source: The disease indeed made its first epidemic appearance in Europe following Columbus 's first voyage , when camp followers spread it among the soldiers of King Charles Vlll during the French monarch 's 1494 campaign to seize the kingdom of Naples . Several tracts of the period discuss the outbreak and indicate that until then the morbus gallicus ( French disease ) had been unknown in Europe . Many scholars hold that it was spread among women infected by Spanish soldiers who had sailed with Columbus to the New World and contracted it there . Whether or not the affliction had existed in Europe before , its first virulent manifestations did date from the Neapolitan campaign .
domestication: 这病确实是在哥伦布首次航行后，在欧洲首次大规模爆发的。1494年，法国国王查理八世出兵占领那不勒斯王国时，随军人员将此病传染给了士兵。当时的许多文献都提到了这次疫情，并指出此前这种“法国病”在欧洲闻所未闻。许多学者认为，是那些随哥伦布远航新大陆的西班牙士兵把病带回了欧洲，传给了当地的妇女。不管这病以前是否在欧洲存在过，但它的第一次大规模暴发确实是从那不勒斯战役开始的。
foreignization: 这种疾病确实在哥伦布第一次航行后首次在欧洲流行，当时随军人员在法国国王查理八世1494年征战那不勒斯王国时将其传播给士兵们。该时期的几份文献讨论了这次疫情，并指出直到那时，morbus gallicus（法国病）在欧洲尚不为人知。许多学者认为，这种疾病是在与哥伦布一同前往新世界的西班牙士兵感染后，再由这些士兵传染给妇女而扩散的。无论这种疾病之前是否存在于欧洲，其首次剧烈的表现确实可以追溯到那不勒斯战役。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The disease indeed made its first epidemic appearance in Europe following Columbus 's first voyage , when camp followers spread it among the soldiers of King Charles Vlll during the French monarch 's 1494 campaign to seize the kingdom of Naples . Several tracts of the period discuss the outbreak and indicate that until then the morbus gallicus ( French disease ) had been unknown in Europe . Many scholars hold that it was spread among women infected by Spanish soldiers who had sailed with Columbus to the New World and contracted it there . Whether or not the affliction had existed in Europe before , its first virulent manifestations did date from the Neapolitan campaign .

source: The key difference with Value Voting is that is allows allies to share anonymized voter data ; includes elections results and turnout predictions so that users know their potential influence over a politician ( voters/turnout needed to win ) ; and its helps users influence ' down ballot ' races -- State Senate , State House , and Board of Education .

source: A new study has identified a novel molecular driver of lethal prostate cancer , along with a molecule that could be used to attack it . The findings were made in laboratory mice . If confirmed in humans , they could lead to more effective ways to control certain aggressive types of prostate cancer , the second-leading cause of cancer death for men in the U.S.
domestication: 一项新研究发现了一个导致致命前列腺癌的新分子驱动因素，以及一种可能用于攻击该驱动因素的分子。这些发现是在实验小鼠身上得出的。如果在人体中得到证实，将可能为控制某些侵袭性前列腺癌提供更有效的手段。前列腺癌是美国男性癌症死亡的第二大原因。

source: Of the 16 cars from Ralph Lauren 's collection exhibited in Boston , 14 of them are cared for ( and 7 of those were restored ) by Paul Russell and Company . Russell specializes in handbuilt prewar cars ( not that war -- World War II ) and cars of the ' 50s , machines of great beauty and/or historic importance . He runs one of those increasingly rare establishments where meticulous craftsmanship and art intersect to produce something unique .
domestication: 拉尔夫·劳伦收藏的16辆汽车在波士顿展出，其中有14辆是由保罗·拉塞尔和他的公司打理的，这14辆车中有7辆还经过了他们的修复。拉塞尔专长于手工打造的战前车辆（不是那个战争，是二战）和50年代的车型，这些车要么美得惊人，要么历史意义非凡。他经营的这种地方越来越少见了，在这里，精细的手工艺和艺术交汇，造就了独一无二的作品。

source: Forty years before fax machines became ubiquitous , the St. Louis Post-Dispatch sent out 15 copies of its nine-page-long " radio edition " to a test group . A printer hooked up to an RCA radio transcribed articles onto a rolled sheet of paper . During the 1940s the New York Times , the Sacramento Bee , the Chicago Tribune and the Miami Herald all faxed abridged daily editions of their paper to radio listeners . Why bother ? You could get the latest news without being tied to the living room and your Philco .

source: " Jurgen Klopp implemented a surprise tactical shift over the summer , moving from his tried-and-trusted 4-2-3-1 into a new-look 4-3-3 shape , and that has continued into the 2016/17 campaign , " Lusby said . source: Scarlet Widow created profiles on mainstream dating sites and apps , allegedly beginning in 2015 . It also trawled specialized networks whose users might be particularly lonely or vulnerable , including sites for divorcees , people with disabilities , and farmers in rural areas . Its fake members stressed the importance of trusting and supporting a partner , discouraging their targets from asking questions . They were American , but they lived in far-flung locations like France or Afghanistan where they could justify not making phone calls or meeting in person . And they were immediately affectionate , talking about their " passionate love " and asking about their " inner being . "
domestication: 猩红寡妇从2015年起就开始在主流的交友网站和应用上创建个人资料。她们还活跃在一些特殊群体的网络中，这些群体的成员往往更为孤独或脆弱，比如离异人士、残障人士以及农村地区的农民。这些假账号强调信任和支持伴侣的重要性，让目标对象不敢多问。她们自称是美国人，但住在法国或阿富汗等遥远的地方，以此来解释为什么不能打电话或见面。她们一上来就表现出浓情蜜意，谈论“热烈的爱”，询问对方的“内心世界”。
foreignization: Scarlet Widow 在主流约会网站和应用程序上创建了个人资料，据称从2015年开始。它还搜寻了一些专门网络的用户，这些用户可能特别孤独或脆弱，包括离婚者、残障人士以及农村地区农民的网站。其虚假成员强调了信任和支持伴侣的重要性，阻止目标提出质疑。他们是美国人，但住在法国或阿富汗等遥远的地方，这样他们可以合理解释为何不能打电话或亲自见面。而且他们立即表现出亲密感，谈论他们的“热烈的爱情”并询问对方的“内在自我”。

source: Remember Duhamel back in 2004 ? No ? Well , we 're willing to bet that your wife or girlfriend probably does : As the eponymous lust object in the beefcake chick flick Win a Date with Tad Hamilton ! Duhamel grinned his way into the spotlight , chopping wood sans shirt and outshining his romantic foil , Topher Grace -- the putative everyman .

source: I do n't suggest this lightly : I experienced firsthand the personal toll of the Senate refusing to vote on my nomination to head the Department of Justice 's Office of Legal Counsel in 2009 and 2010 . One Republican senator sought to reassure me that it was n't personal ; it was politics , how the game was played : " You do it to us ; we do it to you . " My husband , two sons , and I spent more than a year in confirmation limbo , in a rented house far from home , awaiting a Senate vote repeatedly predicted for next week , next month -- but that never came .
domestication: 我可不是随便说说的：2009年到2010年间，我亲身经历了参议院拒绝就我出任司法部法律咨询办公室主任的提名进行投票，那段时间给我个人带来了不小的打击。有位共和党参议员想安慰我，说这不是针对个人，只是政治游戏的一部分：“你对我们这样，我们也会对你这样。”我和我的丈夫、两个儿子，在远离家乡的出租房里，度过了整整一年多的煎熬期，眼巴巴地等着参议院的投票，他们总是说“下个星期”、“下个月”就会投票，但始终没有等到那一天。
foreignization: 我不轻易提出这个建议：我在2009年和2010年亲身经历了参议院拒绝就我担任司法部法律顾问办公室主任的提名进行投票所造成的个人损失。一位共和党参议员试图安慰我说，这并不是针对我个人；这是政治，是游戏规则：“你对我们这样做，我们也对你这样做。”我和我的丈夫、两个儿子在远离家乡的租屋里度过了超过一年的确认等待期，参议院投票被一再推迟，周复一周、月复一月地预测“下周”、“下个月”——但投票从未到来。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" My husband , two sons , and I spent more than a year in confirmation limbo , in a rented house far from home , awaiting a Senate vote repeatedly predicted for next week , next month -- but that never came .

One Republican senator sought to reassure me that it was n't personal ; it was politics , how the game was played : " You do it to us ; we do it to you . " My husband , two sons , and I spent more than a year in confirmation limbo , in a rented house far from home , awaiting a Senate vote repeatedly predicted for next week , next month -- but that never came .
我不轻易提出这个建议：我在2009年和2010年亲身经历了参议院拒绝就我担任司法部法律顾问办公室主任的提名进行投票所造成的个人损失。一位共和党参议员试图安慰我说，这并不是针对我个人；这是政治，是游戏规则：“你对我们这样做，我们也对你这样做。”我和我的丈夫、两个儿子在远离家乡的租屋里度过了超过一年的确认等待期，参议院投票被一再推迟，周复一周、月复一月地预测“下周”、“下个月”——但投票从未到来。

source: Obama 's presidency is nearly three years old . It has been nearly four years since the furor over Reverend Jeremiah Wright . During this period , Obama has been reviled by conservatives to a degree matched only by the venom directed at Franklin Roosevelt and , later , Bill Clinton . But the vituperation , distortions , and outright lies have been mostly about policies , alleged policies , conspiracy theories , and ludicrous fantasies .

source: A report from cybersecurity company Agari claims to expose one corner of the multimillion-dollar romance scam industry : a Nigerian fraud ring it dubs Scarlet Widow . As with other romance scams , members of Scarlet Widow created numerous fake personas to bait lonely men and women into online relationships . The Agari report , not coincidentally published on Valentine 's Day , offers examples of how they hooked victims in one of the most common forms of online scams .
domestication: 网络安全公司Agari的一份报告揭露了价值数百万美元的网络恋情诈骗行业的一角：一个被他们称为“猩红寡妇”的尼日利亚诈骗团伙。和其它恋情诈骗一样，“猩红寡妇”成员们创建了多个虚假身份，诱骗孤独的男女在网上建立恋爱关系。这份报告选在情人节发布，确实不是巧合，里面举了不少例子，展示了他们如何用这种常见的网络骗局套住受害者。
foreignization: 网络安全公司Agari的一份报告声称揭露了价值数百万美元的浪漫诈骗行业的一个角落：一个它称为Scarlet Widow的尼日利亚欺诈团伙。与其它浪漫诈骗一样，Scarlet Widow的成员创建了多个虚假身份，诱骗孤独的男女建立在线关系。Agari的这份报告恰巧在情人节发布，提供了他们如何在最常见的一种网络诈骗中诱骗受害者的例子。

source: Coronary artery bypass ( CABG ) surgery is the standard treatment for revascularization in patients with left main coronary artery ( LMCA ) disease , but use of percutaneous coronary intervention ( PCI ) for this indication is increasing . Findings from the Nordic-Baltic-British Left Main Revascularization Study ( NOBLE ) trial found that despite similar mortality , the five-year risk of major adverse events was higher after PCI compared to CABG for the treatment of unprotected LMCA disease .
domestication: 冠状动脉旁路移植手术（CABG）是治疗左主干冠状动脉疾病的标准方法，但近年来经皮冠状动脉介入治疗（PCI）的使用也在逐渐增加。北欧-波罗的海-英国左主干血运重建研究（NOBLE）的结果显示，尽管两种治疗方法的死亡率相似，但在治疗非保护性左主干冠状动脉疾病时，PCI在五年内的重大不良事件风险要比CABG高。

source: Marc Okkonen 's Baseball Uniforms of the 20th Century ( Sterling . $30 ) will be to the diamond 's fashionmongers what Bill James 's books are to its nerds : the bible . Year-by-year spreads of home and away uniforms are prefaced by the sartorial histories of individual clubs . Suspicions confirmed : frequent and radical redesign ( e.g. , the Chicago White Sox ) is characteristic of chronically bad teams ; and baseball 's front-office troglodytism is probably caused by overexposure to double knits .
domestication: 马克·奥克森的《20世纪棒球服》（斯特林出版社，30美元）对那些追逐棒球时尚的人来说，就像比尔·詹姆斯的书对棒球迷一样：是本圣经。书中按年份展示了主客场队服，每个俱乐部的服装历史也在前面做了介绍。结果证实了大家的猜测：经常大幅改版的球队，比如芝加哥白袜队，往往成绩不佳；而棒球界管理层的保守，可能是因为他们穿双面针织衫穿多了。
foreignization: Marc Okkonen 的《20世纪棒球制服》（Sterling. 30美元）对于棒球场上的时尚追求者来说，就像 Bill James 的书对于棒球场上的书呆子一样：是圣经。逐年展示了主场和客场的制服，并由各支球队的服装历史作为前言。疑虑得到证实：经常性和激进的重新设计（例如，芝加哥白袜队）是长期表现不佳球队的特征；而棒球界管理层的保守可能是由于过度接触双面针织布。

source: In most cases , gravity and ram pressure act simultaneously , so it 's next to impossible to determine which is more important in altering a particular galaxy 's shape . But the gas in C153 is moving independently of the galaxy 's stars , a disconnect that would appear only when ram pressure dominates . " This is a benchmark case of ram pressure acting almost solo , " says Keel .

source: A. Most likely . As Cosmo recently reported , a Brazilian Blowout straightens hair but might expose you to carcinogenic formaldehyde . Most DIY products , however , use keratin , a safe protein . Check the ingredients to be sure yours is free of formaldehyde as well as methylene glycol , which emits toxic fumes during heat-styling , says Ron Robinson , a cosmetic chemist . Try Organix Brazilian Keratin 30 Day Smoothing Treatment , $15 .
domestication: 很可能。就像《时尚芭莎》最近报道的那样，巴西柔顺护理确实能让头发变直，但可能会让你接触到致癌物甲醛。不过，大多数自己动手做的产品都使用了角蛋白，这是一种安全的蛋白质。确保你的产品既没有甲醛也没有甲基乙二醇，后者在高温造型时会释放有毒气体。化妆品化学家罗恩·罗宾逊如是说。试试Organix的巴西角蛋白30天平滑护理吧，只需15美元。

source: Chitwood , formerly of the Donald Danforth Plant Science Center in St Louis , Missouri , and his colleagues pulled together data from their own work on specific plant groups , such as grape and tomato plants , as well as several large data sets from projects that aimed to catalogue a wider swath of plant species and locations .

source: The back story : A glass of wine as an expression of patriotic pride ? It might seem like a stretch , but that 's the concept behind Purple Heart , a new label from California-based C. Mondavi & Family winemakers . The idea was borne from the company 's longtime support of military charities , which itself stemmed from the fact that company patriarch , the late Peter Mondavi , Sr. , was a World War II veteran . " We were looking for a way to take our support to the next level , " says Paul Englert , a Mondavi vice president . The result : C. Mondavi partnered with the Purple Heart Foundation , which funds a variety of veterans programs , on creating a Purple Heart-themed wine , tying the vino to one of the nation 's highest military honors . C. Mondavi will contribute $10,000 to $50,000 annually to the foundation , depending on the wine 's sales .
domestication: 背后的故事：一杯酒能表达爱国之情吗？这听起来有些不可思议，但加州的C. Mondavi & Family酒庄却推出了一个新品牌——紫心，其理念正是如此。这一想法源于公司长期支持军人慈善事业，而这又是因为公司的创始人彼得·蒙达维老先生是二战退伍军人。“我们一直在寻找将我们的支持提升到更高层次的方式，”蒙达维的副总裁保罗·恩格尔特说。最终，C. Mondavi与紫心基金会合作，推出了一款以紫心勋章为主题的葡萄酒，将这瓶佳酿与国家最高的军事荣誉联系起来。根据葡萄酒的销售情况，C. Mondavi每年将向基金会捐赠1万到5万美元。
foreignization: 背景故事：一杯酒作为爱国自豪感的表达？这听起来似乎有些牵强，但这就是加州C. Mondavi & Family酿酒商新品牌Purple Heart背后的概念。这一想法源于公司长期支持军事慈善机构，而这一传统本身则源自公司创始人、已故的Peter Mondavi Sr. 是一位二战退伍军人。“我们一直在寻找一种方式将我们的支持提升到新的层次，”Mondavi的一位副总裁Paul Englert说。结果：C. Mondavi与Purple Heart基金会合作，该基金会资助各种退伍军人项目，共同创建了一款以Purple Heart为主题的葡萄酒，将这款酒与国家最高军事荣誉之一联系起来。C. Mondavi将根据葡萄酒的销售情况，每年向基金会捐款1万至5万美元。

source: I still believe in real estate as a long-term purchase . Not as a short-term money maker . Hopefully you continue to build equity and you can move up into a second home . source: To soothe a dry cough : Add two drops each of the essential oils of frankincense , lavender , and cypress to a bowl of steaming water . Lean over the bowl , cover your head with a towel , and inhale the heading aroma for 5 to 10 minutes . Be careful not to lean into the water to avoid getting burned .
domestication: 要缓解干咳，可以在一盆热水里加两滴乳香、两滴薰衣草和两滴柏树精油。然后俯身靠近盆子，用毛巾盖住头部，深呼吸这些蒸汽的香气，持续5到10分钟。小心别靠得太近，以免烫伤。

source: The SuperSix 's smooth , understated power is the result of Cannondale 's careful rider-focused design . Although the 2012 women 's model shares DNA with the frame ridden to multiple victories by Team Liquigas/Cannondale , the company insists that this version is no clone . True to its gender-specific philosophy , Cannondale 's intention ­ is to offer women " a unique geometry and thoughtful component choices , " says women 's product manager Lyriel Jordan .
domestication: SuperSix 的动力平滑而内敛，这得益于 Cannondale 精心以骑行者为中心的设计。虽然 2012 年的女性版与 Team Liquigas/Cannondale 多次夺冠的车架共享了许多设计元素，但公司坚持说这款车型绝非简单复制。Cannondale 一直秉持性别特定的设计理念，女性产品经理 Lyriel Jordan 表示，她们的目标是为女性提供“独特的几何结构和精心挑选的配件”。
foreignization: SuperSix 的平稳、内敛的动力是 Cannondale 精心以骑手为中心的设计的结果。虽然 2012 年女性款与 Team Liquigas/Cannondale 多次获胜所使用的车架共享 DNA，但公司坚持认为这个版本不是克隆品。忠于其性别特定的哲学，Cannondale 的意图是为女性提供“独特的几何形状和周到的部件选择，”女性产品经理 Lyriel Jordan 说。

source: How a warmer world will affect food production is one of the most complicated -- and important -- questions in the debate over warming . Skeptics argue that a worldwide greenhouse will be as beneficial to crops as an artificial greenhouse . In a warmer world , for one thing , growing seasons will be longer . In the northern temperate region , they are already eight days longer than just 11 years ago . And in a world richer in carbon dioxide ( which plants breathe ' in ) , crops should grow larger faster . The IPCC optimistically notes that , on the whole , global agricultural production could be maintained if carbon dioxide levels in the atmosphere doubled , but regional effects would vary widely . '
domestication: 全球变暖对粮食生产的影响是气候变化辩论中最复杂也是最重要的问题之一。有人认为，全球变暖就像温室效应一样，对农作物有好处。毕竟，在一个更温暖的世界里，生长期会更长。比如在北温带地区，与11年前相比，现在的生长期已经延长了八天。此外，大气中二氧化碳含量增加（植物“呼吸”需要的气体），也会让作物长得更快更大。联合国政府间气候变化专门委员会（IPCC）乐观地指出，如果大气中的二氧化碳浓度翻倍，总体上全球农业产量可以维持不变，但各地区的受影响程度会有很大差异。
foreignization: 一个更温暖的世界将如何影响粮食生产是气候变化辩论中最复杂——也是最重要——的问题之一。怀疑论者认为，全球温室效应将像人造温室一样对农作物有益。在一个更温暖的世界里，一方面，生长季节将会更长。在北温带地区，与仅仅11年前相比，生长季节已经延长了八天。在一个二氧化碳（植物“吸入”的气体）更加丰富的世界里，农作物应该会更快地长得更大。IPCC乐观地指出，总体而言，如果大气中的二氧化碳浓度翻倍，全球农业产量是可以维持的，但区域影响将大不相同。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

How a warmer world will affect food production is one of the most complicated -- and important -- questions in the debate over warming . Skeptics argue that a worldwide greenhouse will be as beneficial to crops as an artificial greenhouse . In a warmer world , for one thing , growing seasons will be longer . In the northern temperate region , they are already eight days longer than just 11 years ago . And in a world richer in carbon dioxide ( which plants breathe ' in ) , crops should grow larger faster . The IPCC optimistically notes that , on the whole , global agricultural production could be maintained if carbon dioxide levels in the atmosphere doubled , but regional effects would vary widely . '

source: Fortunately , there 's a straightforward way of reforming the student-loan system that will make it more efficient , more accessible , and less punitive to those who want to chase their ideals before jumping on the fast track . And Bill Clinton knows all about it . But trouble looms . The interests with a stake in keeping the current system are circling , and Clinton 's simple idea for fixing the loan program is bound up with his entirely admirable -- but infinitely more complicated -- plan for a sweeping national service scheme . There 's a simpler way to fix the problem , whether national service ever comes to pass or not .

source: While Reyn Spooner 's fabrics are made in the Far East , McCullough continues to make his shirts in Hawaii , at a 29,000-square-foot factory near downtown Honolulu , which employs almost 100 seamstresses . Why not lower costs by moving production offshore ? For one thing , he believes an authentic aloha shirt ought to be made in Hawaii . Moreover , he adds , My goals are the same as my father 's . Our business is n't about cheap . It 's about quality . '
domestication: 虽然雷恩·斯波纳的布料是在远东生产的，但麦卡洛坚持在他的夏威夷工厂制作衬衫。这个位于檀香山市中心附近的工厂占地29,000平方英尺，雇用了近100名缝纫女工。为什么不把生产转移到海外降低成本呢？首先，他认为真正的阿罗哈衫应该在夏威夷制作。再说，他的目标和他父亲的一样，他们的生意不图便宜，只求质量。

While Reyn Spooner 's fabrics are made in the Far East , McCullough continues to make his shirts in Hawaii , at a 29,000-square-foot factory near downtown Honolulu , which employs almost 100 seamstresses . Why not lower costs by moving production offshore ? For one thing , he believes an authentic aloha shirt ought to be made in Hawaii . Moreover , he adds , My goals are the same as my father 's . Our business is n't about cheap . It 's about quality . '

source: Agari says it 's identified at least three people associated with Scarlet Widow . It does n't say how many people they targeted , nor how much money they stole . source: While giving scientists a feel for the tiniest of worlds , the magic wrist could also enable them to manipulate objects formerly out of reach . The angstrom- and nanometer-scale features of atoms and molecules place them beyond the grasp of the human hand ; trying to move an atom with your finger would be even harder than prodding an ant with the Washington Monument . But with the ability to steer an STM tip precisely via the magic wrist , Hollis envisions manually controlling chemical reactions by deliberately orienting specific atoms and molecules .
domestication: 这神奇的手腕不仅让科学家们感受到了微观世界的奇妙，还能让他们操控那些原本遥不可及的物体。原子和分子的埃级和纳米级特性超出了人手的控制范围；用手指移动一个原子，比用华盛顿纪念碑去触碰一只蚂蚁还要难。但是，借助神奇手腕精确操控扫描隧道显微镜尖端的能力，霍利斯设想可以通过手动定向特定的原子和分子来人为控制化学反应。

source: A seeming link between innovation and the liberal arts now intrigues countries where broad-based education is less prevalent . In most of the world , university curricula still emphasize learning skills oriented toward a specific profession or trade . The ebullience of the U.S. economy , which boasted in 2014 the highest percentage of high-tech outfits among all its public companies -- has spurred countries such as Singapore to create schools fashioned after the U.S. liberal arts model .
domestication: 创新与文科教育之间看似存在的联系，让那些不太普及通识教育的国家产生了浓厚的兴趣。在世界上大多数地方，大学课程仍然侧重于培养特定职业或行业的技能。美国经济的活力，特别是在2014年，其上市公司中高科技企业的比例最高，这促使像新加坡这样的国家效仿美国的文科教育模式，创办新学校。

source: The numbers numb . The General Accounting Office , an investigative wing of the U.S. Congress , estimates that 1.5 million American women have breast cancer right now and do n't know it yet . Nearly one-half of them , about 750,000 , will certainly die of the disease . This year alone , 180,000 will learn they have breast cancer , and another 46,000 who already know will die as a result .

source: There 's another cheer at that , of course . That 's what this trip is all about , and it 's worth everything it cost . At the top of the sun there 's a spot of ruby-laser light , where one immense red prominence ten times the size of the earth has leaped out and coiled back on itself to fall back to the sun 's surface . A bit later another bright prominence shows up at the bottom of the sun 's disc-fortunate places for them to be , because if they 'd been on the sides of the sun ( that is to say , actually its north or south poles , bearing in mind our right-angle view from the earth 's surface ) they would have been hidden by the enlarged lunar disc and we might have seen no prominences at all .
domestication: 当然，又是一阵欢呼。这正是此行的目的，值回票价了。太阳顶端有一束红宝石激光般的光点，那里有一个巨大的红色耀斑，比地球大十倍，腾空跃起后又盘旋回落到太阳表面。稍后，太阳底部又出现了一个明亮的耀斑，真是幸运。它们出现在这里再好不过了，要是出现在太阳两侧（也就是实际上的南北极，因为我们是从地球表面看到的直角视角），就会被放大的月球遮住，我们可能连一个耀斑都看不见。
foreignization: 当然，这又引起了一阵欢呼。这正是此行的目的，这一切都物超所值。在太阳顶部，有一个红宝石激光光点，那里有一个巨大的红色日珥，其大小是地球的十倍，跃出并缠绕回自身，落回到太阳表面。稍后，在太阳圆盘底部又出现了一个明亮的日珥——它们出现在这些地方真是幸运，因为如果它们出现在太阳的侧面（也就是说，实际上是在太阳的北极或南极，考虑到我们从地球表面看到的直角视角），它们就会被扩大的月球圆盘遮挡，我们可能根本看不到任何日珥。

source: Software companies confront the problem of digital preservation every day as they update their code , making sure it works with the latest hardware and operating systems , while at the same time ensuring that customers can access old files for a reasonable amount of time . But without some sort of digital resuscitation , every application-from the original binary codes written in the 1940s to WordPerfect to the latest million-dollar database application-eventually stops working , and every data file eventually becomes unreadable . Every application andeveryfile .
domestication: 软件公司每天都面临着数字保存的问题，更新代码时要确保新代码能兼容最新的硬件和操作系统，同时还要保证客户在一段时间内能够访问旧文件。可是，如果不进行某种形式的“数字复活”，从20世纪40年代写的原始二进制代码到WordPerfect，再到最新的百万美元数据库应用，每个应用程序最终都会停止工作，每个数据文件最终都会变得无法读取。无一例外。

source: There 's also a vestige of a curtain in the elongated brown triangle and rectangle along the picture 's right edge . Derived from the folds of the studio 's window drapery , these shapes define the picture plane , giving a visual cue to the illusion of shallow space in the painting . Thus Matisse 's studio , too , can be viewed as a stage on which the drama of artistic creation has been momentarily interrupted . Still holding her pose , the odalisque on the bed seems to be awaiting the artist 's imminent return .
domestication: 画面右边缘那拉长的棕色三角形和矩形里还能看到窗帘的痕迹。这些形状源于画室窗户的褶皱窗帘，它们定义了画面平面，给观者一种浅空间的视觉错觉。所以马蒂斯的画室也像一个舞台，艺术创作的戏剧暂时中断了。床上的宫女依然保持着姿势，似乎在等待艺术家即将归来。

source: The landscape of an individual 's personality has much in common with one of those 19th-century impressionist paintings made up of thousands of colored dots . From across the room , an art lover gazing at such a framed creation sees sunbathers lolling by a lake , or perhaps a circus scene . Personality features pondered from a suitable distance also seem to coalesce into familiar forms . For example , a coworker comes across as friendly and fun loving , while an office supervisor always seems grouchy and distracted .
domestication: 一个人的性格就像一幅19世纪的印象派画作，由成千上万的彩色点组成。从远处看，艺术爱好者能看到画框里的阳光浴者懒洋洋地躺在湖边，或者是一幅马戏团的场景。性格特点也是如此，站在一定距离去观察，这些特点也会聚集成我们熟悉的样子。比如，同事显得友好又爱玩，而办公室的主管则总是看起来脾气暴躁、心不在焉。

source: Two-thousand-dollar bikes fill an important need : justifying a bike purchase to a spouse . ( " Sure , it was expensive , but it could have been $8,000 .... " ) To meet demand , manufacturers are packing more value into bikes at that price point than at any time in recent memory . Giant 's TCR Composite , one of the best performance-driven , value-oriented road bikes we 've tested to date , is a prime example .

source: Esther 's decline and death were the fault of many : Dr. Laureano , for gross neglect of a patient who believed in him ; the medical community , for caring less about women 's health than about men 's ; the media , for sharing in that twisted priority ; my father , for not pushing her harder when he knew of her lump ; me , for not prodding her with my usual reporter 's skepticism about authority .
domestication: 埃丝特的病情恶化和去世，错在很多人：劳雷诺医生，对一位信任他的病人大意失责；医疗界，对女性健康不如男性健康那么上心；媒体，助纣为虐，跟着搞偏了重点；我父亲，明明知道她有肿块，却没有更强烈地催促她去检查；还有我，没有用记者那种质疑权威的态度去催她。
foreignization: 埃斯特的衰落和死亡是许多人的过错：劳雷亚诺博士，因为他对一个信任他的病人严重疏忽；医疗界，因为他们更关心男性健康而非女性健康；媒体，因为分享了这种扭曲的优先级；我的父亲，因为在知道她有肿块时没有更加督促她；我，因为没有用我通常对权威的记者式的怀疑来敦促她。

source: For Long Island , New York , artist Jeff Webb , pastel was an inadvertent discovery . Years ago , while studying with painter Henry Hensche in Provincetown , Massachusetts , Webb ran out of funds . A fellow artist suggested he do portraits on the street to earn money , but to do this , he needed to get a permit from the town . Webb approached the local powers-that-be , where he was asked , for some reason , if he worked in pastels . Webb did n't know why he had been asked this question , but without hesitation he answered affirmatively , hurried off to buy a box of pastels , and began practicing doing portraits of as many people as he could find to sit still . Soon , he was given a spot on the street and started making money . But it was n't until he began studying the translucent work of another street artist that he realized pastel 's potential . " All of a sudden , pastels became very alive for me , " he recalls .
domestication: 对于纽约长岛的艺术家杰夫·韦伯来说，粉彩画的发现纯属偶然。几年前，他在马萨诸塞州的普罗温斯敦跟画家亨利·亨施学艺时，钱花光了。一位艺术家朋友建议他上街给人画像赚钱，但得先从镇上拿到许可。韦伯去找了当地的官员，不知为何被问到是否用粉彩作画。虽然韦伯不知道为什么会问这个问题，但他毫不犹豫地点头答应，随后赶紧买了一盒粉彩，开始练习给愿意坐下来的人画像。没多久，他就获得了街头摆摊的资格，开始赚到钱。直到他开始研究另一位街头艺术家那半透明般的作品，才真正意识到粉彩的魅力。“突然间，粉彩变得生动起来。”他回忆道。
foreignization: 对于纽约长岛的艺术家杰夫·韦伯来说，粉彩是一个意外的发现。多年前，在马萨诸塞州普罗vincetown与画家亨利·亨舍学习时，韦伯资金耗尽。一位艺术家建议他在街上画肖像以赚取一些钱，但为此，他需要从镇上获得许可。韦伯找到了当地的权威人士，在那里他被问到一个奇怪的问题，即他是否使用粉彩工作。韦伯不知道为什么会被问到这个问题，但他毫不犹豫地回答了肯定，并急忙去买了一盒粉彩，开始练习为尽可能多的人画像。不久，他得到了一个街头的位置，开始赚钱。但直到他开始研究另一位街头艺术家的半透明作品，他才意识到粉彩的潜力。“突然间，粉彩对我来说变得非常生动，”他回忆说。

source: The show 's appeal , says Jake Tanner , 34 , a Millionaire fan from San Francisco , also stems from the speed of winning . " It 's the money , but I think it 's also the immediacy of it all , " he says . " You call that number , and from the minute you qualify , you air within one week . What are the chances of your life changing that much , that quick ? "

source: In the game of thrones , you compromise or you die . However , that does n't seem to be happening with Sansa Stark and Daenerys Targaryen in the season eight premiere of Game of Thrones . The two are clearly on opposite sides of a big ideological divide , and it might be hard for them to find common ground . Is this clever character work , or bad writing ? io9 's Beth Elderkin and James Whitbrook chat about the biggest battle in the season eight premiere , " Winterfell , " and how to resolve it .
domestication: 在《权力的游戏》里，不是妥协就是死。但第八季第一集中，珊莎·史塔克和丹妮莉丝·坦格利安似乎谁也不肯让步。两人在理念上分道扬镳，想要找到共同点恐怕难上加难。这到底是编剧的高明之举，还是败笔呢？io9的贝丝·埃尔德金和詹姆斯·惠特布鲁克聊了聊这场“临冬城”的大战，以及如何化解这场冲突。

source: I have a friend of many years who began gardening at the age of three . He was given by his grandmother a single rhizome of bearded iris . It was a pet iris , really , which he delighted in moving around the garden on an almost daily basis . Finally it came to rest in a tunnel of an overgrown privet hedge , a secret hiding place just big enough for him and for his companionable iris .

source: This is true at the national level , too . Except for a brief moment after Watergate , investigative reporting has never been especially fashionable in Washington . But it has reached a low ebb today . Talk is cheap and reporting is expensive , which means that cable networks , blogs , and even newspapers are moving away from working the streets to working the TV studios . Even experienced reporters often find big chunks of their days consumed by tweeting and trying to get on television . It 's awfully hard to break a scandal that way .
domestication: 这话放在国家层面上也是一样的。除了水门事件后的一段短暂时间，调查性报道在华盛顿从来都不怎么流行。但如今，它已经跌到了谷底。空谈便宜，报道却很费钱，这意味着有线电视网、博客，甚至报纸都在从街头报道转向电视演播室。即使是经验丰富的记者，现在一天中的大块时间也常常被发推特和争取上电视占据。这么一来，想挖出个丑闻可就难上加难了。

source: The shopping cart announcement is the first introduction of vehicles to Fortnite , which has grown to earn nearly $300 million in the month of April , The Verge reports . source: PHOTO ( COLOR ) : RAMMED GALAXY -- Composite view of the galaxy NGC 4522 , located in the nearby Virgo cluster of galaxies . Contours are radiowave emissions , whish trace the galaxy 's atomic hydrogen gas , while the shaded region depicts visible light from the galaxy 's disk of stars . The gas has been pushed to the right , whereas the galaxy 's stars are undisturbed . Scientists say that this discrepancy indicates that ram pressure is transforming tile galaxy .
domestication: 照片（彩色）：撞击星系——这张合成图展示了位于附近室女座星系团中的NGC 4522星系。等高线代表了无线电波发射，追踪着星系的原子氢气，而阴影区域则显示了来自星系恒星盘的可见光。气体被推到了右边，而星系里的星星却纹丝不动。科学家们说，这种差异表明，冲击压力正在改变这个星系。

source: Alphabet subsidiary Waymo on Friday asked the judge in its case against Uber to bar Anthony Levandowski , head of Uber 's self-driving car research , from further participating in that project . Waymo claims that new evidence shows conclusively that Uber " used Waymo 's intellectual property to develop LiDAR devices for self-driving cars , " and that it engaged in a " cover-up " during the case , concealing documents and resisting court orders .
domestication: 谷歌母公司Alphabet旗下的Waymo周五要求法官在对Uber的诉讼中禁止安东尼·莱万多夫斯基，即Uber自动驾驶汽车研究项目的负责人，继续参与该项目。Waymo声称有新的证据明确显示，Uber“使用了Waymo的知识产权来开发自动驾驶汽车的激光雷达设备”，并且在整个案件过程中一直在“掩盖事实”，隐瞒文件，抗拒法院命令。

source: Gannon writes that he would be " dismayed if my dean sent this letter to my incoming students . Because now they 'll come into my class already having received a clear message about what my institution seems to value -- and it is n't them . " But that both ignores the myriad different ways incoming students will receive the letter and begs the question about the merits of the University of Chicago 's ethos . Those who believe in the propositions set forth in the letter naturally believe that promulgating a maximalist approach to free inquiry , in the clearest terms , is exactly what is required from those who value incoming students . Critics who ignore that wrinkle in the debate are failing an ideological Turing test .
domestication: 甘农写道，如果院长给即将入学的学生发这封信，他会感到“失望”。因为这样一来，学生在进课堂前就已经收到了一个明确的信息，那就是学校看重的是什么——而这并不是他们自己。不过，这忽略了一个事实，即新生会以各种方式接收到这封信，也回避了关于芝加哥大学理念的讨论。那些认同信中观点的人自然认为，用最清晰的语言推广最大限度的自由探究精神，正是重视新生所需要的。批评者若忽视了这一辩论中的细节，就等于没通过意识形态的图灵测试。
foreignization: 甘农写道，如果他的院长将这封信寄给即将入学的学生，他会感到“失望。因为现在他们会带着一个关于我的机构似乎重视什么的明确信息进入我的课堂——而这个信息并不是他们。” 但这既忽略了新生将以多种不同的方式接收此信的事实，也引发了关于芝加哥大学理念的优点的问题。那些相信信中所阐述主张的人自然认为，以最清晰的方式推行最大化的自由探究方法，正是那些重视新生的人所需要的。忽视辩论中这一细微差别的批评者未能通过意识形态图灵测试。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Gannon writes that he would be " dismayed if my dean sent this letter to my incoming students . Because now they 'll come into my class already having received a clear message about what my institution seems to value -- and it is n't them . " But that both ignores the myriad different ways incoming students will receive the letter and begs the question about the merits of the University of Chicago 's ethos . Those who believe in the propositions set forth in the letter naturally believe that promulgating a maximalist approach to free inquiry , in the clearest terms , is exactly what is required from those who value incoming students . Critics who ignore that wrinkle in the debate are failing an ideological Turing test .

source: America 's foremost expert on herbs and plant-derived medicine . He is deam emeritus of the Purdue University School of Pharmacy and Pharmacal Sciences in West Lafayette , IN , and distinguished professor emeritus of pharmacognosy . He is also the author of more than 300 scientific articles and 18 books , including a new edition of Tyler 's honest Herbal , written with herbalist Steven Foster ( Haworth Herbal Press , 1999 ) .
domestication: 美国首屈一指的草药和植物药专家。他是位于西拉斐特的普渡大学药学院和药学科学学院的名誉院长，也是药用植物学的杰出荣誉教授。他著有300多篇科学论文和18本书籍，其中包括与草药师史蒂文·福斯特合著的新版《泰勒的诚实草药》（霍索恩草药出版社，1999年）。

source: I think I 'm in it for the long haul . I 'm optimistic we 'll come out even . If you 're truly able to hang on to it until you 're retired , it is additional income . I think that the advice ( at the height of the bubble ) was that there 's ups and downs in the market but that real estate is a good investment . It 's just so expensive . We had to have help from our parents to buy this time . It 's weird being 40 and getting help from your parents . We did have conversations , do we walk away , do we sell at a tremendous loss ?
domestication: 我觉得这是个长期的事儿。我乐观地认为最终会赚回来的。如果你真能坚持到退休再放手，那这就是额外的收入了。那时候（市场泡沫最严重的时候）的建议是，市场有起有落，但房地产是个不错的投资。就是太贵了。这次买房，我们还得靠父母帮忙。都四十岁的人了，还要父母帮，这事儿听着也挺奇怪的。我们也讨论过，要不要放弃，要不要亏大本卖掉。
foreignization: 我认为我会长期持有。我乐观地认为最终我们会收支平衡。如果你真能持有到退休，这会是一笔额外的收入。我认为那时（在泡沫最高峰时）的建议是市场有起有落，但房地产是一项好的投资。只是太贵了。我们这次买房不得不靠父母的帮助。40岁了还要靠父母帮忙，感觉很奇怪。我们确实讨论过，要不要放弃，要不要以巨大的损失出售。

source: Predictably , economists urge using market forces ( e.g. , the price system ) to reduce the consumption of energy . Higher energy taxes could recoup some of the revenue lost by other items on the energy policy menu . The most direct government action to reduce energy demand is a substantial increase in the excise taxes on gasoline . This would reduce air pollution and carbon dioxide emissions , and hasten the day when new energy sources become commercially feasible . Alternatively . Congress could enact a significant tax on the emissions of CO2 and other greenhouse gases . That would discourage the use of fossil fuels and stimulate the production of sources of electricity .
domestication: 不出所料，经济学家们建议利用市场力量，比如价格机制，来减少能源消费。提高能源税可以弥补能源政策其他方面造成的收入损失。政府最直接的行动就是大幅增加汽油的消费税。这不仅可以减少空气污染和二氧化碳排放，还能加快新型能源成为现实的进程。或者，国会也可以对二氧化碳和其他温室气体的排放征收重税，这样既能抑制化石燃料的使用，又能刺激电力来源的生产。
foreignization: 可以预见的是，经济学家敦促利用市场力量（例如，价格体系）来减少能源消费。更高的能源税可以弥补能源政策菜单上其他项目失去的部分收入。政府最直接的减少能源需求的行动是大幅提高汽油的消费税。这将减少空气污染和二氧化碳排放，并加速新的能源来源变得具有商业可行性的日子的到来。或者，国会可以对二氧化碳和其他温室气体的排放征收显著的税收。这将抑制化石燃料的使用，并刺激电力来源的生产。

This would reduce air pollution and carbon dioxide emissions , and hasten the day when new energy sources become commercially feasible . Alternatively . Congress could enact a significant tax on the emissions of CO2 and other greenhouse gases . That would discourage the use of fossil fuels and stimulate the production of sources of electricity .

source: MY OWN TECHNOLOGY STORY begins as a child , with me hearing music in the air and halhucinating scenes in the cracks of the ceiling in my parents ' bedroom . I knew that seeing visions in plaster separated me from other kids , and I sure did n't want to tell anybody . So when I saw my father take a blank piece of paper , put it into a virtually colorless liquid , and then pull out this image of me at the zoo , it made me believe that my " floating mind " was going to play an important part in my future . In this way , the very concept of photography changed my life .
domestication: 我的科技故事得从小时候说起。那时，我常听到空气中飘来的音乐，看到天花板裂缝里浮现的幻象。我知道自己和别的孩子不一样，这种异想天开的感觉让我害怕说出来。所以，当有一天我看到爸爸把一张白纸放进几乎无色的液体里，再拿出来时，纸上竟然出现了我在动物园的照片，我顿时觉得自己的“漂浮思维”将来一定会大有作为。就这样，摄影这个概念彻底改变了我的人生。
foreignization: 我的技术故事始于童年，当时我能听到空气中传来音乐，并在父母卧室的天花板裂缝中幻视出场景。我知道在灰泥中看到景象让我与众不同，我当然不想告诉任何人。所以当看到父亲将一张空白纸放入几乎无色的液体中，然后拉出一幅我在动物园的图像时，这让我相信我的“漂浮思维”将在我的未来中扮演重要角色。就这样，摄影的概念改变了我的生活。

In this way , the very concept of photography changed my life .

source: During her tenure at the Sundance Institute , she has represented Sundance internationally by serving on juries , speaking on panels and working to cultivate relationships with film commissions , industry figures and artists around the world . For the past five years , Yutani has also overseen a new collaboration with the Berlinale 's European Film Market -- housed within the Sundance Film Festival at EFM program -- which has provided sales opportunities for Sundance films immediately after premiering at the festival .
domestication: 在山丹斯研究所任职期间，她代表山丹斯活跃在国际舞台上，担任评委，参与讨论会，努力与世界各地的电影委员会、行业人士和艺术家们建立联系。过去五年里，她还负责了一个与柏林电影节欧洲电影市场的新合作项目——这个项目在山丹斯电影节期间举办，为刚在电影节首映的电影提供了销售机会。
foreignization: 在她在山丹斯研究所任职期间，她通过担任评审团成员、参加小组讨论和努力培养与世界各地电影委员会、行业人物和艺术家的关系，代表山丹斯进行国际交流。在过去五年中，Yutani还监督了一个与柏林电影节欧洲电影市场的新合作项目——该合作项目纳入了山丹斯电影节在EFM的计划中——这为山丹斯电影节的电影在电影节首映后立即提供了销售机会。

source: One of the remarkable things about presidential elections is the extent to which voters simply believe whatever candidates tell them . It does n't matter if it 's impossible . It does n't matter if the candidate changed his mind about this the day before yesterday . It does n't matter if there 's no plausible policy behind the claim . If Trump says he 's going to build a wall , then he 's going to build a wall . If he says he 's going to renegotiate all our trade treaties , then that 's what he 's going to do . This is not something specific to Trump fans . It 's true of all voters .
domestication: 总统选举中最让人咋舌的一点，就是选民们几乎全盘接受候选人说的每一句话。不管这话多么离谱，不管候选人昨天还在说完全相反的话，也不管这些承诺背后根本没有任何可行的政策支持。特朗普说要建墙，那就是要建墙；他说要重谈所有贸易协定，那他就会去谈。这可不是只有特朗普的支持者才会做的事，所有选民都是这样。
foreignization: 关于总统选举的一个显著特点是，选民们几乎相信候选人告诉他们的任何事情。这不关重要是否这是不可能的。这不关重要如果候选人前天刚刚改变了主意。这不关重要如果这一说法背后没有任何可信的政策支持。如果特朗普说他要建一堵墙，那么他就会建一堵墙。如果他说他将重新谈判我们所有的贸易条约，那么他就会这样做。这不仅仅是特朗普支持者的特有现象。所有选民都是如此。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

One of the remarkable things about presidential elections is the extent to which voters simply believe whatever candidates tell them . It does n't matter if it 's impossible . It does n't matter if the candidate changed his mind about this the day before yesterday . It does n't matter if there 's no plausible policy behind the claim . If Trump says he 's going to build a wall , then he 's going to build a wall . If he says he 's going to renegotiate all our trade treaties , then that 's what he 's going to do . This is not something specific to Trump fans . It 's true of all voters .
总统选举中最让人咋舌的一点，就是选民们几乎全盘接受候选人说的每一句话。不管这话多么离谱，不管候选人昨天还在说完全相反的话，也不管这些承诺背后根本没有任何可行的政策支持。特朗普说要建墙，那就是要建墙；他说要重谈所有贸易协定，那他就会去谈。这可不是只有特朗普的支持者才会做的事，所有选民都是这样。

If Trump says he 's going to build a wall , then he 's going to build a wall . If he says he 's going to renegotiate all our trade treaties , then that 's what he 's going to do . This is not something specific to Trump fans . It 's true of all voters .
关于总统选举的一个显著特点是，选民们几乎相信候选人告诉他们的任何事情。这不关重要是否这是不可能的。这不关重要如果候选人前天刚刚改变了主意。这不关重要如果这一说法背后没有任何可信的政策支持。如果特朗普说他要建一堵墙，那么他就会建一堵墙。如果他说他将重新谈判我们所有的贸易条约，那么他就会这样做。这不仅仅是特朗普支持者的特有现象。所有选民都是如此。

source: Observing electron clouds in bigger molecules might reveal details of atomic bonds that determine molecular structures , Villeneuve says . However , the orbital wave functions in those structures may be so sprawling and complex that perturbing them with a laser may yield emissions so tainted with extraneous information that scientists wo n't be able to make sense of them . Or the laser pulses might fiddle with more than one electron orbital at a time , also muddying the image beyond recognition , says Denmark 's Stapelfeldt .
domestication: 维伦纽夫说，观察大分子中的电子云可能会揭示决定分子结构的原子键的细节。不过，这些结构中的轨道波函数可能非常庞大且复杂，用激光扰动它们时，可能会产生大量杂乱无章的信息，科学家们可能就摸不着头脑了。丹麦的斯塔佩尔费尔特还指出，激光脉冲可能会同时影响多个电子轨道，这样图像就会变得一团糟，根本认不出来。
foreignization: Villeneuve 说，观察大分子中的电子云可能会揭示决定分子结构的原子键的细节。然而，这些结构中的轨道波函数可能如此广泛和复杂，以至于用激光扰动它们可能会产生混杂有大量无关信息的发射，使科学家无法理解。或者激光脉冲可能会同时干扰多个电子轨道，从而使图像模糊到无法辨认，丹麦的 Stapelfeldt 说。

source: Because , you see , I have listed only writers who have gone to that great Bouchercon in the sky . source: Mother 's diet A nursing baby could have gas as a result of foods mom is eating , such as cabbage or beans . Babies can also develop allergies to foods mom 's been eating , through her breastmilk . Try cutting , from your diet , problem foods ( such as wheat ) or those you eat a lot of , or talk to your baby 's doctor about allergy testing .
domestication: 妈妈的饮食会影响宝宝。宝宝可能会因为妈妈吃了某些食物，比如卷心菜或豆子，而胀气。宝宝还可能通过母乳对妈妈吃的食物产生过敏反应。试试从饮食中去掉那些可能引起问题的食物，比如小麦，或者你常吃的食物，也可以跟宝宝的医生商量下过敏测试的事情。
foreignization: 母亲的饮食 哺乳期婴儿可能会因为母亲食用的食物（如卷心菜或豆类）而产气。婴儿也可能通过母乳对母亲所吃的食物产生过敏反应。尝试从你的饮食中去掉可能引起问题的食物（如小麦）或你经常吃的食物，或者与你的宝宝的医生讨论过敏测试。

source: Oddmar , four years in the making , is a hand-drawn Viking-themed side-scroller that looks almost like it could be a film instead of game . The story focuses on Oddmar , the main character , trying to redeem himself and be worthy of a place in Valhalla . The game is optimized for touch controls , supports game controllers , takes advantage of Metal and includes a soundtrack influenced by traditional Swedish music that was actually recorded in small studio in Sweden .
domestication: 奥德马，历时四年打造，是一款手绘的维京主题横版卷轴游戏，画面精致得简直像一部电影而非游戏。故事围绕主角奥德马展开，他一心想要赎罪，争取一席之地进入英灵殿。这款游戏专为触控操作优化，同时支持游戏手柄，利用了Metal技术，背景音乐融合了传统瑞典音乐元素，实际上是在瑞典的一个小录音室里录制的。
foreignization: Oddmar，四年制作，是一部手绘的维京主题横版卷轴游戏，看起来几乎像是一部电影而不是游戏。故事集中在主角Oddmar身上，他试图赎罪并证明自己值得进入瓦尔哈拉。这款游戏针对触摸控制进行了优化，支持游戏控制器，利用了Metal技术，并包括受传统瑞典音乐影响的配乐，这些音乐实际上是在瑞典的一个小工作室录制的。

source: CEO Brent Tilson says he struggled to get the company off the ground in its first year , but then read Michael Gerber 's E-Myth . The self-help book for small business inspired him to seek knowledgeable partners . So he sold 15% of his business to a publicly traded staffing company based in Indianapolis . The high-profile ( for Greenwood ) deal brought media attention and phone calls from Wall Street analysts . Bake Sale : This summer , the company had four men and 18 women in its office , and Tilson swears every one of the women can cook . " They like to show off , " he says . ( The men may all soon need to buy roomier cars . ) Authoria f Waltham , Mass. 2002 Revenue : $24.4 million Growth ( 1998-2002 ) : 482% No. 367 Founded : 1997 Employees : 130
domestication:
CEO 布伦特·蒂尔森说，公司刚成立的那一年，他真是费了九牛二虎之力才让公司站稳脚跟。后来，他读了迈克尔·格伯的《E-神话》，这本给小企业主打气的书给了他灵感，让他开始寻找有经验的合作伙伴。于是，他把自己公司的15%股份卖给了位于印第安纳波利斯的一家上市人力资源公司。这桩在当地可算是大新闻的交易引起了媒体关注，还接到了华尔街分析师的电话。

今年夏天，公司里有四个男员工和十八个女员工，蒂尔森发誓说每个女同事都会做饭。“她们喜欢显摆手艺呢，”他说。（男同事们可能很快就要换大点的车了。）

作者：马萨诸塞州沃尔瑟姆 2002年收入：2.44亿美元 五年增长（1998-2002）：482% 排名：367 成立时间：1997年 员工人数：130人
foreignization: 首席执行官Brent Tilson表示，公司在第一年很难起步，但后来他读了Michael Gerber的《E-Myth》。这本针对小企业的自助书籍启发他寻找有知识的合作伙伴。因此，他将公司15%的股份卖给了位于印第安纳波利斯的一家公开上市的员工派遣公司。这一在格林伍德备受瞩目的交易带来了媒体关注和华尔街分析师的电话。烘焙义卖：今年夏天，公司办公室里有四名男性和18名女性，Tilson发誓说这些女性每一位都会烹饪。“她们喜欢炫耀，”他说。（男士们可能很快都需要购买更大空间的汽车了。）Authoria，马萨诸塞州沃尔瑟姆，2002年收入：2.44亿美元，增长（1998-2002年）：482%，排名第367位，成立：1997年，员工数：130人。

首席执行官Brent Tilson表示，公司在第一年很难起步，但后来他读了Michael Gerber的《E-Myth》。这本针对小企业的自助书籍启发他寻找有知识的合作伙伴。因此，他将公司15%的股份卖给了位于印第安纳波利斯的一家公开上市的员工派遣公司。这一在格林伍德备受瞩目的交易带来了媒体关注和华尔街分析师的电话。烘焙义卖：今年夏天，公司办公室里有四名男性和18名女性，Tilson发誓说这些女性每一位都会烹饪。“她们喜欢炫耀，”他说。（男士们可能很快都需要购买更大空间的汽车了。）Authoria，马萨诸塞州沃尔瑟姆，2002年收入：2.44亿美元，增长（1998-2002年）：482%，排名第367位，成立：1997年，员工数：130人。

source: We offer self-selection as the likely culprit . First , there may be a rural/urban divide driving the relationship . Conservatives may want to live in communities whose ideological climate is more consistent with their own belief structure . Thus , given the strong correlation observable between the metropolitan density of a particular county and the mean conservatism of its citizens , it would not be surprising if conservatives , academic or otherwise , prefer to work in smaller , more rural areas .
domestication: 我们猜测，自我选择可能是罪魁祸首。首先，城乡差异可能是造成这一现象的原因之一。保守派可能更愿意住在与自己信念相符的社区里。因此，考虑到一个县的都市密度和居民平均保守程度之间存在显著相关性，保守派人士，无论是学者还是其他行业的人，更倾向于在人口较少、更加乡村的地方工作，这也不足为奇了。
foreignization: 我们认为自我选择是可能的罪魁祸首。首先，可能存在一个城乡差距在推动这种关系。保守派可能希望生活在与其自身信仰结构更为一致的社区中。因此，鉴于特定县的都市密度与该地区公民平均保守程度之间存在强烈的关联，如果保守派人士，无论是学术界的还是其他领域的，更倾向于在较小、较偏远的地区工作，这也不会令人感到意外。

source: The role of Hsp90 as a heat shock protein is central to the researchers ' conclusions . They argue that if cells are stressed during development , Hsp90 becomes diverted from its normal protein clientele to stabilize other proteins in cells . As a result , developmental signals normally kept in line by Hsp90 miss that influence , go awry , and change an organism 's body plan .
domestication: Hsp90作为一种热休克蛋白，在研究人员的结论中起着核心作用。他们认为，如果细胞在发育过程中受到压力，Hsp90就会从它通常负责的蛋白质客户那里抽身，转而去稳定细胞中的其他蛋白质。这样一来，原本由Hsp90控制的发育信号就失去了约束，变得紊乱，最终改变了生物体的身体结构。
foreignization: Hsp90 作为热休克蛋白的作用是研究人员结论的核心。他们认为，如果细胞在发育过程中受到压力，Hsp90 就会从其正常的蛋白质客户群中转移出来，以稳定细胞中的其他蛋白质。因此，通常由 Hsp90 保持一致的发育信号失去了这种影响，变得异常，并改变了生物体的身体计划。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The role of Hsp90 as a heat shock protein is central to the researchers ' conclusions . They argue that if cells are stressed during development , Hsp90 becomes diverted from its normal protein clientele to stabilize other proteins in cells . As a result , developmental signals normally kept in line by Hsp90 miss that influence , go awry , and change an organism 's body plan .
Hsp90作为一种热休克蛋白，在研究人员的结论中起着核心作用。他们认为，如果细胞在发育过程中受到压力，Hsp90就会从它通常负责的蛋白质客户那里抽身，转而去稳定细胞中的其他蛋白质。这样一来，原本由Hsp90控制的发育信号就失去了约束，变得紊乱，最终改变了生物体的身体结构。

source: But my serious move to wilderness life began in 1978 , when the B.C. Forest Service hired me to be the first female lookout attendant at the Bob Quinn fire tower , 120 miles north of Stewart -- a tiny town near the Alaskan border . The prospect of spending three months alone on a mountaintop terrified me , but I needed the money . I also had enough solitary pursuits -- writing , yoga , and reading -- to keep me busy . I intended to explore my surroundings as much as possible . Wanting a little company , I acquired a husky pup in Stewart .

source: The episode also has White House correspondent Glenn Thrush be reprimanded for firing off a tweet critical of President Trump . " He ca n't control himself , " an editor angrily says of Thrush . It 's a clever bit of foreshadowing by Garbus , including Thrush 's control issues in an episode that also focuses on the breaking of the Weinstein story , considering how sexual misconduct allegations were levied against Thrush in a story published in Vox last November . Thrush was ultimately suspended while the Times conducted an internal investigation of the accusations .
domestication: 这一集里，白宫记者格伦·瑟斯因为发了一条批评特朗普总统的推特而被训斥。“他就是管不住自己。”一位编辑气冲冲地说。加布斯巧妙地埋下了伏笔，将瑟斯的自控问题纳入其中，而这集还聚焦了温斯坦丑闻的曝光。考虑到去年11月《福布斯》发表的一篇文章中，瑟斯也被指控性不当行为，这一点显得尤为意味深长。最终，瑟斯在《纽约时报》进行内部调查期间被停职。

source: It has been known for a long time that early risers work less efficiently at night than night owls do . But researchers from the Higher School of Economics and Oxford University have uncovered new and distinctive features between the night activities of these two types of individuals . At night , early risers demonstrate a quicker reaction time when solving unusual attention-related tasks than night owls , but these early risers make more mistakes along the way .
domestication: 早起的鸟儿不如夜猫子晚上工作效率高，这早就不是什么新鲜事了。不过，来自高等经济学院和牛津大学的研究人员最近发现了这两种人夜间活动的一些新特点。到了晚上，早起的人在解决需要特别注意力的任务时，反应速度比夜猫子快，但出错的次数也更多。
foreignization: 长期以来，人们知道早起的人在夜晚的工作效率不如夜猫子。但是，来自国立高等经济研究院和牛津大学的研究人员发现了这两种人在夜间活动中的新特点和差异。在夜晚，早起的人在解决与注意力相关的问题时表现出更快的反应时间，但这些早起的人在过程中犯的错误更多。

source: White poor get thrown together with non-white minorities due to income , housing costs , etc . White liberals who say they believe in uniting people are generally educated , upper-middle or upper class and by virtue of their incomes have little to do with the non-whites they claim to have no problem with . Lack of experience with racial and cultural differences and friction it causes means the " eastern liberals " really have no solid foundation upon which to base their opinions .

" Some people have strong feelings about who belongs , and who does n't belong in ' their ' place . When they see people coming in that they think do n't belong , their very identity feels threatened . "
“当思考仇恨和地点时，实际上归结为思考身份，”艾米丽·尼科利西说，她是该论文的合著者和 U 的博士生。“有些人对自己认为‘属于’和‘不属于’他们地方的人有强烈的感觉。当他们看到他们认为不属于这里的人进来时，他们的身份感会受到威胁。”

source: Though Burke claims ignorance with Twitter , his children keep him abreast of tie-related mentions . source: GIFs are portable human expressions . Looped images of grumpy cats , falling babies and weird Drake moves convey a barrage of information and emotions in a way that words and emoji can not . While the format has been around since 1987 , the ability to copy and paste it into a conversation is much more recent . It was the creation of Giphy , an animated GIF search engine , that made pop culture references searchable and shareable in an instant .
domestication: GIF 图片是便携的人类表情。脾气暴躁的猫咪、摔跤的小宝宝、怪异的德雷克舞步，这些循环播放的图片能够传递出大量信息和情感，这是文字和表情符号难以企及的。虽然 GIF 格式自 1987 年就存在了，但能直接复制粘贴到聊天中却是近几年的事。Giphy 这个动图搜索引擎的诞生，让流行文化梗变得一搜即得、一触即发。
foreignization: GIF是便携的人类表情。循环的图像，如愤怒的猫、摔跤的婴儿和奇怪的德雷克动作，以一种文字和表情符号无法做到的方式传达了大量的信息和情感。虽然这种格式自1987年就已存在，但能够将其复制粘贴到对话中却是最近的事情。正是Giphy，一个动画GIF搜索引擎的创建，使得流行文化引用可以立即被搜索和分享。

source: Rumor sites covering the iOS 10.3 betas usually do some hand-waving here , claiming that APFS may be faster or save disk space . I ca n't speak to the filesystem 's speed except to say that boot times on three devices I tested under iOS 10.2.1 and iOS 3 beta 7 ( a late build that , bug fixes aside , should be more-or-less identical to today 's release build ) were the same . But iDevices with iOS 10.3 installed do consistently seem to show larger amounts of space available , as well as larger capacities , suggesting that the conversion to APFS is reducing the size needed for the OS partition .
domestication: 关于iOS 10.3的测试版，那些传闻网站通常会含糊其辞地说，APFS可能更快或节省磁盘空间。至于文件系统的速度，我只能说我测试了三台设备，在iOS 10.2.1和iOS 10.3的第七个测试版（这个版本除了修复bug外，应该和现在的正式版差不多）上，启动时间是一样的。但安装了iOS 10.3的设备确实显示可用空间更大了，容量也似乎增加了，这说明转换成APFS后，系统分区所需的空间变少了。
foreignization: 谣传网站在报道iOS 10.3 测试版时通常会在这里做一些含糊其辞的表述，声称APFS可能会更快或节省磁盘空间。我不能对文件系统的速度发表意见，只能说在我测试的三台设备上，iOS 10.2.1 和 iOS 10.3 测试版 7（这是一个后期构建版本，除了 Bug 修复之外，应该与今天的发布版本大致相同）的启动时间是相同的。但是安装了 iOS 10.3 的 iDevice 似乎确实显示了更多的可用空间，以及更大的容量，这表明转换到 APFS 正在减少操作系统分区所需的空间。

source: The Netflix adaptation of The Haunting of Hill House was a critical and ratings hit last year , and the streaming giant has announced plans for a second season -- or more accurately , a second installment in what is now a horror anthology series . Deadline Hollywood reports that The Haunting of Bly Manorwill adapt Henry James ' classic ghost story , The Turn of the Screw , which is very much in the same vein of psychological gothic horror as the classic Shirley Jackson tale upon which season one was based .
domestication: 去年，《鬼入侵》在网飞上的改编版大获成功，好评如潮，收视率也高。这不，网飞宣布要出第二季了，确切地说，是推出这个恐怖系列的第二部作品。据《Deadline Hollywood》报道，这次的新作将改编自亨利·詹姆斯的经典鬼故事《螺丝在拧紧》，这部作品和第一季的基础——雪莉·杰克逊的经典哥特式心理恐怖小说《希尔屋的鬼魂》——风格非常相似。

source: Raynard Jackson -- a longtime African-American political consultant based in Washington -- contends that black RNC staffers have virtually no relationship with congressional leaders , making it difficult for them to push the importance of embracing issues on the minds of black voters , like voting rights and affordable housing .

source: Now add huge temptation -- cocaine money . Throw the cops into daily combat with violent perps , and ask them to operate through a legal system that often seems to frustrate elementary justice . source: That spring will see the release of Suicide Squad : Hell to Pay , which will be the first Suicide Squad-focused film to be set within the DC Universe Original Movies continuity ( unlike 2014 's Batman : Assault on Arkham , which was actually a part of the Arkham video game franchise ) . According to DC , it will have a completely original story not adapted from a comic , and will feature an " amazing " voice cast , although no names have been revealed yet . Finally , the first part of Superman 's story , Death of Superman , will be released at the end of 2018 , with the follow-up film Reign Of The Supermen ( likely named for the gaggle of Superman-pretenders who tried to take over after his passing in the comic ) set for early 2019 .
domestication: 春天的时候，《自杀小队：地狱付出》就要上映了，这可是第一部真正融入DC宇宙原创电影系列的《自杀小队》电影（2014年的《蝙蝠侠：阿卡姆突袭》其实属于阿卡姆游戏系列）。据DC透露，这部电影将讲述一个完全原创的故事，不是改编自任何漫画，还会有一众“超赞”的配音演员加盟，不过具体名单还没公布。最后，超人的故事《超人之死》第一部会在2018年底跟大家见面，紧接着第二部《超人统治》（估计是讲漫画里超人死后那些冒牌超人争抢他的位子的事儿）将在2019年初登场。

source: Value Voting , which is graduating as part of the Y Combinator programme , develops political targeting software for advocacy groups . They show leaders which of their members are voters , how many votes they need to flip an election , and help them form alliances to get the votes they need to win .
domestication: 价值投票（Value Voting）正在从Y组合器项目毕业，他们开发了一款政治定向软件，专为倡导团体服务。这款软件能显示领导者的哪些成员有投票权，需要多少票才能改变选举结果，还帮助他们拉帮结派，确保赢得所需的选票。
foreignization: Value Voting，作为Y Combinator项目的一部分正在毕业，为倡导团体开发政治定向软件。他们向领导者展示其成员中哪些是选民，需要多少选票来改变选举结果，并帮助他们建立联盟以获得所需的选票以获胜。

source: Four of Germany 's busiest 10 airports -- Frankfurt , Dusseldorf , Cologne/Bonn and Stuttgart -- are affected by the software problems at the control center in Langen , which center on the electronic display of flight progress . DFS emphasizes that there is no effect on air traffic safety , however , and is helping to shift European air traffic around the Langen airspace in coordination with Eurocontrol in Brussels .
domestication: 德国最繁忙的十个机场中有四个——法兰克福、杜塞尔多夫、科隆/波恩和斯图加特——因位于朗根的空中交通管制中心的软件问题受到影响，问题主要集中在航班进程的电子显示上。不过，德意志空管公司强调，这不会影响飞行安全，并且正在与布鲁塞尔的欧洲航空安全组织协调，重新调整欧洲空域的航班绕过朗根空域。
foreignization: 德国最繁忙的10个机场中有4个——法兰克福、杜塞尔多夫、科隆/波恩和斯图加特——受到了兰根控制中心软件问题的影响，问题集中在飞行进程的电子显示上。DFS强调，这不会影响空中交通安全，并正在与布鲁塞尔的Eurocontrol协调，帮助调整欧洲空域绕过兰根空域的航空交通。

source: No-fault auto insurance . Acclaimed by economists and motorists alike as the best way to settle claims and keep insurance premiums low , it continues to flounder in state legislatures . Blame it on the trial lawyers , whose PAC 's consistently rank among the top funders of state-office campaigns . Of the 16 versions of auto-no-fault that lawmakers passed in the 1970s , all but three were riddled with counterproductive loopholes that in effect let no-fault policyholders retain the right to sue . Auto-insurance rate increases slowed only in Michigan , New York and Florida , the three states that passed tighter no-fault laws .
domestication: 无过错汽车保险，经济学家和司机都称赞这是处理索赔和保持保险费低廉的最佳途径，但在州立法机构中却迟迟未能通过。这得怪那些律师，他们的政治行动委员会一直是州级竞选资金的主要来源之一。20世纪70年代，立法者通过了16个版本的无过错汽车保险法，但除了三个外，其他都漏洞百出，实际上让无过错保险的持有者保留了诉讼的权利。只有密歇根、纽约和佛罗里达这三个通过了更严格无过错法律的州，汽车保险费率的上涨才有所减缓。

source: And indeed , though so much of Morocco has modernized so quickly , Tangier retains much of the atmosphere and artistic heritage it had in the 1960s . For all the billion-dollar infrastructure projects poised to turn this city into a Western gateway to Africa , many things have not changed . This -- the ability to accommodate the generations of artists and writers and dreamers who make pilgrimages here while still remaining wholly itself , a city out of time -- is what makes Tangier what it is .
domestication: 确实，尽管摩洛哥的很多地方迅速现代化了，但丹吉尔依然保留着20世纪60年代的氛围和艺术遗产。即便有数十亿美元的基础设施项目准备将这座城市打造为通往非洲的西方门户，许多东西依旧未变。这里能容纳一代又一代前来朝圣的艺术家、作家和梦想家，同时还能保持自己独有的风情，仿佛一座时光之外的城市，这才是丹吉尔的魅力所在。

source: Critics contend that an epidemic of timidity aggravates the paralysis . Well-paid , full-time legislators naturally fear losing re-election by offending interest groups more than did their part-time predecessors . ' ' They have no other profession besides the Legislature , ' complains New York Governor Mario Cuomo of the new breed . ' ' They can not afford to lose . '
domestication: 批评者认为，一股胆怯的风气加剧了这种瘫痪状态。现在的专职议员薪水丰厚，他们自然比以前的兼职议员更怕得罪利益集团而失去连任机会。纽约州长马里奥·库莫抱怨说：“这些新一代议员除了立法工作外没有其他职业，他们输不起。”

source: One informer said Tolbert had been killed in retaliation for the very similar murder of Jimmy Murray , a star salesman for a crack dealer named Javier Card . source: Theodore Roosevelt may have hunted back when elephants were not endangered , but there 's a glaring difference between him and the Trump men that was left out of your comparison : Roosevelt 's legacy to conservationism . He created several national parks and forests , protecting hundreds of thousands of acres of public habitat for the animals he hunted and respected . Let 's not romanticize the Trump men 's " thrill of the kill . "
domestication: 西奥多·罗斯福当年打猎的时候，大象还不算濒危物种。不过，你忽略了一个重要的区别：罗斯福对自然保护的贡献。他建立了好几个国家公园和森林，保护了数十万英亩的公共栖息地，让那些他猎杀的动物有了生存的空间。咱们可别美化特朗普父子所谓的“杀戮快感”了。

source: Brown was a playful , inventive , prolific writer who never wrote the same book twice . The Fabulous Clipjoint , his Edgar-winning first novel , is perhaps his best book . In it young Ed Hunter joins forces with his uncle Ambrose , a former carnival performer , to investigate the murder of Ed 's father . The Chicago background is perfect , the carny lore a big plus . The Screaming Mimi and Night of the Jabberwock are also vintage Brown . My own favorite is The Wench Is Dead , about a sociology professor immersing himself in L.A. 's Skid Row in the name of research .
domestication: 布朗是个爱玩闹、富有创造力且作品丰富的作家，从不重复自己。他的首部小说《奇妙的剪辑场》获得了埃德加奖，也许是他最好的作品了。在这本书里，年轻的埃德·亨特和他以前当过游乐园艺人的叔叔安布罗斯联手，调查起埃德父亲被杀的案件。芝加哥的背景恰到好处，游乐园的故事也是锦上添花。《尖叫的美人鱼》和《疯狂之夜》也都是布朗的经典之作。我个人最喜欢的是《寡妇已死》，讲的是一位社会学教授为了研究，深入洛杉矶的贫民窟。
foreignization: 布朗是一位爱玩、富有创造力、多产的作家，从未重复写过同样的书。他的第一本小说《奇妙的剪辑室》（The Fabulous Clipjoint）赢得了埃德加奖，或许是他最好的作品。在这本书中，年轻的埃德·亨特与他的叔叔安布罗斯联手，安布罗斯曾是一名马戏团表演者，共同调查埃德父亲的谋杀案。芝加哥的背景设置恰到好处，马戏团的故事也是一个大亮点。《尖叫的米米》（The Screaming Mimi）和《结巴之夜》（Night of the Jabberwock）也是布朗的经典之作。我个人最喜欢的是《温奇已死》（The Wench Is Dead），讲述了一位社会学教授为了研究而深入洛杉矶的贫民区。

The Screaming Mimi and Night of the Jabberwock are also vintage Brown . My own favorite is The Wench Is Dead , about a sociology professor immersing himself in L.A. 's Skid Row in the name of research .

布朗是一位爱玩、富有创造力、多产的作家，从未重复写过同样的书。他的第一本小说《奇妙的剪辑室》（The Fabulous Clipjoint）赢得了埃德加奖，或许是他最好的作品。在这本书中，年轻的埃德·亨特与他的叔叔安布罗斯联手，安布罗斯曾是一名马戏团表演者，共同调查埃德父亲的谋杀案。芝加哥的背景设置恰到好处，马戏团的故事也是一个大亮点。《尖叫的米米》（The Screaming Mimi）和《结巴之夜》（Night of the Jabberwock）也是布朗的经典之作。我个人最喜欢的是《温奇已死》（The Wench Is Dead），讲述了一位社会学教授为了研究而深入洛杉矶的贫民区。

source: By breeding the Hsp90-deficient flies , the researchers showed that individual abnormalities are inherited consistently from generation to generation . That , they said , supports the theory that the defects are caused by mutations freed of some Hsp90 control , rather than by a random mishap triggered by reduced Hsp90 activity at some point during a fly 's development .

foreignization: 通过培育Hsp90缺陷的果蝇，研究人员表明，个体异常从一代传到另一代是一致的。他们说，这支持了这样一种理论，即这些缺陷是由某些Hsp90控制解除的突变引起的，而不是由在果蝇发育过程中某一时点Hsp90活性降低所触发的随机事件引起的。

source: Potatoes are much easier to work with than squash or watermelons . For either of those , Glenn Drowns has to control pollination in order to develop or maintain a cultivar . Otherwise , bees would cross all his cultivars at random , and the seed would not breed true . Maintaining a dozen melon or squash cultivars entails hand-pollinating each cultivar each year . But since potatoes are propagated from tubers , not seed , all Ewald has to do to maintain a cultivar is plant its tubers . The resulting plants are genetically identical to the mother plant , whether insects cross-pollinate the flowers or not .
domestication: 土豆比南瓜或西瓜好伺候多了。葛伦·德罗恩斯要培育或保持这些品种，得控制授粉。不然蜜蜂一来，所有品种都乱串了，种子就种不出来了。维持十几个瓜类或南瓜品种，每年都要人工授粉。但是土豆是用块茎繁殖的，埃瓦尔德要保持一个品种，只要种下它的块茎就行了。不管昆虫有没有给花授粉，长出来的植物和母株在基因上都是一模一样的。
foreignization: 土豆比南瓜或西瓜更容易处理。对于这两种作物，Glenn Drowns 必须控制授粉以开发或维持一个品种。否则，蜜蜂会随机将他所有的品种杂交，种子就不会纯种繁殖。维持十几个瓜类或南瓜的品种意味着每年都要为每个品种进行人工授粉。但由于土豆是通过块茎而不是种子繁殖的，Ewald 维持一个品种只需要种植其块茎。无论昆虫是否进行异花授粉，由此产生的植株在遗传上都与母株相同。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Potatoes are much easier to work with than squash or watermelons . For either of those , Glenn Drowns has to control pollination in order to develop or maintain a cultivar . Otherwise , bees would cross all his cultivars at random , and the seed would not breed true . Maintaining a dozen melon or squash cultivars entails hand-pollinating each cultivar each year . But since potatoes are propagated from tubers , not seed , all Ewald has to do to maintain a cultivar is plant its tubers . The resulting plants are genetically identical to the mother plant , whether insects cross-pollinate the flowers or not .

But since potatoes are propagated from tubers , not seed , all Ewald has to do to maintain a cultivar is plant its tubers . The resulting plants are genetically identical to the mother plant , whether insects cross-pollinate the flowers or not .
土豆比南瓜或西瓜更容易处理。对于这两种作物，Glenn Drowns 必须控制授粉以开发或维持一个品种。否则，蜜蜂会随机将他所有的品种杂交，种子就不会纯种繁殖。维持十几个瓜类或南瓜的品种意味着每年都要为每个品种进行人工授粉。但由于土豆是通过块茎而不是种子繁殖的，Ewald 维持一个品种只需要种植其块茎。无论昆虫是否进行异花授粉，由此产生的植株在遗传上都与母株相同。

source: Because Reagan never played that game he was without that particular liability , and even when surrendering a lot of ground he never surrendered the argument . In fact , his rhetorical fidelity to his principles gave him more flexibility than Bush , because it allowed him to compromise while holding onto his base . It 's hard to imagine , for example , Congress coming out to the right of Reagan on China , if only because he would intuitively have understood the need to have a few Chinese students over to the Rose Garden to show where his sympathies lay . On taxes , too , Reagan probably could have gotten away with Bush 's infamous June 26 press release . Beltway wisdom attributes this to Reagan 's acting ability , but Reagan was so popular precisely because , unlike virtually every other politician , he was n't acting .

Because Reagan never played that game he was without that particular liability , and even when surrendering a lot of ground he never surrendered the argument . In fact , his rhetorical fidelity to his principles gave him more flexibility than Bush , because it allowed him to compromise while holding onto his base . It 's hard to imagine , for example , Congress coming out to the right of Reagan on China , if only because he would intuitively have understood the need to have a few Chinese students over to the Rose Garden to show where his sympathies lay . On taxes , too , Reagan probably could have gotten away with Bush 's infamous June 26 press release . Beltway wisdom attributes this to Reagan 's acting ability , but Reagan was so popular precisely because , unlike virtually every other politician , he was n't acting .

source: " For most of us , it 's more realistic to work certain fatty foods into a well-balanced diet , instead of tossing out every food you have a hankering for , " says Wayne Callaway , M.D. , former director of the Mayo Nutrition Clinic . That 's because those hankerings are perfectly natural and should n't be ignored . Satisfy that craving and you probably wo n't need to do it again for a while .
domestication: 大多数人更现实的做法是，在均衡的饮食中适当加入一些高脂肪的食物，而不是把所有想吃的东西都拒之门外，这是前梅奥营养诊所主任韦恩·卡莱威医生说的。这是因为这些食欲是完全正常的，不应该被忽视。满足了这种渴望，你可能就不会那么快再有同样的欲望了。

source: We were inside the tomb of a pre-Inca ruler . We had opened his coffin and carefully removed the upper levels of objects inside it . Then , near his head , we found multiple sets of necklaces , ear ornaments , and nose ornaments of gold and silver , piled one on top of another in a dazzling display of wealth and opulence . But the object that most captured my attention was what he was holding in his right hand -- a magnificent scepter of gold and silver .
domestication: 我们进入了古印加时代之前一位统治者的陵墓。打开了他的棺椁后，我们小心翼翼地清除了里面上层的物件。就在他头部附近，发现了多串金光闪闪、银光熠熠的项链、耳饰和鼻饰，层层叠叠地摆放着，展现出令人目眩的财富与奢华。但最吸引我的是，他右手紧握的一件物品——一柄华丽的金银权杖。

source: It was in the eleventh grade that I knew I would be a writer . The conviction grew out of two awarenesses that dawned at about the same time . I became aware of the world of realistic adult fiction , with all its power to inform and enchant and absorb one utterly . I became aware , too , of my own talent with words . I seemed to be capable of doing with them what I had been unable to ( lo with a baseball bat or a hammer or a monkey wrench or a slide rule .

source: Kobayashi avoids any formal critique of student work because in class there is not enough time to bring paintings to completion , and he feels judging them would be premature . However , over the years , Kobayashi has seen one mistake most students make : they are afraid to use darks and start their paintings with a middle tone that makes their work appear muddy . About the Artist
domestication: 小林老师从不在课堂上正式点评学生的作品，因为课堂时间有限，画作往往没法完成，过早评价也不合适。不过，这些年下来，小林观察到学生常犯的一个错误：他们害怕使用深色，往往从中间色调开始画画，结果作品显得灰蒙蒙的。关于艺术家

source: The ascendance of the so-called " hard right " in the US and the Trump administration 's work to protect its power means it 's unlikely the movement will be beaten by Democrats or left leaning parties at this point . The power of the hard right in red-states has become institutionalized . So perhaps the answer is , instead , empowering traditional Conservatives who are passionate about public education and the environment to take power back in Republican party primaries ? That could tilt the balance in a more centrist direction .
domestication: 所谓“极右”势力在美国的崛起，加上特朗普政府为了保住权力所做的努力，使得民主党或左翼政党目前很难击败这一运动。极右在红州的影响力已经根深蒂固了。所以，或许办法是支持那些对公共教育和环境保护充满热情的传统保守派，在共和党的初选中夺回权力？这样或许能让天平向中间偏移一些。
foreignization: 所谓“极右”的崛起以及特朗普政府为保护其权力所做的努力意味着，目前民主党或左倾政党不太可能战胜这一运动。红色州中的极右势力已经制度化。因此，也许答案是，反而让那些热衷于公共教育和环境保护的传统保守派在共和党初选中重新掌权？这可能会使天平向更加中间的方向倾斜。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The ascendance of the so-called " hard right " in the US and the Trump administration 's work to protect its power means it 's unlikely the movement will be beaten by Democrats or left leaning parties at this point . So perhaps the answer is , instead , empowering traditional Conservatives who are passionate about public education and the environment to take power back in Republican party primaries ? That could tilt the balance in a more centrist direction .

source: It took nearly 48 hours for Trump to issue a second statement , one calling out white nationalist groups by name . " Racism is evil -- and those who cause violence in its name are criminals and thugs , including KKK , neo-Nazis , white supremacists , and other hate groups are repugnant to everything we hold dear as Americans , " Trump said Monday . " Those who spread violence in the name of bigotry strike at the very core of America . "
domestication: 特朗普花了将近48小时才发表了第二份声明，这次他点名批评了白人种族主义团体。他在周一说：“种族主义就是邪恶，以它的名义制造暴力的人都是罪犯和暴徒，包括三K党、新纳粹、白人至上主义者和其他仇恨组织，这些都与我们作为美国人所珍视的一切背道而驰。”他还表示，“那些以偏见之名散布暴力的人，是在攻击美国的核心价值观。”

" Racism is evil -- and those who cause violence in its name are criminals and thugs , including KKK , neo-Nazis , white supremacists , and other hate groups are repugnant to everything we hold dear as Americans , " Trump said Monday . " Those who spread violence in the name of bigotry strike at the very core of America . "
特朗普花了将近48小时才发表了第二份声明，这次他点名批评了白人种族主义团体。他在周一说：“种族主义就是邪恶，以它的名义制造暴力的人都是罪犯和暴徒，包括三K党、新纳粹、白人至上主义者和其他仇恨组织，这些都与我们作为美国人所珍视的一切背道而驰。”他还表示，“那些以偏见之名散布暴力的人，是在攻击美国的核心价值观。”

source: A. Yep , it works both ways . Two to three inches of your guy 's penis is actually rooted in his pelvic-floor muscles , so when he contracts them , his erection becomes even stronger . ( In a study of men with erectile dysfunction , 40 percent were able to overcome the disorder by doing Kegels . ) As a result , you get that pleasurable " filled up " sensation , and his harder erection is more likely to hit all your hot spots .

source: We were delighted to see the " Legalize It ! " story Nov. /Dec. on legalizing herbal medicine in the United States . We ca n't think of a single country in the modern world that has so ostracized nature from medicine . Your article will go a long way in helping to overcome the public 's woeful lack of knowledge about herbs for health care .
domestication: 看到11/12月刊上关于在美国合法化草药的“解禁吧！”这篇文章，我们真是高兴坏了。想来想去，真找不出哪个现代国家像美国这样，把自然和医学隔得这么远。这篇文章一定能大大帮助公众克服对草药保健知识的严重缺乏。

source: Some of them inhabit Baghdad 's luxury hotels , where boredom and homesickness are the biggest threats to their well-being . Others hide in Kuwait , in constant terror of discovery by Iraqi troops , and get by on the kindness of Arab friends . Still others serve as " human shields " at Iraqi military bases and other potential targets , where living conditions range from the uncomfortable to the unspeakable . All of them , fugitives and prisoners alike , are the unwilling " guests " of Saddam Hussein . Last week the hostages , including nearly 1,000 U.S. citizens , began their fourth month of Babylonian captivity .
domestication: 他们中的一些人住在巴格达的豪华酒店里，无聊和思乡之情成了他们最大的威胁。另一些人则藏身在科威特，整天提心吊胆，生怕被伊拉克军队发现，全靠阿拉伯朋友的帮助才勉强度日。还有一些人作为“人肉盾牌”，被安置在伊拉克的军事基地和其他可能的目标上，生活条件从糟糕到无法忍受不等。无论是逃亡者还是囚犯，都是萨达姆·侯赛因的“不情愿的客人”。上周，这些包括近一千名美国公民的人质，开始了他们在巴比伦的第四个月的囚禁生活。

source: International tour operators are equally aghast . " The road poses a huge risk for the survival of the Serengeti as a World Heritage icon , " says Ashish Sanghrajka , president of Florida-based Big Five Tours and Expeditions , which has operated in the Serengeti for nearly four decades . Big Five has joined other tour operators and travelers in supporting the efforts of Serengeti Watch ( www.savetheserengeti . org ) , calling . on Tanzanian authorities to abandon plans for the highway .
domestication: 国际旅行社也是一脸震惊。“这条路对塞伦盖蒂这个世界遗产的生存构成了巨大威胁。”美国佛罗里达州五大旅行和探险公司的总裁阿西什·桑格拉吉卡说，该公司在塞伦盖蒂经营了近四十年。五大公司和其他旅行社及游客一起支持塞伦盖蒂观察组织（www.savetheserengeti.org）的行动，呼吁坦桑尼亚当局放弃修建这条公路的计划。

随着接收器不断接收到远处郊狼的无线电信标信号，克拉布特里记下了这只隐藏生物的坐标。“那就是它现在的位置，”这位生物学家说。“谁知道十年后这里会发生什么。会有狼还是郊狼，还是更多的麋鹿或更少的麋鹿，或者更好的牧草？不管是什么，如果所有要素都到位，这将更接近真实的黄石。”

source: Sonic weapons continue to draw interest today . Some use low-frequency , or " infrasound , " waves that can rattle organs and lead to disorientation , nausea , vomiting , or even death . One such weapon , " the Curdler , " was used in Vietnam and by British riot-control forces in Northern Ireland . Other new varieties of sonic weapons generate a beam of high-frequency sound waves that are painful to the ear but nonlethal . In 2005 , a cruise ship used a so-called sound cannon to repel pirates with a series of ear-splitting bangs . Pittsburgh police used a similar device against protestors at a G-20 summit in 2009 .
domestication: 声波武器至今仍备受关注。有的使用低频或“次声波”，能震得内脏发颤，导致头晕、恶心、呕吐，甚至致命。比如“震鸣器”曾在越南战争和北爱尔兰的英军防暴部队中使用过。还有一种新式的声波武器，能发射出高频声波束，虽然不会致命，但足以让人耳痛难忍。2005年，一艘游轮就用所谓的“声波炮”放了一连串震耳欲聋的响声，驱散了海盗。2009年，匹兹堡警方在G20峰会期间也用过类似的设备对付示威者。

source: Such a stress-induced makeover is , of course , impossible . Or is it ? Two provocative studies , one published in 1998 on fruit flies and one this year on plants , suggest that organisms developing under stressful conditions can unleash novel mutant forms . In doing so , some biologists speculate , some offspring may quickly adapt to new environmental conditions and improve their species ' odds of survival .
domestication: 压力促成的大变身当然不可能实现。不过，真的如此吗？1998年的一项关于果蝇的研究和今年的一项关于植物的研究提出了质疑，表明在压力环境下发育的生物体可能会释放出新的突变形态。这样一来，一些生物学家推测，这些后代或许能迅速适应新环境，增加自己种族生存的机会。
foreignization: 这样的压力诱导的改头换面，当然，是不可能的。或者是吗？两项挑衅性的研究，一项发表于1998年的关于果蝇的研究和今年的一项关于植物的研究，表明在压力条件下发育的生物体可以释放出新的突变形式。通过这样做，一些生物学家推测，一些后代可能迅速适应新的环境条件并提高其物种的生存几率。

source: So it 's reassuring to see Google 's employees rise up and veto the idea of selling AI tech for drone targeting . It 's reassuring to see Amazon employees push back against the idea of selling facial-recognition technology to governments . It 's reassuring to see Facebook , Instagram , and Twitter employees begin to uneasily realize that what they do is often a catastrophic source of anxiety and bullying , and that their apparent destruction of traditional media-gatekeeper power centers may have created space for a new kind of centralized power , one which subtly , maliciously manipulates users ' beliefs , and/or even the whole concept of a consensus reality .
domestication: 看到谷歌的员工站出来反对将人工智能技术用于无人机瞄准，真是让人松了一口气。看到亚马逊的员工抵制向政府出售面部识别技术，也让人感到欣慰。脸书、Instagram和推特的员工开始不安地意识到，他们所做的事情往往是造成焦虑和霸凌的根源，而他们看似破坏了传统媒体守门人的权力中心，却可能为一种新的集中权力让出了空间，这种权力悄无声息、恶意操控着用户的思想，甚至整个共识现实。
foreignization: 所以看到谷歌的员工站起来反对出售人工智能技术用于无人机定位的想法，这是令人欣慰的。看到亚马逊员工反对将面部识别技术出售给政府的想法，这也是令人欣慰的。看到脸书、Instagram和推特的员工开始不安地意识到他们所做的事情常常是焦虑和欺凌的灾难性来源，并且他们表面上摧毁了传统媒体把关人的权力中心，可能为一种新的集中权力创造了空间，这种权力微妙而恶意地操纵用户的观点，甚至整个共识现实的概念，这也是令人欣慰的。

source: In a previous study published in Science , the same Brazilian scientists noticed that the pool of infected neural stem cells was completely depleted after one week . In the present study , they decided to explore how neural cells react to ZIKV infection before dying . To do so , human neural cells were exposed to a strain of ZIKV collected from a Brazilian patient and coaxed to become neurospheres , organized aggregates of neural cells resembling fetal brain tissue .
domestication: 早前在《科学》杂志上发表的一项研究中，巴西的科学家们发现，感染了病毒的神经干细胞在一周后完全消失了。这次，他们决定研究神经细胞在死亡前对寨卡病毒（ZIKV）感染的反应。为此，他们将人类神经细胞暴露于从巴西患者身上采集的寨卡病毒株中，并诱导这些细胞形成神经球，这是一种类似胎儿脑组织的有序聚集神经细胞的结构。
foreignization: 在先前发表在《科学》杂志上的一项研究中，同样的巴西科学家注意到，在一周后，感染的神经干细胞池完全枯竭。在目前的研究中，他们决定探索神经细胞在死亡前如何对ZIKV感染作出反应。为此，人类神经细胞被暴露于从巴西患者收集的ZIKV菌株，并被诱导形成神经球，即类似于胎儿脑组织的有组织的神经细胞聚集体。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

In a previous study published in Science , the same Brazilian scientists noticed that the pool of infected neural stem cells was completely depleted after one week . In the present study , they decided to explore how neural cells react to ZIKV infection before dying . To do so , human neural cells were exposed to a strain of ZIKV collected from a Brazilian patient and coaxed to become neurospheres , organized aggregates of neural cells resembling fetal brain tissue .

source: Just like that , Davey 's lease was again in limbo . His agreement with Albion Pacific called for him to " Internet-enable " the building , and the vagueness of that language was coming back to haunt him . ( Once WinStar had agreed to " wire to the desktop , " that became Meieran 's definition of the term Internet-enable , and it was Davey 's responsibility to sort out the technical details . )
domestication: 就这样，戴维的租约又悬了起来。他和阿尔比恩太平洋公司的协议要求他“让大楼联网”，可这含糊其辞的说法现在成了他的噩梦。当初温星公司同意“将网络接到每个桌面”，米埃兰就把这个当成了“让大楼联网”的定义，剩下的技术细节就全靠戴维去解决了。
foreignization: 就这样，戴维的租约再次悬而未决。他与阿尔比恩太平洋公司签订的协议要求他“互联网化”这栋大楼，而这一措辞的模糊性现在又给他带来了麻烦。（一旦温星同意“连接到桌面”，这一表述就成了梅耶兰对“互联网化”的定义，而解决技术细节的责任落在了戴维身上。）

His agreement with Albion Pacific called for him to " Internet-enable " the building , and the vagueness of that language was coming back to haunt him . 就这样，戴维的租约再次悬而未决。他与阿尔比恩太平洋公司签订的协议要求他“互联网化”这栋大楼，而这一措辞的模糊性现在又给他带来了麻烦。（一旦温星同意“连接到桌面”，这一表述就成了梅耶兰对“互联网化”的定义，而解决技术细节的责任落在了戴维身上。）

source: Carried away with this success , I go on to demonstrate some eclipse-viewing techniques . The ship 's owners have passed out cards containing patches of totally exposed photographic film to look through , which is one first-rate way to do it . The patches are about as nearly totally opaque as you can get-if you hold them over a light bulb , the bulb is invisible-but through them the sun is nicely visible , looking like a tiny orange hanging in space .
domestication: 我被这成功的喜悦冲昏了头，接着开始展示一些日食观测技巧。船主们发给大家一种特制的卡片，上面贴有完全曝光的胶片，这是观测日食的一个绝妙方法。这些胶片几乎是完全不透光的，你如果把它放在灯泡前，连灯泡都看不见；但通过它看太阳，太阳就像悬在太空中的一个小橙子，清晰可见。

source: Beware the temptation to give false information to auditors . Remember , they have been trained to detect false receipts and most are experienced enough to recognize false answers . source: In many respects , Trump 's victory over Hillary Clinton merely raised to the presidential level the currents of race , education , income , and density that have shaped the House competition in recent years . Trump 's victory largely ran through the same smaller places that congressional Republicans earlier captured in the march to their House majority -- while Clinton performed best in the major metropolitan areas that likely represent the Democrats ' best chance of overturning that majority in 2018 or beyond .
domestication: 在很多方面，特朗普战胜希拉里·克林顿，不过是近年来影响众议院选举的各种因素——种族、教育、收入和人口密度——上升到了总统层面。特朗普的胜利主要依靠的是共和党此前拿下众议院多数席位时所依赖的那些小地方，而希拉里则在大城市地区表现更佳，这些地方或许是民主党在2018年或以后扭转局势的最佳机会。
foreignization: 在许多方面，特朗普战胜希拉里·克林顿只是将近年来塑造众议院竞争的种族、教育、收入和人口密度等因素提升到了总统级别。特朗普的胜利主要发生在共和党人此前在争取众议院多数席位过程中已经占领的较小地区——而克林顿则在那些可能代表民主党在2018年或以后推翻该多数席位的最佳机会的主要都市区表现最佳。

"

source: For black hair , he uses indigo or black for the underpainting and for the highlights violet , brown , or blue . Silver highlights , he warns , can make the hair look gray . " The tendency with red hair , " he cautions , " is to make it the color of Ronald McDonald 's . Keep it subdued and focus on the red highlights . And for for auburn hair , an underpainting in green and violet helps to keep the color down . " At times , Webb will lightly stroke the dominant color over an area and then add touches of the same color in other sections to unify the painting .
domestication: 对于黑发，他先用靛蓝或黑色打底，高光部分则用紫色、棕色或蓝色。他还提醒说，银色高光会让头发显得发灰。“画红发时，”他警告道，“容易画成像麦当劳小丑那样夸张的红色。要保持低调，突出红色高光。”至于栗色头发，他说，用绿色和紫色打底，可以避免颜色过于艳丽。“有时，我会在大面积轻轻扫上主色，再在其他地方点缀同样的颜色，使整幅画更加统一。”
foreignization: 对于黑发，他使用靛蓝或黑色作为底色，高光部分则使用紫色、棕色或蓝色。他警告说，银色高光会使头发看起来发灰。“对于红发，”他告诫道，“倾向于将其做成罗纳德·麦当劳的颜色。保持低调，专注于红色高光。对于栗色头发，使用绿色和紫色作为底色有助于控制颜色。”有时，Webb 会在某个区域轻轻涂抹主色，然后在其他部分添加相同颜色的点缀，以统一整幅画。

source: " I 've been with the network for nine years and feel completely at home working in another language among people who have come from all parts of Latin America to do what they know best -- TV journalism , " says Miss Durham . " I work with the Hispanic network as a matter of choice . I feel its news service is the professional equal of any of its English-language counterparts . We 're more inclined to be go-getters and in some ways we 're better informed . And we 're first on the scene of events . " She can say this with assurance because she previously worked six years for the highly regarded Public Broadcasting System , and she has taught communications at Hartford University ' in Connecticut .
domestication: 杜兰小姐说：“我在这家网络公司已经九年了，在这个由来自拉美各地的同行组成的团队里用另一种语言工作，我感到非常自在，大家都是做自己最擅长的事情——电视新闻。”“我是出于个人选择加入这家西班牙语网络公司的，我觉得他们的新闻服务不输任何英语媒体同行，甚至可以说，我们更加积极主动，对信息的掌握也更全面，而且我们总是第一时间出现在新闻现场。”她这么说是有底气的，因为她之前在备受尊敬的公共广播系统工作了六年，还曾在康涅狄格州的哈特福德大学教授过传播学。
foreignization: “我已经在这个网络工作九年了，感觉完全像在家里一样，用另一种语言在来自拉丁美洲各个地方的人们中间工作，他们来做他们最擅长的事情——电视新闻，”达勒姆小姐说。“我选择与西班牙语网络合作。我觉得它的新闻服务在专业水平上可以与任何英语频道相媲美。我们更倾向于积极进取，在某些方面我们更加消息灵通。而且我们总是最先到达事件现场。”她可以这么说，因为她之前曾在备受尊敬的公共广播系统工作了六年，并且在康涅狄格州的哈特福德大学教授过传播学。

" I work with the Hispanic network as a matter of choice . I feel its news service is the professional equal of any of its English-language counterparts . We 're more inclined to be go-getters and in some ways we 're better informed . And we 're first on the scene of events . " She can say this with assurance because she previously worked six years for the highly regarded Public Broadcasting System , and she has taught communications at Hartford University ' in Connecticut .

source: It would be foolish to conjure up Columbus as a dashing , brilliant seaman or even as a bold and enlightened explorer . He certainly was a great sailor , and his successful crossing of the Ocean Sea was an unparalleled feat of navigation . Yet very little comes through from the scant information we have on Columbus the man , or from his own writings , to suggest that he was the swashbuckling , decisive , and gallant Renaissance figure often portrayed in schoolbooks .
domestication: 把哥伦布想象成一个英俊潇洒、才华横溢的航海家，或者是个大胆开明的探险家，这未免太傻了。他确实是个了不起的水手，成功横渡大西洋的壮举，在航海史上堪称无人能及。然而，从我们对哥伦布这个人有限的了解和他的著作中，几乎找不出什么证据来证明他就是教科书里描述的那个英勇果敢、风度翩翩的文艺复兴时代的英雄。
foreignization: 把哥伦布想象成一个英俊、杰出的水手，甚至是一个大胆而开明的探险家，是愚蠢的。他当然是一名伟大的水手，他成功横渡大洋的壮举是无与伦比的航海成就。然而，从我们掌握的关于哥伦布这个人的有限信息，以及他自己的著作中，几乎没有什么能够表明他就是学校教科书中经常描绘的那种豪迈、果断和英勇的文艺复兴时期人物。
