source: With the spectacular collapse of so many dot-coms over the last couple of years , it 's easy to forget that the history of American invention is a huge collection of failed ideas , some brilliant and unlucky , many febrile and plain idiotic . Passenger space travel may happen some day . Towing icebergs to drought-stricken areas probably wo n't . Aspirations , along with bad ideas , never die . Trial -- and lots of error -- is embedded in entrepreneurship . The impulse to change the world for the better can as easily result in a breakthrough as a humiliating , and expensive , defeat . Flying Cars
domestication: 过去这两年，许多互联网公司轰然倒塌，让人容易忘记美国的发明史其实是一堆失败想法的大杂烩，有的想法虽好却命运多舛，有的则是脑子一热的胡思乱想。也许有一天会有载人太空旅行，但把冰山拖到干旱地区恐怕不太可能。理想不灭，坏点子也不断。创业之路总是伴随着无数次的试错。改变世界的冲动既可能带来突破，也可能导致丢脸又烧钱的失败。飞行汽车就是个例子。
foreignization: 随着过去几年如此多的互联网公司在壮观的崩塌中消失，很容易忘记美国发明史实际上是一个巨大失败想法的集合，其中一些是天才但不幸的，许多则是狂热而纯粹愚蠢的。乘客太空旅行可能有朝一日会实现。将冰山拖到干旱地区则很可能不会。抱负，连同糟糕的想法，永远不会消亡。尝试——以及大量的错误——是企业家精神的一部分。改变世界使其变得更好的冲动同样可能导致突破，也可能导致尴尬且代价高昂的失败。飞行汽车

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

With the spectacular collapse of so many dot-coms over the last couple of years , it 's easy to forget that the history of American invention is a huge collection of failed ideas , some brilliant and unlucky , many febrile and plain idiotic . Passenger space travel may happen some day . Towing icebergs to drought-stricken areas probably wo n't . Aspirations , along with bad ideas , never die . Trial -- and lots of error -- is embedded in entrepreneurship . The impulse to change the world for the better can as easily result in a breakthrough as a humiliating , and expensive , defeat . Flying Cars

source: Bartolome de Las Casas , an eminent Spanish bishop , used the accounts of his father and uncle , who had sailed with Columbus , to frame his luminous Apologia . He devoted himself to the denunciation of the plundering and devastation of the new territories with the " loss of so many thousands of souls . " Appalled by Spanish cruelties , Las Casas passionately insisted that the peoples of the New World " are our brothers , redeemed by Christ 's most precious blood , no less than the wisest and most learned men in the whole world . " Through books , sermons , and direct representation to the crown , he pleaded the cause of the oppressed Indians for more than half a century . WHY DID COLUMBUS GO BACK A THIRD TIME ?
domestication:
巴托洛梅·德·拉斯卡萨斯，一位杰出的西班牙主教，利用他父亲和叔叔与哥伦布一起航行的经历，写出了他那光辉的《辩白书》。他致力于揭露新领土遭受的掠夺和破坏，感叹“成千上万的灵魂”因此丧生。对西班牙人的暴行感到震惊，拉斯卡萨斯满怀激情地坚持认为：“新大陆的人民是我们的兄弟，他们同样被基督最珍贵的宝血所赎回，与世界上最有智慧和学识的人没有两样。”通过书籍、布道和直接向王室陈情，他为受压迫的印第安人奔走了五十多年。

哥伦布为什么第三次回到新大陆？
foreignization: 巴托洛梅·德·拉斯卡萨斯，一位杰出的西班牙主教，利用他父亲和叔叔（曾与哥伦布一起航行）的叙述，构建了他的光辉的《辩护书》。他致力于谴责对新领土的掠夺和破坏，以及“成千上万灵魂的丧失。”对西班牙人的暴行感到震惊，拉斯卡萨斯热情地坚持认为新大陆的人民“是我们的兄弟，他们被基督最宝贵的血液所救赎，不亚于世界上最有智慧和学识的人。”通过书籍、布道和直接向王室陈情，他为受压迫的印第安人奔走呼号超过半个世纪。哥伦布为什么第三次回去？

Bartolome de Las Casas , an eminent Spanish bishop , used the accounts of his father and uncle , who had sailed with Columbus , to frame his luminous Apologia . He devoted himself to the denunciation of the plundering and devastation of the new territories with the " loss of so many thousands of souls . " Appalled by Spanish cruelties , Las Casas passionately insisted that the peoples of the New World " are our brothers , redeemed by Christ 's most precious blood , no less than the wisest and most learned men in the whole world . " Through books , sermons , and direct representation to the crown , he pleaded the cause of the oppressed Indians for more than half a century . WHY DID COLUMBUS GO BACK A THIRD TIME ?

哥伦布为什么第三次回到新大陆？

source: It was an easy step from feeding the sheep to feeding the shepherd . The first Saturday Peter had , simply in the line of pastoral encouragement , lifted the lid of one of her pots where she was cooking fresh pea soup and taken a whiff so deep and satisfying she thought the bells in the tower would clang .
domestication: 从喂羊到喂牧羊人，这一步说起来也就那么回事。彼得第一个周六来，纯粹是出于对羊群的关怀，他掀开了她煮的新鲜豌豆汤的锅盖，深深吸了一口气，那滋味真是太满足了，她差点以为教堂尖塔上的钟都要被这香气敲响了。
foreignization: 从喂羊到喂牧羊人只是一个简单的步骤。第一个星期六，彼得仅仅是为了牧灵鼓励，就掀开了她正在煮新鲜豌豆汤的一个锅盖，吸了一口气，如此深长而满足，她以为钟楼里的钟会响起。

It was an easy step from feeding the sheep to feeding the shepherd . The first Saturday Peter had , simply in the line of pastoral encouragement , lifted the lid of one of her pots where she was cooking fresh pea soup and taken a whiff so deep and satisfying she thought the bells in the tower would clang .

It was an easy step from feeding the sheep to feeding the shepherd . The first Saturday Peter had , simply in the line of pastoral encouragement , lifted the lid of one of her pots where she was cooking fresh pea soup and taken a whiff so deep and satisfying she thought the bells in the tower would clang .
从喂羊到喂牧羊人只是一个简单的步骤。第一个星期六，彼得仅仅是为了牧灵鼓励，就掀开了她正在煮新鲜豌豆汤的一个锅盖，吸了一口气，如此深长而满足，她以为钟楼里的钟会响起。

source: In fact , hard work has been a key factor behind the rise of Alice in Chains . The group emerged in 1990 with its debut album , Facelift ; that LP 's single Man in the Box ' garnered both Grammy and MTV award nominations last year . Before recording Dirt , the foursome kept busy by quietly releasing a mellow , guest-laden EP titled Sap and making an appearance in Cameron Crowe 's recent Seattle-based film , Singles . That movie 's soundtrack considerably boosted the group 's profile when the crunchy dirge Would ? ' caught on . ( The single is also included on Dirt . )
domestication: 其实，努力工作是爱丽丝囚徒乐队崛起的关键。1990年，他们带着首张专辑《Facelift》横空出世，《Man in the Box》这首单曲去年不仅提名了格莱美，还登上了MTV大奖的候选名单。在录制《Dirt》之前，乐队成员们也没闲着，悄悄发行了一张风格温和、嘉宾云集的EP《Sap》，还客串出演了卡梅隆·克罗执导的西雅图背景电影《单身男子》。这部电影的原声带里收录了《Would?》这首歌，它的流行大大提升了乐队的知名度。这首歌也在《Dirt》这张专辑里。

source: At the same time , Hudson took a mop to headquarters . He brought in experienced fast-food executives , like Frank B. Young , a Wendy 's alumnus , to run the company-owned restaurants division , and Michael Shumsky , a Taco Bell veteran , to oversee operations . Andrew Ritger , a onetime Hardee 's executive , slashed costs throughout the system -- from more efficient shipping to trimming the number of Sonic 's five hamburger patty sizes down to two : regular and kid-size . By 2001 , operating expenses were down to 73% of the average franchisee 's sales .
domestication: 与此同时，哈德森带着“扫帚”回到了总部。他请来了像弗兰克·B·扬这样的快餐业老将，这位曾在温蒂汉堡工作过的高管负责公司自营餐厅的运营；还请来了塔可贝尔的老兵迈克尔·舒姆斯基，来监督整个运营。安德鲁·里特格，这位曾效力于哈迪汉堡的高管，更是大刀阔斧地削减了系统内的成本——从提高物流效率到将 Sonic 的五种汉堡肉饼尺寸简化为两种：常规和儿童款。到了2001年，营业费用已经降到了平均加盟商销售额的73%。

source: Just ask Jeremy Davey . He founded Pabulum in March 1997 , convinced that the brave new world of the Web was going to be the next big thing in marketing and advertising . Initially , the business was a one-man show : Davey would work with customers on developing promotional Web sites with his Pentium 133 notebook and then farm out the graphics-intensive components of the design , such as photo manipulation and streaming video , to subcontractors that had the equipment to do the job . It did n't take him long to realize , however , that the field of on-line marketing was crowded with entrepreneurs . If Davey wanted Pabulum to grow , he was going to have to be something more than just another digital-ad guy with bright ideas and a trusty laptop .
domestication: 就问问杰里米·戴维吧。1997年3月，他创立了Pabulum公司，坚信互联网这个新世界将会是营销和广告的下一个风口。起初，这生意就是他一个人单打独斗：用他的奔腾133笔记本电脑为客户开发宣传网站，然后把那些需要专业设备才能完成的设计工作，比如照片处理和流媒体视频，外包给有技术的分包商。然而，没过多久他就意识到，网上营销这一行里高手如云。如果想让Pabulum发展起来，光靠一些好点子和一台可靠的笔记本电脑当数字广告人，显然是不够的。

source: A newly proposed solution , ironically enough , might make use of a very old technology : paper itself . Not to preserve all the digital documents we are creating in hard copy , but rather to preserve the specifications for a decoding mechanism-a kind of " universal computer " defined by a few hundred lines of software code-that will allow the documents to be deciphered in the future . Archived on paper and across the Inter-net , the mechanism would be guaranteed to survive for centuries . Proponents of such an approach say it will make it possible to preserve everything-a complete record of humanity . Maybe then history can finally stop repeating itself .
domestication: 新提出的解决方案，颇具讽刺意味的是，可能会利用一种非常古老的技术：纸张。不是为了保存我们创建的所有数字文档的纸质版，而是为了保存解码机制的规格——一种由几百行软件代码定义的“通用计算机”——这样未来就能解码这些文档。这些信息可以存储在纸上，也可以通过互联网存档，确保能够保存数百年。支持这种做法的人说，这将使人类能够保存一切，记录下完整的人类历史。或许这样一来，历史终于可以不再重演了。
foreignization: 一个新提出的解决方案，颇具讽刺意味的是，可能会利用一种非常古老的技术：纸本身。不是为了保存我们创建的所有数字文档的硬拷贝，而是为了保存解码机制的规范——这是一种由几百行软件代码定义的“通用计算机”——这将使未来的文档能够被解密。以纸张形式和通过互联网存档，该机制可以保证保存数个世纪。这种做法的支持者表示，这将使保存一切成为可能——人类的完整记录。也许历史最终可以停止重演。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

A newly proposed solution , ironically enough , might make use of a very old technology : paper itself . Not to preserve all the digital documents we are creating in hard copy , but rather to preserve the specifications for a decoding mechanism-a kind of " universal computer " defined by a few hundred lines of software code-that will allow the documents to be deciphered in the future . Archived on paper and across the Inter-net , the mechanism would be guaranteed to survive for centuries . Proponents of such an approach say it will make it possible to preserve everything-a complete record of humanity . Maybe then history can finally stop repeating itself .

Archived on paper and across the Inter-net , the mechanism would be guaranteed to survive for centuries . Proponents of such an approach say it will make it possible to preserve everything-a complete record of humanity . Maybe then history can finally stop repeating itself .
一个新提出的解决方案，颇具讽刺意味的是，可能会利用一种非常古老的技术：纸本身。不是为了保存我们创建的所有数字文档的硬拷贝，而是为了保存解码机制的规范——这是一种由几百行软件代码定义的“通用计算机”——这将使未来的文档能够被解密。以纸张形式和通过互联网存档，该机制可以保证保存数个世纪。这种做法的支持者表示，这将使保存一切成为可能——人类的完整记录。也许历史最终可以停止重演。

source: Indeed , the Chicago venture-capital firm of Golder , Thoma , Cressey , Rauner Inc . ( GTCR ) is engaged in the consolidation of same 25 industries , including golf courses , rock quarries , temp agencies , funeral homes , security guards , and even coin-operated laundries in apartment buildings . " When you combine companies , you get true synergies and savings . By bringing together products and services , you also build market power . And also , of course , you can leverage good people and good systems through companies that are acquired , " explains Bryan Cressey , a GTCR principal .
domestication: 确实，芝加哥的风险投资公司戈尔德·托马斯·克雷斯西·罗纳公司（GTCR）正在整合25个行业，包括高尔夫球场、采石场、临时工机构、殡仪馆、保安服务，甚至公寓楼里的投币自助洗衣店。“合并公司时，就能产生真正的协同效应和节省成本。通过整合产品和服务，还能增强市场影响力。当然，你也可以在被收购的公司中发挥优秀人才和优质系统的作用。”GTCR的合伙人布赖恩·克雷斯西解释道。

source: A. To nail the flirty flush that was all over runways , pick a formula based on your skin tone , says Mai Quynh , a makeup artist for Mark . If you 're fair , opt for a less concentrated powder blush . " Also , apply it with a big , fluffy brush -- small , stiff ones deposit more pigment , " says Quynh . Medium or dark complected ? Creams provide a more dramatic glow .
domestication: 要抓住 runway 上那股撩人的红晕，选对适合你肤色的配方很重要，化妆师 Mai Quynh 为马克品牌建议道。如果你是浅肤色，可以选择浓度较低的粉状腮红。Quynh 还说：“用大而蓬松的刷子上妆——小而硬的刷子容易上色过重。”如果是中等或深肤色，霜状腮红能带来更耀眼的光泽。

source: Raised in Beirut , Lebanon , to be cosmopolitan in the spirit of that city , he went to Hamburg , Germany , where he was radicalized , and then wound up at the controls of Flight 93 , the one that was supposed to hit the U.S. Capitol . source: PHOTO ( BLACK &; WHITE ) : When in 1507 the cartographer Martin Waldsemuller set about making this map of the discoveries of Columbus and his followers , he portrayed most of them as one continuous strip of land -- and christened it America in honor of Amerigo Vespucci , whose portrait he included . Columbus could n't complain ; he had died a year earlier .

source: Of course , Pat was much more than just a vocal search engine -- but so are plenty of internet of things devices we encounter in homes today . From smart refrigerators that can let you know their contents and when products are about to expire , to smart lighting that can make it easier to navigate a room or change the ambiance , today we have the option to make every room of the home just as futuristic .

source: No more messy washing of roller trays with Peel-A-Tray ( $7.50 ; peelatray.com ) , which has four removable liners that are easily balled up and thrown out . The liners also make it a cinch to drain unused paint back into the can or wrap up a roller mid-project to avoid having to clean it between coats . When your final liner is gone , you can use the tray one last time before disposing of it or washing and reusing it .

source: Raymond Chandler ( 1888-1959 ) . Chandler has long been the intellectual 's darling , a mystery writer for people who do n't like mysteries . On the one hand , he talked of taking murder out of the English drawing room and putting it in the streets where it belonged . At the same time , his characters spent a surprising amount of time in the homes and haunts of the California rich , a West Coast equivalent of the country house on the moors . His achievement , it seems to me , is less that he brought the traditional mystery into the alleys and gutters than that he put a novelist 's spin on the pulp tradition of Dime Detective and Black Mask .
domestication: 雷蒙德·钱德勒（1888-1959）。钱德勒一直被视为知识分子的宠儿，是不爱悬疑小说的人也会喜欢的悬疑作家。他常说要把凶杀从英式客厅搬到大街上，让它回归本色。可他的角色却常常出入加州富豪的豪宅和社交圈，这就好比把英国荒野上的庄园搬到了西海岸。在我看来，他的成就不在于把传统的侦探故事带进小巷和阴沟，而在于给廉价杂志《一角侦探》和《黑色面具》的传统添上了小说家的笔触。
foreignization: 雷蒙德·钱德勒（1888-1959）。钱德勒长期以来一直是知识分子的宠儿，一个为不喜欢悬疑小说的人写作的悬疑作家。一方面，他谈到将谋杀从英国的客厅中移出，放到它本该属于的街头。同时，他的角色却出人意料地花了很多时间在加利福尼亚富人的家中和社交场所，这是摩尔荒原上的乡间别墅的西海岸版本。在我看来，他的成就不在于将传统悬疑小说带入小巷和阴沟，而在于他以小说家的视角重新诠释了《一毛钱侦探》和《黑色面具》等通俗文学的传统。

Raymond Chandler ( 1888-1959 ) . Chandler has long been the intellectual 's darling , a mystery writer for people who do n't like mysteries . On the one hand , he talked of taking murder out of the English drawing room and putting it in the streets where it belonged . At the same time , his characters spent a surprising amount of time in the homes and haunts of the California rich , a West Coast equivalent of the country house on the moors . His achievement , it seems to me , is less that he brought the traditional mystery into the alleys and gutters than that he put a novelist 's spin on the pulp tradition of Dime Detective and Black Mask .

source: For a guy who knew nothing about ambulances four years ago , Paul Verrochi has come a long way . Since launching American Medical Response ( AMR ) , in August 1992 , he has built the country 's largest ambulance company , now with $550 million in annualized revenues , some 10,000 employees , and operations in 26 states . And fueled by a $100-million credit line and $90 million from a stock offering last spring , expansion is going full tilt .
domestication: 四年前，保罗·维罗奇对救护车一窍不通，现在可真是大变样了。1992年8月，他创办了美国医疗响应公司（AMR），短短几年间，就把公司做成了全美最大的救护车公司，年收入达到了5亿5千万美元，雇员超过1万人，业务遍布26个州。今年春天，公司还通过股票发行筹集了9000万美元，再加上1亿美元的信贷额度，扩张的步伐更是快得不得了。
foreignization: 对于一个四年前对救护车一无所知的人来说，保罗·维罗奇已经走了很长一段路。自1992年8月创立美国医疗响应（AMR）以来，他已经建立了全国最大的救护车公司，目前年收入为5.5亿美元，拥有约10,000名员工，在26个州开展业务。并且在去年春天获得1亿美元信贷额度和9000万美元股票发行的推动下，扩张正在全速进行。

For a guy who knew nothing about ambulances four years ago , Paul Verrochi has come a long way . And fueled by a $100-million credit line and $90 million from a stock offering last spring , expansion is going full tilt .

source: The result was that by the late 20th century they discovered that much of the business-related work that makes fortunes for American lawyers-taxes , for instance-had slipped out of their hands into those of the giant accounting firms . This was bad enough . But then people began wondering in public just what justification there was for the conveyancing monopoly at all . Surely accounting firms , real estate agents and banks could do the work just as well , and perhaps more efficiently and more cheaply .
domestication: 结果到了20世纪末，他们发现很多让美国律师发财的业务，比如税务，都落入了大型会计师事务所的手中。这已经够糟糕的了。但更糟的是，人们开始公开质疑，这些律师对房产转让的垄断到底有没有道理。毕竟，会计师事务所、房地产中介和银行也能干同样的活，而且可能更高效、更便宜。
foreignization: 结果是到了20世纪末，他们发现许多使美国律师发财的商业相关工作——例如税务——已经从他们的手中滑落到大型会计公司的手中。这已经够糟糕的了。但随后人们开始公开质疑到底有什么理由维持这种房产转让垄断。当然，会计公司、房地产代理人和银行也能做得一样好，甚至可能更高效、更便宜。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The result was that by the late 20th century they discovered that much of the business-related work that makes fortunes for American lawyers-taxes , for instance-had slipped out of their hands into those of the giant accounting firms . This was bad enough . But then people began wondering in public just what justification there was for the conveyancing monopoly at all . Surely accounting firms , real estate agents and banks could do the work just as well , and perhaps more efficiently and more cheaply .

source: Then he took high-school biology , and his class discussed crop improvement and hybridization . " Wow , maybe I could get a ripe melon that way , " he thought . So he tried a cross . One of the parents was probably Sugar Baby ' . The other was from a package of seeds some friends had given him labeled " watermelon . " Glenn did n't keep much in the way of records ; he thought he was just playing around .

One of the parents was probably Sugar Baby ' . The other was from a package of seeds some friends had given him labeled " watermelon . " Glenn did n't keep much in the way of records ; he thought he was just playing around .
后来他上了高中的生物课，课堂上讨论了作物改良和杂交技术。“哇，说不定我用这个方法能种出熟透的甜瓜呢。”他心想。于是他就试着做了个杂交。其中一个亲本可能是“糖宝宝”西瓜，另一个是从朋友那里得到的一包种子，标签上写着“西瓜”。格伦没有记太多笔记，他觉得自己只是在玩玩而已。

Then he took high-school biology , and his class discussed crop improvement and hybridization . " Wow , maybe I could get a ripe melon that way , " he thought . So he tried a cross . One of the parents was probably Sugar Baby ' . The other was from a package of seeds some friends had given him labeled " watermelon . " Glenn did n't keep much in the way of records ; he thought he was just playing around .
然后他上了高中的生物课，他的班级讨论了作物改良和杂交。“哇，也许我可以用这种方法得到一个熟透的甜瓜，”他想。所以他尝试了一次杂交。其中一个亲本可能是“Sugar Baby”。另一个是从一些朋友给他的种子包装上标有“西瓜”的种子。格伦没有保留多少记录；他认为自己只是在玩玩而已。

source: That what-if became Davey 's ticket to technological plenty . WinStar agreed to place a dish on the roof of 701 Sutter Street at no cost , contingent on the company 's obtaining roof rights to 995 Market Street . As for Meieran , he needed little convincing : outfitting the larger building with high-speed wireless telecommunications fell right in line with his own development plans . " I envisioned building a futuristic multimedia community there , " he says .

source: Laura Macdonald , a political science professor at Carleton University in Ottawa , said despite the rhetorical pressure from Trump , the negotiations still appeared to be proceeding remarkably normally . But the limits of Trump 's leverage were also becoming clear with the president still needing to get any agreement through a Congress that has concerns about any pact that does not include Canada .
domestication: 渥太华卡尔顿大学的政治学教授劳拉·麦克唐纳说，尽管特朗普施加了很大的舆论压力，但谈判似乎仍在按部就班地进行。不过，特朗普的影响力也有其局限性，因为总统还需要将任何协议提交给国会审批，而国会对于没有加拿大参与的任何协定都持保留态度。
foreignization: 劳拉·麦克唐纳，渥太华卡尔顿大学的政治学教授，表示尽管面临特朗普的言辞压力，谈判似乎仍在出人意料地正常进行。但特朗普的影响力限制也日益明显，总统仍需让任何协议在国会通过，而国会对任何不包括加拿大的协议都有疑虑。

source: Our lifestyle is not for everyone . Each person has to choose his or her priorities . For me , a relatively pure environment is more important that a world of gadgets . We delight in the wilderness around us , and in the comings and goings of animals , weather , and seasons . But people who do n't understand still shake their heads and say that we live " in the middle of nowhere . "
domestication: 我们的生活方式不是人人都适合的。每个人都有自己的选择和优先考虑的事情。对我来说，一个相对纯净的环境比满是高科技的东西重要得多。我们乐在周围的荒野中，享受着动物的来来往往、天气的变化和四季的更替。但那些不理解的人还是会摇头，说我们住在“不毛之地”。

source: Palmer developed a rivalry and lifelong friendship with Nicklaus and Gary Player , and the trio eventually became known as the Big Three . Among them , they won seven straight Masters titles from 1960 to 1966 , and they hit ceremonial tee shots together at Augusta National to signal the start of the year 's first major . Palmer hit his first ceremonial tee shot at Augusta in 2007 . Nicklaus joined him in 2010 , and Player was added in 2012 .
domestication: 帕尔默和尼克劳斯、加里·普莱尔既是对手又是终生好友，三人最终被称为“三巨头”。在这三人中，从1960年到1966年，他们连续夺得了七次美国大师赛的冠军。每年的第一场大满贯赛事开始时，他们会在奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部一起打象征性的开球。2007年，帕尔默首次在奥古斯塔打象征性的开球。2010年，尼克劳斯加入了他的行列，而普莱尔则是在2012年加入的。
foreignization: 帕尔默与尼克劳斯和加里·普莱耶发展出了一种竞争关系和终生的友谊，三人最终被称为“三巨头”。在他们之中，从1960年到1966年连续赢得了七届大师赛冠军，并且他们会在奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部共同击出仪式性的开球，以宣告年度首场大满贯赛事的开始。帕尔默于2007年在奥古斯塔首次击出仪式性开球。尼克劳斯于2010年加入他，而普莱耶则是在2012年加入。

Palmer hit his first ceremonial tee shot at Augusta in 2007 . Nicklaus joined him in 2010 , and Player was added in 2012 .

source: Beth : I think it 's unfair to assume that women being on opposite sides is the result of sexist writing ( although it is something that can and does happen ) . Women do n't always get along . They can argue , they can fight , they can hate everything the other one stands for . It 's called the human experience . What is sexist is not understanding your characters and their motivations , and assuming that women having different opinions is the same as a cat fight .
domestication: 贝丝：我觉得不能一概而论地说女性角色对立就是性别歧视的产物（虽然这种情况确实存在）。女人之间不总是和睦相处的，她们会吵架，会争斗，甚至会厌恶对方所代表的一切。这叫人性百态。真正性别歧视的是没有理解角色和她们的动机，却把女性意见不合当成是一场猫 fight。
foreignization: Beth：我认为假设女性站在对立面是性别歧视写作的结果是不公平的（尽管这种情况确实可能发生）。女性并不总是相处融洽。她们可以争吵，可以打架，可以憎恨对方所代表的一切。这叫做人类经验。真正性别歧视的是不理解你的角色及其动机，并认为女性有不同的意见等同于猫fight。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Beth : I think it 's unfair to assume that women being on opposite sides is the result of sexist writing ( although it is something that can and does happen ) . Women do n't always get along . They can argue , they can fight , they can hate everything the other one stands for . It 's called the human experience . What is sexist is not understanding your characters and their motivations , and assuming that women having different opinions is the same as a cat fight .
贝丝：我觉得不能一概而论地说女性角色对立就是性别歧视的产物（虽然这种情况确实存在）。女人之间不总是和睦相处的，她们会吵架，会争斗，甚至会厌恶对方所代表的一切。这叫人性百态。真正性别歧视的是没有理解角色和她们的动机，却把女性意见不合当成是一场猫 fight。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

They can argue , they can fight , they can hate everything the other one stands for . It 's called the human experience . What is sexist is not understanding your characters and their motivations , and assuming that women having different opinions is the same as a cat fight .

source: If you tell the whole truth and your answers raise a red flag -- say you have high blood pressure -- sites are likely to spit out the questionnaire and reject your request . That 's because the web sites are typically programmed to note undesirable or suspicious answers and to turn down anyone who fails to meet certain criteria .
domestication: 如果你把实话全盘托出，比如你有高血压，网站多半会直接把你拒之门外，问卷也白填了。这是因为这些网站通常都设置好了程序，一看到不中听或者可疑的答案，就会立马把不符合条件的人挡在外面。
foreignization: 如果你说出全部真相，而你的答案引起了警觉——比如你有高血压——网站很可能会弹出问卷并拒绝你的请求。那是因为这些网站通常被编程设置为注意不理想或可疑的答案，并拒绝任何不符合某些标准的人。

source: Some of the late McGees are weak books , but so what ? Start with The Deep Blue Goodby and read them all in order . Of the non-McGees , I have especially fond recollections of The End of the Night and One Monday We Killed Them All . Each in its own quiet way is dark enough to make noir look like a light show .

source: Cressey , who has been financing consolidations since the 1970s ( GTCR has about $400 million invested in such ventures ) , recommends that entrepreneurs first examine the consolidation 's rationale . " If there are real savings and economies , then that probably will continue , " he says . " But if benefits do n't materialize -- and they do n't always -- it will be status quo for a long time . The downside risk for entrepreneurs who hold out against smart consolidations depends on how good they are . If they are very good managers , there 's not a big downside . But if they 're in the middle of the pack , the consolidation wave of lower costs could roll over them . "
domestication: 克雷斯自20世纪70年代就开始资助企业整合（GTCR在这些项目上投资了约4亿美元），他建议创业者首先要审视整合的合理性。“如果真能节省成本，提高效率，那这种好处大概率会持续下去，”他说，“但如果预期的好处没有实现——这种情况也不是没有发生过——那么事情可能会长时间停滞不前。对于那些抗拒明智整合的企业家来说，风险取决于他们的能力。如果他们真的很擅长管理，那也没什么大不了的。但若是中等水平，随着成本降低的整合浪潮来袭，他们可能会被淹没。”
foreignization: 克雷斯西自20世纪70年代以来一直在为整合提供资金（GTCR在这些项目中投资了约4亿美元），他建议企业家首先审视整合的合理性。“如果有实际的节省和经济效应，那么这可能将继续下去，”他说。“但如果利益没有实现——而它们并不总是会实现——那么很长一段时间内将保持现状。对于那些抵制明智整合的企业家来说，下行风险取决于他们有多优秀。如果他们是非常优秀的管理者，那么下行风险不大。但如果他们在行业中处于中等水平，成本降低的整合浪潮可能会淹没他们。”

Cressey , who has been financing consolidations since the 1970s ( GTCR has about $400 million invested in such ventures ) , recommends that entrepreneurs first examine the consolidation 's rationale . " If there are real savings and economies , then that probably will continue , " he says . " But if benefits do n't materialize -- and they do n't always -- it will be status quo for a long time . The downside risk for entrepreneurs who hold out against smart consolidations depends on how good they are . If they are very good managers , there 's not a big downside . But if they 're in the middle of the pack , the consolidation wave of lower costs could roll over them . "

source: At the same time , it is also important to know the role you play in reporting a loss . Here are just a few effective ways to help ensure the best response to your claim : Give Immediate Notice . Promptly give notice to your insurance company or agent after a loss to covered property has occurred . Make an Inventory List of the Damaged Personal Property . Include all bills , receipts and related documents that justify the figures in the inventory . Notify the police as soon as possible after a loss by theft . Notify the credit card or fund transfer card company of loss or theft of a credit card or funds transfer card . Make an Attempt to Protect the Damaged Property from Further Damage . If repairs to the property are required , make the reasonable and necessary repairs as well as keep an accurate record of the repair expenses .
domestication:
同时，了解自己在报损中扮演的角色也很重要。以下几点能帮你确保理赔顺利：

第一时间通知保险公司或代理人。一旦发生保险覆盖的财产损失，要尽快告知他们。

列出受损个人财产清单。清单中要包含所有证明物品价值的账单、收据及相关文件。

如遇盗窃，尽快报警。还要及时通知信用卡或资金转账卡公司，报告卡片丢失或被盗的情况。

尽量防止受损财产进一步损坏。如果需要修理，要进行合理且必要的修缮，并准确记录维修费用。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

At the same time , it is also important to know the role you play in reporting a loss . Here are just a few effective ways to help ensure the best response to your claim : Give Immediate Notice . Promptly give notice to your insurance company or agent after a loss to covered property has occurred . Make an Inventory List of the Damaged Personal Property . Include all bills , receipts and related documents that justify the figures in the inventory . Notify the police as soon as possible after a loss by theft . Notify the credit card or fund transfer card company of loss or theft of a credit card or funds transfer card . Make an Attempt to Protect the Damaged Property from Further Damage . If repairs to the property are required , make the reasonable and necessary repairs as well as keep an accurate record of the repair expenses .

source: For Columbia , signing Alice in Chains was a deliberate move to regain the label 's foothold in the hard-rock market . They came to us at a time when we were hungry for music , ' says label president Don Ienner , who has since taken the band - especially guitarist Cantrell , whom he refers to as a future guitar god ' - under his wing . From the beginning , Ienner turned the building of Alice 's career into a crusade : I flipped out the first time I heard their demo tape . '
domestication: 哥伦比亚唱片签约音链乐队（Alice in Chains）是为了重新夺回在硬摇滚市场的地位。当时我们正渴求新的音乐，他们就像及时雨一样出现了，”哥伦比亚唱片的总裁唐·伊纳尔说。他后来成了乐队的伯乐，尤其是对吉他手坎特雷尔情有独钟，称他为未来的吉他之神。从一开始，伊纳尔就把扶持音链乐队当作自己的使命：“第一次听到他们的样带时，我就被彻底征服了。”
foreignization: 对于哥伦比亚唱片公司来说，签约Alice in Chains是重新获得公司在硬摇滚市场立足点的有意之举。“他们在我们渴望音乐的时候找到了我们，”唱片公司总裁唐·伊纳说，他此后将这支乐队——尤其是吉他手坎特雷尔，他称其为未来的吉他之神——置于自己的庇护之下。从一开始，伊纳就把打造Alice的职业生涯变成了一场运动：“我第一次听到他们的demo带时就疯了。”

source: When Hurricane Andrew slammed into the Florida coast in August 1992 , Brian Pariser 's home was one of more than 135,000 damaged or destroyed . Pariser believed his home was fully covered -- until a contractor told him it would cost $165,874 to rebuild . That was $62,445 more than his insurance policy would pay .
domestication: 1992年8月，飓风安德鲁猛烈袭击了佛罗里达海岸，布莱恩·帕里泽的家也在被毁的13万多户中。帕里泽原以为自己的房子是完全有保险的，直到承包商告诉他重建需要16万5874美元。这比保险公司赔付的多了6万2445美元。真是晴天霹雳，屋漏偏逢连夜雨啊。

source: In Woody Allen 's Midnight In Paris- which if it is n't playing at a theater near you this very second will be soon and which you should definitely go see- Owen Wilson plays a man obsessed with the past . Traveling around Paris with his fiancee , he laments our current times , believing the best of days were the 1920s , when literary kings mixed with great artists and thinkers . Then , in one of those fanciful inventions Woody Allen specializes in , Wilson suddenly is transported there and finds himself hanging out with Hemingway and DaIi , Gertrude Stein and F. Scott Fitzgerald . It 's heaven for him , until he realizes that everyone during that time wishes he had lived in the Renaissance and everyone from the Renaissance wishes he had lived in Roman times and so on .
domestication: 伍迪·艾伦的《午夜巴黎》很快就会在你家附近的电影院上映，你可千万别错过。在这部电影里，欧文·威尔逊饰演一个痴迷过去的人。他和未婚妻在巴黎游荡时，总是感叹现在这个时代，认为最好的时光是上世纪20年代，那时候文学巨匠、艺术大师和思想家们交相辉映。接着，在伍迪·艾伦擅长的天马行空想象中，威尔逊突然穿越到了那个时代，跟海明威、达利、格特鲁德·斯坦因和菲茨杰拉德混在一起。对他来说，这简直是天堂。直到他发现，那个时代的人又都向往文艺复兴时期，而文艺复兴时期的人又羡慕罗马时代，如此这般，没有尽头。
foreignization: 在伍迪·艾伦的《午夜巴黎》中——如果现在你附近的影院没有上映，很快就会有，你一定要去看——欧文·威尔逊扮演一个痴迷于过去的人。与他的未婚妻在巴黎旅行时，他哀叹我们当前的时代，认为最好的时光是20世纪20年代，当时文学巨匠与伟大的艺术家和思想家混在一起。然后，在伍迪·艾伦擅长的那种奇妙创造中，威尔逊突然被传送到了那里，发现自己与海明威和达利、格特鲁德·斯坦因和F·斯科特·菲茨杰拉德在一起。对他来说，这简直是天堂，直到他意识到那个时代的人们都希望自己生活在文艺复兴时期，而文艺复兴时期的人们又希望自己生活在罗马时代，如此等等。

source: The last time she 'd seen Peter , he 'd seemed huge but fine . She 'd been in the kitchen , bent over the oven , drawing a skewer from a line of lamb kabobs . The air was sweet with onions and bell peppers bubbling in butter . She had n't known he was behind her . Burning her fingers slightly , she had lost her balance and tumbled backward across the kitchen , shoving Peter in her path . The thought of impaling him on the skewer had crossed her mind . Stuck , the air would have slowly hissed out of him .
domestication: 上次见到彼得时，他显得魁梧又精神。当时她在厨房里，弯腰从烤箱里抽出一串羊肉串。空气中弥漫着洋葱和彩椒在黄油里翻炒的香味。她没意识到彼得就站在身后。手指被烫了一下，她一下子失去了平衡，向后跌倒，撞上了身后的彼得。她心里闪过一个念头：万一自己手中的铁签子刺进他的身体怎么办？那他就像个泄了气的皮球，慢慢悠悠地瘪下去。

source: The mass shooting at the Pittsburgh synagogue Saturday comes after more than a dozen suspicious packages containing potentially explosive devices were sent to prominent Democratic figures , like former President Barack Obama , Hillary Clinton , former CIA Director John Brennan , former Attorney General Eric Holders , and others , further fueling conversation about deepening divides and violence in America .
domestication: 周六，匹兹堡的一所犹太教堂发生了一起枪击案，这之前还发生了十多起可疑包裹事件，这些包裹含有潜在的爆炸装置，被寄给了包括前总统奥巴马、希拉里·克林顿、前中情局局长约翰·布伦南、前司法部长埃里克·霍尔德等民主党重要人物。这些事件进一步引发了关于美国社会分裂和暴力加剧的讨论。

source: " Our study presents an interesting finding in the form of the multicomponent , tumor suppressive FTH1 gene : pseudogene network which can be harnessed for future diagnostic and drug development . The highly expressed microRNAs that link FTH1 and the pseudogenes are attractive biomarkers , as well as therapeutic targets for prostate cancer . Targeting or restoring proper iron storage could also be a potential avenue for therapeutic development , " said Assistant Professor Yvonne Tay , Principal Investigator at CSI Singapore who led the study .
domestication: 我们的研究发现了一个有趣的多组分肿瘤抑制基因网络，这个网络由FTH1基因及其假基因组成，未来可以用于诊断和药物开发。高度表达的微RNA将FTH1基因与假基因联系起来，这些微RNA是很有吸引力的生物标志物，也是前列腺癌的治疗靶点。新加坡CSI的首席研究员泰玉凤副教授说，调节或恢复正常的铁储存也是一个潜在的治疗方向。

source: As a group , amphibians are declining more dramatically than any other class of vertebrate , and the future of some species is in serious doubt . Having already vanished throughout much of the southern Rocky Mountains , the boreal toad is one species with a questionable future . Beginning in the 1970s , the species began disappearing throughout much of Colorado 's high country . Rocky Mountain National Park is now one of only a small number of places where this high-elevation amphibian is still hanging on . But this was n't always the case .
domestication: 两栖动物这个群体的境况比其他任何脊椎动物类群都要糟糕，有些物种的未来堪忧。以生活在高山地区的北美林蛙为例，其命运令人担忧。自20世纪70年代起，这种林蛙在科罗拉多州的高地逐渐消失，现在落基山国家公园成了它为数不多的栖息地之一。然而，这并不是一直如此。
foreignization: 作为一类，两栖动物的衰退比其他任何一类脊椎动物都要严重得多，某些物种的未来令人严重担忧。已经从落基山脉南部大部分地区消失的北极蟾蜍是未来前景堪忧的一个物种。从20世纪70年代开始，这种物种在科罗拉多州的大部分高山地区开始消失。如今，落基山国家公园是这种高海拔两栖动物仍然存活的少数几个地方之一。但情况并非总是如此。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Beginning in the 1970s , the species began disappearing throughout much of Colorado 's high country . Rocky Mountain National Park is now one of only a small number of places where this high-elevation amphibian is still hanging on . But this was n't always the case .

source: Nobody knows even what triggers it . Nine of every ten lung-cancer patients can at least blame their own smoking . Breast-cancer patients can blame nothing for sure . All the identifiable risk factors combined still only account for about 25 percent of the cases . In other words , three-quarters of women who suffer the disease have none of the known risks -- for example , family history or diets high in saturated fat . Many experts believe their cancer is launched by poisons in the environment , but there is little research in that area . The gaps in knowledge and the inability to stem breast cancer 's onslaught make it one of humanity 's cruelest diseases .
domestication: 没人知道是什么引发了它。十个肺癌患者中，有九个至少能怪自己抽烟。乳腺癌患者却找不到确切的罪魁祸首。所有已知的风险因素加起来也只占病例的四分之一。换句话说，四分之三的女性患者并没有任何已知的风险因素，比如家族史或高饱和脂肪饮食。许多专家认为，她们的癌症可能是环境中的毒素引起的，但在这方面研究得很少。知识上的空白和无法遏制乳腺癌的肆虐，使它成为人类最残忍的疾病之一。
foreignization: 没有人知道甚至是什么触发了它。每十个肺癌患者中至少有九个可以归咎于他们自己的吸烟。乳腺癌患者则无法确定地归咎于任何因素。所有可识别的风险因素加在一起仍然只能解释大约25%的病例。换句话说，患有该疾病的四分之三的女性没有已知的风险因素——例如，家族史或高饱和脂肪饮食。许多专家认为，她们的癌症是由环境中的毒物引发的，但在这一领域很少有研究。知识上的空白和无法阻止乳腺癌的侵袭使其成为人类最残酷的疾病之一。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nobody knows even what triggers it . Nine of every ten lung-cancer patients can at least blame their own smoking . Breast-cancer patients can blame nothing for sure . All the identifiable risk factors combined still only account for about 25 percent of the cases . In other words , three-quarters of women who suffer the disease have none of the known risks -- for example , family history or diets high in saturated fat . Many experts believe their cancer is launched by poisons in the environment , but there is little research in that area . The gaps in knowledge and the inability to stem breast cancer 's onslaught make it one of humanity 's cruelest diseases .

source: Tuesday through Friday nights , the bike messengers congregate at a Washington dive called Asylum for a little-known event , the " Courier Happy Hour . " At 6 p.m. they come skidding in from the streets , Lycra spidermen with names like Beaver , Beetlejuice , and Bam Bam . Concrete cowboys with shaved legs and holstered Motorola radios , scabby knees and earrings , guys who look like some weird cross between Greg LeMond and Sid Vicious . Soon the place is reminiscent of the alien bar in Star Wars , all sorts of interesting-looking beasts and hard-shelled insects hobnobbing in the dim lounge , speaking a strange patois . " Made a major southwest slice , man . Cut a big hole in the traffic in front of this Murphy at Farragut and then I shredded ' em , man , had him eating my dust .... "
domestication: 周二到周五晚上，这些自行车信使们会聚在华盛顿的一家叫“庇护所”的小酒吧，参加一个鲜为人知的活动——“快递员欢乐时光”。每到下午六点，他们从街头滑进这里，一个个身穿莱卡紧身衣，像蜘蛛侠一般，名字也奇奇怪怪，什么海狸、甲壳虫、巴姆巴姆。他们是城市里的牛仔，光着腿，摩托罗拉对讲机挂在腰间，膝盖上带着伤疤，耳朵上挂着耳环，看起来就像格雷格·勒蒙德和西德·维舍斯的奇异混血。不一会儿，这里就像是《星球大战》里的外星人酒吧，各种长相奇特的生物和硬壳昆虫在昏暗的休息室里交流，说着一种古怪的方言。“我在西南区来了个大转弯，老兄，穿过法拉古特广场前面的车流，给墨菲那小子开了个大洞，然后我就把他甩得吃灰……”

Tuesday through Friday nights , the bike messengers congregate at a Washington dive called Asylum for a little-known event , the " Courier Happy Hour . " At 6 p.m. they come skidding in from the streets , Lycra spidermen with names like Beaver , Beetlejuice , and Bam Bam . Concrete cowboys with shaved legs and holstered Motorola radios , scabby knees and earrings , guys who look like some weird cross between Greg LeMond and Sid Vicious . Soon the place is reminiscent of the alien bar in Star Wars , all sorts of interesting-looking beasts and hard-shelled insects hobnobbing in the dim lounge , speaking a strange patois . " Made a major southwest slice , man . Cut a big hole in the traffic in front of this Murphy at Farragut and then I shredded ' em , man , had him eating my dust .... "

source: During my pregnancy , I visited my doctor five times . They assured me everything was fine . So Jay and I carefully prepared ourselves for the birth . I practiced breathing techniques and relaxation , kept up my exercise , and ate a good diet . Even toward the end , a hike of eight miles was nothing unusual .
domestication: 怀孕期间，我一共去了五次医院检查，医生都跟我说一切正常。我和杰伊对宝宝的到来做好了充分的准备。我练习呼吸技巧，放松心情，坚持锻炼，还保持健康的饮食。就算到了孕晚期，走个八里路也跟玩儿似的，没啥大不了的。

source: After the scammers established contact , they 'd make up a financial emergency , like needing to pay for a flight home . If the target paid up , they 'd repeat the process until it was no longer profitable , eventually ghosting their partner who was often deeply emotionally invested in the relationship . In one case study , a Texas man spent more than $50,000 during a fake relationship with " Laura Cahill , " supposedly an American model living in Paris . That included $10,000 allegedly stolen from his stepfather .
domestication: 骗子一搭上线，就会编个财务紧急情况，比如需要钱买机票回家。要是目标上钩了，他们就会一次又一次地故技重施，直到榨不出什么油水为止，最后直接消失得无影无踪，留下对方在一段情感投入很深的关系中深受打击。有个案例特别典型，一个德州男子在与自称是住在巴黎的美国模特“劳拉·凯希尔”的虚假恋情中，花费了超过5万美元。其中，有1万美元还是从继父那里偷来的。
foreignization: 骗子在建立联系后，会编造一个财务紧急情况，比如需要支付回家的机票费用。如果目标付款了，他们会重复这个过程，直到不再有利可图，最终放弃他们的伴侣，而这些伴侣往往在情感上已经深陷这段关系。在一个案例研究中，一名得克萨斯州的男子在与所谓的“劳拉·凯希尔”的虚假关系中花费了超过5万美元，“劳拉·凯希尔”据称是一名居住在巴黎的美国模特。这其中包括据称从他继父那里偷来的1万美元。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

After the scammers established contact , they 'd make up a financial emergency , like needing to pay for a flight home . If the target paid up , they 'd repeat the process until it was no longer profitable , eventually ghosting their partner who was often deeply emotionally invested in the relationship . In one case study , a Texas man spent more than $50,000 during a fake relationship with " Laura Cahill , " supposedly an American model living in Paris . That included $10,000 allegedly stolen from his stepfather .

source: In the original study , researchers led by Feiisa Wolfe- Simon , a NASA astrobiology research fellow , cultured a microbe now known as GFAJ-I from eastern California 's Mono Lake . The lake has an unusual chemistry rich in carbonates , phosphorus , arsenic and sulfur . Wolfe- Simon and her colleagues starved GFAJ-I of phosphate , a combination of phosphorus and oxygen that 's an essential building block of life , and force-fed the critter arsenate , an almost identical arrangement of arsenic and oxygen .
domestication: 最初的研究中，由NASA天体生物学研究员费伊莎·沃尔夫-西蒙领导的团队，从加利福尼亚州东部的莫诺湖中培养出了一种微生物，现在被称为GFAJ-1。这个湖里的化学成分很特别，富含碳酸盐、磷、砷和硫。沃尔夫-西蒙和她的同事们先是让GFAJ-1缺磷，磷是生命的基本构成之一，然后又给它喂了砷酸盐，这玩意儿跟磷酸盐长得很像，只不过把磷换成了砷。
foreignization: 在原始研究中，由NASA天体生物学研究员费伊萨·沃尔夫-西蒙领导的研究人员从加利福尼亚州东部的莫诺湖培养出一种现在被称为GFAJ-1的微生物。该湖具有独特的化学成分，富含碳酸盐、磷、砷和硫。沃尔夫-西蒙和她的同事们使GFAJ-1缺乏磷酸盐，这是一种由磷和氧组成的生命的基本构建块，并强迫喂食砷酸盐，这是一种几乎相同的砷和氧的排列。

source: Edwin Gray , who headed the Federal Home Loan Bank Board in the mid-1980s , says he was frustrated in trying to sound the alarm by his inability to release pertinent information to the press . The law says that doing so could have cost him his job as well as a year in prison . Gray now contends that the S &L; losses would never have grown so large had the public been given more information about the problem sooner . " That would have gone a long way to helping , " he says .
domestication: 20世纪80年代中期担任联邦住房贷款银行委员会主席的埃德温·格雷说，他试图发出警告时感到非常沮丧，因为无法向媒体透露相关信息。法律规定，这样做不仅可能让他丢了工作，还可能面临一年的牢狱之灾。现在格雷认为，要是公众能早点了解到问题的严重性，储贷危机的损失就不会那么惨重了。“那样会起到很大的作用的。”他说。
foreignization: 埃德温·格雷在20世纪80年代中期担任联邦住房贷款银行委员会主席，他说，由于无法向新闻界发布相关信息，他在试图发出警报时感到沮丧。法律规定这样做可能会使他失去工作，甚至可能被判一年监禁。格雷现在认为，如果公众能够更早地获得有关问题的更多信息，储贷危机的损失本不会变得如此巨大。“这将大有帮助，”他说。

" That would have gone a long way to helping , " he says .

source: On Wednesday , Treasurys cemented their longest winning streak since June 28 , a period that coincided with the U.K. 's vote to leave the European Union . source: Together , the growth of these business and social-issue lobbies has created a phenomenal , and unprecedented , concentration of power in Washington . In 1994 , for instance , residents of Washington gave more money to national candidates than residents of any other city , even though Washington itself only had a single uncontested congressional race . More PAC money emanated from Washington than from the rest of the country put together .

source: Duhamel knows the real secret here : Avoid the casino . " People underestimate the importance of setting up their environment to favor self-control , " says Roger Giner-Sorolla , Ph.D. , a psychology professor at the University of Kent at Canterbury , Instead of hitting the casino , set up a tow-stakes basement poker game with your buddies . Ante with high-risk , low-loss dares ( loser has to race in the local triathlon in a pink Speedo ) or household chores ( low man mows the winner 's lawn ) to keep serious cash off the table . JUNK FOODS

source: Kentucky governor Matt Bevin wants students majoring in electrical engineering to receive state subsidies for their education but does n't want to support those who study subjects such as French literature . Bevin is not alone in trying to nudge higher education toward course work that promotes better future job prospects . Senator Marco Rubio of Florida , a former presidential candidate , put it bluntly last year by calling for more welders and fewer philosophers .
domestication: 肯塔基州长马特·贝文希望主修电气工程的学生能获得州政府的教育补贴，但不打算支持那些学习法语文学等科目的学生。贝文并不是孤军奋战，他正试图引导高等教育向更有助于未来就业的专业方向发展。佛罗里达州参议员、前总统竞选人马尔科·鲁比奥去年直言不讳地呼吁要多培养焊工，少出哲学家。

source: First there was the pathetic charge that Obama was born in Kenya and therefore ineligible to be president . The story was heavily stoked by the conservative media , aided by the non-denial denials of GOP leaders , and gave Donald Trump his fifteen minutes of presidentialcontender fame . It was never taken seriously by the mainstream press , but the president ended the story in April of this year by taking the unprecedented step of releasing his birth certificate , a tacit acknowledgment that the desperate effort to smear him had become a political distraction .
domestication: 先是有人造谣奥巴马出生在肯尼亚，说他没有资格当总统，这事儿简直荒唐。保守派媒体推波助澜，共和党领导人的模棱两可更是火上浇油，让唐纳德·特朗普也借此出了把风头，成了总统候选人的热门人物。主流媒体一直没把这当回事，但今年四月，奥巴马总统不得不采取前所未有的措施，公布了出生证明，才算是平息了这场风波。这其实也是默认了，那些抹黑他的伎俩已经让他政治上分心了。
foreignization: 首先出现了奥巴马出生于肯尼亚因此没有资格担任总统的可怜指控。这一故事在保守派媒体的大力推动下愈演愈烈，共和党领导人的不否认态度也起到了推波助澜的作用，这让唐纳德·特朗普获得了十五分钟的总统竞选人名气。虽然主流媒体从未认真对待这一指控，但今年四月，总统通过采取前所未有的举措发布了他的出生证明，从而结束了这一故事，这实际上承认了这一诋毁他的绝望努力已成为政治上的分心因素。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

First there was the pathetic charge that Obama was born in Kenya and therefore ineligible to be president . The story was heavily stoked by the conservative media , aided by the non-denial denials of GOP leaders , and gave Donald Trump his fifteen minutes of presidentialcontender fame . It was never taken seriously by the mainstream press , but the president ended the story in April of this year by taking the unprecedented step of releasing his birth certificate , a tacit acknowledgment that the desperate effort to smear him had become a political distraction .

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

First there was the pathetic charge that Obama was born in Kenya and therefore ineligible to be president . The story was heavily stoked by the conservative media , aided by the non-denial denials of GOP leaders , and gave Donald Trump his fifteen minutes of presidentialcontender fame . It was never taken seriously by the mainstream press , but the president ended the story in April of this year by taking the unprecedented step of releasing his birth certificate , a tacit acknowledgment that the desperate effort to smear him had become a political distraction .
首先出现了奥巴马出生于肯尼亚因此没有资格担任总统的可怜指控。这一故事在保守派媒体的大力推动下愈演愈烈，共和党领导人的不否认态度也起到了推波助澜的作用，这让唐纳德·特朗普获得了十五分钟的总统竞选人名气。虽然主流媒体从未认真对待这一指控，但今年四月，总统通过采取前所未有的举措发布了他的出生证明，从而结束了这一故事，这实际上承认了这一诋毁他的绝望努力已成为政治上的分心因素。

source: Since last fall , the study team has captured 37 adult coyotes from 13 territorial packs , examining and marking them in a systematic 45-minute process . With smelly lures simulating coyote scents , researchers set padded jaw traps with a shock absorber to keep from injuring the coyote . A radio transmitter alerts researchers when the trap is sprung , so they can be on the scene within minutes after an animal is caught
domestication: 从去年秋天起，研究小组已经从13个领地内的狼群中捕捉了37只成年郊狼，每只郊狼都要经过一个系统的45分钟检查和标记过程。研究人员用模拟郊狼气味的香饵，设置了装有减震器的软颚陷阱，防止伤害到郊狼。一旦陷阱被触发，无线电发射器就会发出警报，研究人员几分钟内就能赶到现场。
foreignization: 自去年秋天以来，研究小组已经从13个领地狼群中捕获了37只成年郊狼，对它们进行检查和标记的系统过程需要45分钟。研究人员使用模仿郊狼气味的有味诱饵，设置带有减震器的垫颚陷阱以避免伤害郊狼。当陷阱被触发时，无线电发射器会向研究人员发出警报，以便在动物被捕获后几分钟内到达现场。

source: Reservoir drawdowns , flow augmentation , and water released over spillways during peak migration season are needed to move young salmon safely to the ocean . In addition , some dams may eventually have to be removed . Action is needed now , since 1995 could be the last chance for large numbers of juveniles to reach the sea .

source: With its Bugatti-like styling , precision-machined aluminum receiver , and match-barrel blank wrapped in carbon fiber , the Fusion is the sexiest plinking rifle on Earth . The trigger is perfect , a Picatinny rail allows easy optics mounting , and the fore-end accepts even more accessory rails . Barrels for the .17 HMR/.22 WMR or .17 Mach 2/.22 LR models swap out in seconds with no tools .
domestication: 这款融合了布加迪风格的Fusion步枪，精密加工的铝制机匣，搭配碳纤维包裹的比赛级枪管，可以说是地球上最性感的小口径步枪了。扳机调校得恰到好处，皮卡汀尼导轨方便安装各种瞄准镜，前护木还能加装更多配件导轨。无论是.17 HMR/.22 WMR还是.17 Mach 2/.22 LR型号的枪管，都能在几秒钟内无需工具快速更换。

source: 20th Century Fox is reportedly looking to buy Tribune Media , potentially sparking a wave of consolidation in the TV business . The news comes via Bloomberg , which believes that the media giant has entered into secret talks to buy the broadcaster . Tribune Media is a potentially prize asset , owning 39 stations in 31 markets , including affiliates for all of the big five TV networks .
domestication: 据报道，20世纪福克斯正计划收购特里布媒体，这一举动可能在电视行业引发一波并购潮。这则消息来自彭博社，称这家传媒巨头已秘密接触，商谈收购事宜。特里布媒体可是一块肥肉，它手握31个市场的39个电视台，涵盖了五大电视网的附属台。
foreignization: 据报道，20世纪福克斯正寻求收购特里布媒体，此举可能会在电视行业引发一波整合潮。此消息来自彭博社，该社认为这家媒体巨头已进入秘密谈判以购买该广播公司。特里布媒体是一个潜在的优质资产，拥有31个市场中的39个电视台，包括五大电视网络的所有附属台。

source: " The contest may not make people who have no initial interest in science suddenly think about it as a career , " Schor says . " But for people who have an interest but who have some doubt in the back of their mind as to whether they are good enough , this program says , ' Go ahead . " ' Adds Nobelist Hoffmann : " I think it encourages kids -- like any competition-to do things well , to do the things they would not have thought themselves capable of doing . I think that was how it was for me . Kids in high school are so keyed in on courses , on performance , on examination - but by focusing on a research project , you turn toward more of the reality of what science is about . "
domestication: 斯科尔说：“比赛可能不会让那些对科学没有兴趣的人突然想把它当成职业。”但是，对于那些对科学有兴趣但又对自己是否足够优秀有所怀疑的人来说，这个项目就像是在对他们说：“大胆往前走吧。”诺贝尔奖得主霍夫曼也补充道：“我觉得这比赛鼓励了孩子们——就像所有竞赛一样——让他们去做好事，去做他们原本以为自己做不到的事。我想这对我来说也是如此。高中生们总是很关注课程、成绩和考试，但通过专注于一个研究项目，他们就能更接近科学的真谛。”
foreignization: “这个竞赛可能不会让那些最初对科学没有兴趣的人突然将其视为职业，”斯科尔说。“但是对于那些有兴趣但心中存有疑虑，不确定自己是否足够优秀的人，这个项目在说，‘去做吧。’”诺贝尔奖得主霍夫曼补充道：“我认为它鼓励孩子们——像任何竞赛一样——做得更好，去做他们原本认为自己无法做到的事情。我认为对我来说也是这样的。高中学生非常关注课程、表现和考试，但通过专注于一个研究项目，你会更加接近科学的现实。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" The contest may not make people who have no initial interest in science suddenly think about it as a career , " Schor says . " But for people who have an interest but who have some doubt in the back of their mind as to whether they are good enough , this program says , ' Go ahead . " ' Adds Nobelist Hoffmann : " I think it encourages kids -- like any competition-to do things well , to do the things they would not have thought themselves capable of doing . I think that was how it was for me . Kids in high school are so keyed in on courses , on performance , on examination - but by focusing on a research project , you turn toward more of the reality of what science is about . "

source: Even at its peak , investigative reporting depended on officials with subpoena power . These sources in law enforcement and on Capitol Hill fed various reporters , who had few tools for uncovering wrongdoing on their own . But this system depended on sources who were , if not nonpartisan , at least committed to some version of the truth that stood above blatant political ax grinding . Nowadays everyone has an agenda , which makes the information offered the press more suspect .
domestication: 即使在鼎盛时期，调查性报道也离不开有传唤权的官员。这些执法部门和国会山的信源给记者们提供了不少线索，而记者自己却很少有独立揭露不当行为的工具。不过，这套系统依赖的信源虽然不是完全中立，但至少还坚持某种高于明显党派斗争的真实。如今，人人各有算盘，提供的信息也就更加不可信了。
foreignization: 即使在其鼎盛时期，调查性报道也依赖于拥有传讯权的官员。这些来自执法部门和国会山的消息来源为各种记者提供了信息，而这些记者自己几乎没有工具来揭露不当行为。但这一系统依赖于消息来源，即使不是无党派的，至少也致力于某种高于明显政治斗争的真相。如今，每个人都有自己的议程，这使得提供给媒体的信息更加可疑。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even at its peak , investigative reporting depended on officials with subpoena power . These sources in law enforcement and on Capitol Hill fed various reporters , who had few tools for uncovering wrongdoing on their own . But this system depended on sources who were , if not nonpartisan , at least committed to some version of the truth that stood above blatant political ax grinding . Nowadays everyone has an agenda , which makes the information offered the press more suspect .
即使在鼎盛时期，调查性报道也离不开有传唤权的官员。这些执法部门和国会山的信源给记者们提供了不少线索，而记者自己却很少有独立揭露不当行为的工具。不过，这套系统依赖的信源虽然不是完全中立，但至少还坚持某种高于明显党派斗争的真实。如今，人人各有算盘，提供的信息也就更加不可信了。

source: Applying the weed killer would knock out much of the goat grass invading farmers ' fields . But left untreated , the goat grass survives to accept pollen from the wheat - and in so doing , creates hybrids that incorporate its cousin 's resistance . Although farmers can target the hybrid goat grass with other herbicides , doing so risks killing the wheat as well .
domestication: 喷洒除草剂能大大减少田里肆虐的山羊草。但如果不处理，山羊草会继续存活，并接受小麦的花粉，从而产生带有其表亲抗性的杂交种。农民虽然可以用其他除草剂对付这些杂交山羊草，但这样做可能会连小麦也一起杀死。
foreignization: 施用除草剂会消灭侵入农民田地的大部分山羊草。但如果不进行处理，山羊草就会存活下来，接受小麦的花粉——从而产生结合了其表亲抗性的杂交种。虽然农民可以用其他除草剂针对这种杂交山羊草，但这样做可能会同时杀死小麦。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Applying the weed killer would knock out much of the goat grass invading farmers ' fields . But left untreated , the goat grass survives to accept pollen from the wheat - and in so doing , creates hybrids that incorporate its cousin 's resistance . Although farmers can target the hybrid goat grass with other herbicides , doing so risks killing the wheat as well .
喷洒除草剂能大大减少田里肆虐的山羊草。但如果不处理，山羊草会继续存活，并接受小麦的花粉，从而产生带有其表亲抗性的杂交种。农民虽然可以用其他除草剂对付这些杂交山羊草，但这样做可能会连小麦也一起杀死。

source: Columbus was proud of his ships , as well he might be , since all three made it on a blind journey to a phantom destination . Still , he did have his troubles with them . On the third day out , the rudder of the Pinta jumped . He wrote in his diary that it was repaired off the Canary Islands " with great labor and diligence of the Admiral . " There , too , the Nina , which was lateen-rigged ( outfitted with triangular sails hung at a forty-five- to sixty-degree angle to the deck ) , had to be fitted with square sails on yards parallel to the deck . Lateens could sail closer to the wind , but square-rigged vessels were easier to maneuver .
domestication: 哥伦布对自己的船队感到自豪，确实有理由自豪，因为这三艘船在盲目的航程中居然顺利到达了虚无缥缈的目的地。不过，航行过程中也遇到了不少麻烦。出海第三天，平塔号的舵突然失灵。他在日记中写道，是在加那利群岛附近“经过一番辛苦和努力才修好”。在那里，尼娜号的三角帆（帆面与甲板呈45到60度角）也需要改装成方帆，帆桁平行于甲板。虽然三角帆更能迎风行驶，但方帆更容易操控。
foreignization: 哥伦布为他的船只感到自豪，这是有道理的，因为所有三艘船都在一次盲目的旅程中到达了一个虚幻的目的地。然而，他确实与这些船遇到了一些麻烦。在出海的第三天，平塔号的舵跳脱了。他在日记中写道，它是在加那利群岛“经过海军上将的巨大努力和勤奋”修复的。在那里，尼娜号，这艘装有三角帆（帆与甲板成45至60度角悬挂）的船，也不得不安装上与甲板平行的方形帆。三角帆可以更接近风向航行，但方形帆船更容易操控。

source: Carrots for the energy industry : That 's the core of George Bush 's advice this summer as legislators in both houses of Congress try to concoct a national energy policy . Leasing the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge for oil and gas development is essential , Bush says ; so is increased production of natural gas and nuclear power . Energy efficiency ? For Bush , it 's a topic hardly worth mentioning .
domestication: 给能源业的胡萝卜：这正是乔治·布什今年夏天对国会议员们的核心建议，他们正在两院努力制定国家能源政策。布什说，租赁北极国家野生动物保护区进行石油和天然气开发是必须的；增加天然气和核能的生产也是必要的。至于能源效率？布什几乎不提这个话题。

source: Twitter holds on to you because years ago you held onto it . A curated feed of friends and smart humans made for an interesting and dare I say it fun occasional escape . I gradually added more accounts to my feed like a ravenous dog chomping all as much data as my brain could handle . More friends . More friends . More friends . Everyone is equal . Everyone has something to say and it 's weird AF and I was just filling my feed with their words and occasional cat GIFs .
domestication: 推特能抓住你，是因为多年前你也紧紧抓住了它。那时候，关注的都是些朋友和有意思的智者，看他们的动态就像是偶尔的小憩，既有趣又轻松。我渐渐地像一只饿狼一样，疯狂地添加更多账号，恨不得把所有信息都塞进大脑里。加一个朋友，再加一个，再多加一个。人人平等，每个人都有话要说，这事儿听起来就怪怪的。我的动态里就充满了他们的只言片语，偶尔还有萌猫的动图。
foreignization: 推特抓住你不放，是因为多年前你曾紧紧抓住它。一个由朋友和聪明的人精心策划的信息流，让这里变得有趣，我甚至可以说，偶尔逃离到这里是件乐事。我逐渐在我的信息流中添加了更多账号，就像一只饿狼般贪婪地咀嚼着所有我的大脑能处理的数据。更多的朋友。更多的朋友。更多的朋友。每个人都是平等的。每个人都有话说，这真是太奇怪了，而我只是在用他们的言语和偶尔的猫咪动图填充我的信息流。

source: Still , at all levels , a big complaint from potential hires is the process involved in getting a government job . Confusing applications and an often interminable wait before a decision is made are two common turnoffs . " Government methods of recruiting and hiring are often so troublesome that they lose a lot of good people because of the frustration , " says Volcker .
domestication: 尽管如此，从各个层面来看，求职者对政府工作的抱怨主要集中在招聘流程上。申请材料复杂难懂，等待通知的时间又长得让人望眼欲穿，这些都让人打了退堂鼓。“政府的招聘方式常常麻烦得要命，因为太令人沮丧了，很多优秀人才都被吓跑了。”沃克说。
foreignization: 仍然，潜在雇员在各个层面的一个主要抱怨是获得政府工作的过程。令人困惑的申请和在做出决定之前的经常性的漫长等待是两个常见的令人却步的原因。“政府的招聘和雇佣方法往往如此麻烦，以至于由于挫折感而失去了很多优秀的人才，”沃尔克说。

source: The truth is the government not only allows you to take certain deductions , but also encourages you to do so . During this unstable economy , for example , if you 're willing to run a small business from your home , the federal government will actually assist you in funding your business . The government entitles you to deduct a portion of your automobile expenses ... of your office supplies ... of your travel ... even of your home .
domestication: 实话实说，政府不仅允许你享受一些税收减免，还鼓励你这样做。比如说，在这经济不稳定的时期，只要你愿意在家里搞个小生意，联邦政府还真会帮你一把，提供资金支持。政府让你有权扣除一部分汽车费用、办公用品费、差旅费，甚至是房租。

source: And as NASA prepares for Artemis , Wright 's animations assist in planning for safer , more successful missions . There is now enough data where Wright can use his computer program to make animations depicting what specific areas on the moon will look like in 2024 . This allows scientists to find further target zones for upcoming exploration .

source: Stone was pushed out as a Trump campaign official last year , but he continues to head up one of the biggest pro-Trump PACs . Reports suggest that he plays a major role in advising the campaign -- he was apparently part of the reason Trump hired Paul Manafort , who ran the campaign over the summer -- and that he speaks with Trump on the regular . The whole strategy of using Bill Clinton 's infidelities -- along with insinuations about darker , sexualized conspiracy theories -- as a way to distract voters from Trump 's actual sexism is exactly the sort of politics Stone specializes in . And it 's precisely the mentality driving this year 's Republican campaign .
domestication: 石去年被特朗普竞选团队开除了，但他依然掌管着一个支持特朗普的最大政治行动委员会。有报道称，他在幕后仍然对竞选团队有很大的影响力——据说特朗普雇佣保罗·马纳福特，这位夏天负责竞选的人，部分原因就是听从了石的建议——而且他经常和特朗普通电话。整个策略，利用比尔·克林顿的风流韵事，再加上一些更黑暗、性化的阴谋论，以此转移选民对特朗普实际性别歧视的注意力，这正是石擅长的政治手段。而这恰恰是今年共和党竞选背后的思维逻辑。
foreignization: 斯通去年被赶出了特朗普的竞选团队，但他继续领导着最大的亲特朗普政治行动委员会之一。有报道称，他在为竞选团队提供建议方面扮演了重要角色——他显然是特朗普雇佣保罗·马纳福特的原因之一，后者在夏季期间负责了竞选活动——并且他经常与特朗普通话。利用比尔·克林顿的不忠行为——以及关于更黑暗、性化的阴谋论的暗示——作为分散选民对特朗普实际性别歧视注意力的方式，正是斯通所擅长的那种政治手段。而这正是今年共和党竞选活动背后的思维方式。

The whole strategy of using Bill Clinton 's infidelities -- along with insinuations about darker , sexualized conspiracy theories -- as a way to distract voters from Trump 's actual sexism is exactly the sort of politics Stone specializes in . And it 's precisely the mentality driving this year 's Republican campaign .

source: Those of a more radical stripe will no doubt seek out new causes and new utopias . Environmentalism holds an obvious appeal for those drawn to utopias ; the realization of the radical environmental agenda would entail a degree of totalitarian regimentation that would compare well with what went on in Hoxha 's Albania . But a truly mass movement devoted to radical ecology is not likely to materialize . Environmental controls inevitably collide with the public 's economic well-being , a fact which will always limit the movement 's mass popularity .
domestication: 激进派人士肯定会寻找新的事业和新的乌托邦。环保对向往乌托邦的人来说显然很有吸引力；彻底实现激进的环保目标，意味着需要实施类似于霍查时代阿尔巴尼亚那样的极权统治。不过，真正的大规模激进环保运动恐怕难以形成。环保措施总会与公众的经济利益相冲突，这一点永远会限制该运动的大众支持度。
foreignization: 那些更为激进的人无疑会寻求新的事业和新的乌托邦。环境主义对于那些被乌托邦吸引的人来说具有明显的吸引力；激进环境议程的实现将需要一种程度的极权主义管理，这与霍查的阿尔巴尼亚的情况相比也不逊色。但一个真正大众化的激进生态运动不太可能形成。环境管制不可避免地会与公众的经济福祉相冲突，这一事实将始终限制该运动的大众受欢迎程度。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Those of a more radical stripe will no doubt seek out new causes and new utopias . Environmentalism holds an obvious appeal for those drawn to utopias ; the realization of the radical environmental agenda would entail a degree of totalitarian regimentation that would compare well with what went on in Hoxha 's Albania . But a truly mass movement devoted to radical ecology is not likely to materialize . Environmental controls inevitably collide with the public 's economic well-being , a fact which will always limit the movement 's mass popularity .

source: The compassion meditation group was trained to visualize people when they were suffering and practice noticing their own personal reactions in a calm and nonjudgmental way . Focusing on a loved one , on themselves , on a stranger , and on someone with whom they had conflict , they also practiced caring for and wishing to help the other person .
domestication: 慈悲冥想小组受训想象人们在受苦的情景，并练习冷静而不带评判地观察自己的反应。他们先是专注于一位亲人，然后是自己，接着是一位陌生人，最后是与自己有矛盾的人，练习去关爱对方，希望帮助对方。
foreignization: 同情心冥想小组接受训练，想象人们处于痛苦中的情景，并练习以平静和非评判的方式注意自己的个人反应。他们专注于一位亲人、自己、一个陌生人以及与他们有冲突的人，还练习关怀他人并希望帮助他人。

source: Then the team tried growing GFAJ-I with no additional additives . The microbe did n't grow nearly as much as Wolfe-Simon and her colleagues had reported . But Wolfe- Simon 's team had noted that the culture might have been contaminated by a little phosphate . So Redfield 's team added a sprinkling of phosphate , a comparable amount to what Wolfe-Simon and colleagues thought might have been in their culture anyway .
domestication: 接着，研究小组尝试在不加任何添加剂的情况下培养GFAJ-1。结果微生物的生长量远不如沃尔夫-西蒙及其同事所报告的那么多。不过，沃尔夫-西蒙的团队曾提到，他们的培养基可能被微量的磷酸盐污染了。于是，雷德菲尔德的团队也添加了一点点磷酸盐，量大概和沃尔夫-西蒙他们认为自己培养基中可能含有的差不多。

source: He also gives clues about his process in the way he answers questions . Asked about a particular mixture of colors that was a favorite in a previous workshop he replies , " Oh , I do n't do that anymore . " When a student wanted to pin him down on the way he establishes shadows or paints hands , he gave answers such as , " It keeps changing , " or " I normally do that , but not today . " Students came to under stand they should stay in the present , trust what they see , and take artistic control of their work .
domestication: 他还通过回答问题的方式透露了一些创作过程的线索。有人问起他在以前的工作坊里特别喜欢的一种颜色搭配，他回答说：“哦，我再也不这么做了。”当有学生想让他具体讲讲他是如何处理阴影或画手部的时候，他的回答总是模棱两可，比如：“这事儿总在变”或者“我通常这么做，但今天就不行了。”学生们渐渐明白，应该活在当下，相信自己的眼睛，把握住自己作品的艺术主导权。

source: Roach , seven-year-old Ethan Roach 's mom , went . Looking like she was ready for a dinner date-Melanie wore full makeup and diamond earrings on the platform-she lifted the 79 kilograms over her head and later made two heavier lifts , including a personal-best 83 kilos , and then went 3 for 3 in the clean and jerk , setting an American record of a combined 193 kilos . She finished sixth in her first Olympics , at age 33 . Not that the boy decked out in a powder-blue TEAM ROACH T-shirt would say it , but his mom , all 117 pounds of her , probably could take your mom .
domestication: 罗奇，也就是7岁的小伊桑·罗奇的妈妈，上场了。梅拉尼打扮得像是要去赴晚宴——她化了全妆，戴着钻石耳环，站在举重台上，把79公斤举过头顶，随后又完成了两次更重的试举，其中包括个人最好成绩83公斤。在挺举项目中，她三次试举全部成功，总成绩达到193公斤，打破了美国纪录。33岁的她在首次参加的奥运会上获得了第六名。虽然穿着淡蓝色“罗奇战队”T恤的小男孩可能不会这么说，但他的妈妈，只有117磅重，估计能打败你的妈妈。

source: SAN JOSE , Calif. -- After much speculation and fanfare in the press , Apple confirmed today that it will sunset iTunes in the next version of macOS and spin its functionality into three new apps -- Apple Music , Apple Podcasts , and Apple TV . As we noted earlier , this marks the end of an era of sorts on the Mac -- but there were plenty of unanswered questions . What features will Music retain from iTunes ? And what happens to Windows users who are dependent on iTunes ?
domestication: 加州圣何塞——在媒体的一片猜测和炒作之后，苹果今天终于确认，在下一个版本的macOS中，iTunes将被停用，并将其功能拆分到三个新应用中——Apple Music、Apple Podcasts 和 Apple TV。正如我们之前提到的，这标志着Mac时代的一个结束，但还有很多未解之谜。音乐应用会保留iTunes的哪些功能？那些依赖iTunes的Windows用户又该怎么办呢？

source: Nixon : The order is to leave the goddamned thing alone . Now , I 've said this , Dick , a number of times , and you fellows apparently do n't get the message over there . source: Couriers love to hate the police . The antagonism animates them . They scramble to clean up the scene , stash their beer cans in the shrubs , snuff out their joints . Murphy jumps out of his car and , inexplicably , slips on a pair of rubber gloves . He forges into the crowd with an eye toward busting somebody or impounding an unregistered bicycle . The messengers whisk their bikes off the pavement and stand defiantly in the officer 's path .
domestication: 快递员对警察又爱又恨。这种对立让他们充满活力。他们赶紧收拾现场，把啤酒罐藏在灌木丛里，掐灭手里的烟。墨菲从车里跳出来，莫名其妙地戴上了一副橡胶手套。他冲进人群中，眼睛四处搜寻，想抓个人或者扣押一辆没有牌照的自行车。快递员们迅速把自行车从人行道上移开， defiantly 挡在警察面前。
foreignization: 快递员喜欢憎恨警察。这种敌意激发了他们。他们争先恐后地清理现场，把啤酒罐藏在灌木丛中，熄灭他们的烟。墨菲从车里跳出来，莫名其妙地戴上了一副橡胶手套。他冲进人群中，打算抓个人或者扣押一辆未注册的自行车。信使们把自行车从人行道上移开，坚定地站在警察的路线上。

source: As we 've all discovered , Donald Trump is not really up on his American history . Apparently , he never was much of a student , which is probably why he was so desperate to have his former fixer Michael Cohen threaten his former academic institutions , plus the College Board , into never publicly releasing his grades and test scores .

source: " After administering peptide-based vaccines in mouse models of cancer , we saw that sustained IL2 signaling dramatically increased the number of tumor-specific cancer-killing T cells ( CD8+ ) , " said Dr. Hussein Sultan , a postdoctoral fellow in the laboratory of Celis , leader of the Center 's Cancer Immunology , Inflammation and Tolerance Program .
domestication: 在给癌症小鼠模型注射肽基疫苗后，我们发现持续的IL2信号显著增加了肿瘤特异性杀伤T细胞（CD8+）的数量，”赛利斯癌症免疫学、炎症和耐受性项目负责人实验室的博士后研究员苏丹博士说。
foreignization: “在向癌症小鼠模型施用肽基疫苗后，我们观察到持续的IL2信号显著增加了肿瘤特异性杀伤T细胞（CD8+）的数量，”Celis中心癌症免疫学、炎症和耐受性项目负责人实验室的博士后研究员Hussein Sultan博士说。

source: Gesture , intuition , and passion are all experiences that I instill in my work . My paintings are large ; scale is extremely important in emphasizing the big , sweeping movements I use . In some ways , the paintings are an abstraction from nature . They are not descriptive , literal , or narrative , nor do they work as a direct translation . They are visual experiences that go beyond words to create a harmony of feelings . Evoking a sense of mystery , the dark colors are rich , orchestrated , and subtle , like the dim ringing of a bell .
domestication: 手势、直觉和激情，这些体验我都融入到我的作品中。我的画作很大，尺寸对于强调我那宏大的挥洒动作至关重要。从某种角度说，这些画是自然的抽象表现。它们不追求具象描述，不讲故事，也不直接翻译现实。它们是一种超越语言的视觉体验，营造出一种情感的和谐。画中的深色如同钟声余音般神秘、丰富、细腻，富有层次感。
foreignization: 手势、直觉和激情都是我在作品中灌注的经验。我的画很大；规模在强调我使用的宏大、挥洒自如的笔触方面极为重要。在某些方面，这些画是自然的抽象。它们不是描述性的、字面的或叙事的，也不是直接的翻译。它们是超越语言的视觉体验，创造了一种情感的和谐。唤起一种神秘感，深色调丰富、有序且微妙，就像钟声的微弱回响。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Gesture , intuition , and passion are all experiences that I instill in my work . My paintings are large ; scale is extremely important in emphasizing the big , sweeping movements I use . In some ways , the paintings are an abstraction from nature . They are not descriptive , literal , or narrative , nor do they work as a direct translation . They are visual experiences that go beyond words to create a harmony of feelings . Evoking a sense of mystery , the dark colors are rich , orchestrated , and subtle , like the dim ringing of a bell .
手势、直觉和激情，这些体验我都融入到我的作品中。我的画作很大，尺寸对于强调我那宏大的挥洒动作至关重要。从某种角度说，这些画是自然的抽象表现。它们不追求具象描述，不讲故事，也不直接翻译现实。它们是一种超越语言的视觉体验，营造出一种情感的和谐。画中的深色如同钟声余音般神秘、丰富、细腻，富有层次感。

Gesture , intuition , and passion are all experiences that I instill in my work . My paintings are large ; scale is extremely important in emphasizing the big , sweeping movements I use . In some ways , the paintings are an abstraction from nature . They are not descriptive , literal , or narrative , nor do they work as a direct translation . They are visual experiences that go beyond words to create a harmony of feelings . Evoking a sense of mystery , the dark colors are rich , orchestrated , and subtle , like the dim ringing of a bell .
手势、直觉和激情都是我在作品中灌注的经验。我的画很大；规模在强调我使用的宏大、挥洒自如的笔触方面极为重要。在某些方面，这些画是自然的抽象。它们不是描述性的、字面的或叙事的，也不是直接的翻译。它们是超越语言的视觉体验，创造了一种情感的和谐。唤起一种神秘感，深色调丰富、有序且微妙，就像钟声的微弱回响。

source: Indeed , the total number of bankruptcies was 252,733 compared with 230,723 for the same period last year . Of those first quarter filings , 18,760 were businesses , an increase of 5.3% , while 233,973 were nonbusiness filings , an increase of 9.8% . " Over the last two to three years , we have seen a tremendous number of our small business clients seek relief in bankruptcy protection , " says Chester N. Watson , a certified public accountant and partner in the New York accounting firm , Mitchell/Titus &; Co .

source: The tradition of depicting the artist 's workplace has ancient beginnings . Examples can be found in Egyptian tomb art , Greek vase paintings , medieval manuscripts , and bas-relief . However , the modem conception of the studio as subject -- a genre that reveals elements of the physical interior of the studio while suggesting the psychological interior of the artist -- traces its roots to the Italian Renaissance , when the studio as we know it came into existence .
domestication: 描绘艺术家工作场所的传统由来已久，可以在古埃及墓室艺术、希腊陶瓶画、中世纪手稿和浮雕中找到例子。不过，现代意义上的工作室题材——这种体裁不仅揭示了工作室的物理空间，还暗示了艺术家的心理世界——其根源可以追溯到意大利文艺复兴时期，那时我们今天所认识的工作室才真正形成。
foreignization: 描绘艺术家工作场所的传统有着古老的历史渊源。例子可以在埃及墓葬艺术、希腊彩陶绘画、中世纪手稿和浮雕中找到。然而，将工作室作为主题的现代概念——一种揭示工作室物理内部元素的同时暗示艺术家心理内部的流派——可以追溯到意大利文艺复兴时期，那时我们所知的工作室得以诞生。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The tradition of depicting the artist 's workplace has ancient beginnings . Examples can be found in Egyptian tomb art , Greek vase paintings , medieval manuscripts , and bas-relief . However , the modem conception of the studio as subject -- a genre that reveals elements of the physical interior of the studio while suggesting the psychological interior of the artist -- traces its roots to the Italian Renaissance , when the studio as we know it came into existence .

However , the modem conception of the studio as subject -- a genre that reveals elements of the physical interior of the studio while suggesting the psychological interior of the artist -- traces its roots to the Italian Renaissance , when the studio as we know it came into existence .

source: Thankfully , no one was injured in the latter incident , and most outlets aggregating the story covered it as little more than a bizarre news item highlighting the extreme lengths gluttonous Americans will go to to get their fix of deep-fried shit . Yet that story , combined with reports of Popeyes ' employees being subject to grueling working conditions as a result of the incredible demand for the sandwich , draws into sharp relief the actual potential consequences of a fast food item going viral , which may go far beyond the momentary spike in cholesterol levels .
domestication: 幸好，后一件事中没人受伤，大多数报道也只是轻描淡写地将其描述为一起怪事，反映出美国人为了满足口腹之欲，真是什么傻事都做得出来。然而，这件事加上据报道因炸鸡三明治需求量激增导致 Popeyes 的员工工作条件恶劣，让人不得不反思，一款快餐走红可能带来的后果远不止是胆固醇暂时升高那么简单。
foreignization: 令人庆幸的是，后一起事件中没有人受伤，大多数汇总这则新闻的媒体也只是将其视为一个突出美国人为了满足对油炸食品的渴望而不惜一切代价的奇怪新闻。然而，这个故事与有关Popeyes员工因三明治的巨大需求而遭受严酷工作条件的报道结合起来，清晰地揭示了快餐产品走红可能带来的实际后果，这些后果可能会远远超出胆固醇水平的暂时上升。

source: The industry started building women 's bikes in an attempt to fit the average woman , and it works well for many , but not all , says Lori Hoefer , manager and advanced bike-fit specialist at Signature Cycles in Greenwich , Connecticut . " Stock companies are paying more attention to putting the right components on the bikes , the right-size bar , nice saddles , " she says . But because no two bodies are exactly alike , " not everyone fits their ' size . ' "
domestication: 行业开始专门为女性设计自行车，试图适合普通女性的身材，这确实对很多人有用，但并非所有人。康涅狄格州格林威治市Signature Cycles的经理兼高级自行车适配专家洛丽·霍弗说：“现在厂家更加注重给自行车配备合适的部件，比如合适尺寸的手把和舒适的坐垫。”不过，由于每个人的身材都不尽相同，“并不是每个人都能完全适应所谓的‘标准尺寸’。”

该行业开始制造女性自行车，试图适合平均身材的女性，这对许多人有效，但并非所有人都是如此，康涅狄格州格林威治Signature Cycles的经理和高级自行车适配专家Lori Hoefer说。“库存公司正在更加关注在自行车上安装合适的组件，合适尺寸的把手，舒适的鞍座，”她说。但由于没有两具身体是完全相同的，“并不是每个人都能适应他们的‘尺码’。”

source: Donald Trump 's deeply unsettling press conference with his Russian counterpart , Vladimir Putin , managed to be even worse than feared . When asked whether he trusted his own intelligence agencies or Putin on the question of meddling in the 2016 election , the president attacked Hillary Clinton , savaged the FBI , and said that he did n't see any reason why Russia would do such a thing . It was surreal and grotesque , another awful spectacle in a presidency that delights in awful spectacles . But the event in Helsinki can also be analyzed through another prism : the very strange , bizarrely accommodating personal behavior of Trump toward Putin .
domestication: 唐纳德·特朗普与俄罗斯总统普京举行的新闻发布会，比人们担心的还要糟糕。当被问及在2016年大选干预问题上是相信自己的情报机构还是普京时，特朗普攻击了希拉里·克林顿，抨击了联邦调查局，还说他看不出俄罗斯有什么理由要这么做。这场景简直像梦境一般，令人毛骨悚然，又是一出特朗普治下的恐怖闹剧。但赫尔辛基的这场会面还可以从另一个角度来看：特朗普对普京表现出的个人行为既奇怪又过分讨好。
foreignization: 唐纳德·特朗普与他的俄罗斯 counterparts 弗拉基米尔·普京举行的令人深感不安的新闻发布会，比人们担心的还要糟糕。当被问及在2016年大选干预的问题上，他是相信自己的情报机构还是普京时，总统攻击了希拉里·克林顿，诋毁了联邦调查局，并表示他不认为俄罗斯有理由这样做。这是一场超现实且令人震惊的表演，是这个以糟糕场面为乐的总统任期内的又一场糟糕表演。但赫尔辛基的这一事件也可以从另一个角度分析：特朗普对普京表现出的非常奇怪、异常迎合的个人行为。

source: Jeremy Davey 's career as a **26;5264;TOOLONG builder began , ironically enough , with a piece of real real estate : that seven-story building , at 701 Sutter Street , in San Francisco 's fashionable Nob Hill district . It was September 1997 , and Davey was pounding the pavement in search of office space that could serve as Pabulum 's new base of operations . As soon as he laid eyes on the Sutter Street site , he was smitten -- so much so that he not only began to formulate a plan for leasing all five floors of its available commercial space but also vowed to base the design of Pabulum 's new logo on the wrought-iron grating around the balcony . " The building was pretty much vacant , " he says , " and the whole idea of bringing in companies that could assist Pabulum in realizing its new business model formed in my head . "
domestication: 杰里米·戴维的建筑生涯，颇具讽刺意味的是，从一块真正的不动产开始：位于旧金山时尚的诺布山地区的萨特街701号那座七层楼的建筑。那是1997年9月，戴维正在四处寻找可以作为帕布鲁姆新运营基地的办公室。一看到萨特街的这个地点，他就被迷住了，迷得不可自拔，不仅开始策划租下所有五层可用的商业空间，还发誓要把帕布鲁姆的新标志设计成阳台周围的铁花格子样式。“那栋楼几乎是空的，”他说，“把能帮助帕布鲁姆实现新商业模式的公司招进来，这个想法在我脑子里渐渐成形了。”
foreignization: 杰里米·戴维的职业生涯作为一个**26;5264;TOOLONG建筑工，讽刺的是，开始于一块真正的房地产：位于旧金山时尚的诺布山地区，苏特街701号的那座七层建筑。那是1997年9月，戴维正在四处寻找可以作为Pabulum新运营基地的办公空间。他一看到苏特街的这个地点，就被吸引住了——以至于他不仅开始计划租赁其所有五层可用的商业空间，还发誓要以阳台周围的铁艺格栅为基础设计Pabulum的新标志。“这座建筑基本上是空置的，”他说，“将能够帮助Pabulum实现其新商业模式的公司引入的想法在我脑海中形成。”

source: At this point , you should mount the motherboard inside the case and connect the power and speaker to it . If you turn the PC on , you should get a series of beeps from the speaker . ( The speaker connection is easy to find , as you can usually follow the wires back to the speaker . Speaker connections are usually keyed so that they attach only one way , but actually , there is no single right way for PC speaker connections . ) You can now test the reset switch by attaching it to the motherboard : Turn on the PC , and when the beeps begin , hit the reset switch . If the beeps stop exactly when you hit the reset switch , you 'll know you correctly wired the reset switch .
domestication: 这时候，你应该把主板装进机箱里，并连接好电源和扬声器。如果你打开电脑，应该会从扬声器传来一连串的蜂鸣声。找扬声器的接口很简单，顺着线就能找到。扬声器接口通常设计得只能插对一种方式，但实际上，电脑扬声器的连接方式并没有绝对正确的。接下来，你可以测试一下重置按钮，把它接到主板上：开机后，等蜂鸣声响起时，按一下重置按钮。如果蜂鸣声在你按下重置按钮时立刻停止了，说明你已经正确地接好了重置按钮。
foreignization: 此时，你应该将主板安装在机箱内，并连接电源和扬声器。如果你打开PC，你应该会从扬声器听到一连串的蜂鸣声。（扬声器连接很容易找到，因为通常可以沿着电线追踪到扬声器。扬声器连接通常是键控的，因此只能以一种方式连接，但实际上，PC扬声器连接没有唯一正确的方式。）现在你可以通过将其连接到主板上来测试复位开关：打开PC，在蜂鸣声开始时按下复位开关。如果蜂鸣声在你按下复位开关时恰好停止，你就知道复位开关已经正确连接。

source: When prompted to speak , I picked up a paperback novel from the table . I read out loud the publication date ( 1947 ) , then threw it up almost to the ceiling before it fell back to the floor . I reached down , picked it up . opened it scanned a page or two , muttered " Yes , good story , " then looked down at the ebook fanciers ' gadgets with a " go on . I dare you " Look .

source: But on June 28th , 2005 , Luckic was killed in a car accident in Pennsylvania while riding in the Chrysler Jay had bought him as a graduation present . Jay was in L.A. for the BET Awards when he heard . " I know he had a couple good cries , " Def Jam marketing exec Tracy Waples says . " It was mind-blowing for him . " Jay says , " It was the toughest shit . Nothing close to it . Numbingly . Like I 'm numb . I 'm numb . " Months later he 's still dealing with the pain . " Shit comes time-released . " He pauses . " Beautiful kid . "
domestication: 2005年6月28日，Luckic在宾夕法尼亚州的一场车祸中丧生，当时他正乘坐Jay送他的毕业礼物——一辆克莱斯勒。Jay那时候正在洛杉矶参加BET颁奖典礼，听到这个消息后。“我知道他哭了好几回，”Def Jam的市场执行官Tracy Waples说，“这对他的打击太大了。”Jay说：“这是我经历过的最艰难的事，没有比这更难的了。整个人都麻木了。我就是感觉不到任何东西，彻底麻木了。”几个月过去了，Jay还在努力应对这份痛苦。“这种伤痛是慢慢释放出来的。”他停顿了一下，“真是个好孩子啊。”

source: At midnight we 're under weigh to the off shore point where we hope to see the sun go out , and Joe Rao is pacing the deck . We 're already a long way from Hilo , but the clouds have followed us . The best he can count is three stars , and those only for minutes at a time . It 's worry time on the Independence . He spent an hour at the weather station at Lyman Field in Hilo , and the best the maps and the forecasters could offer was a fingers-crossed " maybe . "
domestication: 午夜时分，我们起航前往那个希望看到日落的海域，乔·拉奥在甲板上踱来踱去。我们已经离希洛很远了，可云彩却一路跟来。他能数到的星星只有三颗，而且也只是偶尔出现一会儿。在“独立号”上，大家都开始担心起来。之前他在希洛的莱曼机场气象站待了一个小时，地图和预报员给出的最好答案就是抱着侥幸心理的“可能吧”。
foreignization: 午夜时分，我们启程前往离岸点，希望在那里看到太阳下山，乔·拉奥正在甲板上踱步。我们已经离希洛很远了，但云层一直跟着我们。他能数到的星星最多只有三颗，而且每次只能持续几分钟。在“独立号”上，这是令人担忧的时刻。他在希洛的莱曼机场气象站待了一个小时，地图和预报员给出的最佳答案只是一个手指交叉的“也许”。

source: Nonetheless , some computer scientists have suggested " chains " of emulators as a temporary solution to the problem of digital obsolescence : as each generation of hardware grows obsolete , it will be replaced by a layer of emulation software . But it 's an idea that has others shaking their heads . " It 's extremely dangerous to talk about emulation as a solution , " says David Bearman , president of Archives and Museum Infor-matics , a consulting group that works with business and government entities , helping them preserve digital files . " It gives an excuse to managers and governments around the world to put off doing things that really need to be done right now . "
domestication: 然而，有些计算机科学家提出了一个暂时解决数字过时问题的方法——“仿真链”：每一代硬件过时后，就用一层仿真软件来替代。但这个想法让不少人摇头。“把仿真当作解决方案来说是非常危险的，”大卫·贝阿曼说。他是档案和博物馆信息学咨询公司的总裁，这家公司为商业和政府机构提供服务，帮助他们保存数字文件。“这给了世界各地的管理者和政府一个借口，让他们推迟现在本该做的事情。”
foreignization: 然而，一些计算机科学家建议将“仿真链”作为解决数字过时问题的临时方案：随着每一代硬件逐渐过时，它将被一层仿真软件所取代。但这个想法让其他人摇头。“将仿真作为解决方案来谈论是非常危险的，”档案和博物馆信息学咨询集团（与企业和政府机构合作，帮助他们保存数字文件）的总裁大卫·贝曼说。“这给了世界各地的管理者和政府推迟现在真正需要做的事情的借口。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nonetheless , some computer scientists have suggested " chains " of emulators as a temporary solution to the problem of digital obsolescence : as each generation of hardware grows obsolete , it will be replaced by a layer of emulation software . But it 's an idea that has others shaking their heads . " It 's extremely dangerous to talk about emulation as a solution , " says David Bearman , president of Archives and Museum Infor-matics , a consulting group that works with business and government entities , helping them preserve digital files . " It gives an excuse to managers and governments around the world to put off doing things that really need to be done right now . "

source: Certain kinds of sedimentary rocks , called Burgess Shale-type ( BST ) deposits , have the right characteristics to preserve soft-bodied organisms as thin carbon films . During the Cambrian Period , BST deposits are more common , and they preserve fossils of increasingly complex animals . But only a handful of Ediacaran BST deposits are known globally .
domestication: 某些沉积岩，被称为布尔吉斯页岩型（BST）沉积物，具有保存软体生物为薄碳膜的特性。在寒武纪时期，这类沉积物更为常见，保存了越来越复杂的动物化石。但全球已知的埃迪卡拉纪BST沉积物却屈指可数。

《种子保存者交换：头十年》，由肯特·惠利和阿丽丝·阿德尔曼编辑（种子保存者交换，1986年）。这本书汇集了种子保存者交换在成立10年历史中发表的最好的文章。包括《种子保存指南》，其内容质量可与任何一本专门出版的书籍媲美。

source: New Horizons is moving faster than 30,000 miles an hour , meaning that its zip past the strange object really needed to be pulled off without even the slightest interference . After a slight course correction in mid-December , the spacecraft has done just that . New Horizons is now set to beam back some pretty important data , with some updates expected in the coming hours .

source: Otatea acuminata subsp. aztecorum ( Zones.9-10 ; 8 ft . ) . One of the most gore of bamboos with tall , arching canes . Narrow , 3- to 6-inch medium green leaves carried in airy , pendulous clusters all along the stems . Keep foliage thinned for an elegant , fountainlike habit . Spreads rather slowly but like other bamboos , is probably best grown in a large container sunk in the ground . Likes light shade or dappled sun . Not fussy about soil , but will suffer from drought . Does best with regular watering .
domestication: 奥塔特亚尖叶竹亚种阿兹特克（耐寒区9-10；高约2.4米）。这是最壮观的竹子之一，有着高大而弯曲的竹竿。叶子细长，3到6英寸，中绿色，沿着茎秆挂着，轻盈下垂，聚集成簇。要想保持优雅的喷泉状形态，要经常修剪叶片。这种竹子蔓延得比较慢，但和其他竹子一样，最好还是种在地下的大盆里。喜欢半阴或斑驳的阳光。对土壤不挑剔，但旱了就不行，定期浇水能长得更好。

source: Even in a beginner 's class , you 'll be doing enough small hops and jumps to strengthen bones . And , according to a study in the Journal of Dance Medicine &; Science , tap dancing has less impact than running , making it a joint-friendly activity . Tap also increases the foot 's range of motion and strengthens fast-twitch muscles ( the ones required for actions such as jumping ) . Off the dance floor , these improvements help you to be surer on your feet and protect you from injuries like ankle sprains .
domestication: 即使是初学者课程，你也会做很多小跳和小跃，这有助于增强骨骼。而且，根据《舞蹈医学与科学杂志》的一项研究，踢踏舞的冲击力比跑步小得多，对关节非常友好。踢踏舞还能增加脚的活动范围，强化快肌纤维（就是那些让你能跳跃的肌肉）。离开舞池后，这些改善能让你脚步更稳健，保护你免受诸如脚踝扭伤之类的伤害。
foreignization: 即使在初学者班级里，你也将会做足够多的小跳和跳跃来增强骨骼。而且，根据《舞蹈医学与科学杂志》上的一项研究，踢踏舞的冲击力比跑步小，使其成为一种对关节友好的活动。踢踏舞还能增加脚的活动范围并强化快肌纤维（进行如跳跃等动作所需的肌肉）。在舞池之外，这些改善有助于你更稳当地站在脚下，并保护你免受如踝关节扭伤之类的伤害。
