Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even in a beginner 's class , you 'll be doing enough small hops and jumps to strengthen bones . And , according to a study in the Journal of Dance Medicine &; Science , tap dancing has less impact than running , making it a joint-friendly activity . Tap also increases the foot 's range of motion and strengthens fast-twitch muscles ( the ones required for actions such as jumping ) . Off the dance floor , these improvements help you to be surer on your feet and protect you from injuries like ankle sprains .

source: While some scientists develop new tools to visualize for the first time the fuzzy essence of electrons , others are coercing these inherently quantum entities into clearly definable locations and behaviors that resemble those of tiny billiard balls . The reshaped atoms call to mind an antiquated version of atomic structure that dates to the early 20th century . In this classical view , atoms resemble miniature solar systems in which electrons orbit the nucleus as discrete planets circle a star . With the new research , scientists are exploring how matter crosses the line between quantum and classical forms .
domestication: 有的科学家正在研发新工具，首次捕捉到电子那模糊不清的本质；而另一些科学家则在努力将这些本质属于量子的粒子，塞进类似微小台球的明确位置和行为模式中。重塑后的原子让人联想到20世纪初的那种过时的原子结构模型。按照这种经典观点，原子就像是一个个袖珍太阳系，电子像行星绕太阳一样绕着原子核旋转。借助新的研究，科学家们开始探索物质如何在量子与经典形态之间转换。
foreignization: 虽然一些科学家正在开发新的工具来首次可视化电子模糊的本质，其他科学家则正在迫使这些本质上属于量子的实体进入类似于微小台球的明确定义的位置和行为。重塑的原子让人联想到一种可以追溯到20世纪初的过时的原子结构版本。在这种经典的观点中，原子类似于微型太阳系，其中电子像离散的行星围绕恒星运行那样绕着原子核运转。通过新的研究，科学家们正在探索物质如何在量子和经典形式之间跨越界限。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

While some scientists develop new tools to visualize for the first time the fuzzy essence of electrons , others are coercing these inherently quantum entities into clearly definable locations and behaviors that resemble those of tiny billiard balls . The reshaped atoms call to mind an antiquated version of atomic structure that dates to the early 20th century . In this classical view , atoms resemble miniature solar systems in which electrons orbit the nucleus as discrete planets circle a star . With the new research , scientists are exploring how matter crosses the line between quantum and classical forms .

source: " The establishment is not prepared , they do n't have a sense of urgency , and they do n't understand the working class people in Pennsylvania , in Wisconsin , in Michigan , in Minnesota and in Iowa and Ohio . What we did we can replicate . We can replicate it , though , with hard work , and wisdom . And if we blow this , we are never going to get it back . You have to understand , it is never coming back . We have the ability to change this country . "
domestication: 体制内的人没做好准备，他们没有紧迫感，也不了解宾夕法尼亚、威斯康星、密歇根、明尼苏达、爱荷华和俄亥俄这些地方的劳工阶层。我们之前能做到的，现在也能复制，但需要努力和智慧。如果我们这次搞砸了，就再也没机会了。你们得明白，这机会一旦失去，就再也回不来了。我们有能力改变这个国家。

source: he seems to have been speaking true to character . In the Asian arena he could safely express his expansionist inclinations ; and in China 's north-eastern provinces in particular he easily rationalised the aggression of his armed forces . But when dealing with the West he preferred caution because he lacked confidence in Japan 's ability to win a war against the United States and Britain , and was far more aware than his military commanders of Japan 's vulnerability to economic blockade . Essentially , he believed in force but wanted to combine it with its opposite , diplomacy , so that Japan might retain the fruits of its aggression against weaker Asian neighbours .
domestication: 他似乎一直言行一致。在亚洲舞台上，他可以放心大胆地展现扩张的野心；特别是在中国东北地区，他轻而易举地为军队的侵略行为找到了正当理由。但与西方打交道时，他更倾向于谨慎，因为他对日本是否有能力战胜美国和英国缺乏信心，而且比他的军事指挥官更清楚日本在经济封锁下的脆弱性。归根结底，他信奉武力，但也希望将武力与外交相结合，让日本能够在侵略较弱的亚洲邻国后保住战果。
foreignization: 他似乎一直是在按照自己的性格行事。在亚洲舞台上，他可以安全地表达其扩张的倾向；特别是在中国东北省份，他很容易为其武装力量的侵略行为找到合理的解释。但在与西方打交道时，他更倾向于谨慎，因为他对日本战胜美国和英国的能力缺乏信心，并且比其军事指挥官更清楚地意识到日本在经济封锁下的脆弱性。本质上，他相信武力，但希望将其与相反的外交手段结合起来，从而使日本能够保留其对较弱亚洲邻国侵略所获得的成果。

source: Within the first few miles on our usual test route , the Composite felt as familiar as favorite jeans . We 've been fortunate enough to log many hours on Giant 's TCR Advanced SL , the high-end cousin of the Composite , and both bikes produced strikingly similar sensations . Geometry on the entire TCR line is identical , right down to the head-tube height-Giant did n't compromise the fit or handling one iota from its race-bred steeds . In addition , the Composite is stiff-not quite as efficient as its costlier cousins , but the bike is clearly intended to perform and stand up to even the strongest cyclists .
domestication: 刚骑上我们常走的测试路线头几公里，这辆复合材料车就像穿上了自己最爱的牛仔裤一样亲切。我们有幸在捷安特的TCR Advanced SL上骑了很长时间，而这款高端车型和复合材料车给我们的感觉惊人的相似。整个TCR系列的几何结构完全一致，连头管高度都一模一样，捷安特丝毫没有在比赛级别的自行车上妥协过任何一点适应性和操控性。此外，复合材料车也很硬朗，虽然效率不如更贵的车型，但明显是为了高性能和能承受最强骑手的需求而设计的。
foreignization: 在我们通常的测试路线的前几英里内，Composite的感觉就像心爱的牛仔裤一样熟悉。我们有幸在Giant的TCR Advanced SL上记录了许多小时的时间，这是Composite的高端兄弟车型，而这两款自行车产生的感觉惊人地相似。整个TCR系列的几何形状完全相同，甚至包括头管高度——Giant在其比赛级别的战车上没有在适配或操控性上做出任何妥协。此外，Composite很硬——虽然没有其更昂贵的兄弟车型那么高效，但这辆自行车显然旨在表现出色，并能够承受即便是最强的骑手。

source: In order to effectively address the problems presented by prenatal substance exposure , an adequate system of medical , social , and related health care services to the substance exposed infant and its mother must exist . Without an increased focus on prevention and early intervention , the problem of substance exposed infants will continue to grow , and the nation will continue to reap the tragic harvest of this problem . With adequate services and a coordinated system of care , intrusive intervention might be avoided. 1
domestication: 为了有效应对胎儿期接触毒品的问题，必须有一套完备的医疗、社会及相关健康服务体系来照顾受影响的婴儿及其母亲。如果不加大对预防和早期干预的重视，这个问题只会越来越严重，国家也会继续承受由此带来的悲惨后果。有了充足的服务和协调的护理体系，或许就能避免强制性的干预。
foreignization: 为了有效应对产前物质暴露带来的问题，必须存在一个向受物质暴露影响的婴儿及其母亲提供充分的医疗、社会及相关健康护理服务的体系。如果没有加强对预防和早期干预的关注，受物质暴露影响的婴儿问题将继续加剧，国家将继续收获这一问题的悲剧性后果。通过充分的服务和协调的护理系统，或许可以避免侵入性的干预。1

source: Two years after Eddy 's paper came out , the United States launched the Nimbus 7 satellite , which carried a radiometer that could measure the sun 's brightness from high above the interfering effects of Earth 's atmosphere . Two years later , a second satellite , called the Solar Maximum Mission , went up carrying a radiometer specifically designed to measure total solar irradiance .

source: All cyclists share an intimate connection with our equipment : We have five contact points ( two hands , two feet , one seat ) with our bike , and each one must be perfect . " When people are fitted wrong , they feel like they have no power , " says Hoefer . " It 's about creating the right relationship between you and your bicycle . " You also need to find the right fitter , one with whom you 'll feel comfortable discussing intimate anatomical details .
domestication: 所有骑行者都和自己的装备有着亲密无间的联系：我们与自行车有五个接触点（两只手、两只脚、一个车座），每个点都得恰到好处。“如果调整不当，人们就会觉得 powerless，就像使不上劲一样，”霍夫说道，“关键在于建立你和自行车之间的良好关系。”此外，还得找到合适的调适师，能让你放心地讨论一些身体上的私密细节。

所有骑自行车的人与我们的设备之间都有着亲密的联系：我们有五个接触点（两只手、两只脚、一个座位）与自行车相连，每个接触点都必须完美。“当人们不适合时，他们会感觉没有力量，”霍弗说。“这关乎于在你和你的自行车之间建立正确的联系。”你还需找到合适的调整师，一个你可以舒服地讨论亲密解剖细节的人。

source: Be sure to stop off at the nearest Starbucks before you head to the gym for an intense physical workout . Caffeine can boost physical endurance by inhibiting perception of pain in muscles and by diminishing a sense of muscle fatigue . It works by blocking the adenosine receptors located on sensory nerve endings .
domestication: 去健身房前，记得先在最近的星巴克来杯咖啡。咖啡因能提高体力，让人感觉不到那么累，还能减轻肌肉疲劳。这是因为咖啡因能阻断感觉神经末梢上的腺苷受体。

source: Frankincense is an oleo gum resin ( a mixture of volatile oil , water-soluble gum , and alcohol-soluble resins ) that oozes from the trunk of Boswellia sacra and related species . These shrubby desert trees are native to Yemen , Oman , and Somalia . The resin has a pleasant , fresh balsamic odor and has been prized since biblical times as an incense and perfume ingredient .
domestication: 乳香是一种油胶树脂，是从圣乳香树及其相关树种的树干中渗出的混合物，含有挥发油、水溶性胶和酒精溶性树脂。这些灌木状的沙漠树木主要生长在也门、阿曼和索马里。乳香有股清新宜人的香味，自古以来就被视为制作香料和香水的上乘原料。
foreignization: 乳香是一种油胶树脂（由挥发油、水溶性树胶和酒精溶性树脂混合而成），从圣乳香树及其相关物种的树干中渗出。这些灌木状沙漠树木原产于也门、阿曼和索马里。这种树脂具有令人愉悦的清新香脂气味，自圣经时代以来就被视为焚香和香水成分中的珍品。

source: Minimizing the disruption to the national economy may warrant a significant role for conventional fuels during the limited period that new energy sources are being developed and the means for their distribution put in place . Over the years , the less-polluting new energy sources would become far more important and the role of high-polluting , traditional energy sources would be reduced or ultimately eliminated .
domestication: 为了减少对国民经济的冲击，在新能资源开发和分配体系建立的这段时间里，传统燃料还得继续扮演重要角色。时间长了，污染少的新能源会变得越来越重要，而那些污染大的传统能源呢，要么会慢慢减少使用，要么最终被淘汰出局。
foreignization: 最小化对国民经济的扰乱可能需要在新能源开发和其分配方式建立的有限期间内，传统燃料发挥重要作用。多年来，污染较少的新能源将变得更为重要，而高污染的传统能源的作用将被减少或最终淘汰。

source: Barrons is a confident Catholicism : At the Roman Colosseum - scene of torture and death for early Christians- he says he always thinks , " We won , " because the church 's great lesson is that love is always more powerful than hatred . " Were a disturbing number of priests and bishops wrong and even sinful in their contribution to the sex abuse scandal ? " he asks . " Yes . "

source: " I want the viewer to question what is in front , " she says , describing her intentions to completely integrate the subject and its setting . In Porcelain Figures and Tulips , for example , a pale blue and brown flowered vase holding pale tulips has been placed against a deep blue cloth covered with a pattern of pink blossoms . The tulips merge with the flowers on the fabric behind them , creating an illusion of flatness in the painting . The figurines and vase sit on a flowered , light-yellow tablecloth , furthering the sense of two-dimensionality by extending the " bouquet " in all directions .
domestication: 她说：“我想让观者质疑眼前所见。” 她希望将主题和背景完全融合。比如在《瓷器人像与郁金香》这幅画中，一个带有淡蓝棕色花朵的花瓶里插着几束浅色郁金香，花瓶被置于一块深蓝色、上面布满粉色花朵图案的布上。郁金香与背景布上的花朵融为一体，使得画面显得平面化。那些瓷器人像和花瓶则放在一张铺着带花图案的浅黄色桌布上，进一步增强了二维感，仿佛“花束”向四周无限延伸。
foreignization: “我想让观众质疑眼前的事物，”她说，描述了她完全将主题和背景融合的意图。在《瓷像与郁金香》中，例如，一个淡蓝色和棕色花纹的花瓶里插着淡色的郁金香，被放置在覆盖有粉红色花朵图案的深蓝色布料前。郁金香与背景布料上的花朵融为一体，创造了一种绘画中的平面错觉。瓷像和花瓶放在带有花纹的浅黄色桌布上，通过向各个方向延伸“花束”，进一步增强了二维感。

source: I ca n't think of anyone else who could have created that little man , let alone made him work . Willeford kept coming up with quirky characters and put them in wonderfully quirky books . A career soldier in the horse cavalry and a highly decorated tank commander in World War II , he wrote a variety of books over the years , all of them providing a skewed vision of the universe .

source: Planetary scientists think there 's a good Europa 's hidden ocean might be habitable to alien life . Nutrients sprayed onto the ice by the nearby volcanic moon Io , the thinking goes , may sink down to the ocean floor and serve as food . Meanwhile , hydrothermal vents that blast out hot water could make environments cozy enough to support deep-ocean life ( as they did and still do on Earth ) .

source: This strategy ignores the fact that the Hispanic voters who lean to the GOP are the very ones who respond to an assimilationist message . Though they may be a minority of all Latinos , they are nonetheless the Latino Republican base . Embracing a multiculturalist message leaves them feeling abandoned , resentful , and finally apathetic . And since that policy also depresses GOP support among whites , the net effect is to drive down the overall GOP vote .
domestication: 这个策略忽视了一个事实：倾向于共和党的西班牙裔选民正是那些对同化信息有积极响应的人。他们虽然是拉丁裔中的少数，却是共和党在拉丁裔中的基本盘。如果采纳多元文化的信息，他们会感到被抛弃，心生怨气，最后变得冷漠。而且，这种政策还会打击白人选民对共和党的支持，结果就是整体上拉低共和党的得票率。
foreignization: 这一策略忽视了这样一个事实：倾向于共和党的拉丁裔选民正是那些对同化信息作出回应的人。虽然他们可能是所有拉丁裔中的一小部分，但他们仍然是拉丁裔共和党选民的基础。接受多元文化主义的信息让他们感到被抛弃、愤恨，最终变得冷漠。由于这一政策也抑制了共和党在白人选民中的支持率，其净效应是降低了共和党的总票数。

source: " Safe space " is a similarly slippery term . It could refer to an environment in which just physical safety is guaranteed ; or to a support group for rape survivors that is closed to people who have never been raped to increase emotional comfort ; or to classrooms where robust exchanges are protected but interpersonal harassment is forbidden ; or to students reacting to a speaker with whom they disagree with counter-programming , as at Brown , where students surrounded themselves with " cookies , coloring books , bubbles , Play-Doh , calming music , pillows , blankets and a video of frolicking puppies , as well as students and staff members trained to deal with trauma , " as if Wendy McElroy 's presence on campus made them " unsafe . "
domestication: “安全空间”这个词同样含糊不清。它既可以指保证身体安全的环境，也可以指仅供强奸幸存者参加的支持小组，排除那些从未经历过强奸的人，以增强情感上的舒适感；还可以指课堂上允许激烈讨论，但禁止个人骚扰的地方；甚至可以指学生对不同意的演讲者做出反应时，通过反制活动来表达自己的立场，比如在布朗大学，学生们围坐在一起，身边摆满了“饼干、涂色书、泡泡、橡皮泥、舒缓音乐、枕头、毯子和嬉戏小狗的视频”，还有受过处理创伤培训的学生和工作人员，仿佛温迪·麦克尔罗的出现让他们感到“不安全”。
foreignization: “安全空间”是一个同样难以界定的术语。它可能指的是一个仅保证身体安全的环境；或者是指一个仅对从未遭受过强奸的人封闭的支持团体，以增加情感上的舒适度；或者是课堂上保护激烈交流但禁止人际骚扰的环境；或者是学生对与他们意见不合的演讲者进行反编程反应，如在布朗大学，学生们用“饼干、涂色书、泡泡、橡皮泥、舒缓音乐、枕头、毛毯和嬉戏的小狗视频，以及受过处理创伤训练的学生和工作人员”包围自己，仿佛温迪·麦克尔罗伊在校园内的存在使他们变得“不安全”。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" Safe space " is a similarly slippery term . It could refer to an environment in which just physical safety is guaranteed ; or to a support group for rape survivors that is closed to people who have never been raped to increase emotional comfort ; or to classrooms where robust exchanges are protected but interpersonal harassment is forbidden ; or to students reacting to a speaker with whom they disagree with counter-programming , as at Brown , where students surrounded themselves with " cookies , coloring books , bubbles , Play-Doh , calming music , pillows , blankets and a video of frolicking puppies , as well as students and staff members trained to deal with trauma , " as if Wendy McElroy 's presence on campus made them " unsafe . "

“安全空间”这个词同样含糊不清。它既可以指保证身体安全的环境，也可以指仅供强奸幸存者参加的支持小组，排除那些从未经历过强奸的人，以增强情感上的舒适感；还可以指课堂上允许激烈讨论，但禁止个人骚扰的地方；甚至可以指学生对不同意的演讲者做出反应时，通过反制活动来表达自己的立场，比如在布朗大学，学生们围坐在一起，身边摆满了“饼干、涂色书、泡泡、橡皮泥、舒缓音乐、枕头、毯子和嬉戏小狗的视频”，还有受过处理创伤培训的学生和工作人员，仿佛温迪·麦克尔罗的出现让他们感到“不安全”。

source: In the earlier bottega ( " workshop " ) , a bustling , semipublic commercial space , the master was simultaneously engaged in creating , teaching , and trading . The Renaissance changed this by redefining the artist 's role . His most valued products were no longer merely beautiful objects , but symbolic representations of ideas : thoughts made visible .
domestication: 以前的工坊，热闹非凡，半公开的商业空间，师傅们既创作又教学还买卖。到了文艺复兴时期，艺术家的角色变了。他们最珍贵的作品不再是仅仅漂亮的物件，而是思想的象征：看得见的思想。
foreignization: 在早期的bottega（“作坊”），一个繁忙的半公共商业空间里，师傅同时从事创作、教学和交易。文艺复兴改变了这一点，重新定义了艺术家的角色。他最珍贵的产品不再是仅仅美丽的物件，而是思想的象征性表现：可见的思想。

source: Mix a 2-inch layer of rich compost into the planting site , along with a light application of an organic fertilizer . Thoroughly water the soil before planting seeds half an inch deep and 6 inches apart . When tiie seedlings have three leaves , thin them to 12 inches apart , which is the spacing you should use if transplanting seedlings .
domestication: 在种植地混入一层约5厘米厚的肥沃堆肥，再加点有机肥料。种之前先浇透水，然后把种子种下去，深度约1.2厘米，间距大约15厘米。等小苗长出三片叶子时，要间苗，让它们之间保持30厘米的距离，如果你是移栽小苗的话，也是这个距离。
foreignization: 将2英寸厚的富含有机质的堆肥混入种植地，并施用少量有机肥料。在播种前充分浇水，然后将种子以半英寸深、6英寸间距种植。当幼苗长出三片叶子时，将其间苗至12英寸间距，如果你是移栽幼苗，也应使用这个间距。

source: But that increase is in total outlays , not average prices . The primary reasons the former increased , points out Laura Dummit of the General Accounting Office , are growth in pharmaceutical coverage by private insurance plans , the number of new drugs entering the market , and overall consumption . Drug prices have increased less swiftly , and even those estimates are flawed ; they reflect sampling problems , fail to account for the increased role of generics , and ignore falling prices for newer medicines and improved drug quality .
domestication: 但是，增加的是总支出，而不是平均价格。正如政府问责局的劳拉·邓米特指出的，总支出增加的主要原因有：私人保险计划中的药品覆盖范围扩大了，新药上市的数量增多，还有总体消费的增长。药品价格并没有涨那么快，而且这些估计本身也有问题；它们存在抽样问题，没有考虑到仿制药比重的增加，也没有注意到新药价格的下降和药品质量的提升。
foreignization: 但这种增长是指总支出的增加，而不是平均价格的上涨。美国总审计局的劳拉·邓米特指出，导致前者增长的主要原因是私人保险计划中药品覆盖范围的扩大、新药上市的数量增加以及总体消费的增长。药品价格的上涨速度要慢得多，而且即使这些估计也存在缺陷；它们反映了抽样问题，没有考虑到仿制药作用的增强，也忽视了 newer 药品价格的下降和药品质量的提高。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But that increase is in total outlays , not average prices . The primary reasons the former increased , points out Laura Dummit of the General Accounting Office , are growth in pharmaceutical coverage by private insurance plans , the number of new drugs entering the market , and overall consumption . Drug prices have increased less swiftly , and even those estimates are flawed ; they reflect sampling problems , fail to account for the increased role of generics , and ignore falling prices for newer medicines and improved drug quality .
但是，增加的是总支出，而不是平均价格。正如政府问责局的劳拉·邓米特指出的，总支出增加的主要原因有：私人保险计划中的药品覆盖范围扩大了，新药上市的数量增多，还有总体消费的增长。药品价格并没有涨那么快，而且这些估计本身也有问题；它们存在抽样问题，没有考虑到仿制药比重的增加，也没有注意到新药价格的下降和药品质量的提升。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But that increase is in total outlays , not average prices . The primary reasons the former increased , points out Laura Dummit of the General Accounting Office , are growth in pharmaceutical coverage by private insurance plans , the number of new drugs entering the market , and overall consumption . Drug prices have increased less swiftly , and even those estimates are flawed ; they reflect sampling problems , fail to account for the increased role of generics , and ignore falling prices for newer medicines and improved drug quality .
但这种增长是指总支出的增加，而不是平均价格的上涨。美国总审计局的劳拉·邓米特指出，导致前者增长的主要原因是私人保险计划中药品覆盖范围的扩大、新药上市的数量增加以及总体消费的增长。药品价格的上涨速度要慢得多，而且即使这些估计也存在缺陷；它们反映了抽样问题，没有考虑到仿制药作用的增强，也忽视了 newer 药品价格的下降和药品质量的提高。

source: Some colors made primarily from titanium dioxide have unique names . One of these is Holbein 's Ceramic White , formulated with a strontium pigment to give it qualities not found in standard titanium white . The manufacturer claims Ceramic White has more tinting strength and covering power than lead or zinc white , is more transparent and faster drying , and offers better handling than titanium white . Chroma Archival Oils ' Pearl White is a transparent , iridescent white made from titanium-coat-ed mica and , according to the company , can be combined with colors -- especially transparent ones -- to obtain a metallic effect .

source: In fact , the only students who are n't vulnerable to assumptions of underqualification are Asian . The heartless assumption about Asian Americans at highly selective colleges is that they are , if anything , overqualified -- academic beasts of burden , whose strange willingness to work endlessly makes them a vast group of curve-busters , who disappear into the hard sciences and are never heard from again until you need a knee replacement or a shunt in your brain .

source: Drew Westen , a psychotherapist at Harvard Medical School in Boston , takes the close-up perspective in treating people whose personalities have gone awry . Current methods of classifying personality and its disturbances offer clinicians little practical help , he contends .

source: No kidding . In a follow-up investigation to " Relief for the Rx Blues " ( October 1999 ) , we found that despite claims of increased scrutiny by government regulators and medical and pharmacy-industry trade groups , suspect web sites that sell prescription drugs are flourishing . Ordering medications online without benefit of a proper diagnosis remains about as easy as clicking your way through cyberspace for books or clothes . Unfortunately , an ill-prescribed drug can carry far more serious consequences than a bad ending or a bad fit .
domestication: 别开玩笑了。我们在“缓解处方药的烦恼”（1999年10月）的后续调查中发现，尽管政府监管机构和医疗及药房行业的贸易团体声称加强了监管，但那些卖处方药的可疑网站还是如雨后春笋般涌现。在网上没经过正规诊断就下单买药，跟在网上挑书或买衣服一样简单。可惜的是，用药不当的后果可能比书不好看或衣服不合身严重得多。
foreignization: 不骗你。在对“缓解处方药的忧郁”（1999年10月）的后续调查中，我们发现，尽管政府监管机构和医药及药店行业贸易团体声称加强了审查，但销售处方药的可疑网站仍在蓬勃发展。无需适当诊断即可在线订购药物，仍然像在网上浏览购买书籍或衣服一样容易。不幸的是，错误开具的药物可能带来的后果远比结局不好或不合身严重得多。

source: As she wrote those words , and without knowing it , my mother was dying . It began with a single , healthy breast cell that mutated into cancer . That cell split into two . No one will ever know why or when , but it could have happened as long as a decade before she discovered the disease . For years , as she worked , slept , made love , mothered her children , the malignant cells were slowly doubling within her breasts until , unstoppable , they became billions .
domestication: 她写下那些字的时候，还不知道妈妈正在走向生命的尽头。一切始于一个健康的乳腺细胞，它突然变异成了癌细胞。这个细胞一分为二。没人知道究竟是为什么，也没人知道具体是什么时候发生的，但可能在她发现疾病前的十年就已经开始了。在那些年里，无论她是在工作、睡觉、做爱，还是照顾孩子，那些癌细胞都在她的乳房里悄悄地成倍增长，最后积少成多，达到了数十亿，再也无法阻止。
foreignization: 当她写下这些话时，毫不知情的是，我的母亲正在死去。这一切始于一个健康的乳腺细胞突变为癌症。那个细胞分裂成两个。没有人会知道为什么或是什么时候发生的，但这可能在她发现疾病前十年就发生了。多年来，在她工作、睡觉、做爱、抚养孩子的时候，恶性细胞在她的乳房中缓慢地倍增，直到最终无法阻挡，变成了数十亿个。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As she wrote those words , and without knowing it , my mother was dying . It began with a single , healthy breast cell that mutated into cancer . That cell split into two . No one will ever know why or when , but it could have happened as long as a decade before she discovered the disease . For years , as she worked , slept , made love , mothered her children , the malignant cells were slowly doubling within her breasts until , unstoppable , they became billions .
她写下那些字的时候，还不知道妈妈正在走向生命的尽头。一切始于一个健康的乳腺细胞，它突然变异成了癌细胞。这个细胞一分为二。没人知道究竟是为什么，也没人知道具体是什么时候发生的，但可能在她发现疾病前的十年就已经开始了。在那些年里，无论她是在工作、睡觉、做爱，还是照顾孩子，那些癌细胞都在她的乳房里悄悄地成倍增长，最后积少成多，达到了数十亿，再也无法阻止。

source: With no cure or discovery yet of a drug or medical treatment to slow its progress , Alzheimer 's disease is a terrible tragedy for any family to face . But when the emotional strain of dealing with the disease and feelings of physical exhaustion are shared with a support group , caregivers seem to find more strength to cope . Not only do they gain emotional and even spiritual support , they gain practical help as well by learning from the support group about community services .
domestication: 阿尔茨海默病至今没有治愈的方法，也没有能减缓病情的药物或医疗手段，对任何家庭来说都是个可怕的悲剧。但是，当情感上的压力和身体上的疲惫能够与支持小组中的其他成员共同分担时，看护者似乎能找到更多的力量去应对。他们不仅能获得情感上甚至精神上的支持，还能从支持小组中了解到社区服务，得到实际的帮助。俗话说得好，众人拾柴火焰高，大家互相帮助，总能渡过难关。
foreignization: 目前还没有找到可以延缓其进展的药物或医疗治疗方法，阿尔茨海默病对任何家庭来说都是一个可怕的悲剧。但当处理这种疾病的情感压力和身体疲惫感与支持小组分享时，护理人员似乎能找到更多的力量来应对。他们不仅获得了情感甚至精神上的支持，还通过支持小组了解社区服务，从而获得了实际帮助。

Not only do they gain emotional and even spiritual support , they gain practical help as well by learning from the support group about community services .

source: With the new repeal bill , Republicans have constructed legislation that would accomplish many of their most cherished goals , like reducing taxes on the wealthy and reducing the regulation of insurers . And their proposal would surely benefit some people , including some for whom the Affordable Care Act has meant higher premiums and weaker coverage .
domestication: 有了新的废除法案，共和党人构建了一套法律，实现了他们最渴望的目标，比如给富人减税，放松对保险公司的监管。他们的提案肯定会惠及一些人，包括那些因《平价医疗法案》而保费上涨、保障减弱的人。
foreignization: 通过新的废除法案，共和党人制定了一项能够实现他们许多最珍视的目标的立法，比如减少对富人的税收和减少对保险公司的监管。他们的提案肯定会惠及一些人，包括那些因《平价医疗法案》而面临更高保费和更弱保障的人。

With the new repeal bill , Republicans have constructed legislation that would accomplish many of their most cherished goals , like reducing taxes on the wealthy and reducing the regulation of insurers . source: While plenty of people , including plenty of Trump fans , certainly have concerns about the economy , it 's racial resentment that drives who does and does n't support Trump .... Adding an economic anxiety factor to your account does n't actually help to explain anything . Trump 's supporters , for example , are considerably whiter and considerably older than the American population at large . If the economic problems of the past decade had been unusually hard on the white and the old , then an economics-focused explanation could be valuable . In reality , things have been rougher on nonwhites and rougher on younger cohorts .
domestication: 虽然很多人，包括不少特朗普的支持者，确实对经济状况感到担忧，但真正左右是否支持特朗普的其实是种族怨恨……在解释中加入经济焦虑的因素其实没啥用。比如，特朗普的支持者明显比美国整体人口更白、更老。如果过去十年的经济问题特别打击了白人和老年人，那么从经济角度来解释就能说得通。实际上，日子过得更艰难的是非白人群体和年轻一代。
foreignization: 虽然很多人，包括很多特朗普的支持者，确实对经济有担忧，但推动支持或不支持特朗普的是种族怨恨……在你的解释中加入经济焦虑因素实际上并不能帮助说明任何问题。例如，特朗普的支持者比美国人口总体上更白人、年龄更大。如果过去十年的经济问题对白人和老年人特别不利，那么以经济为中心的解释可能会有价值。实际上，情况对非白人和年轻群体更为不利。

source: So the lesson of Barnes 's article , rightly interpreted , is not that California is no longer significant because it no longer foretells America 's political future , but quite the opposite : namely , that because California foretells a future of Democratic political hegemony for America , the state has to be dismissed as insignificant . And this latter lesson is so manifestly nonsensical that Barnes can be advancing it only to draw attention to perils that he prudently forbears to name .
domestication: 所以，正确解读巴恩斯的文章，并不是说加利福尼亚不再重要，因为它不再预示美国的政治未来，恰恰相反：正因为加利福尼亚预示着民主党的政治霸权将席卷全美，这个州才被贬低为无足轻重。这一结论显然荒谬至极，巴恩斯这样写，无非是为了暗示那些他不便明言的危险。
foreignization: 所以，正确解读的巴恩斯文章的教训，并不是说加利福尼亚不再重要，因为它不再预示美国的政治未来，而是恰恰相反：即，因为加利福尼亚预示着美国民主党政治霸权的未来，所以该州必须被贬低为不重要。而这一后者教训显然是荒谬的，以至于巴恩斯只能以此来引起人们对那些他谨慎地避免提及的危险的关注。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

So the lesson of Barnes 's article , rightly interpreted , is not that California is no longer significant because it no longer foretells America 's political future , but quite the opposite : namely , that because California foretells a future of Democratic political hegemony for America , the state has to be dismissed as insignificant . And this latter lesson is so manifestly nonsensical that Barnes can be advancing it only to draw attention to perils that he prudently forbears to name .

source: William Morris railed against the Victorian fondness for reproducing furnishings from past eras , yet here we are , more than 100 years later , eating up reproductions of the English designer 's wallpapers and fabrics . But it figures : his richly colored patterns are nature-based . The man and his work are detailed in William Morris , Decor and Design by Elizabeth Wilhide ( Abram. $45 ) , and Arts and Crafts Carpets by Malcolm Haslam ( Rizzoli. $65 ) celebrates the lush carpets of the international design movement Morris inspired . Vibrant replicas of the rugs are now in some major carpet stores ( $2 , 000 to $10 , 000 ) .
domestication: 威廉·莫里斯曾对维多利亚时代热衷于复制过往时代的家具表示不满，可一百多年后的今天，人们却争相购买这位英国设计师的壁纸和布料复制品。这也不奇怪：他的图案色彩丰富，取材自然。伊丽莎白·威尔海德在《威廉·莫里斯：装饰与设计》（Abram，45美元）一书中详细介绍了莫里斯和他的作品，而马尔科姆·哈斯拉姆的《工艺美术运动地毯》（Rizzoli，65美元）则庆祝了莫里斯所启发的国际设计运动中的华丽地毯。现在，这些鲜艳的地毯复制品已经出现在一些大型地毯店中，价格从2000到10000美元不等。
foreignization: 威廉·莫里斯曾强烈反对维多利亚时代对过去时代家具的复制，然而在这里，100多年后的今天，我们却在热衷于这位英国设计师的壁纸和织物的复制品。但这也在意料之中：他的色彩丰富的图案是以自然为基础的。伊丽莎白·威尔海德所著的《威廉·莫里斯，装饰与设计》（Abram. 45美元）详细介绍了此人及其作品，而马尔科姆·哈斯拉姆的《工艺美术运动地毯》（Rizzoli. 65美元）则庆祝了莫里斯所启发的国际设计运动的华丽地毯。这些地毯的鲜艳复制品现在在一些主要的地毯店有售（2000至10000美元）。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

William Morris railed against the Victorian fondness for reproducing furnishings from past eras , yet here we are , more than 100 years later , eating up reproductions of the English designer 's wallpapers and fabrics . But it figures : his richly colored patterns are nature-based . The man and his work are detailed in William Morris , Decor and Design by Elizabeth Wilhide ( Abram. $45 ) , and Arts and Crafts Carpets by Malcolm Haslam ( Rizzoli. $65 ) celebrates the lush carpets of the international design movement Morris inspired . Vibrant replicas of the rugs are now in some major carpet stores ( $2 , 000 to $10 , 000 ) .

source: Even when Fox and its allies in the powerful conservative media establishment get traction on a supposed scandal , it does n't grip the nation like scandals of old because of its origins in partisan reporting . The stories are combated by fierce blogging on the liberal side . For instance , when Van Jones was wrongly accused on Fox of believing 9/11 was a U.S. plot , a counterassault by liberals kept the mainstream press from taking up the story in a big way . It was seen in a partisan context , which had the effect of protecting the president from a feeding frenzy .
domestication: 即便福克斯及其在强大保守派媒体圈的盟友在所谓的丑闻上掀起波澜，也难以像过去那样引起全国的关注，因为这些丑闻源自党派报道。左派则通过激烈的博客反击这些故事。比如，当福克斯错误地指责范·琼斯认为“9·11”事件是美国自导自演时，自由派的反攻使得主流媒体没有大肆报道此事。这被视为一种党派斗争，反而保护了总统免受群起攻之的困境。
foreignization: 即使福克斯及其在强大的保守派媒体机构中的盟友在所谓的丑闻上取得进展，也不会像过去的丑闻那样引起全国的关注，因为这些报道源于党派性报道。自由派方面的激烈博客文章与这些故事进行了对抗。例如，当福克斯错误地指责范·琼斯相信9/11是美国阴谋时，自由派的反击阻止了主流媒体大规模地报道此事。这被视为一种党派性背景，从而在一定程度上保护了总统免受舆论狂潮的攻击。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even when Fox and its allies in the powerful conservative media establishment get traction on a supposed scandal , it does n't grip the nation like scandals of old because of its origins in partisan reporting . The stories are combated by fierce blogging on the liberal side . For instance , when Van Jones was wrongly accused on Fox of believing 9/11 was a U.S. plot , a counterassault by liberals kept the mainstream press from taking up the story in a big way . It was seen in a partisan context , which had the effect of protecting the president from a feeding frenzy .
即便福克斯及其在强大保守派媒体圈的盟友在所谓的丑闻上掀起波澜，也难以像过去那样引起全国的关注，因为这些丑闻源自党派报道。左派则通过激烈的博客反击这些故事。比如，当福克斯错误地指责范·琼斯认为“9·11”事件是美国自导自演时，自由派的反攻使得主流媒体没有大肆报道此事。这被视为一种党派斗争，反而保护了总统免受群起攻之的困境。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even when Fox and its allies in the powerful conservative media establishment get traction on a supposed scandal , it does n't grip the nation like scandals of old because of its origins in partisan reporting . The stories are combated by fierce blogging on the liberal side . For instance , when Van Jones was wrongly accused on Fox of believing 9/11 was a U.S. plot , a counterassault by liberals kept the mainstream press from taking up the story in a big way . It was seen in a partisan context , which had the effect of protecting the president from a feeding frenzy .
即使福克斯及其在强大的保守派媒体机构中的盟友在所谓的丑闻上取得进展，也不会像过去的丑闻那样引起全国的关注，因为这些报道源于党派性报道。自由派方面的激烈博客文章与这些故事进行了对抗。例如，当福克斯错误地指责范·琼斯相信9/11是美国阴谋时，自由派的反击阻止了主流媒体大规模地报道此事。这被视为一种党派性背景，从而在一定程度上保护了总统免受舆论狂潮的攻击。

source: I 'm still losing money now when you include homeowner dues . That 's only after 10 years and refinancing and putting in $65,000 ( to the principal ) to get out from underwater and refinance it as an investment property . We 've had to replace carpet a couple of times , paint a couple times , and over time have replaced all the appliances . At least there 's a tax write-off on my " income property " that 's been losing money .
domestication: 我现在还在亏钱呢，算上那些业主协会的费用。这可是十年之后，又重新贷款，还往里头砸了6万5千块钱（都是还本金的），才从负资产的泥潭里爬出来，重新把房子当作投资房产贷款的。这期间，地毯换了好几次，墙也刷了好几次，家具家电都换了个遍。好歹这“收入物业”还能给我减点税，尽管它一直在亏钱。
foreignization: 我现在仍然在亏钱，即使算上业主协会的会费。这还是在10年之后，进行了再融资，并投入了65,000美元（用于本金）才得以摆脱负资产并将其再融资为投资物业的情况下。我们不得不更换地毯几次，粉刷了几回，随着时间的推移还更换了所有家电。至少，我的“收入物业”亏损部分可以抵税。

source: Scientists from the University of Bonn and the Sirindhorn Museum in Thailand have identified two new dinosaur species . They analyzed fossil finds that were already discovered 30 years ago in Thailand . Both species are distant relatives of T. rex , but with a somewhat more primitive structure . They were efficient predators . The results have now been published in the journal Acta Palaeontologica Polonica .

source: Now researchers led by microbiologist Rosemary Redfield of the University of British Columbia in Vancouver have tried to replicate the original growth experiments . Redfield , colleague Marshall Reaves of Princeton University and others grew GFAJ-I in a test tube . After confirming with a genetic test that they had the right microbe , the researchers could n't get GFAJ-I to be fruitful and multiply until they added a dash of glutamate , an amino acid that Wolfe-Simon did not use in her experiments .
domestication: 现在，由加拿大温哥华不列颠哥伦比亚大学的微生物学家罗丝玛丽·雷德菲尔德领导的研究团队，尝试重现最初的生长实验。雷德菲尔德和普林斯顿大学的同事马歇尔·里夫斯等人在试管中培养了GFAJ-1菌株。经过基因检测确认他们用的是正确的微生物后，研究人员发现，除非添加一点沃尔夫-西蒙实验中没有使用的氨基酸——谷氨酸，否则GFAJ-1根本无法茁壮成长、大量繁殖。

source: " The girl tried to come to Lauren and Dinah 's doors and the security we hired were with us speaking to us and making sure we were safe . We saw this girl lie to them about where she was staying and where her actual room was , tell them to ' shut the f -- k up and stop talking ' and then proceed to try and lunge towards Lauren 's room so she could get a note to her . The security guards who ushered her away and made sure she did n't follow through were doing their jobs of protecting us . Especially in light of recent events like the shooting of Christine Grimmie , we ca n't ever be too safe with our personal space and protection .
domestication: 这姑娘想来找劳伦和迪娜，我们雇的保安一直在旁边保护我们，跟我们说话，确保我们的安全。我们看到这姑娘对他们撒谎，说自己住哪儿、房间是哪个，还骂他们“闭嘴，别废话”，然后试图冲向劳伦的房间，好把字条交给她。保安把她带走了，防止她得逞，这是他们在尽职保护我们。最近出了那么多事，像克里斯汀·格里米被枪杀的悲剧，我们在个人安全上可不能有半点马虎。
foreignization: 这个女孩试图来到劳伦和迪娜的门前，我们雇用的安保人员和我们在一起，和我们交谈，确保我们的安全。我们看到这个女孩对他们撒谎，说她住在哪里，她真正的房间在哪里，让他们“闭嘴，不要再说话”，然后试图冲向劳伦的房间，以便给她递一张纸条。驱散她的安保人员确保她没有得逞，他们在履行保护我们的职责。特别是在最近发生的克里斯汀·格里米枪击事件之后，我们在个人空间和保护方面永远都不能太谨慎。

source: Glenn crossed the putative Sugar Baby ' with the unknown watermelon , then saved the seeds and planted them . The plants , he recalls , were similar to the Blacktail Mountain ' of today . source: Among those students was Roald Hoffmann , a young immigrant from Poland . When Hoffmann was 6 , his father smuggled him and his mother out of a Nazi labor camp . Mother and child hid in the attic of a Polish schoolhouse ; the Nazis killed Hoffmann 's father . After the war , Hoffmann and his mother lived in refugee camps , where he read biographies of Marie Curie and George Washington Carver .
domestication: 这些学生中有一个叫罗尔德·霍夫曼的年轻波兰移民。霍夫曼6岁那年，他父亲把他和母亲从纳粹劳改营偷带了出来。母子俩藏在一所波兰学校的阁楼里，而霍夫曼的父亲却被纳粹杀害了。战后，霍夫曼和母亲住在难民营里，他读了居里夫人和乔治·华盛顿·卡弗的传记。
foreignization: 在这些学生中有一位来自波兰的年轻移民罗尔德·霍夫曼。当霍夫曼6岁时，他的父亲把他和母亲偷运出纳粹劳工营。母子俩藏身于一所波兰学校的阁楼里；纳粹杀死了霍夫曼的父亲。战后，霍夫曼和他的母亲住在难民营里，他阅读了关于玛丽·居里和乔治·华盛顿·卡弗的传记。

Among those students was Roald Hoffmann , a young immigrant from Poland . When Hoffmann was 6 , his father smuggled him and his mother out of a Nazi labor camp . source: " It is reassuring that these results indicate no increased risk of a second malignancy in RA patients with a past cancer who used biologic therapy , and that were was no major indication of an increased mortality rate among users of these medications , " said Dr. Dreyer . " However , the number of patients who suffered a second malignancy was small , so our statistical analyses must be interpreted with caution . Further studies are required to confirm our findings . In the meantime , our data does provide some reassurance that biologics do n't pose an immediate danger in patients with a history of cancer . "  Related Stories
domestication: 德雷尔博士说：“看到这些结果让人安心，它们表明使用生物制剂的类风湿关节炎患者，即使之前得过癌症，也不会增加二次患癌的风险，而且也没有明显证据显示使用这些药物的患者死亡率增加。”他接着说：“不过，二次患癌的患者人数较少，所以我们的统计分析需要谨慎解读。还需要更多的研究来验证我们的发现。但目前的数据确实让人放心，至少可以说明生物制剂对有癌症史的患者不会立即造成危险。” 相关报道
foreignization: “这些结果表明，使用生物制剂的RA患者中，有既往癌症病史的患者并没有增加第二次恶性肿瘤的风险，且这些药物使用者中没有明显的死亡率增加的迹象，这令人感到安心，”Dreyer博士说。“然而，发生第二次恶性肿瘤的患者数量很少，因此我们的统计分析必须谨慎解读。需要进一步的研究来确认我们的发现。同时，我们的数据确实提供了一些安慰，即生物制剂对有癌症病史的患者不会立即构成危险。” 相关故事

" It is reassuring that these results indicate no increased risk of a second malignancy in RA patients with a past cancer who used biologic therapy , and that were was no major indication of an increased mortality rate among users of these medications , " said Dr. Dreyer . In the meantime , our data does provide some reassurance that biologics do n't pose an immediate danger in patients with a history of cancer . "  Related Stories

source: Before she submits her idea , the student takes pains to complete the homework required of an entrepreneur : initial market research to identify a need ; product research and development to meet that need ; a determination of the land , labor , and capital requirements of production ; and market surveys to hit upon a competitive price as well as a catchy name for the product .
domestication: 在提交自己的创意之前，这位学生可没少下功夫，做足了创业者必备的功课：先是进行初步市场调研，找准需求；接着搞产品研发，满足这些需求；然后确定生产所需的场地、劳力和资金；最后通过市场调查，定出一个有竞争力的价格，还给产品起了个响亮的名字。
foreignization: 在提交她的想法之前，学生费尽心思完成了企业家所需的家庭作业：初步的市场研究以确定需求；产品研究和开发以满足该需求；确定生产所需的土地、劳动力和资本要求；以及市场调查以确定有竞争力的价格以及一个吸引人的产品名称。

source: As for the prospects , Diaz , a 21-year-old Double-A outfielder , hit two home runs in Sunday 's All-Star Futures Game , becoming just the second player in the game 's history to homer twice . Alfonso Soriano is the only other player to hit two home runs in the Futures Game , doing so in 1999 , the first year the game was played . On the season , Diaz is hitting .314 with a .905 OPS and has tallied 6 home runs , 30 RBIs and 36 runs scored .

source: And so I wrote-poems , sketches , stories , the usual juvenilia . Artistically , my childhood had been one of deprivation , in that I was not the product of a dysfunctional family . Accordingly , the things I wrote derived less from experience and inner turmoil than from other writings that I admired .
domestication: 于是我开始写诗、散文、故事，都是些年轻人常写的东西。我小时候在艺术上算是受了些苦，因为我出生在一个正常家庭。所以，我写的东西更多是从我喜欢的其他作品中汲取灵感，而不是来自自己的经历或内心的挣扎。
foreignization: 于是我写下了——诗歌、速写、故事，通常是青少年的作品。从艺术上来说，我的童年是贫乏的，因为我并不是来自一个功能失调的家庭。因此，我所写的东西较少来源于经验和内心的痛苦，而是更多地来源于我所欣赏的其他作品。

source: While many of the benefits of real smart homes are a matter of convenience , they can also make a big difference in people 's lives . Connected smoke and carbon monoxide detectors can alert residents to potential dangers even when they 're not at home . Certain connected technologies can allow the elderly to stay in their own homes longer or empower those with disabilities with greater accessibility and independence .
domestication: 智能家居的很多好处在于便利，但也能大大改善人们的生活。联网的烟雾和一氧化碳探测器即使在你不在家时也能发出警报，提醒你潜在的危险。有些智能技术能让老人在自己家中住得更久，也能让残疾人获得更多的便利和独立。
foreignization: 虽然许多智能家庭的实际好处在于便利性，但它们也可以在人们的生活方面产生重大影响。连接的烟雾和一氧化碳探测器即使在居民不在家时也能提醒他们潜在的危险。某些连接技术可以让老年人在自己的家中居住更长时间，或赋予残障人士更大的可访问性和独立性。

source: Several weeks after returning to Pennsylvania , Esther fell as she tried to rise from the sofa . She lacked the strength to stand . My father called an ambulance . In the hospital , her doctors discovered that the cancer had spread to her lungs and liver . Her kidneys were failing . Again , my father called me .

几周后，埃斯特回到宾夕法尼亚后，在试图从沙发上起身时摔倒了。她没有力气站起来。我父亲叫了救护车。在医院里，她的医生发现癌症已经扩散到她的肺和肝脏。她的肾脏也在衰竭。再一次，我父亲给我打了电话。

source: The USOC has no policy to accommodate Olympic mothers , but many federations have their own initiatives . The mothers-catcher Stacey Nuveman , pitcher Jennie Finch and alternate pitcher Lisa Fernandez-spent part of the U.S. pre-Olympic tour in a motor home dubbed the Baby Mobile , a rolling day-care center with cartoons in the back and naps in the front .

source: Diagnosed your own scalp as dry ? Be careful . " Sometimes what people self-diagnose as dryness is really seborrhea , a condition of overactive oil production , which creates flaking of the scalp as well as scaling around the nose and/or eyebrows , " says Dr. Brandt . " They see this flakiness and think they have a dry scalp , then they compound their problem by using heavy conditioners . " If you 're unsure , check with your dermatologist . MANE-TAINING ' YOUR STYLE
domestication: 自己觉得头皮干燥？可得小心了。布兰特医生说：“有时候，人们自认为的干燥其实是脂溢性皮炎，这是一种过度分泌油脂的情况，会导致头皮脱屑，还有可能鼻子和眉毛周围出现鳞片状。”“他们看到这些皮屑，以为是头皮干燥，结果用了厚重的护发素，反而加重了问题。”如果你拿不准，最好咨询一下皮肤科医生。保持发型，也要注意头皮健康哦！

source: Drives in XT-class systems are generally held in place with screws that bolt the drives right into the chassis . source: Heavin credits Curves ' rapid growth to the low-overhead business model , which allows the company to open profitably in towns too small for other gyms . " We created an efficient business model that could go where no one else could , " he says . Indeed , the average Curves club today has only 400 members -- which , according to a formula the company has developed , is what a town with a population of about 10,000 can sustain .
domestication: 希文将曲线健身的快速成长归功于低成本的商业模式，这使得公司在那些规模太小、其他健身房无法盈利的小镇上也能顺利开业。“我们创造了一个高效的商业模式，能去到别人去不了的地方，”他说。确实，如今平均每个曲线健身俱乐部只有400名会员——根据公司开发的公式，一个大约1万人的小镇就能维持这样一个规模。

source: To understand the impact of demography on the House , The Atlantic examined congressional district-level data from the Census Bureau 's 2015 American Community Survey . ( The ACS data for 2015 does not take into account the recent court-ordered redistricting in North Carolina , Florida , and Virginia , so there may be some variation from the numbers reported here in the revised districts in those states . )
domestication: 为了弄清楚人口结构对众议院的影响，《大西洋月刊》分析了2015年美国社区调查中来自人口普查局的国会选区数据。不过，2015年的美国社区调查数据没有考虑到北卡罗来纳、佛罗里达和弗吉尼亚州最近法院下令的重新划分选区的情况，所以这些州调整后的选区数据可能会与这里报告的数字有些出入。

source: For another thing , people who want a drug are likely to stretch the truth . And when they do that , a lot can go wrong . A 90-pound anorexic who claims to weigh 290 can get a diet drug , a 12-year-old kid can get a muscle-building drug . The truth is , there 's little to stop anyone , through ignorance of their own health or through mischief , from buying almost any prescription drug . ( For his part , Marks usually told the truth . He fibbed about that physical exam and about his weight , to get the diet drug Meridia . )

source: American holly ( Ilex opaca ) , with its dark green leaves and bright red berries , contains bitter elements and was once thought to be useful in treating malaria . Now it 's mainly used ornamentally as a handsome thorny Christmas decor . However , the leaves of its close relative , Ilex paraguariensis , commonly called mate , are rich in caffeine . They are used to prepare a stimulating beverage known as Paraguay tea that is very popular in South America .
domestication: 美国冬青（Ilex opaca），叶子墨绿，浆果鲜红，含有苦味成分，过去人们认为它能治疟疾。如今，它主要作为漂亮的带刺圣诞装饰，用在节日里增添气氛。不过，它的近亲巴拉圭冬青（Ilex paraguariensis），也就是常说的马黛茶，叶子富含咖啡因。人们用这些叶子制作了一种提神饮料，叫做巴拉圭茶，在南美洲非常流行。
foreignization: 美国冬青（Ilex opaca），其深绿色的叶子和鲜红的浆果含有苦味成分，曾被认为对治疗疟疾有用。现在它主要被用作装饰品，作为一种 handsome thorny Christmas decor。然而，它的近亲，巴拉圭冬青（Ilex paraguariensis），通常被称为马黛，其叶子富含咖啡因。它们被用来制作一种刺激性饮料，称为巴拉圭茶，在南美洲非常受欢迎。

source: Cornell Woolrich ( 1903-68 ) . A couple of years ago I read a Woolrich short story in which a pulp writer locks himself in a hotel room and works all night to meet a deadline . When he 's done , he falls asleep , exhausted ; when he wakes up , he 's horrified to discover that the pages are blank . There was no ribbon in the typewriter . Presumably the hero took each page in turn from the typewriter without noting the absence of words on it .
domestication: 康奈尔·伍尔里奇（1903-1968）。前些年我读过一个伍尔里奇的短篇故事，讲的是一个廉价小说作家把自己关在旅馆房间里，整夜赶稿，为了赶截止日期。写完后，他累得倒头就睡；醒来时，却吓得魂飞魄散，发现稿纸一张张都是空白的。原来打字机里根本没有色带。估计这位主角是一张接一张地从打字机里取出来，都没注意到上面一个字都没有。

source: He 's been building the brand called Jay-Z since the beginning of his career . Jay stepped into the hip-hop limelight in 1996 with the perfect back story : He grew up in Brooklyn , a drug dealer who was never jailed but was able to walk into the hip-hop game with big money . There was no need to exaggerate . But more than that , he came into the game with big talent . " He 's a figure hip-hop purists can respect , " says ? uestlove . " If you bring his name up with KRS-One , Rakim , Nas and Biggie , most people would agree with you . "

source: WHERE TO FIND IT : In your breakfast . One bowl of raisin bran , a slice of buttered whole wheat toast , and a cup of hot chocolate will give you more than a third of what you need each day . Copper has also been spotted in lobster , cashews , and salmon . YOUR SYMPTOMS : Huffing and puffing , even without a cigarette ; lack of stamina during aerobic exercise WHAT MAY BE MISSING : ZINC

source: Sonic Corp . is but one-fifth the size of McDonald 's domestic burger business . But , unlike its larger rival , it does n't have to worry about pretending to be health-conscious or luring kids with plastic toys from the latest aniflick . A determinedly retro fast-food organization , the Oklahoma City-based chain of drive-ins still has a stubbornly high-calorie menu delivered by 1950s-style carhops on roller blades . How hard is it to screw up that formula ?
domestication: 声纳公司（Sonic Corp.）的规模只有麦当劳国内汉堡业务的五分之一。不过，和那个更大的竞争对手不同，它不用操心装成健康导向，也不用靠最新动画片的小塑料玩具来吸引孩子。这家总部位于俄克拉荷马城的复古快餐连锁店，依然保留着1950年代的风格，服务员穿着轮滑鞋送餐，菜单上的高热量食物也依然顽固地占据主导。这样的经营模式，想搞砸了都难。

source: Donald Trump would be the oldest individual ever elected to the presidency . He sleeps little and holds angry grudges . He purports to eat KFC and girthy slabs of red meat , and his physique does n't suggest any inconsistency in this . His health might be fine , but a claim to anything superlative feels off .

foreignization: 唐纳德·特朗普将会成为有史以来当选总统年龄最大的个人。他睡眠很少，而且怀恨在心。他声称吃肯德基和大块的红肉，而他的体形并没有显示出任何不一致。他的健康可能很好，但声称有任何优越之处却显得不太合适。

source: You can conduct an elaborate vegetable breeding project with ridiculously little land . For example , Tim Peters recommends the following procedure for tomatoes : Plant about 50 seeds of your first generation in a half-gallon pot of soil . When they come up , select for early emergence and seedling vigor , and eliminate all but about 10 . As the plants grow , remove all suckers and branches , and limit each plant to just one vine . In addition , you may need to leaf-prune -- that is , remove all the older , bigger leaves to keep the plants from shading each other out . When the plants start flowering and have set a few fruits , remove the tops . Then continue to remove all suckers and branches . And pay careful attention to soil fertility . Use good soil initially and fertilize as necessary .
domestication: 你可以在极小的土地上开展一个复杂的蔬菜育种项目。比如，蒂姆·彼得斯就推荐了一套番茄的育种方法：首先，在半加仑的土壤中种下大约50颗第一代种子。等它们发芽后，挑选那些早出苗、长势旺的，留下大概10株。随着植物生长，要掐掉所有侧枝，每株只留一根主蔓。此外，可能还需要剪叶，就是去掉老叶、大叶，防止植株互相遮挡阳光。等植物开始开花，结几个果子时，就要打顶了。之后继续去除所有侧枝。还要注意土壤肥力，一开始要用好土，必要时再施肥。
foreignization: 你可以用非常少的土地进行一项精心的蔬菜育种项目。例如，Tim Peters建议以下番茄的程序：在半加仑的土壤盆中种植大约50粒第一代种子。当它们长出来时，选择早出苗和幼苗活力强的，并淘汰所有但约10株。随着植株的生长，去除所有侧芽和分枝，每株植物仅限于一个藤蔓。此外，你可能需要剪叶——也就是说，去除所有较老、较大的叶子，以防止植株相互遮荫。当植株开始开花并结出一些果实后，去除顶部。然后继续去除所有侧芽和分枝。并且要仔细注意土壤肥力。最初使用好的土壤，并根据需要施肥。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

You can conduct an elaborate vegetable breeding project with ridiculously little land . For example , Tim Peters recommends the following procedure for tomatoes : Plant about 50 seeds of your first generation in a half-gallon pot of soil . When they come up , select for early emergence and seedling vigor , and eliminate all but about 10 . As the plants grow , remove all suckers and branches , and limit each plant to just one vine . In addition , you may need to leaf-prune -- that is , remove all the older , bigger leaves to keep the plants from shading each other out . When the plants start flowering and have set a few fruits , remove the tops . Then continue to remove all suckers and branches . And pay careful attention to soil fertility . Use good soil initially and fertilize as necessary .

source: In 1958 Edward Teller , a creator of the hydrogen bomb , suggested using nuclear explosions to dig a harbor near Cape Thompson , Alaska . On a tour of the region , where he stumped for " Project Chariot , " Teller told residents that the explosions would be so precise that they could dig the harbor into the shape of a polar bear .

source: A bicyclist discovered Payton Leutner , 12 , on the side of the road covered in blood . It was May 31 , 2014 , and the young girl had crawled for dear life out of the nearby woods , where she 'd been viciously stabbed 19 times in her arms , her legs , and her torso . She managed to survive , despite suffering major injuries to her vital organs . And she remembered who tried to kill her , leaving her alone amid the trees to bleed to death .
domestication: 一名骑自行车的人发现了12岁的佩顿·莱特纳，她躺在路边，浑身是血。那是2014年5月31日，这个小女孩为了保命，从附近树林里爬了出来，身上被残忍地刺了19刀，手臂、腿和身体上都是伤。尽管内脏器官严重受损，她还是活了下来。而且，她记得是谁想杀她，把她一个人留在树丛中等死。

一名骑自行车的人发现了12岁的佩顿·勒特纳，她躺在路边浑身是血。那是2014年5月31日，这个小女孩从附近的树林里爬了出来，她在手臂、腿部和躯干上被残忍地刺了19刀。尽管她的内脏器官遭受了严重损伤，但她还是活了下来。而且她记得是谁试图杀死她，将她独自留在树丛中等死。

source: Gal Pearl , a product manager at the Israeli-based company Better Place , disconnects his electric Renault Fluence from a charge point at his company 's parking lot in Rosh Ha'Ayin . He enters his next destination into the car 's computer- which quickly calculates that the 70 -mile journey is longer than his battery 's charge level will allow . The computer maps out a route that passes a battery switching station operated by Better Place . There , an industrial robot will quickly change the car 's battery for a fully charged one that will last the rest of the trip .
domestication: 以色列公司Better Place的产品经理加尔·帕尔，在罗什哈因的公司停车场给他的电动雷诺弗卢恩斯拔下充电插头。他把下一个目的地输入汽车电脑，电脑很快就算出70英里的路程超出了当前电池电量能跑的距离。于是，电脑规划了一条会经过Better Place运营的电池更换站的路线。到了那里，一个工业机器人会迅速把车里的电池换成充满电的新电池，这样就能顺利完成剩下的旅程了。

source: Evolutionary plant biologist David Baum of the University of Wisconsin-Madison suspects that Hsp90 does n't stand alone in this surprising story . He says the Hsp90 findings are " profoundly important " because they show that hidden genetic diversity exists within species and can erupt when conditions change .
domestication: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校的进化植物生物学家大卫·鲍姆认为，Hsp90在这段令人惊讶的故事中并不是孤军奋战。他说，Hsp90的研究成果“极其重要”，因为它揭示了物种内部存在隐性的遗传多样性，一旦环境变化，这些隐藏的多样性就会喷薄而出。

source: In most areas they found only a hard matrix of mud bricks that had been mortared in place as the pyramid was constructed . In one area near the summit , however , they found a place where the bricks had been removed and subsequently replaced with soil centuries ago . As they began removing the soil , they found eight decomposed wood beams that roofed a small room approximately thirteen feet square . In the center of this room was a large coffin made of wood planks that had been tied together with copper straps .
domestication: 大多数地方，他们只发现了一种由泥砖构成的坚硬基质，这些泥砖是在建造金字塔时用灰浆固定在原地的。然而，在接近顶端的一个区域，他们发现了一个地方，这里的砖块曾在几百年前被移除，之后又用土填补了空缺。当他们开始清理这些土壤时，发现了八根已经腐烂的木梁，这些木梁覆盖着一个大约四米见方的小房间。房间正中央放着一口大棺材，这口棺材是用木板制成的，并用铜带绑在一起。
foreignization: 在大多数地区，他们只发现了一种由泥砖构成的硬质基质，这些泥砖是在建造金字塔时用灰浆固定到位的。然而，在靠近顶部的一个区域，他们发现了一个地方，那里的砖块曾在数世纪前被移除并随后用土壤替代。当他们开始移除土壤时，发现了八根腐朽的木梁，这些木梁覆盖着一个大约十三英尺见方的小房间。在这个房间的中心是一个大型棺材，由木板制成，并用铜带捆绑在一起。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

In most areas they found only a hard matrix of mud bricks that had been mortared in place as the pyramid was constructed . In one area near the summit , however , they found a place where the bricks had been removed and subsequently replaced with soil centuries ago . As they began removing the soil , they found eight decomposed wood beams that roofed a small room approximately thirteen feet square . In the center of this room was a large coffin made of wood planks that had been tied together with copper straps .

source: All this came up recently when I was talking with some serious boat owners at the first Cruisers University in Baltimore 's Inner Harbor , co-sponsored by Motor Boating and our sister publication Cruising World . Time , they universally agreed , is the enemy of safe and comfortable cruising - time , that is , in the sense of timetables , deadlines and hard-and-fast schedules .

所有这些最近在我与一些认真的船主在巴尔的摩内港举行的首届巡游者大学上交谈时提出来了，该活动由《Motor Boating》和我们的姊妹刊物《Cruising World》共同主办。他们普遍认为，时间是安全舒适巡航的敌人——这里的时间是指时间表、最后期限和严格的日程安排。

source: Despite intense media interest in the disease recently , for decades breast cancer was a " condition " that neither women nor the press discussed in anything above a bare whisper . There were many reasons : its location in an organ that is a sexual icon in western societies ; the social stigma that all cancers carry ; a medical community controlled by paternalistic doctors ; a research community with priorities other than women 's health problems .

source: In the July " Hardware Clinic , " Mark Minasi writes , " The white wire connects the hot side of the wall outlet to the power switch ... The black wire connects the return side of the wall outlet to the power switch . " In fact , these connections are the other way around . The black wire is always the hot lead , and the white wire is always the common or return lead . "

source: But tasks that are simple for human hands can be daunting for a robot . When a person grabs an egg from a carton , for instance , tactile information from the hands feeds back to motor-control centers in the brain , which orchestrate the finger muscles to hold the egg without breaking it . Most industrial robots lack such precise feedback and control .
domestication: 但对人类来说轻而易举的事情，对机器人来说却可能难如登天。比如说，人从蛋盒里拿鸡蛋时，手上的触感会反馈给大脑的运动控制中心，指挥手指肌肉刚好使上劲，既不会捏碎也不会掉蛋。而大多数工业机器人却缺乏这种精细的反馈和控制能力。
foreignization: 但是，对于人类的手来说简单的任务对机器人来说可能非常艰巨。例如，当一个人从蛋盒中拿一个鸡蛋时，手部的触觉信息会反馈到大脑中的运动控制中心，这些中心协调手指肌肉以握住鸡蛋而不将其弄碎。大多数工业机器人缺乏如此精确的反馈和控制。

But tasks that are simple for human hands can be daunting for a robot . When a person grabs an egg from a carton , for instance , tactile information from the hands feeds back to motor-control centers in the brain , which orchestrate the finger muscles to hold the egg without breaking it . Most industrial robots lack such precise feedback and control .

source: Westen and Shedler presented their alternative classification system in the February American Journal of Psychiatry . Over the past 7 years , they have refined it for use as a clinical tool to describe patients ' personalities in a quantifiable form . Although the two clinicians probe personality from a psychodynamic , or Freudian-inspired , perspective , psychotherapists of any theoretical persuasion can use the new technique , they add .
domestication: 韦斯滕和舍德勒在2月份的《美国精神病学杂志》上提出了他们的分类系统。在过去7年里，他们不断完善这个系统，以便将其作为临床工具，以量化的方式描述患者的个性。尽管这两位临床医生是从心理动力学，即弗洛伊德学派的角度来探究个性的，但他们补充说，任何理论取向的心理治疗师都可以使用这套新方法。
foreignization: Westen 和 Shedler 在二月份的《美国精神病学杂志》上介绍了他们的替代分类系统。在过去7年中，他们对其进行了改进，以便作为临床工具以可量化形式描述患者的个性。尽管这两位临床医生从心理动力学或弗洛伊德启发的角度探讨个性，但他们补充说，任何理论倾向的心理治疗师都可以使用这种新方法。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Westen and Shedler presented their alternative classification system in the February American Journal of Psychiatry . Over the past 7 years , they have refined it for use as a clinical tool to describe patients ' personalities in a quantifiable form . Although the two clinicians probe personality from a psychodynamic , or Freudian-inspired , perspective , psychotherapists of any theoretical persuasion can use the new technique , they add .
韦斯滕和舍德勒在2月份的《美国精神病学杂志》上提出了他们的分类系统。在过去7年里，他们不断完善这个系统，以便将其作为临床工具，以量化的方式描述患者的个性。尽管这两位临床医生是从心理动力学，即弗洛伊德学派的角度来探究个性的，但他们补充说，任何理论取向的心理治疗师都可以使用这套新方法。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Westen and Shedler presented their alternative classification system in the February American Journal of Psychiatry . Over the past 7 years , they have refined it for use as a clinical tool to describe patients ' personalities in a quantifiable form . Although the two clinicians probe personality from a psychodynamic , or Freudian-inspired , perspective , psychotherapists of any theoretical persuasion can use the new technique , they add .
Westen 和 Shedler 在二月份的《美国精神病学杂志》上介绍了他们的替代分类系统。在过去7年中，他们对其进行了改进，以便作为临床工具以可量化形式描述患者的个性。尽管这两位临床医生从心理动力学或弗洛伊德启发的角度探讨个性，但他们补充说，任何理论倾向的心理治疗师都可以使用这种新方法。

source: There 's much about the object we still do n't know , but scientists say they 'll be getting high-resolution images of Ultima Thule overnight . According to Stern , we can expect to see those on Wednesday . What we know about the object now is that it 's about 35 by 15 kilometers . Its strange shape means that it 's either bilobate or in fact two objects in orbit around each other . That 's another mysterious detail about ( 486958 ) 2014 MU69 , as it 's officially known , that we 'll be able to say for certain tomorrow , Stern said .
domestication: 我们对这个天体还有很多不了解的地方，但科学家们说，他们会在一夜之间拿到Ultima Thule的高分辨率图像。按照斯滕的说法，我们周三就能看到这些图了。现在我们知道的是，这个天体大约有35公里长，15公里宽。它的形状怪异，要么是双叶状的，要么实际上是两个天体互相绕着对方转。关于这颗官方编号为（486958）2014 MU69的天体，又有一个神秘的细节，斯滕说，明天我们就能确定了。

source: Banks have tightened their lending practices . The Fed 's bank survey found that lenders have upped their standards for credit-card and jumbo mortgages -- they do this by charging premiums above the standard interest rate , reducing how much credit they offer or by forcing borrowers to meet more stringent requirements during underwriting .
domestication: 银行的贷款政策收紧了。美联储的调查显示，银行提高了信用卡和大额房贷的审批标准。它们要么在标准利率基础上加收溢价，要么减少信贷额度，或者在审核时对借款人提出更严格的要求。
foreignization: 银行已经收紧了它们的放贷政策。美联储的银行调查显示，贷款机构提高了信用卡和大额抵押贷款的标准——他们通过在标准利率之上收取溢价、减少提供的信贷额度或在审批过程中迫使借款人满足更严格的要求来实现这一点。

source: Whereas Vermeer subtly questioned aesthetic hierarchies , 200 years later , French artist Gustave Courbet aggressively challenged them in L'Atelier . Conceived on the scale of monumental public art -- 12 ' x 20 ' -Courbet 's self-aggrandizing depiction of his Paris atelier makes the modern artist ( Courbet himself ) the hero in the sort of drama previously reserved for religious and historical subjects . Crowded with more than 30 figures of humans and animals , L'Atelier resembles a scene from grand opera , its theatricality emphasized by the symmetrical arrangement of figures on either side of the central group .
domestication: 维米尔巧妙地质疑了审美等级，200年后，法国艺术家库尔贝在《画室》中则大胆挑战了这些观念。这幅画作如同宏伟的公共艺术品——长12英尺，宽20英尺——库尔贝自夸地描绘了自己的巴黎画室，将现代艺术家（即他自己）塑造成英雄，这种地位之前可是宗教和历史题材的专属。画面中挤满了30多个真人和动物形象，《画室》就像一幕宏大的歌剧场景，剧中人物左右对称地排列，更增添了戏剧效果。
foreignization: 而维米尔微妙地质疑了美学等级，200年后，法国艺术家古斯塔夫·库尔贝在《画室》中强烈地挑战了这些等级。构思为纪念碑式公共艺术的规模——12英尺x20英尺——库尔贝自夸的描绘了他的巴黎画室，使现代艺术家（库尔贝自己）成为了以前仅限于宗教和历史题材的戏剧中的英雄。画作中挤满了超过30个人物和动物，使《画室》看起来像是大歌剧的场景，其戏剧性因中央群体两侧人物的对称排列而得到了强调。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Whereas Vermeer subtly questioned aesthetic hierarchies , 200 years later , French artist Gustave Courbet aggressively challenged them in L'Atelier . Conceived on the scale of monumental public art -- 12 ' x 20 ' -Courbet 's self-aggrandizing depiction of his Paris atelier makes the modern artist ( Courbet himself ) the hero in the sort of drama previously reserved for religious and historical subjects . Crowded with more than 30 figures of humans and animals , L'Atelier resembles a scene from grand opera , its theatricality emphasized by the symmetrical arrangement of figures on either side of the central group .

source: On July 13 , 1946 , Stieglitz died of heart failure , and Dove 's own death occurred just over four months later , on November 22 . Both men left a legacy to American art . For Dove , it was getting at the essence of inner consciousness and external experience -- less a matter of abstraction , he said , than " extraction , gravitation toward a certain direction , and minding your own business . " Against heavy odds he did all these things , and with a fortitude that can only be called heroic .
domestication: 1946年7月13日，斯蒂格利茨因心脏病去世，多夫也在四个月后，11月22日离开了人世。两人给美国艺术留下了宝贵的遗产。对于多夫来说，他的艺术追求是挖掘内在意识和外部体验的本质——他说这不仅仅是抽象的问题，而是“提取、朝着某个方向前进，还有管好自己的事”。在重重困难面前，他做到了这一切，展现出了堪称英雄般的坚韧不拔。
foreignization: 1946年7月13日，斯蒂格利茨因心脏衰竭去世，多夫自己的死亡则发生在四个月后，即11月22日。两人都给美国艺术留下了遗产。对多夫而言，这是捕捉内在意识和外部体验的本质——他说，这“不那么是抽象的问题，而是‘提取，朝某个方向的引力，以及管好自己的事’。”在重重困难中，他做到了这一切，并且表现出只能称为英雄般的坚韧。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On July 13 , 1946 , Stieglitz died of heart failure , and Dove 's own death occurred just over four months later , on November 22 . Both men left a legacy to American art . For Dove , it was getting at the essence of inner consciousness and external experience -- less a matter of abstraction , he said , than " extraction , gravitation toward a certain direction , and minding your own business . " Against heavy odds he did all these things , and with a fortitude that can only be called heroic .

" Against heavy odds he did all these things , and with a fortitude that can only be called heroic .

source: In additional experiments involving human tissue samples , pharmaceutical databases and laboratory animals , the investigators identified a compound , CSRM617 , that counteracted Onecut2 . They showed CSRM617 significantly reduced the size of prostate cancer metastases in mice . " Our research suggested that Onecut2 is a master regulator of lethal prostate cancer that may be a useful therapeutic target in up to a third of patients whose cancer spreads and evades hormone therapy , " Freeman said .
domestication: 研究人员在涉及人体组织样本、药物数据库和实验动物的进一步实验中，发现了一种名为CSRM617的化合物，能有效对抗Onecut2。他们证明，CSRM617显著缩小了小鼠前列腺癌转移瘤的大小。“我们的研究显示，Onecut2可能是致命前列腺癌的关键调控因子，对于那些癌症扩散并逃避激素治疗的患者，可能有三分之一的人能从中受益。”弗里曼说道。
foreignization: 在涉及人体组织样本、药物数据库和实验动物的额外实验中，研究人员确定了一种化合物CSRM617，可以对抗Onecut2。他们显示，CSRM617显著减少了小鼠前列腺癌转移灶的大小。“我们的研究建议Onecut2是致命前列腺癌的主要调控因子，可能成为高达三分之一患者的治疗靶点，这些患者的癌症已经扩散并逃避了激素治疗，”弗里曼说。

In additional experiments involving human tissue samples , pharmaceutical databases and laboratory animals , the investigators identified a compound , CSRM617 , that counteracted Onecut2 . They showed CSRM617 significantly reduced the size of prostate cancer metastases in mice . " Our research suggested that Onecut2 is a master regulator of lethal prostate cancer that may be a useful therapeutic target in up to a third of patients whose cancer spreads and evades hormone therapy , " Freeman said .

source: Sipan is a small village , located in the central part of the Reque River valley . Near Sipan is an impressive cluster of mud-brick pyramids that rise dramatically out of the intensively cultivated valley floor . In February 1987 local grave robbers digging at the pyramids in search of ancient objects to sell , broke into one of the richest funerary chambers ever found -- the royal tomb of an ancient Moche ruler .
domestication: 西潘是个小村庄，坐落在雷克河谷的中部。村边有一群壮观的土砖金字塔，从密集耕种的河谷地面上陡然拔起。1987年2月，当地盗墓贼为了寻找古物去卖，在金字塔附近挖掘时，意外闯入了一个极为富丽堂皇的墓室——这是古代莫切统治者的一座皇家陵墓。
foreignization: 西潘是一个小村庄，位于雷克河谷的中部。西潘附近有一群令人印象深刻的土砖金字塔，从密集耕种的河谷地面 dramatic 地升起。1987年2月，当地盗墓贼在金字塔中挖掘寻找可以出售的古代物品时，闯入了有史以来发现的最富有的墓葬室之一——一位古代莫切统治者的王陵。

source: But in the unforgiving isolation of the field , Willenbring said she experienced a very different reality than the one painted by Marchant 's acolytes . Her first Antarctic expedition on his team took place in December of 1999 , when she was a 22-year-old master 's student . Alone with Marchant , his brother Jeffrey ( who was working as an assistant ) , and another graduate student , Adam Lewis , Willenbring recalls the blood-chilling ordeal that became her daily life while trapped with him :
domestication: 但在野外那毫不留情的孤寂中，威伦布林经历的现实和马昌特门徒描绘的大相径庭。1999年12月，她还是个22岁的硕士生，第一次随马昌特的团队来到南极。当时只有她、马昌特、他的弟弟杰弗里（担任助手）和另一位研究生亚当·刘易斯。威伦布林回忆起那段与他们困在一起的日子，每天的生活都让她感到毛骨悚然。
foreignization: 但是，在野外无情的孤独中，威伦布林说她经历了一个与马昌特的门徒所描绘的截然不同的现实。她的第一次南极考察是在1999年12月，当时她是22岁的硕士生。与马昌特、他的弟弟杰弗里（作为助手工作）和另一位研究生亚当·刘易斯一起，威伦布林回忆起被困与他一起时成为她日常生活的令人心寒的困境：

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But in the unforgiving isolation of the field , Willenbring said she experienced a very different reality than the one painted by Marchant 's acolytes . Her first Antarctic expedition on his team took place in December of 1999 , when she was a 22-year-old master 's student . Alone with Marchant , his brother Jeffrey ( who was working as an assistant ) , and another graduate student , Adam Lewis , Willenbring recalls the blood-chilling ordeal that became her daily life while trapped with him :

source: Financial Tax-Free Income . Financial 's William Veronda , 44 , the $185 million no-load 's manager since 1984 , has made money betting on interest rates . By lengthening the maturities in his high-grade portfolio to 24 years and loading up on highly rate-sensitive discount bonds ( those selling for less than their face value ) , Veronda capitalized on falling interest rates over the past five years to rack up a market-beating total return of 70% . The drawback : a volatility among the highest in its class .
domestication: 金融免税收入。威廉·维伦达，现年44岁，自1984年起就掌管着这只价值1.85亿美元的无手续费基金。他通过预测利率变化赚了不少钱。通过将高质量投资组合中的到期时间延长至24年，并大量购入对利率高度敏感的折价债券（即售价低于面值的债券），维伦达在过去五年中利用利率下降的机会，实现了超过市场平均水平70%的总回报。不过，这种策略也有个缺点：基金波动性在同类产品中算是较高的。

source: On OctOber 3 , 2008 , President George W. Bush signed the Troubled Asset Relief Program bill into law , delivering $450 billion to failing banks on the premise that it would prevent their collapse and stimulate a faltering economy . Like millions of Americans , Dmitri Williams , an associate professor of communications at the University of Southern California , found TARP troubling- not because the bill provided too much or ( as many economists argued ) too little , but because it was unscientific . " We did a half-a-trillion-dollar experiment with the economy and had no control group , " he says . Setting up a test bed for a program as complex as TARP might be difficult , but it was n't impossible . Williams had found just such a petri dish in videogames .
domestication: 2008年10月3日，美国总统乔治·W·布什签署了一项《问题资产救助计划》法案，拨款4500亿美元给濒临倒闭的银行，声称这可以防止它们破产，并刺激疲软的经济。和数百万美国人一样，南加州大学传播学副教授德米特里·威廉姆斯对TARP感到不安，不是因为觉得这个法案提供的资金太多或太少——许多经济学家这么认为——而是因为它缺乏科学依据。“我们做了一个半万亿的经济实验，却没有任何对照组，”他说。尽管像TARP这样复杂的计划设立测试环境可能很难，但并非不可能。威廉姆斯在电子游戏中找到了这样的“培养皿”。

On OctOber 3 , 2008 , President George W. Bush signed the Troubled Asset Relief Program bill into law , delivering $450 billion to failing banks on the premise that it would prevent their collapse and stimulate a faltering economy . Like millions of Americans , Dmitri Williams , an associate professor of communications at the University of Southern California , found TARP troubling- not because the bill provided too much or ( as many economists argued ) too little , but because it was unscientific . " We did a half-a-trillion-dollar experiment with the economy and had no control group , " he says . Setting up a test bed for a program as complex as TARP might be difficult , but it was n't impossible . Williams had found just such a petri dish in videogames .

source: If you look at the front-panel switch , you 'll see four spade lugs where you can connect or disconnect the white , black , brown , and blue wires . You 'll notice a very low ridge on the connector and two spade lugs on either side of the ridge . Before disconnecting the wires from the switch , notice that the black and the blue are on one side of the ridge and the white and the brown are on the other side . The ridge is just a reminder about which wires go with which other wires . Just keep the white and the brown on one side and the black and the blue on the other side , and all will be well . The way I remember it is that one side is black and blue .
domestication: 你看看前面板的开关，会看到四个接线端子，你可以在这里连接或断开白色、黑色、棕色和蓝色的电线。你会注意到连接器上有一个很低的小凸起，两边各有两个接线端子。在断开开关上的电线之前，要记住黑色和蓝色的电线在凸起的一边，白色和棕色的电线在另一边。这个凸起只是个提醒，帮你记住哪些线应该连在一起。只要保持白色和棕色在一边，黑色和蓝色在另一边，就不会出错。我是这么记的：一边是黑加蓝。

If you look at the front-panel switch , you 'll see four spade lugs where you can connect or disconnect the white , black , brown , and blue wires . You 'll notice a very low ridge on the connector and two spade lugs on either side of the ridge . Before disconnecting the wires from the switch , notice that the black and the blue are on one side of the ridge and the white and the brown are on the other side . The ridge is just a reminder about which wires go with which other wires . Just keep the white and the brown on one side and the black and the blue on the other side , and all will be well . The way I remember it is that one side is black and blue .

source: But the rhyme processor in his mind has n't stopped working . He has songs in his head . " I got six or seven good ones and a bunch of other silly ideas , " he says , " but six or seven that could go tomorrow . " He builds on and remembers these songs by rhyming when he showers : " Every day , every shower . "
domestication: 但他脑子里的韵脚处理器可没闲着，脑袋里全是歌。“我有六七首不错的歌，还有一些乱七八糟的点子，”他说，“不过这六七首明天就能拿得出手。”他每天洗澡时都会哼唱这些歌来记忆和创作：“每天洗一次，每次都在唱。”

source: When pending changes to Montana 's stream-access laws led to a debate over fishing access , Crawford made it clear which side of the fence he was on . The rancher , who lives on the East Gallatin River , installed a gate on his property and put up a sign : WELCOME ANGLERS . Crawford continued in his championing of public access in 2009 after a 2.5-acre parcel in Logan came on the market . He bought the property and then donated it , part to Montana Fish , Wildlife and Parks and part to the American Legion . Besides adding a takeout halfway between two existing access points , the site will serve as a wheelchair-friendly " fishing park " for disabled veterans .
domestication: 蒙大拿州的河流使用权法规即将修改，引起了关于钓鱼准入的争论，克劳福德明确表明了自己的立场。这位住在加拉廷河东岸的牧场主，在自己的地界上装了一扇门，竖起一块牌子：欢迎垂钓者。2009年，罗根有一块2.5英亩的土地上市，克劳福德又站了出来支持公共准入。他买下了这块地，然后一部分捐给了蒙大拿鱼类、野生动物和公园部门，另一部分捐给了美国退伍军人协会。这样一来，不仅在两个现有入口之间增加了一个新的下水点，还建成了一个方便轮椅使用的“垂钓公园”，专供残疾退伍军人使用。
foreignization: 当蒙大拿州的河流准入法律待定变更引发钓鱼准入辩论时，克劳福德明确表明了他站在哪一边。这位住在加拉廷河东岸的牧场主在他的财产上安装了一个大门，并竖起了一块牌子：欢迎垂钓者。2009年，当洛根有一块2.5英亩的土地上市后，克劳福德继续支持公共准入。他购买了这块土地，然后将其部分捐赠给蒙大拿鱼类、野生动物和公园部门，部分捐赠给美国退伍军人协会。除了在两个现有准入点之间增加一个下水点外，该地点还将作为一个轮椅友好的“垂钓公园”，供残疾退伍军人使用。

When pending changes to Montana 's stream-access laws led to a debate over fishing access , Crawford made it clear which side of the fence he was on . The rancher , who lives on the East Gallatin River , installed a gate on his property and put up a sign : WELCOME ANGLERS . Crawford continued in his championing of public access in 2009 after a 2.5-acre parcel in Logan came on the market . He bought the property and then donated it , part to Montana Fish , Wildlife and Parks and part to the American Legion . Besides adding a takeout halfway between two existing access points , the site will serve as a wheelchair-friendly " fishing park " for disabled veterans .

source: LITTLE PATIENTS In a medical CT scan , X rays pass through tissue at a series of different angles , and a computer analyzes the X rays ' subsequent locations and intensities to generate images of thin slices of the body . The computer then combines the data on a multitude of slices to produce a 3-dimensional view of inner anatomy .
domestication: 小病人做CT检查时，X光从不同角度穿过身体组织，电脑分析X光的路径和强度，生成身体薄片的图像。这些薄片的信息再由电脑汇总，形成人体内部结构的三维视图。
foreignization: 小患者们 在医学CT扫描中，X射线以一系列不同的角度穿过组织，计算机分析X射线随后的位置和强度以生成身体薄层的图像。然后，计算机将大量切片的数据结合起来，生成内部解剖结构的三维视图。

source: Robert Sobel loved police work , too . Sobel , now 49 , was a member of an elite narcotics unit in the L.A. Sheriff 's Department from 1987 to 1989 , when federal prosecutors nabbed him and some of his fellow detectives in a $30,000 sting . Since then , 27 former deputies have been convicted on various charges and dozens of others have been forced to retire . Sobel says his unit contained 124 people , and this case knocked down about 45 . If there 's two or three guys , that 's corruption . But when a third of the unit goes down . . . we 're talking about institutional corruption . '
domestication: 罗伯特·索贝尔也热爱警察工作。现年49岁的他，曾在1987年至1989年间，是洛杉矶县警局一个精英缉毒小组的成员。后来，联邦检察官在一次3万美元的诱捕行动中，把他和几位同事一起抓了起来。从那以后，有27名前副警长因各种罪名被定罪，还有几十人被迫退休。索贝尔说，他所在的小组共有124人，这个案子就让其中大约45人栽了跟头。两三个坏蛋，那叫腐败；但要是三分之一的人都倒下了，这可就是体制性的问题了。
foreignization: 罗伯特·索贝尔也热爱警察工作。索贝尔，现年49岁，从1987年到1989年是洛杉矶县警长办公室一个精英毒品单位的成员，当时联邦检察官在一个3万美元的陷阱行动中逮捕了他和他的几位同事。自那以后，27名前副警长因各种指控被定罪，另有数十人被迫退休。索贝尔说他的单位有124人，而这个案件牵扯到了大约45人。如果有两三个家伙，那就是腐败。但当单位的三分之一倒下……我们谈论的是制度性腐败。

Since then , 27 former deputies have been convicted on various charges and dozens of others have been forced to retire . Sobel says his unit contained 124 people , and this case knocked down about 45 . If there 's two or three guys , that 's corruption . But when a third of the unit goes down . . . we 're talking about institutional corruption . '

source: In the old days the Inns provided all the legal instruction necessary , not in formal classes but by continual contact between students and their learned elders , mostly in the great communal dining rooms , listening and talking about cases and precedents while the claret and the port went round . A student who was judged to have soaked up enough learning after a few years was summoned to step up to the Bar , which was originally a wooden barrier marking off the part of the hall reserved for the exclusive use of " the benchers , " or senior members of the Inn . From that moment on , the candidate was authorized to practice before the higher courts of England and Wales .
domestication: 过去，旅店就是法学院，不需要正式的课程，学生和他们的前辈学者们成天泡在大食堂里，边喝红酒边聊案例和先例。老一辈觉得哪个学生混得差不多了，几年后就会被叫去“登堂入室”，那道门槛原本是一根木栏杆，拦着的是“法官们”或资深会员专用的地方。从那时起，这位候选人就被授权可以在英格兰和威尔士的高等法院执业了。
foreignization: 在过去的日子，律师会馆提供了所有必要的法律指导，不是通过正式的课程，而是通过学生和他们的学识渊博的长辈之间持续的接触，大部分是在大型的公共餐厅里，听着并讨论案例和先例，同时红葡萄酒和波特酒不断流传。一个被判断为在几年内吸收了足够知识的学生会被召唤去晋升到律师行列，最初这是一道木制的屏障，标志着大厅中专供“the benchers”（或会馆的资深成员）使用的区域。从那一刻起，候选人被授权在英格兰和威尔士的高级法院执业。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the old days the Inns provided all the legal instruction necessary , not in formal classes but by continual contact between students and their learned elders , mostly in the great communal dining rooms , listening and talking about cases and precedents while the claret and the port went round . A student who was judged to have soaked up enough learning after a few years was summoned to step up to the Bar , which was originally a wooden barrier marking off the part of the hall reserved for the exclusive use of " the benchers , " or senior members of the Inn . From that moment on , the candidate was authorized to practice before the higher courts of England and Wales .
过去，旅店就是法学院，不需要正式的课程，学生和他们的前辈学者们成天泡在大食堂里，边喝红酒边聊案例和先例。老一辈觉得哪个学生混得差不多了，几年后就会被叫去“登堂入室”，那道门槛原本是一根木栏杆，拦着的是“法官们”或资深会员专用的地方。从那时起，这位候选人就被授权可以在英格兰和威尔士的高等法院执业了。

In the old days the Inns provided all the legal instruction necessary , not in formal classes but by continual contact between students and their learned elders , mostly in the great communal dining rooms , listening and talking about cases and precedents while the claret and the port went round . A student who was judged to have soaked up enough learning after a few years was summoned to step up to the Bar , which was originally a wooden barrier marking off the part of the hall reserved for the exclusive use of " the benchers , " or senior members of the Inn . From that moment on , the candidate was authorized to practice before the higher courts of England and Wales .

在过去的日子，律师会馆提供了所有必要的法律指导，不是通过正式的课程，而是通过学生和他们的学识渊博的长辈之间持续的接触，大部分是在大型的公共餐厅里，听着并讨论案例和先例，同时红葡萄酒和波特酒不断流传。一个被判断为在几年内吸收了足够知识的学生会被召唤去晋升到律师行列，最初这是一道木制的屏障，标志着大厅中专供“the benchers”（或会馆的资深成员）使用的区域。从那一刻起，候选人被授权在英格兰和威尔士的高级法院执业。

source: In tap , you wear shoes that have metal plates attached to the heel and forefoot ; these make a percussive sound when you rhythmically touch or stomp on the floor . Compared with other dance styles , there 's less coordination between your arms and legs and only a little hip action , so tap dancing is actually easier than it looks .
domestication: 踢踏舞时，脚上穿的鞋底和脚尖都装有金属片，你有节奏地触碰或踩踏地板时，就会发出清脆的敲击声。和其他舞蹈比起来，踢踏舞对手臂和腿部的协调要求不高，胯部动作也很少，所以说，踢踏舞其实没看起来那么难。
foreignization: 在踢踏舞中，你穿的鞋子在鞋跟和前脚掌部分附有金属板；当你有节奏地触碰或踩踏地板时，这些金属板会发出打击乐般的声音。与其他舞蹈风格相比，踢踏舞中你的手臂和腿部之间的协调性较低，只有少量的髋部动作，所以踢踏舞实际上比看起来要容易。

source: The best regimen of hair care , even if you exercise vigorously , is to shampoo once a day using a pH-balanced shampoo . " Especially if your hair is fine or damaged from too many chemical processes , cleansing too frequently can be damaging . Your natural oils offer important protection to your hair shaft , " says Dr. Caserio . " If you strip too many of them out by shampooing , you create excessive dryness , which , in turn , eventually causes breakage . "
domestication: 最好的头发护理方案，即使你剧烈运动，也是一天洗一次头，用pH平衡的洗发水。特别是如果你的头发细软，或者因为化学处理太多而受损，过于频繁地清洁反而会伤害头发。天然油脂对你的发丝有很重要的保护作用，卡塞里博士说。如果洗得太勤，把油脂都洗没了，头发就会变得干燥，久而久之就会导致断裂。

source: Tesla highlighted preventative measures it takes to counter racial discrimination in the workplace , such as compulsory anti-discrimination courses , regular in-person spot training sessions upon the submission of an allegation or complaint , as well as a dedicated team that is focused on " investigating workplace concerns , recommending corrective actions and assisting managers with implementing those actions . "

source: " There is no way to adequately express the immense sense of loss that we all feel with this news , " PGA Tour commissioner Tim Finchem said in a statement to tour members . " It is not an exaggeration to say there would be no modern-day PGA Tour without Arnold Palmer . There would be no PGA Tour Champions without Arnold Palmer . There would be no Golf Channel without Arnold Palmer . ... The fact that his popularity never waned more than a quarter-century after his last competitive victory speaks volumes to the man , the icon and the legendary figure he was . "

source: The art movement 's 2009 centennial brought a rash of retrospectives to Italy and elsewhere . The biggest-ever American exhibition is scheduled to open at the Guggenheim in 2014 . Since the Futurists proposed the destruction of museums ( " cemeteries , " in their parlance ) , they would have hated these tributes . But they would have been pleased to discover that their influence remains potent in the 21st century .
domestication: 2009年，这个艺术运动迎来了百年诞辰，意大利和其他地方因此掀起了一股回顾展的热潮。美国也计划在2014年于古根海姆博物馆举办史上最大规模的展览。未来主义者曾提议摧毁博物馆（他们称之为“坟墓”），所以他们肯定不会喜欢这些纪念活动。但要是知道自己的影响在21世纪依然强大，他们恐怕会感到欣慰吧。

source: In the late 1970s , a television series based on the popular comic book The Incredible Hulk became a surprise hit . The comic related the adventures of a scientist who studied the effect of radiation on physical strength . After a freak accident in a nuclear reactor , the researcher would temporarily transform into a gigantic , green monster with incredible strength-the Hulk-whenever he experienced stress . The clothes-ripping , skin-coloring transformation of the scrawny scientist into the Hulk was an amusing staple of every episode of the television show .
domestication: 20世纪70年代末，根据热门漫画《无敌浩克》改编的电视剧意外走红。这本漫画讲述了一位科学家研究辐射对体力影响的故事。一次核反应堆的意外事故后，这位科学家每当遇到压力时，就会暂时变成一个巨大、绿色、力大无穷的怪物——浩克。这位瘦弱的科学家变身为浩克时，衣服破裂、皮肤变绿的场景成了电视剧每集的笑点。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the late 1970s , a television series based on the popular comic book The Incredible Hulk became a surprise hit . The comic related the adventures of a scientist who studied the effect of radiation on physical strength . After a freak accident in a nuclear reactor , the researcher would temporarily transform into a gigantic , green monster with incredible strength-the Hulk-whenever he experienced stress . The clothes-ripping , skin-coloring transformation of the scrawny scientist into the Hulk was an amusing staple of every episode of the television show .

source: The flimsy and transparently specious argument Republicans offered was : " Let the people decide . " Of course , the people decided when they elected Obama to a second four-year term . domestication: 共和党的这个借口真是站不住脚，简直是透明的诡辩：“让人民来做决定。”人民已经做过决定了，2012年选出了奥巴马连任四年总统。而且，2016年大选时，大约多出300万美国人更希望奥巴马有个民主党接班人，而不是让特朗普来提名大法官。那些重视司法独立和民主参议院的人，可以通过坚持让梅里克·加兰德坐上他本应占据的席位来解决这个宪法问题。接下来的大法官提名，就留给特朗普总统吧。
