source: Walker 's parents had not heard a word from their son after he left the madrasa at Bannu in May 2001 . Marilyn had written her son , " I really need to hear your voice , " but she got no answer . Frank came up with an elaborate rationale for his son 's silence : under Islamic custom , John would have to obey his father , so he never asked for permission before joining up with the Taliban . After September 11 , Frank and Marilyn were worried sick ; Frank began visiting mosques in the San Francisco area , showing a photo of his son in full Islamic dress . Lindh says he dreaded the worst . " I would look at the moon and just wonder if John was somewhere seeing it , too , " he says . " I did n't have the sense that he was . "
domestication: 沃克的父母自2001年5月他离开班努的宗教学校后，就再也没有他的音讯了。玛丽琳给儿子写信说：“我真的很想听听你的声音。”但她没有收到任何回音。弗兰克为儿子的沉默编了一个复杂的理由：按照伊斯兰教的习俗，约翰必须听从父亲的吩咐，所以他加入塔利班之前从未征求过父亲的同意。9·11事件后，弗兰克和玛丽琳担心得要命；弗兰克开始在旧金山地区的清真寺里四处打听，拿着儿子穿着全套伊斯兰服装的照片问人。林德说，他最害怕的就是这种状况。“我望着月亮，心里想着约翰是不是也在世界的某个角落看着同样的月亮。”他说，“但我总感觉不是这样。”
foreignization: 沃克的父母自2001年5月他离开班努的神学院后就再也没有收到过他的任何消息。玛丽琳给儿子写信说：“我真的很需要听到你的声音，”但她没有得到回复。弗兰克为儿子的沉默想出了一个复杂的理由：根据伊斯兰习俗，约翰必须服从他的父亲，所以他加入塔利班之前从未征求过许可。9月11日之后，弗兰克和玛丽琳担心得要命；弗兰克开始走访旧金山地区的清真寺，展示他儿子身穿全套伊斯兰服装的照片。林德说他害怕最坏的情况。“我会看着月亮，只是想知道约翰是否也在某个地方看着它，”他说。“我没有那种感觉。”

Walker 's parents had not heard a word from their son after he left the madrasa at Bannu in May 2001 . Marilyn had written her son , " I really need to hear your voice , " but she got no answer . Frank came up with an elaborate rationale for his son 's silence : under Islamic custom , John would have to obey his father , so he never asked for permission before joining up with the Taliban . After September 11 , Frank and Marilyn were worried sick ; Frank began visiting mosques in the San Francisco area , showing a photo of his son in full Islamic dress . Lindh says he dreaded the worst . " I would look at the moon and just wonder if John was somewhere seeing it , too , " he says . " I did n't have the sense that he was . "

source: Consistent with most of the other approaches is to reduce regulatory obstacles to the exploration and production of energy . If ANWR continues to be off-limits , then the government could open up areas in the lower 48 states that , at present , are not accessible . Likewise , if exploration and production on the outer Continental Shelf off the coasts of Florida and California continue to be prohibited , then production could be expanded from existing platforms in the Gulf of Mexico and elsewhere .
domestication: 与其他大多数方法一致的是减少对能源勘探和生产的监管障碍。如果阿拉斯加国家野生动物保护区继续禁止进入，政府可以开放下48州目前无法触及的区域。同样，如果佛罗里达和加利福尼亚沿海的外大陆架继续禁止勘探和生产，那就可以扩大墨西哥湾和其他地方现有平台的产量。
foreignization: 与大多数其他方法一致的是减少对能源勘探和生产的监管障碍。如果ANWR继续禁止进入，那么政府可以开放下48州目前无法进入的地区。同样，如果继续禁止在佛罗里达和加利福尼亚海岸外的大陆架上进行勘探和生产，那么可以从墨西哥湾和其他地方现有的平台扩大生产。

Consistent with most of the other approaches is to reduce regulatory obstacles to the exploration and production of energy . If ANWR continues to be off-limits , then the government could open up areas in the lower 48 states that , at present , are not accessible . Likewise , if exploration and production on the outer Continental Shelf off the coasts of Florida and California continue to be prohibited , then production could be expanded from existing platforms in the Gulf of Mexico and elsewhere .

source: " We know how to run the present U. S. economy on one-fifth the oil we are now using , " says energy expert and Rocky Mountain Institute founder Amory Lovins . The efficiency improvements Lovins is talking about would cut demand at a cost of about $5 per barrel of oil saved . The oil that Bush would wrest from Alaska would run three to seven times more per barrel , not even considering the devastation of the Arctic Wildlife Refuge .
domestication: 能源专家、落基山研究所创始人艾莫瑞·洛文斯说：“我们懂得如何将目前美国经济对石油的依赖减少到现在的五分之一。”洛文斯谈到的效率提升措施，每节省一桶油的成本大约是5美元。而布什想从阿拉斯加开采的石油，每桶成本要高三到七倍，还不算对北极野生动物保护区的破坏呢。
foreignization: “我们知道如何以目前使用的石油的五分之一来运行美国经济，”能源专家和落基山研究所创始人阿莫里·洛文斯说。洛文斯谈到的效率提升将使每桶节省的石油成本约为5美元。布什试图从阿拉斯加开采的石油每桶将多出三到七倍的成本，甚至还没有考虑到对北极野生动植物保护区的破坏。

source: Columbus met only a small number of them after he had successfully navigated the Ocean Sea , as the Atlantic was then known . His disclosure of their existence baffled Renaissance Europe but eventually led to knowledge of an entire new hemisphere . The Genoese mariner made the announcement of his triumphant crossing in a letter addressed to his Spanish patrons , King Ferdinand and Queen Isabella . He declared that he had " found very many islands filled with people without number , and of them all I have taken possession for their Highnesses , by proclamation and with the royal standard displayed , and nobody objected . " This arrogant usurpation was wholly in line with Europe 's determination to expand its ordained and Christian world .
domestication: 哥伦布在成功横渡当时被称为大西洋的海域后，只遇到了少量的土著人。他透露了这些人的存在，让文艺复兴时期的欧洲感到困惑不已，但最终却揭开了新半球的面纱。这位热那亚水手在他的信中向西班牙的赞助者——费迪南德国王和伊莎贝拉女王——宣布了他的胜利。他说：“我发现了许多岛屿，岛上住着不计其数的人，我都以陛下的名义宣布占领了，举行了宣誓仪式，竖起了皇家旗帜，没有一个人敢反对。”这种傲慢的侵占行为完全符合欧洲扩张其既定的基督教世界的决心。
foreignization: 哥伦布在成功航行了当时被称为大西洋的海洋之后，只遇到了他们中的一小部分人。他透露他们的存在让文艺复兴时期的欧洲感到困惑，但最终导致了对一个全新半球的认识。这位热那亚航海家在他的胜利横渡公告中，写了一封信给他的西班牙赞助人，费迪南国王和伊莎贝拉王后。他宣布自己“发现了许多岛屿，岛上住着无数的人，我以他们的陛下的名义，通过宣告和展示王室旗帜的方式，占有了所有这些岛屿，没有人反对。”这种傲慢的夺取行为完全符合欧洲扩张其预定的基督教世界的决心。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Columbus met only a small number of them after he had successfully navigated the Ocean Sea , as the Atlantic was then known . His disclosure of their existence baffled Renaissance Europe but eventually led to knowledge of an entire new hemisphere . The Genoese mariner made the announcement of his triumphant crossing in a letter addressed to his Spanish patrons , King Ferdinand and Queen Isabella . He declared that he had " found very many islands filled with people without number , and of them all I have taken possession for their Highnesses , by proclamation and with the royal standard displayed , and nobody objected . " This arrogant usurpation was wholly in line with Europe 's determination to expand its ordained and Christian world .

哥伦布在成功横渡当时被称为大西洋的海域后，只遇到了少量的土著人。他透露了这些人的存在，让文艺复兴时期的欧洲感到困惑不已，但最终却揭开了新半球的面纱。这位热那亚水手在他的信中向西班牙的赞助者——费迪南德国王和伊莎贝拉女王——宣布了他的胜利。他说：“我发现了许多岛屿，岛上住着不计其数的人，我都以陛下的名义宣布占领了，举行了宣誓仪式，竖起了皇家旗帜，没有一个人敢反对。”这种傲慢的侵占行为完全符合欧洲扩张其既定的基督教世界的决心。

source: Renewed growth . Rochester 's turnaround has been less dramatic , but it is happening . A new Blue Cross Blue Shield tower is on the drawing board , and a new addition to Rochester 's grand old library is currently underway . Gannett , which publishes the city 's two papers , is building a new printing plant . There 's a new minor-league baseball stadium , and Tops Friendly Markets , a grocery chain based in Buffalo , recently agreed to build stores in some run-down neighborhoods . The most dramatic growth seems to be in the better-off suburbs , however , with an abundance of new development and construction . " There 's a lot of purchasing power in this community , a lot of wealth on the southeast side , " says Kent Gardner . " I see the community as very stable . "
domestication: 焕发新生。罗切斯特的复苏虽然不如其他地方那样轰轰烈烈，但也正在悄然发生。新的蓝十字蓝盾大厦已经在规划中，罗切斯特那座历史悠久的图书馆也正扩建。甘尼特公司，出版该市两家报纸的公司，正在建设新的印刷厂。这里还有一个新建的小联盟棒球场，而总部位于布法罗的连锁超市Tops Friendly Markets最近也同意在一些破旧社区开设分店。不过，最显著的增长还是出现在富裕的郊区，那里新开发和建设项目如雨后春笋般涌现。“这个社区的购买力很强，东南区尤其富有。”肯特·加德纳说，“我觉得这个社区非常稳定。”

source: Making the most of that chance , however , is a complicated business , requiring both manual labor and advanced research and analytical techniques . Crabtree and his team of volunteers and paid workers will spend hours tracking coyotes with radio transmitters , watching them through binoculars , collecting coyote scats to determine the animals ' population density and diet , and mapping the creatures ' sovereign territories .
domestication: 把握住这个机会可不容易，既要出力流汗，又要动脑筋搞科研。克兰特里和他的志愿者团队，还有雇员们，要花上好几小时，用无线电发射器追踪郊狼，举着望远镜观察它们，还要收集郊狼的粪便来分析它们的数量和食性，最后还要绘制这些野生动物的地盘图。
foreignization: 然而，充分利用这个机会是一项复杂的工作，既需要体力劳动，也需要先进的研究和分析技术。Crabtree和他的志愿者及有偿工作人员团队将花费数小时通过无线电发射器追踪土狼，用双筒望远镜观察它们，收集土狼的粪便以确定这些动物的种群密度和饮食，并绘制这些生物的主权领地地图。

source: WHEN Lonnie Alfred ( Bo ) Pilgrim was a young boy and wanted a Coke , his father , who ran the general store in the northeast Texas hamlet of Pine , would first make him sell six Cokes for a nickel apiece to the men working the nearby cotton gin . In 1939 , when Bo was 11 , his father died suddenly of a heart attack , leaving a widow , seven children and a deeply indebted store . Bo went to work as a farmhand . He later peddled newspapers , raised chickens and hogs , hauled gravel , picked peas and cotton and sacked groceries -- all before he turned 18 .
domestication: 当Lonnie Alfred（博）皮尔格姆还是个孩子的时候，要是想喝可乐，他爸爸，就是那个在德克萨斯州东北部的松树小镇经营杂货店的老皮尔格姆，就会先让他去附近的棉籽加工厂，以每瓶五分钱的价格卖给工人六瓶可乐。1939年，博11岁那年，他父亲突然因心脏病去世，留下了一个寡妇、七个孩子和一家负债累累的杂货店。博就开始给人干农活了。后来，他还卖过报纸，养过鸡和猪，拉过石子，摘过豌豆和棉花，还打过杂货袋——这些事儿，他全是在18岁前干的。
foreignization: 当隆尼·阿尔弗雷德（博）·皮尔格林还是个小男孩并且想要一瓶可乐时，他的父亲，经营着位于得克萨斯州东北部小镇派恩的一家杂货店，会先让他以每个五分钱的价格卖给附近棉籽加工厂工作的男人们六瓶可乐。1939年，当博11岁时，他的父亲因心脏病突发去世，留下了一位遗孀、七个孩子和一家负债累累的商店。博开始作为一名农场工人工作。他后来卖报纸，养鸡和猪，运沙石，摘豌豆和棉花，打包杂货——所有这些都在他18岁之前完成。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

WHEN Lonnie Alfred ( Bo ) Pilgrim was a young boy and wanted a Coke , his father , who ran the general store in the northeast Texas hamlet of Pine , would first make him sell six Cokes for a nickel apiece to the men working the nearby cotton gin . In 1939 , when Bo was 11 , his father died suddenly of a heart attack , leaving a widow , seven children and a deeply indebted store . Bo went to work as a farmhand . He later peddled newspapers , raised chickens and hogs , hauled gravel , picked peas and cotton and sacked groceries -- all before he turned 18 .

source: Ewald , however , does n't bother emasculating . He just takes a flower from the cultivar he wants as male parent and dusts its pollen onto the stigma of the flower of the other cultivar . Sometimes the offspring will be from his cross , sometimes they wo n't . " I just dust the pollen on there and take what I get , " Ewald says . " Most of life is like that , I 've found . "
domestication: 然而，埃瓦尔德却懒得去去雄。他只是从想要作为父本的品种上摘一朵花，把它的花粉撒到另一个品种的雌蕊上。有时候，后代会是他的杂交结果，有时候又不是。“我就是把花粉撒上去，看能收获什么。”埃瓦尔德说，“我发现，生活多半也是这样。”
foreignization: 然而，埃瓦尔德并不费心去势。他只是从他想要作为父本的品种中摘下一朵花，将其花粉撒到另一个品种的花朵的柱头上。有时后代会是他的杂交结果，有时则不会。“我只是把花粉撒在那里，然后接受我得到的结果，”埃瓦尔德说。“我发现，生活中的大部分事情都是这样的。”

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Ewald , however , does n't bother emasculating . He just takes a flower from the cultivar he wants as male parent and dusts its pollen onto the stigma of the flower of the other cultivar . Sometimes the offspring will be from his cross , sometimes they wo n't . " I just dust the pollen on there and take what I get , " Ewald says . " Most of life is like that , I 've found . "
然而，埃瓦尔德却懒得去去雄。他只是从想要作为父本的品种上摘一朵花，把它的花粉撒到另一个品种的雌蕊上。有时候，后代会是他的杂交结果，有时候又不是。“我就是把花粉撒上去，看能收获什么。”埃瓦尔德说，“我发现，生活多半也是这样。”

Ewald , however , does n't bother emasculating . He just takes a flower from the cultivar he wants as male parent and dusts its pollen onto the stigma of the flower of the other cultivar . 然而，埃瓦尔德并不费心去势。他只是从他想要作为父本的品种中摘下一朵花，将其花粉撒到另一个品种的花朵的柱头上。有时后代会是他的杂交结果，有时则不会。“我只是把花粉撒在那里，然后接受我得到的结果，”埃瓦尔德说。“我发现，生活中的大部分事情都是这样的。”

source: To insulate his company from those cycles , Pilgrim decided in 1986 to plow his surging earnings into the prepared chicken market . Prepared chicken is closer to a finished , ready-to-eat product . It is sold to supermarkets and to food service customers -- wholesale distributors like Sysco and Kraft General Foods ( which resell it to restaurants , hospitals and the like ) and fast-food chains . Unlike commodity chicken , prepared chicken sells mostly on a cost-plus basis .
domestication: 为了保护公司免受行业周期的影响，皮尔格雷姆在1986年决定将快速增长的利润投向加工鸡肉市场。加工鸡肉更接近成品，可以随时食用。这些产品不仅卖给超市，还供应给食品服务客户，比如Sysco和卡夫通用食品这样的批发商，他们会再把这些鸡肉卖给餐馆、医院等场所，还有快餐连锁店。与普通鸡肉不同，加工鸡肉大多按照成本加成的方式销售。
foreignization: 为了使他的公司不受这些周期的影响，Pilgrim 在 1986 年决定将他激增的利润投入到熟食鸡市场。熟食鸡更接近于成品，即食产品。它被卖给超市和食品服务客户——像 Sysco 和 Kraft General Foods 这样的批发分销商（它们再将其转售给餐馆、医院等）以及快餐连锁店。与大宗商品鸡不同，熟食鸡主要以成本加成的方式销售。

source: FOUR YEARS ON , I FIND IT IMPOSSIBLE TO DESCRIBE WHAT IT 'S like . I could say it 's like being water-boarded , or listening to nails on a chalkboard . I could say it 's like any number of things people use to describe something unbearable . Except it is n't really like that . It is n't really like anything except what it is . It 's a thing that 's impossible to recall with anything like the discomfort one experiences when it 's happening .
domestication: 四年过去了，我实在无法描述那是一种怎样的感觉。要说起来，就像是被水刑拷问，或是听到指甲划过黑板的声音。这些形容词人们常用来说一些难以忍受的事情。但其实又不太一样，它就是它自己，没有什么能比得上。那种感觉，事后回想起来，怎么也体会不到当时那种难受劲儿。
foreignization: 四年后，我发现很难描述那是什么感觉。我可以说它就像被水刑拷问，或者像听粉笔在黑板上刮擦的声音。我可以说它就像人们用来形容无法忍受的事情的任何一种东西。但其实并不真的像那样。它并不真的像任何东西，除了它本身。这是一种当事情发生时，难以用同样的不适感回忆起来的感觉。

source: The shirts , which he began selling in his store in 1961 , quickly caught on with local customers . Not the least of their appeal was their toned-down colors . McCullough had observed that the most authentic-looking aloha shirts were the ones the surfers wore , which had become bleached out by the sun . To achieve that effect he simply turned the brightly colored floral and calico prints inside out .

source: Cleganebowl is a prediction that has stayed with the Game of Thrones fandom since the days of yore , in 2013 . source: The dynamisms involved in bacterial drug resistance , emergence and spread of multiple antibiotic resistant Enterobacteriaceae in Ghana are poorly understood . The current state of antibiotic resistance is gradually becoming alarming . To make matters worse , the factors that drive the transmission of antibiotic resistance among organisms in Ghana are still poorly understood .
domestication: 细菌的耐药性问题在加纳越来越严重，而其中的动态变化和多重抗生素抗性肠杆菌科细菌的出现与传播机制还远未被理解。雪上加霜的是，导致这些细菌在加纳传播耐药性的因素依然不清楚。现在抗生素耐药性的情况正逐渐变得令人担忧。
foreignization: 涉及细菌药物抗性的动态、多重抗生素耐药肠杆菌科细菌在加纳的出现和传播尚不为人所理解。目前的抗生素抗性状态正逐渐变得令人担忧。更糟的是，驱动加纳生物体之间抗生素抗性传播的因素仍知之甚少。

source: Located in the center of the casbah , Taralon 's riad has been his refuge for the past 20 years . The house unfolds over many floors and levels -- there 's one for living , one for dining , one for sleeping , and one for working . On the bottom level , which is separate from the main house , a Taj Mahal-style arched door reveals a little bedroom intended for afternoon siestas . Full of secret passageways and hidden loggias , this is the kind of fantasy house that reveals itself over time .
domestication: 塔拉隆的riad位于卡斯巴的中心，过去20年里一直是他的避风港。这房子分好多层，一层用于生活，一层用于就餐，一层用于睡觉，还有一层用于工作。最下面一层和主屋分开，一扇泰姬陵式的拱门后面藏着个小卧室，专门用来午睡。房子里满是秘密通道和隐藏的游廊，这种梦幻般的房子，需要时间慢慢去发现它的奥秘。
foreignization: 位于卡斯巴中心的塔拉隆的riad是他过去20年的避难所。这栋房子分布在多个楼层和层次——有一个楼层用于生活，一个楼层用于用餐，一个楼层用于睡眠，一个楼层用于工作。在最底层，与主屋分开，一扇泰姬陵风格的拱门揭示了一个用于午睡的小卧室。充满秘密通道和隐藏的门廊，这是一种随着时间逐渐展现的幻想之屋。

source: Jay 's success at getting deals done has earned him a new nick-name : the Closer . " If I really want you , I 'll close it like Mariano Rivera , the Yankees relief pitcher . " I 'll convince you that this is the best place for you . I 'll give you a million reasons why you should be here , but I 'm not chasing . I 'm not gon na call a hundred times . " He laughs . " I 'm not messin ' up my best suit . "

source: Swing dancing functions both as a stress reliever and a fitness booster . In an hour-long session , you can expect to burn about 375 calories ( based on a 150-lb person ) . And there 's an added bonus , Catherine reports : " At weddings , dinners , and especially holiday parties-anywhere there 's music with the right beat-we get to show our stuff ! " Sari Reaches for Herbs
domestication: 摇摆舞既能解压又能健身。一小时的舞蹈大约能消耗375卡路里（以150磅的人为例）。还有个额外的好处，凯瑟琳说：“在婚礼、晚宴，特别是节日派对上——只要有合适的音乐，我们就能大显身手！”萨里伸手去拿草药。

source: In addition to contending with swelling retirement among the population as a whole , the Social Security Administration has launched an effort to deal with its own retirement wave over the next 10 years , when up to 38,000 of its current employees will be eligible to retire . Eye-catching recruitment posters and brochures now sport a new slogan : " Make a difference in people 's lives and your own . " Monetary incentives such as an above-minimum starting salary , reimbursement for travel to a first post , and payment for interview expenses may also be used to nab a good prospect .
domestication: 除了应对整体人口老龄化带来的退休潮，美国社会保障署也启动了一项计划，准备在未来十年内应对自身员工的大规模退休，预计多达38,000名现有员工将有资格退休。为了吸引人才，他们现在推出了引人注目的招聘海报和宣传册，打出了新的口号：“改变别人的生活，也改变你自己的生活。”此外，为了网罗优秀人才，还可能提供一些经济激励措施，比如起薪高于最低标准、报销首次到岗的差旅费以及面试费用。
foreignization: 除了应对整个人口中日益增多的退休问题外，社会保障管理局已发起努力，以应对未来10年内自身即将出现的退休潮，届时多达38,000名现任员工将有资格退休。引人注目的招聘海报和小册子现在使用了一个新的口号：“改变人们的生活和你自己的生活。” 可能还会使用诸如高于最低标准的起薪、报销前往首个岗位的旅行费用以及支付面试费用等金钱激励措施来吸引优秀候选人。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

In addition to contending with swelling retirement among the population as a whole , the Social Security Administration has launched an effort to deal with its own retirement wave over the next 10 years , when up to 38,000 of its current employees will be eligible to retire . Eye-catching recruitment posters and brochures now sport a new slogan : " Make a difference in people 's lives and your own . " Monetary incentives such as an above-minimum starting salary , reimbursement for travel to a first post , and payment for interview expenses may also be used to nab a good prospect .

source: Chitwood 's ultimate goal is to reconstruct the leaf ' morphospace ' : the full catalogue of possible leaf shapes . " If you could measure all the leaves that currently existed and all the leaves that ever existed , would it be completely random ? " he asks . " Or would there be some leaves that never showed up ? Was it because the plants ca n't make them ? "
domestication: 奇特伍德的终极目标是重建“叶片形态空间”：即所有可能的叶片形状的完整目录。“如果我们能够测量出所有现存的叶片和历史上存在过的叶片，它们的形状会是完全随机的吗？”他问道，“还是会有一些形状从未出现过？是因为植物无法生成这些形状吗？”

source: Sonic hired Kansas City-based Barkley Evergreen &; Partners , responsible for successful campaigns for Cellular One and Western Auto . The company bought time on cable channels , where ads focused on a fresh , albeit odd , menu that featured cherry limeades , onion rings and sandwiches served on thick toaster bread -- all delivered to the car in under four minutes . Frankie Avalon was shown the door , in favor of young skating carhops . Last year the company spent $80 million on marketing , triple what it had spent five years earlier .
domestication: 声宝聘请了总部位于堪萨斯城的贝克利·埃弗格林与合伙人公司，这家公司曾为蜂窝一号和西部汽车成功策划过营销活动。声宝在有线频道买下了广告时段，主打一款新奇但有些古怪的菜单，包括樱桃青柠汁、洋葱圈和用厚吐司面包做的三明治，所有这些都能在四分钟内送到车里。老员工弗兰基·阿瓦隆被辞退，取而代之的是年轻的滑板服务员。去年，公司在营销上的投入达到8000万美元，是五年前的三倍。

source: On the Mac , by contrast , people 's system partitions could be set up in all kinds of weird and unpredictable ways , making it more difficult to account for edge cases in the conversion process . So iOS gets to be the guinea pig , and macOS ( as well as watchOS and tvOS ) will likely pick up APFS support in the new major OS updates we see at WWDC this year .
domestication: 相比之下，在Mac上，人们的系统分区五花八门，变化莫测，这使得在转换过程中处理各种特殊情况更加困难。所以，iOS就成了试验田，而macOS（还有watchOS和tvOS）可能在今年的WWDC上发布的新大版本操作系统更新中，也会加入对APFS的支持。

source: This " go-to gym shoe " has ample cushioning that runs the length of the midsole to prevent foot fatigue on cardio machines , plus deep grooves in the outsole to improve flexibility . " I could shimmy like a pro in my dance class , " said one tester . Thanks to a breezy upper , your foot " stays cool no matter how much you sweat , " and the roomy toe box lets your little piggies spread out .
domestication: 这款“健身房必备鞋”中底全长都设计了充足的缓震，能防止你在有氧器械上锻炼时脚部疲劳，外底还有深沟槽，增加了灵活性。“我在舞蹈课上都能像专业人士那样摇摆了，”一位测试者说道。透气的鞋面让你的脚“无论怎么出汗都能保持凉爽”，宽敞的前脚掌空间也让你的脚趾可以自由舒展。

这款“常去健身房的鞋子”在中底全长提供了充足的缓震，以防止在有氧运动器械上使用时脚部疲劳，同时外底上的深槽设计提高了灵活性。“我在舞蹈课上可以像专业人士一样摇摆，”一位测试者说。得益于透气的鞋面，你的脚“无论出汗多少都能保持凉爽”，宽敞的脚趾空间让你的小脚趾可以自由伸展。

source: Two . Though Hispanic immigrants come usually from Catholic cultures , that may not be the best predictor of how they will behave in the liberal climate of the U.S. Thus , the illegitimacy rate among Hispanics in California is 40.5 percent-compared with 32.8 percent for all races there . As for abortion , Hispanics are approximately 11 percent of the U.S. population but account for 22 percent of all abortions . And , as we have seen with other Americans , moral opinion tends to follow moral behavior rather than the other way round . So the likelihood is that Hispanics will become less conservative morally the longer they live in the U.S.
domestication: 二来，虽然拉美移民大多来自天主教文化背景，但这并不意味着他们在美国自由的社会氛围中会按部就班地遵循旧习。比如说，在加利福尼亚，拉美裔的非婚生子女比例达到了40.5%，而全州所有族裔的这一比例是32.8%。说到堕胎，拉美裔占美国人口的大约11%，却占了全国堕胎总数的22%。我们从其他美国人身上也看到了类似的情况，道德观念往往是跟着行为走，而不是反过来。所以，拉美裔在美国生活的时间越长，他们的道德观很可能会变得更加开放。
foreignization: 二、尽管西班牙裔移民通常来自天主教文化，但这可能不是预测他们在美国自由氛围中行为的最佳指标。因此，加州西班牙裔的非婚生育率是40.5%——相比之下，该州所有种族的非婚生育率为32.8%。至于堕胎，西班牙裔约占美国人口的11%，但占所有堕胎的22%。正如我们从其他美国人身上所看到的，道德观点往往跟随道德行为，而不是相反。因此，西班牙裔在美国居住的时间越长，他们变得越不保守的可能性就越大。

source: We bring good snacks to school . " We 're the go-to parents whenever there 's a school party , " Debi says . " We bring healthy things -- a macedonia , which is strawberries with orange juice and mint , or a schiacciata alla fiorentina , which is like an angel food cake . At the last party they went to , the girls ate cupcakes with icing that was three inches high . They were bouncing off the walls . We let them have sugar , but in small doses . "
domestication: 我们带好吃的零食去学校。“每次学校有派对，我们都得靠上。”黛比说。“我们带的都是健康的食物——比如水果沙拉，用草莓、橙汁和薄荷拌的，或者是佛罗伦萨式的甜饼，就像天使蛋糕一样。上次派对她们吃的是糖霜厚达三寸的纸杯蛋糕，孩子们兴奋得跟中了奖似的。我们也让她们吃糖，但都是少量的。”

source: Stephen MillerSessions brought with him into the Trump fold his former aide , Miller , now a senior adviser to the president . Miller , who helped Sessions form his anti-immigrant positions in the Senate , became known as one of the architects of Trump 's Muslim ban . Lesser known is his history with the most famous neo-Nazi of our time , Richard Spencer . " It 's funny no one 's picked up on the Stephen Miller connection , " Spencer told Mother Jones in October . " I knew him very well when I was at Duke . " Miller denied any connection to Spencer at the time , but emails obtained by the Electronic Intifada confirmed that Miller worked with Spencer to put on a debate on immigration sponsored by the Duke Conservative Union .
domestication: 斯蒂芬·米勒带着他的前助手米勒加入了特朗普团队，现在米勒成了总统的高级顾问。米勒曾帮助塞申斯在参议院形成反移民立场，后来成为特朗普穆斯林禁令的主要策划者之一。鲜为人知的是，他还和当代最出名的新纳粹分子理查德·斯宾塞有过交集。“真奇怪，居然没人注意到斯蒂芬·米勒的这段关系，”斯宾塞去年十月告诉《母亲明镜》杂志，“我在杜克大学时跟他很熟。”当时米勒否认与斯宾塞有任何联系，但《电子因提法达》获得的邮件证实，米勒确实与斯宾塞合作，在杜克保守联盟的赞助下组织了一场关于移民问题的辩论。
foreignization: 斯蒂芬·米勒塞申斯将他的前助手米勒带入了特朗普团队，现在是总统的高级顾问。米勒曾帮助塞申斯在参议院形成反移民立场，后来成为了特朗普穆斯林禁令的主要策划者之一。鲜为人知的是他与我们这个时代最著名的纳粹新党员理查德·斯宾塞的历史。“很奇怪没有人注意到斯蒂芬·米勒的联系，”斯宾塞在10月份告诉《母亲琼斯》杂志。“当我在杜克大学时，我非常了解他。”米勒当时否认与斯宾塞有任何联系，但《电子因提法达》获得的电子邮件证实，米勒确实与斯宾塞合作组织了一场由杜克保守联盟赞助的关于移民的辩论。

" I knew him very well when I was at Duke . " Miller denied any connection to Spencer at the time , but emails obtained by the Electronic Intifada confirmed that Miller worked with Spencer to put on a debate on immigration sponsored by the Duke Conservative Union .

source: A. If a perfume is colored , it likely contains dyes that can stain white or light clothing , says perfumer Steve Demercado . Plus , its high alcohol and oil levels can cause delicate fabrics such as silk to look spotty . It 's best to scent skin before dressing ( bonus : When you get naked , you 'll still smell sexy ) .
domestication: 如果香水有颜色，很可能含有染料，这些染料会弄脏白色或浅色的衣服，调香师史蒂夫·德梅卡多说。而且，高酒精和油分含量还可能让丝绸等娇贵面料出现斑点。最好是在穿衣服前喷在皮肤上（额外福利：脱衣时，你依然香气扑鼻）。

source: Radishes make great pickles , and you can use any radish in this recipe . Green watermelon radishes , with their stunning rainbow interiors , make a most attractive pickled condiment . You can also substitute a number of different vinegars here , but the sweet complexity of Champagne vinegar is a refreshing contrast to the strong mustard oil found in radishes .
domestication: 萝卜做成泡菜特别好吃，这道泡菜用什么萝卜都可以。青西瓜萝卜里面颜色像彩虹一样，做成泡菜最是好看。这里也可以换几种醋，不过香槟醋甜中带酸，和萝卜里的浓烈芥末味一搭配，别提多爽口了。
foreignization: 萝卜是制作泡菜的好材料，你可以在这个食谱中使用任何种类的萝卜。绿西瓜萝卜，由于其惊人的彩虹色内部，制成的泡菜调料最为吸引人。你也可以在这里使用多种不同的醋，但香槟醋的甜味复杂性与萝卜中的强烈芥末油形成了清新的对比。

source: Wind power has been championed for years--with limited success--as an environmentally-friendly alternative to fossil fuels . A promising project in the Cape Cod region of Massachusetts has been stymied by ostensibly fervent environmentalists because it may reduce the natural beauty of the area . Elsewhere , Wind projects have been opposed because spinning blades may kill some birds .
domestication: 风能作为环保的替代能源，多年来一直备受推崇，但成效有限。在马萨诸塞州的科德角地区，一个前景光明的项目却因为一些所谓的环保人士反对而受阻，他们担心这个项目会破坏当地的自然美景。其他地方，风力发电项目也遭到了反对，原因是旋转的叶片可能会对鸟类造成伤害。
foreignization: 风能多年来一直被推崇为化石燃料的环境友好型替代品——但收效有限。马萨诸塞州科德角地区的一个有前景的项目因可能降低该地区的自然美景而受到表面上热情的环保人士的阻挠。在其他地方，风力项目因旋转叶片可能会杀死一些鸟类而遭到反对。

source: MarketWatch collected the personal narratives of four such accidental landlords , all of them millennials or on the cusp of that age group . source: One of the most important insights gained from these tombs is that the pinnacle of Moche society soared much higher than we had imagined . No Moche burials previously excavated were as large and complex as these tombs , with room-sized burial chambers containing multiple individuals in separate coffins , surrounded by hundreds of ceramic vessels . Nor had any Moche tombs contained anywhere near the quantity and quality of jewelry and ornaments that were found in these royal tombs .
domestication: 从这些墓葬中，我们得到的最重要的启示是，莫切社会的巅峰远超我们的想象。以前发掘的莫切墓葬，没有一个像这些墓葬这般宏大和复杂，墓室大如房间，里面有多人分别安放在不同的棺材中，周围还堆满了数百件陶瓷器。更不用说，这些皇家墓葬中的珠宝和饰品数量之多、质量之高，也是前所未见。
foreignization: 从这些墓葬中获得的最重要的见解之一是，莫切社会的顶峰比我们想象的要高得多。以前发掘的莫切墓葬没有一座像这些墓葬那样大且复杂，这些墓葬中有房间大小的墓室，包含多个分别安放在棺材中的个体，周围环绕着数百件陶器。也没有任何莫切墓葬包含如此数量和质量的珠宝和装饰品，这些皇家墓葬中发现的珠宝和装饰品即是证明。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

One of the most important insights gained from these tombs is that the pinnacle of Moche society soared much higher than we had imagined . No Moche burials previously excavated were as large and complex as these tombs , with room-sized burial chambers containing multiple individuals in separate coffins , surrounded by hundreds of ceramic vessels . Nor had any Moche tombs contained anywhere near the quantity and quality of jewelry and ornaments that were found in these royal tombs .

source: If you use mistletoe for holiday decor and have crawling babies in the house , beware . Mistletoe , particularly the berries from the American variety , is considered highly toxic , especially to infants ; seizures and deaths have been reported . Because the tiny berries can easily shake loose and fall onto your floor or carpet , you might want to smooch under fake mistletoe . Quick Tip
domestication: 如果你家里有爬来爬去的宝宝，节日装饰时可要小心了。特别是美洲槲寄生的浆果，毒性很大，对婴儿尤其危险，曾有抽搐甚至死亡的案例。这些小小的浆果很容易掉到地上或地毯上，还是用假槲寄生亲热吧。小贴士
foreignization: 如果你在节日装饰中使用槲寄生并且家中有爬行的婴儿，请当心。槲寄生，尤其是美洲品种的浆果，被认为具有高度毒性，尤其对婴儿；已有报道指出会导致抽搐和死亡。由于这些小小的浆果很容易松动并掉落到你的地板或地毯上，你可能想要改用假槲寄生来接吻。快速提示

source: Masi 's new Evolozione carbon frame is made with a mix of carbon grades and comes with racy features such as a tapered head tube , BB30 , oversized chainstays and carbon rear dropouts . source: The youth efforts were distilled into a new entity headed by Echols and called the Republican Leadership Initiative . The party says the program paves the way for young Republicans to engage with local GOP groups in their communities , instead of their having to take time off from school to work with operatives in Washington . More than 4,500 fellows have completed a six-week training program as part of the initiative and are now an integral part of localized get-out-the-vote efforts , the RNC says .
domestication: 年轻人的努力汇聚成一个新组织，由埃克尔斯牵头，名为“共和党领导力倡议”。党表示，这个项目为年轻共和党人参与社区的共和党团体提供了便利，让他们不必为了到华盛顿与幕僚合作而耽误学业。据共和党中央委员会称，已有4500多名学员完成了为期六周的培训，现在已成为地方选民动员工作中不可或缺的一部分。
foreignization: 青年们的努力汇聚成一个新的实体，由埃奇尔斯领导，名为共和党领导力倡议。该党表示，该计划为年轻共和党人与所在社区的当地共和党团体互动铺平了道路，而无需为了与华盛顿的工作人员合作而请假离校。据全国共和党委员会称，已有超过4,500名学员完成了该倡议下的六周培训计划，现在已成为地方动员投票工作的核心部分。

source: Now Chelsea , their daughter , who is , as I say in this book " The Clintons ' War on Women " , actually the daughter of Webb Hubbell and Hillary Clinton -- you can see this based on a series of photographs . Hillary admits in her own book that a large football player-sized man taught her the proper way to hold a baby . Who could that be ? And if you look at her , she does n't look anything like Bill . She looks just like her daddy , despite four plastic surgeries , the youngest one when she 's only 18 . What 18-year-old gets plastic surgery unless you 're trying to , I do n't know , thin out the lips and make you look less like your daddy .
domestication: 现在来说切尔西，他们的女儿，我在《克林顿夫妇的女性战争》这本书里提到，其实是韦布·胡贝尔和希拉里·克林顿的女儿——你从一系列的照片就能看出来。希拉里在她自己的书里承认，一个大个子的橄榄球运动员教过她怎么正确抱婴儿。那会是谁呢？再看看切尔西，长得一点都不像比尔。她特别像她的亲爸爸，尽管做了四次整容手术，最年轻的一次是在她18岁的时候。18岁的小姑娘哪有做整形的，除非是想让自己嘴唇变薄，不像她爸爸。

source: Private Medigap coverage , too , could better meet this need if the federal government did not require policies to reimburse routine expenditures . For the same amount of money , existing policies could be reconfigured to provide the benefits that Medicare recipients most need . Finally , as the Institute for Policy Innovation points out , the federal government could help everyone by loosening FDA control of pharmaceutical development , thereby reducing costs .
domestication: 私人补充医疗保险也能更好地满足这一需求，如果联邦政府不要求保险政策报销常规支出的话。同样金额的保费，现有的保险可以重新设计，提供医保受益人最需要的福利。最后，正如政策创新研究所指出的，联邦政府可以通过放宽对药品研发的FDA管控来降低费用，从而帮助所有人。

source: What House Republicans have done is to take a process of political decline that began three decades ago under the Democrats and accelerate it . The older system , which prevailed after World War II , was far from perfect , but it contained mechanisms by which Congress could , in Armey 's words , " listen to the concerns of the American people . " These involved interest groups , but the groups had a far different relationship to citizens outside of Washington and to each other , and they represented a much broader range of Americans . The election of 1994 did not revive this older system but furthered the hold of a new one dominated by Washington insiders .
domestication: 共和党众议院议员所做的，无非是加速了民主党三十年前开始的政治衰败进程。二战后形成的旧制度虽不完美，但其中包含了一套机制，能让国会“倾听美国人民的诉求”，用阿米的话说。这套机制涉及利益集团，但这些集团与华盛顿之外的民众以及彼此之间有着不同的关系，代表的美国人也更加广泛。1994年的选举并没有恢复这套旧制度，反而进一步巩固了一个由华盛顿内部人士主导的新体系。
foreignization: 众议院共和党人所做的，是将民主党人在三十年前开始的政治衰退过程加速了。旧的体系，在二战后占主导地位，远非完美，但它包含了国会议员可以“倾听美国人民的关切”的机制。这些机制涉及利益集团，但这些集团与华盛顿之外的公民以及彼此之间的关系大相径庭，并且代表了更广泛的美国人。1994年的选举并没有复兴这个旧体系，而是进一步巩固了一个由华盛顿内部人士主导的新体系。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

What House Republicans have done is to take a process of political decline that began three decades ago under the Democrats and accelerate it . The older system , which prevailed after World War II , was far from perfect , but it contained mechanisms by which Congress could , in Armey 's words , " listen to the concerns of the American people . " These involved interest groups , but the groups had a far different relationship to citizens outside of Washington and to each other , and they represented a much broader range of Americans . The election of 1994 did not revive this older system but furthered the hold of a new one dominated by Washington insiders .
共和党众议院议员所做的，无非是加速了民主党三十年前开始的政治衰败进程。二战后形成的旧制度虽不完美，但其中包含了一套机制，能让国会“倾听美国人民的诉求”，用阿米的话说。这套机制涉及利益集团，但这些集团与华盛顿之外的民众以及彼此之间有着不同的关系，代表的美国人也更加广泛。1994年的选举并没有恢复这套旧制度，反而进一步巩固了一个由华盛顿内部人士主导的新体系。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

What House Republicans have done is to take a process of political decline that began three decades ago under the Democrats and accelerate it . The older system , which prevailed after World War II , was far from perfect , but it contained mechanisms by which Congress could , in Armey 's words , " listen to the concerns of the American people . " These involved interest groups , but the groups had a far different relationship to citizens outside of Washington and to each other , and they represented a much broader range of Americans . The election of 1994 did not revive this older system but furthered the hold of a new one dominated by Washington insiders .
众议院共和党人所做的，是将民主党人在三十年前开始的政治衰退过程加速了。旧的体系，在二战后占主导地位，远非完美，但它包含了国会议员可以“倾听美国人民的关切”的机制。这些机制涉及利益集团，但这些集团与华盛顿之外的公民以及彼此之间的关系大相径庭，并且代表了更广泛的美国人。1994年的选举并没有复兴这个旧体系，而是进一步巩固了一个由华盛顿内部人士主导的新体系。

source: Now , an atlas that traces the shapes of 182,000 leaves from 141 plant families and 75 locations around the world shows promise for refining scientists ' ability to read that story . Using that atlas , researchers found that leaf shape alone accurately predicted where a leaf was collected 14.5% of the time , and plant family correctly 27.3% of the time . That is far better than predictions made using conventional methods to describe a leaf 's shape .
domestication: 现在，有一本图集，收录了来自全球75个地点、141个植物家族的182,000片叶子的形状，这为科学家们解读植物故事提供了新的线索。利用这本图集，研究人员发现，仅凭叶子的形状就能准确预测出叶子的采集地14.5%的时间，以及正确识别植物家族27.3%的时间。这比用传统方法描述叶子形状来预测的效果好太多了。
foreignization: 现在，一本追踪了来自141个植物家族和全球75个地点的182,000片叶子形状的图集显示，有望提高科学家们解读这一故事的能力。使用该图集，研究人员发现仅凭叶子形状就能准确预测出叶子的采集地14.5%的时间，以及正确识别植物家族27.3%的时间。这远远好于使用传统方法描述叶子形状所做出的预测。

source: Recent improvements at private medical labs clearly illustrate the kind of cleanup that disclosure can prompt in an industry where the public release of regulators ' documents , SEC filings , nonprofit agency tax forms , or other records allow the public to make sure regulators are protecting consumers . The Wall Street Journal 's Walt Bogdanich used an array of documents from federal and state health regulators and court records to prove in 1987 that inaccurate and unreliable testing of body fluids and tissues at clinical labs was a serious health hazard as well as a waste of millions of dollars .
domestication: 最近，私立医疗实验室的改进明显说明了信息公开对行业清理的作用。这个行业里，公众能查看监管部门的文件、证监会的申报材料、非营利机构的税务表格等记录，就能监督监管部门是否在保护消费者。1987年，《华尔街日报》的沃尔特·博格达尼奇利用联邦和州卫生监管部门及法院的大量文件证明，临床实验室对体液和组织的检测不准确、不可靠，不仅是个严重的健康隐患，还浪费了数百万美元。
foreignization: 最近私人医疗实验室的改进清楚地说明了披露可以在多大程度上促使一个行业的整顿，在这个行业中，监管机构文件、证券交易委员会（SEC）备案文件、非营利机构税务表格或其他记录的公开发布允许公众确保监管机构正在保护消费者。《华尔街日报》的沃尔特·博格丹尼奇利用联邦和州卫生监管部门以及法院记录的一系列文件，在1987年证明了临床实验室对体液和组织进行不准确和不可靠的检测不仅是一个严重的健康隐患，也是数百万美元的浪费。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Recent improvements at private medical labs clearly illustrate the kind of cleanup that disclosure can prompt in an industry where the public release of regulators ' documents , SEC filings , nonprofit agency tax forms , or other records allow the public to make sure regulators are protecting consumers . source: But the message is n't the only thing that counts in the communications field . Ratings and viewership numbers , sponsors , financing , legal and political factors also have to be taken into consideration . After 27 years of largely Mexican control , SIN 's successes attracted the attention of major investors , and in 1987-88 the network was purchased for $630 million . The buyer was a U.S. consortium composed of Hallmark -- the greeting-card company -- and First Chicago Venture Capital . With the takeover , SIN became Univision . Programming a Balancing Act
domestication: 但通讯领域里，传达的信息并不是唯一重要的。收视率和观众人数、赞助商、资金、法律和政治因素也都得考虑在内。SIN在墨西哥人手中经营了27年后，取得的成绩引起了大投资者的注意。1987到1988年间，这个网络以6.3亿美元的价格被卖给了由贺卡公司Hallmark和芝加哥第一风险投资公司组成的美国财团。SIN从此改名为Univision。节目编排就像走钢丝，得两边都顾及。

source: On Monday afternoon , June 4 , Apple handed out its annual Apple Design Awards onstage at its Worldwide Developer Conference in San Jose . The awards , now in their 21st year , are meant to highlight those apps that set a benchmark for high-quality design , taking into consideration things like the user interface and user experience , originality and other factors that represent those types of applications that Apple would like to see more of in its App Store .
domestication: 6月4日星期一，苹果在圣何塞举行的全球开发者大会上，现场颁发了年度苹果设计奖。这个奖项今年已经是第21届了，旨在表彰那些设计出众的应用程序。这些应用在用户界面和体验上都达到了很高的标准，同时在原创性等方面也表现出色，正是苹果希望在App Store里看到更多这样的应用。

In the video , Gunn shows just how much fun the extras were having on set , most of whom were playing members of Yondu 's Ravagers . You can watch the entire video , along with Gunn 's explanation of just what the heck was going on that day , down below :

source: In his first two years in office , he 's made the work of modern-day Mary Harris Joneses a little bit easier with several union-friendly appointments to the National Labor Relations Board . This , however , is no substitute for seeking long-overdue changes in the National Labor Relations Act that would enable more workers to organize unions and negotiate contracts without employer interference .
domestication: 上任这两年，他通过任命几位对工会友好的人员到国家劳资关系委员会，让现代的玛丽·哈里斯·琼斯们的工作轻松了不少。不过，这并不能代替迟迟未改的《国家劳资关系法》。要想让更多的工人能组织工会、谈判合同而不受雇主干涉，还是得从根儿上改改这部法律才行。
foreignization: 在他上任的头两年里，他通过任命几位对工会友好的人员到国家劳资关系委员会，使现代玛丽·哈里斯·琼斯们的工作变得稍微容易了一些。然而，这并不能替代寻求《国家劳资关系法》中早就该进行的改革，这些改革将使更多工人能够在不受雇主干扰的情况下组织工会并协商合同。

This , however , is no substitute for seeking long-overdue changes in the National Labor Relations Act that would enable more workers to organize unions and negotiate contracts without employer interference .

In his first two years in office , he 's made the work of modern-day Mary Harris Joneses a little bit easier with several union-friendly appointments to the National Labor Relations Board . This , however , is no substitute for seeking long-overdue changes in the National Labor Relations Act that would enable more workers to organize unions and negotiate contracts without employer interference .
在他上任的头两年里，他通过任命几位对工会友好的人员到国家劳资关系委员会，使现代玛丽·哈里斯·琼斯们的工作变得稍微容易了一些。然而，这并不能替代寻求《国家劳资关系法》中早就该进行的改革，这些改革将使更多工人能够在不受雇主干扰的情况下组织工会并协商合同。

source: The loaves and fishes ( he intoned from the pulpit ) you can almost taste those crusty loaves , the insides lightly and airy , but chewy , and the fishes , those wonderful Mediterranean catches , skates and scampi , barely simmered in a little olive oil , a squirt of lemon , very simply prepared -- all the Jewish culinary genius brought to bear on the boy 's lunch .
domestication: 他从讲坛上吟诵道：那面包和鱼啊，你几乎能尝到那脆皮面包，里面松软又有点嚼劲，还有那些地中海的美味海鲜，比如鳐鱼和大虾，只在橄榄油里稍微一煮，挤上几滴柠檬汁，简单至极——犹太人的烹饪智慧全都在这小男孩的午餐里了。
foreignization: 这些面包和鱼（他从讲坛上吟诵道）你几乎可以品尝到那些硬皮面包，里面轻盈而有嚼劲，还有那些美妙的地中海捕获，鳐鱼和龙虾，仅在少许橄榄油中略微煮过，挤上一点柠檬汁，非常简单地烹制——所有的犹太烹饪才华都倾注在这男孩的午餐上。

source: You also get a list of every single device signed in to your Apple ID , including iOS devices , Macs , Apple TVs , and Apple Watches . This provides easy access to serial numbers , Find my iPhone/iPad/Mac info for the OSes that support it , as well as iDevice backup status , iPhone phone number and IMEI information , and Apple Pay information . If a device is lost or destroyed or traded in , you can use this screen to easily remove it from your account , and if you spot a device that does n't belong , you can change your password quickly to lock it out .
domestication: 你还能看到所有登录了你的Apple ID的设备列表，包括iOS设备、Mac电脑、Apple TV和Apple手表。这里可以轻松查到序列号、“查找我的iPhone/iPad/Mac”信息（支持的操作系统才有）、iDevice备份状态、iPhone的手机号码和IMEI信息，还有Apple Pay的信息。如果设备丢了、坏了或换了，你可以从这个页面轻松移除；要是发现有不认识的设备，赶紧改密码，把外来设备拒之门外。
foreignization: 您还可以获得登录到您的 Apple ID 的每个设备的列表，包括 iOS 设备、Macs、Apple TVs 和 Apple Watches。这提供了轻松访问序列号、“查找我的 iPhone/iPad/Mac”信息（对于支持的操作系统）、iDevice 备份状态、iPhone 电话号码和 IMEI 信息以及 Apple Pay 信息的功能。如果设备丢失、损坏或交易掉，您可以使用此屏幕轻松将其从您的帐户中移除，如果您发现不属于您的设备，可以快速更改密码以将其锁定。

source: If you put the power switch on the rear of the case so that you can incorporate it directly into the power supply , the big red switch is all that 's needed-but the needs of the new power supply 's front-panel switches change all that . ( Actually , old power supplies also include a third wire-a green wire-for ground , but it 's not important for this discussion . )
domestication: 如果你把电源开关装在机箱后面，可以直接接入电源，那么只要有个大红开关就够了——但新电源前面板开关的需求改变了这一切。其实，老式电源也有第三根线，一根绿线，用来接地，但这对咱们现在的讨论不重要。

source: Do n't take fish-oil supplements . Fish oil , especially the kind containing lots of omega-3 fatty acids , may be bad news for people with diabetes . It 's been shown to increase blood glucose levels if you take too much of it . One study showed a loss of blood sugar control when 5.5 grams of omega-3 were taken daily for a month . But eating fish is encouraged -- it 's part of a healthy diet and in this form it wo n't provide too much omega-3 fatty acids .
domestication: 别吃鱼油补充剂了。特别是那种含有大量欧米伽-3脂肪酸的鱼油，对糖尿病患者来说可能不是什么好事。如果摄入过量，可能会导致血糖升高。有研究显示，每天摄入5.5克欧米伽-3，持续一个月，血糖控制就会变差。但吃鱼还是被推荐的，它是健康饮食的一部分，而且这样也不会让欧米伽-3脂肪酸摄入过多。
foreignization: 不要服用鱼油补充剂。鱼油，尤其是含有大量欧米伽-3脂肪酸的鱼油，可能对糖尿病患者不利。研究表明，如果摄入过多，它会导致血糖水平升高。一项研究显示，每天服用5.5克欧米伽-3一个月后，出现了血糖控制失常的情况。但吃鱼是被鼓励的——它是健康饮食的一部分，在这种形式下，它不会提供过多的欧米伽-3脂肪酸。

source: When Rutherford and Lindquist studied flies with such a half-portion of Hsp90 , however , they observed physical abnormalities in about 5 percent of the insects . Misshapen or missing eyes , stubby wings , deformed legs , or antennae growing in the wrong places are just some of the oddities that the researchers documented . Similar developmental defects emerged in the offspring of flies raised on food containing the Hsp90 inhibitor geldanamycin , a compound now attracting the interest of cancer researchers ( see box ) .
domestication: 然而，当卢瑟福和林德奎斯特研究那些Hsp90只有一半剂量的果蝇时，他们发现大约5%的昆虫出现了身体畸形。有的眼睛变形或缺失，有的翅膀短小，有的腿脚畸形，还有的触角长错了地方，研究人员记录了这些奇怪的现象。同样，喂食含有Hsp90抑制剂—— Geldanamycin（格尔达霉素）的食物后，果蝇的后代也出现了类似的发育缺陷。这种化合物现在引起了癌症研究人员的兴趣。
foreignization: 当拉瑟福德和林德奎斯特研究具有这样一半Hsp90剂量的果蝇时，他们观察到大约5%的昆虫出现了身体异常。不规则或缺失的眼睛、短小的翅膀、畸形的腿或触角长错位置等，只是研究人员记录的一些奇怪现象。类似的发展缺陷也出现在以含有Hsp90抑制剂 geldanamycin（一种现在正吸引癌症研究人员兴趣的化合物）的食物饲养的果蝇后代中。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When Rutherford and Lindquist studied flies with such a half-portion of Hsp90 , however , they observed physical abnormalities in about 5 percent of the insects . Misshapen or missing eyes , stubby wings , deformed legs , or antennae growing in the wrong places are just some of the oddities that the researchers documented . Similar developmental defects emerged in the offspring of flies raised on food containing the Hsp90 inhibitor geldanamycin , a compound now attracting the interest of cancer researchers ( see box ) .
然而，当卢瑟福和林德奎斯特研究那些Hsp90只有一半剂量的果蝇时，他们发现大约5%的昆虫出现了身体畸形。有的眼睛变形或缺失，有的翅膀短小，有的腿脚畸形，还有的触角长错了地方，研究人员记录了这些奇怪的现象。同样，喂食含有Hsp90抑制剂—— Geldanamycin（格尔达霉素）的食物后，果蝇的后代也出现了类似的发育缺陷。这种化合物现在引起了癌症研究人员的兴趣。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Misshapen or missing eyes , stubby wings , deformed legs , or antennae growing in the wrong places are just some of the oddities that the researchers documented . Similar developmental defects emerged in the offspring of flies raised on food containing the Hsp90 inhibitor geldanamycin , a compound now attracting the interest of cancer researchers ( see box ) .
当拉瑟福德和林德奎斯特研究具有这样一半Hsp90剂量的果蝇时，他们观察到大约5%的昆虫出现了身体异常。不规则或缺失的眼睛、短小的翅膀、畸形的腿或触角长错位置等，只是研究人员记录的一些奇怪现象。类似的发展缺陷也出现在以含有Hsp90抑制剂 geldanamycin（一种现在正吸引癌症研究人员兴趣的化合物）的食物饲养的果蝇后代中。

source: Arching out over the edges of the pool are the broad leaves of a 12-year-old Gunnera tinctoria ( also known as G. chilensis ) , which Gullickson kept in a 36-inch box until he was able to give it a permanent home here . The narrow , graceful foliage and habit of the uncommon Japanese bamboo Sasa tessellata appears nearby , and is echoed in form , but not in color , by the black bamboo ( Phyllostachys nigra ) on the terrace . Opposite the pool , the terrace takes-on a woodland effect , created in part by a large , shading box elder ( Acer negundo ) , a relic of the previous tenants that helps soak up the water in the seep that forms at the bottom of the hill . The tree also tends to drop a lot of debris , but it has been much better about that ; Gullickson reports , since it was pollarded last year .
domestication: 池塘边缘伸出的是12年生的冈尼拉（也叫智利冈尼拉）的宽大叶片，古利克森一直把它养在一个36英寸的箱子里，直到它能在这里安家。旁边是少见的日本苔竹，叶子细长优雅，与露台上黑竹（墨竹）的形态相呼应，不过颜色却大不相同。池塘对面，露台营造出一片林地的感觉，这很大程度上得益于一株遮荫的大盒elder树（实际上是箱elder树），这是前房客留下的遗产，帮助吸收了山坡下形成的湿地积水。这棵树落叶很多，但自从去年修剪过后，情况好了不少，古利克森说。

Arching out over the edges of the pool are the broad leaves of a 12-year-old Gunnera tinctoria ( also known as G. chilensis ) , which Gullickson kept in a 36-inch box until he was able to give it a permanent home here . The narrow , graceful foliage and habit of the uncommon Japanese bamboo Sasa tessellata appears nearby , and is echoed in form , but not in color , by the black bamboo ( Phyllostachys nigra ) on the terrace . Opposite the pool , the terrace takes-on a woodland effect , created in part by a large , shading box elder ( Acer negundo ) , a relic of the previous tenants that helps soak up the water in the seep that forms at the bottom of the hill . The tree also tends to drop a lot of debris , but it has been much better about that ; Gullickson reports , since it was pollarded last year .

source: Once the bulk of the back garden was established , the industrious pair were able to devote their attention to a different design problem -- the top of the garage in front of the house . When they bought the property , the sunny area over the bunker like block of cement contained lawn , a few rosebushes , and a Magnolia xsoulangiana . Gradually the two started " eating away at the lawn " in an effort to create a larger planting area and thereby soften the imposing nature of the structure and the noise and distraction of the street . " We wanted it to look sort of tropical and exotic , but not outrageous , because we do n't spend as much time in front as we do in back , " Gullickson says .
domestication: 后花园的大体框架一建立好，这对勤劳的搭档就开始琢磨另一个设计难题——房子前面的车库顶。买下这处房产时，车库上方那块像水泥堡垒一样的地方还是一片阳光普照，上面有草坪、几丛玫瑰和一棵洋玉兰。慢慢地，他们开始“蚕食”草坪，努力扩大种植面积，以此来削弱建筑的压迫感，减少街道上的噪音和干扰。“我们希望前院看起来有点热带风情，但又不能太夸张，毕竟我们大部分时间都在后院活动。”古利克森说道。
foreignization: 一旦后花园的主要部分建立起来，这对勤劳的夫妇就能够将注意力转向另一个设计问题——房子前面的车库顶。当他们购买这处房产时，这个阳光明媚的水泥块上方的区域有草坪、几株玫瑰和一棵木兰（Magnolia xsoulangiana）。渐渐地，两人开始“蚕食草坪”，努力创造一个更大的种植区，从而软化结构的压迫感以及街道的噪音和干扰。“我们希望它看起来有点热带和异国情调，但又不过分，因为我们在前面的时间不如在后面的时间多，”古利克森说。

source: In the minds of some scientists , there are hints that the sun has nudged the climate during the past century Just as the global average temperature has risen about 0.5 degrees C over this period , the number of sunspots has increased with each cycle . Researchers have long noted this relationship and wondered whether to consider it cause and effect or just coincidence .
domestication: 在一些科学家的心里，他们发现过去一个世纪里太阳可能对气候有所影响。就在全球平均气温上升了大约0.5度 Celsius 的同时，每个太阳活动周期的太阳黑子数量也在增加。研究人员早就注意到了这种关系，但一直琢磨这到底是因果关系还是 mere 偶然。
foreignization: 在一些科学家的脑海中，有迹象表明太阳在过去一个世纪中对气候产生了影响。正如全球平均温度在此期间上升了约0.5摄氏度一样，每个周期的太阳黑子数量也有所增加。研究人员长期以来一直注意到这种关系，并且疑惑这是否应该被视为因果关系还是仅仅是巧合。

source: Why do the administration 's oil-rich dreams seem so unlikely to come true ? The United States is the most densely drilled petroleum region in the world . Its oil-extraction rate has been gradually declining since 1985 . More than half of the country 's 13 largest oil fields are four-fifths depleted . Delivering new supplies , whether by squeezing more oil from old wells or by finding and developing new ones , is becoming increasingly difficult -- even with subsidies .
domestication: 为什么政府的石油梦看起来如此难以实现？美国是全球钻探密度最高的石油产区，自1985年起，石油产量就一直在逐渐下降。美国最大的13个油田中，超过一半已经耗尽了五分之四的储量。无论是从旧油井中榨取更多石油，还是寻找和开发新的油田，供应新资源都变得越来越难，即使有补贴也不行。

source: His indispensable instrument was a mariner 's compass . A combination of the ancient " rose of the winds " and a magnetized needle , the compass had been in use long before Columbus sailed . Known by the Chinese , Arabs , and Phoenicians , it had been rediscovered by the Europeans in the fourteenth century . In Columbus 's day the rose was a circular card on which a pattern of diamonds , lozenges , and lines marked the thirty-two compass points . No letters were used because most seamen could not read . Twelve winds were known to the ancients , but by Columbus 's time the number had been reduced to eight ; we indicate them today as N , NE , E , SE , S , SW , W , NW .
domestication: 他离不开的工具就是航海罗盘。这东西结合了古老的“风之玫瑰”和磁针，早在哥伦布航行之前就已经存在了。中国人、阿拉伯人和腓尼基人都知道这个东西，后来在14世纪被欧洲人重新发现。到了哥伦布的时代，“风之玫瑰”变成了一张圆形卡片，上面用菱形、钻石形状和线条标出了三十二个方位。因为大多数水手不识字，所以上面没有字母。古人知道十二种风向，但到了哥伦布那个时代，风向已经简化成了八个；现在我们用N、NE、E、SE、S、SW、W、NW来表示。

Twelve winds were known to the ancients , but by Columbus 's time the number had been reduced to eight ; we indicate them today as N , NE , E , SE , S , SW , W , NW .

source: Think of kefir as a cousin of yogurt with a similarly tangy taste . It 's high in protein and loaded with probiotic cultures , up to 11 different strains compared to the one or two found in most yogurts . It 's great in frozen pop recipes because the freezing does n't kill the beneficial cultures . Also , its texture is a bit thinner than yogurt , which makes it ideal for freezing with berries and other healthy add-ins , like naturally sugar-free cacao nibs .
domestication: 可以把开菲尔想象成酸奶的亲戚，味道同样酸爽。它蛋白质含量高，富含益生菌，多达11种不同的菌株，而大多数酸奶通常只有1到2种。做冰棍时用开菲尔特别好，因为冷冻不会杀死这些有益的菌群。此外，开菲尔的质地比酸奶稀一些，冻起来和浆果或其他健康配料，比如天然无糖的可可豆碎，搭配起来刚刚好。
foreignization: 将开菲尔视为酸奶的表亲，具有类似的酸味。它富含蛋白质，并含有多种益生菌，多达11种不同的菌株，而大多数酸奶中只含有一两种。它非常适合用于冷冻棒的食谱，因为冷冻不会杀死有益的菌群。此外，它的质地比酸奶稍稀一些，这使其成为与浆果和其他健康添加物（如天然无糖可可豆）一起冷冻的理想选择。

Also , its texture is a bit thinner than yogurt , which makes it ideal for freezing with berries and other healthy add-ins , like naturally sugar-free cacao nibs .

source: Alex Len , a 2013 first-rounder , left as a free agent last offseason . The Suns traded Marquese Chriss and Josh Jackson from the 2017 draft before faced with the dilemma of offering them a second contract . They also traded 2014 pick T.J. Warren , who 's on a pretty reasonablefour-year , $47 milliondeal , to the Indiana Pacers for reasons thatare n't immediately clear .

source: I reached behind the computer , and-sure enough the fan was n't blowing any air . The last time that happened , I had to replace the motherboard because the heat had weakened various components . I did n't relish replacing a 50-MHz 486DX , a local-bus accelerator , a 500MB hard disk , a VideoSpigot , a Sound Blaster , dual 16550 UARTs , and an Ethernet card .

source: Co-Advantage handles back-office tasks like payroll and compliance . CEO Dayne Williams considers the book Socratic Selling by Kevin Daley ( which counsels asking questions to understand clients instead of pitching a product ) to be a great tool . He also recommends the B-Alert plan offered in The Power of Focus by Jack Canfield . The plan has six steps : blueprint , action , learning , exercise , relaxation , think . Sports Center : Williams played fullback for the Florida State Seminoles from 1985-88 ( the Deion years ) , and former teammates sit on his board . source: NICHOLAS DAWIDOFF 'S INcredible profile of Paul Simon " Paul Simon 's Restless Journey , " RS 1130 was a serious and superior piece of writing , well worthy of the subject it illuminated . Philip Glass is right : Simon is an American treasure , every bit as much as Bob Dylan - and Cole Porter and Irving Berlin .

source: The irony is that despite these positive factors , Morocco performs far worse than Tunisia in , for instance , literacy rates , secondary education , and per capita income . Two-thirds of Moroccan women are illiterate . " People are urging Mohammed toward a gradual evolution to the Spanish model , rather than an eventual revolution , " White says . " He 's a relatively young monarch , so it remains to be seen . What 's exceptional is that Morocco has managed to avoid the turmoil that is throughout the region , but I would n't wager that it continues to do so . "
domestication: 讽刺的是，尽管有这些积极因素，摩洛哥在识字率、中等教育和人均收入等方面的表现远不如突尼斯。三分之二的摩洛哥妇女是文盲。怀特说：“人们希望穆罕默德能逐步向西班牙模式靠拢，而不是最终爆发革命。”“他是个相对年轻的君主，所以还得走着瞧。摩洛哥不同寻常的地方在于它成功避免了本地区普遍存在的动荡，但我不会赌这种情况能持续下去。”
foreignization: 讽刺的是，尽管有这些积极因素，摩洛哥在识字率、中等教育和人均收入等方面的表现远逊于突尼斯。三分之二的摩洛哥妇女是文盲。“人们敦促穆罕默德走向逐渐演变为西班牙模式，而不是最终的革命，”怀特说。“他是一位相对较年轻的君主，所以还有待观察。例外的是，摩洛哥设法避免了整个地区普遍存在的动荡，但我不会打赌这种情况会继续下去。”

messages_domestication.content:

The irony is that despite these positive factors , Morocco performs far worse than Tunisia in , for instance , literacy rates , secondary education , and per capita income . Two-thirds of Moroccan women are illiterate . " People are urging Mohammed toward a gradual evolution to the Spanish model , rather than an eventual revolution , " White says . " He 's a relatively young monarch , so it remains to be seen . What 's exceptional is that Morocco has managed to avoid the turmoil that is throughout the region , but I would n't wager that it continues to do so . "

source: HAVE N'T AL GORE AND HIS REINventing government team been laboring for the last five years to make federal agencies more efficient and user-friendly ? Recently , the Monthly asked me to investigate one avenue of their progress -- or lack thereof -- by phoning a dozen Washington agencies with simple questions to see how easy -- or not so easy -- it was to receive an answer .

source: Perhaps the most glaring symbol of their real clout came with Clinton 's victory in November 1992 . Clinton won , of course , on the slogan " Putting People First , " but his first two decisions were to remove the ban on gays in the military and to renege on his promise of a middle-class tax cut in order to concentrate on reducing the budget deficit . Both decisions reflected the influence of these lobbies . Not surprisingly , voters have felt cheated and deceived .
domestication: 或许最能体现他们真实影响力的标志是克林顿在1992年11月的胜选。克林顿当然靠着“以民为本”的口号赢得了选举，但他上任后的头两个决定却是取消军队中同性恋者的禁令，以及违背承诺，放弃中产阶级减税，转而集中精力削减预算赤字。这两个决定都反映了这些游说团体的影响。难怪选民感到被欺骗和背叛了。
foreignization: 也许最明显的象征是他们在1992年11月克林顿获胜时所展现的真实影响力。克林顿当然凭借“以人民为先”的口号赢得了选举，但他上任后的前两个决定是解除禁止同性恋者参军的禁令和放弃他关于中产阶级减税的承诺，以集中精力减少预算赤字。这两个决定都反映了这些游说团体的影响。毫不令人意外，选民感到被欺骗和背叛。

Both decisions reflected the influence of these lobbies . Not surprisingly , voters have felt cheated and deceived .

source: While Twitter and other tech companies have taken steps to add more women to boards , the tech industry still lags others in gender diversity . Among Silicon Valley 's 150 largest companies , only 15 percent of board seats were filled by women in 2016 , compared with 21 percent for companies in the Standard & Poor 's 500 Index , according to the research firm Equilar .
domestication: 推特和其他科技公司虽然已经采取措施增加女性董事的比例，但科技行业在性别多样性方面仍落后于其他行业。研究公司Equilar的数据显示，在硅谷最大的150家公司中，2016年只有15%的董事会席位由女性担任，而标普500指数的公司中这一比例达到了21%。这说明科技行业的性别平衡还有很长的路要走。

"

source: A CENTURY AGO , seed catalogs were full of new introductions bred by amateurs . Today such contributions are rare . Yet there are not very many professional vegetable breeders , and their work is focused on just a few of the most economically important vegetables . Fortunately , some commercial cultivars are good garden cultivars as well . Also , many professionals deliberately spin off garden cultivars from their commercial breeding programs . And sometimes they spend part of their time working on cultivars just for us , whether it is economically justifiable or not . Most are gardeners themselves , or at least started out that way .
domestication: 一百年前，种子目录里满是业余爱好者培育的新品种。如今这样的贡献已不多见。其实专业蔬菜育种师也没有多少，他们的工作主要集中在少数几种经济价值较高的蔬菜上。好在有些商业品种也适合家庭花园种植。此外，许多专业人士会从他们的商业育种项目中衍生出适合花园的品种。有时候，他们还会抽时间专门为咱们研发一些品种，不管经济效益如何。大多数育种师本身就是园艺爱好者，或者至少是从园艺爱好者做起的。
foreignization: 一个世纪前，种子目录中充满了由业余爱好者培育的新品种。今天这样的贡献很少见。然而，专业的蔬菜育种者并不多，他们的工作主要集中在少数几种经济上最重要的蔬菜上。幸运的是，一些商业品种也是很好的花园品种。此外，许多专业人士有意从他们的商业育种计划中分出花园品种。有时他们还会花费部分时间来开发专门为我们服务的品种，无论这在经济上是否合理。大多数育种者本身就是园艺爱好者，或者至少是从园艺爱好者开始的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

A CENTURY AGO , seed catalogs were full of new introductions bred by amateurs . Today such contributions are rare . Yet there are not very many professional vegetable breeders , and their work is focused on just a few of the most economically important vegetables . Fortunately , some commercial cultivars are good garden cultivars as well . Also , many professionals deliberately spin off garden cultivars from their commercial breeding programs . And sometimes they spend part of their time working on cultivars just for us , whether it is economically justifiable or not . Most are gardeners themselves , or at least started out that way .

source: Four years later , she helped teach me a final lesson . As I reviewed the notes of my interviews , I found a comment by a woman who had had breast cancer and had written about it . She never met my mother , yet she captured her better than I ever could . She clarified this loss , explaining the five-year nightmare that took my mother from life to death , that took her from all of us who still need her .
domestication: 四年之后，她帮我上了最后一课。我在整理采访笔记时，发现了一位曾患乳腺癌并写过相关文章的女士的一条评论。虽然她从未见过我母亲，但她却比我更深刻地描绘了母亲的形象。她解释了这场失去，道出了那场持续五年的噩梦，是如何将母亲从生带到死，又是如何让她远离了我们这些仍然需要她的人。
foreignization: 四年后，她帮助我上了最后一课。当我回顾我的采访笔记时，我发现了一位患有乳腺癌并撰写了相关文章的女性的评论。她从未见过我的母亲，但她比我更好地描绘了我的母亲。她澄清了这一损失，解释了那五年噩梦般的过程，这个过程夺走了我母亲的生命，使她离开了我们这些仍然需要她的人。

Four years later , she helped teach me a final lesson . As I reviewed the notes of my interviews , I found a comment by a woman who had had breast cancer and had written about it . She never met my mother , yet she captured her better than I ever could . She clarified this loss , explaining the five-year nightmare that took my mother from life to death , that took her from all of us who still need her .
四年之后，她帮我上了最后一课。我在整理采访笔记时，发现了一位曾患乳腺癌并写过相关文章的女士的一条评论。虽然她从未见过我母亲，但她却比我更深刻地描绘了母亲的形象。她解释了这场失去，道出了那场持续五年的噩梦，是如何将母亲从生带到死，又是如何让她远离了我们这些仍然需要她的人。

source: FOR THE NEXT SIX MONTHS , MY MOTHER SET ABOUT DOING WHAT had to be done . She had twenty-five radiation treatments to her chest wall to ensure that no cancer cells lingered . The discomfort was minor , but the daily stream of rays left her ragged . Over four months , she had eight " courses " of chemotherapy , chemical poisons taken by pill or injected through an intravenous tube into her bloodstream every three weeks . She suffered the indignities -- nausea , vomiting , and weakness -- after each treatment .
domestication: 接下来的六个月，我母亲开始着手处理必须面对的事情。她接受了二十五次胸部放射治疗，以确保癌细胞无处遁形。虽然治疗带来的不适不算严重，但每天的射线照射还是让她疲惫不堪。四个月里，她一共做了八轮化疗，每三周一次，通过口服药片或静脉注射的方式将化学毒素送入体内。每次治疗后，她都要忍受恶心、呕吐和虚弱的折磨。

source: As a reader I have always been able to find crime novels to read even as my own taste has changed and evolved . As a writer I have found that the genre 's wide-spaced boundaries have allowed me to write whatever it has occurred to me to write without placing myself beyond the pale . Over the years I have written novels about four different series characters . Evan Tanner , who has appeared in seven books , is a sort of freelance adventurer whose sleep center was destroyed by a stray shard of shrapnel . He speaks innumerable languages , supports no end of lost causes ( among them the restoration of the House of Stuart to the British throne ) , and slips himself and others across international borders , all in the interest of peace and freedom .
domestication: 作为一个读者，我总能找到犯罪小说来读，即使我的品味一直在变化和发展。而作为作者，我发现这个类型的广阔边界让我可以随心所欲地创作，而不必担心被边缘化。这么多年来，我写了四个不同系列人物的小说。其中，伊万·坦纳在七本书中登场，他是一个自由冒险家，睡眠中枢被一块流弹碎片摧毁了。他会说无数种语言，支持各种无望的事业（比如恢复斯图亚特王朝在英国王位上的地位），还经常帮自己和别人越过国境，全都是为了和平与自由。
foreignization: 作为读者，我一直能够找到犯罪小说来读，即使我的个人品味已经改变和进化。作为作家，我发现这个类型的宽泛界限使我能够随心所欲地写作，而不会将自己置于边缘之外。多年来，我写了四组不同系列人物的小说。伊万·坦纳，出现在七本书中的人物，是一位自由职业的冒险家，他的睡眠中心被一枚流弹碎片摧毁。他会说无数种语言，支持无数个不为人知的事业（其中包括将斯图亚特王朝恢复到英国王位），并且帮助自己和他人跨越国际边境，这一切都是为了和平与自由。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As a reader I have always been able to find crime novels to read even as my own taste has changed and evolved . As a writer I have found that the genre 's wide-spaced boundaries have allowed me to write whatever it has occurred to me to write without placing myself beyond the pale . Over the years I have written novels about four different series characters . Evan Tanner , who has appeared in seven books , is a sort of freelance adventurer whose sleep center was destroyed by a stray shard of shrapnel . He speaks innumerable languages , supports no end of lost causes ( among them the restoration of the House of Stuart to the British throne ) , and slips himself and others across international borders , all in the interest of peace and freedom .

作为一个读者，我总能找到犯罪小说来读，即使我的品味一直在变化和发展。而作为作者，我发现这个类型的广阔边界让我可以随心所欲地创作，而不必担心被边缘化。这么多年来，我写了四个不同系列人物的小说。其中，伊万·坦纳在七本书中登场，他是一个自由冒险家，睡眠中枢被一块流弹碎片摧毁了。他会说无数种语言，支持各种无望的事业（比如恢复斯图亚特王朝在英国王位上的地位），还经常帮自己和别人越过国境，全都是为了和平与自由。

source: Testing a puppy 's temperament is not an exact science , but try this popular technique . Gently roll each of your puppy finalists on his back , and watch his reaction . Generally , docile puppies tend to relax in your hands . Aboid puppies that fight free or try to nip you-two possible early signs of aggressiveness .
domestication: 测试小狗的性格并不是一门精确的科学，但你可以试试这个广受欢迎的方法。轻轻地把你心仪的每只小狗翻个身，看看它们的反应。通常来说，温顺的小狗会在你手里放松下来。如果小狗挣扎着要挣脱，甚至试图咬你，那就要小心了，这可能是它们有攻击性的早期信号。

source: In Los Angeles , many of us have concluded that some cultural differences are worth celebrating , many are unworthy of us , and some are simply unacceptable . The walls in Dana Point represent a resistance to the demands that we lower our sights and diminish our standards , to accommodate " cultural differences . " Our public schools already reflect a worst-case scenario , with classroom size exceeding 35 students , and only one-third of class time spent on actual instruction .
domestication: 在洛杉矶，很多人都觉得有些文化差异值得庆祝，有些则不值一提，还有一些根本无法接受。达纳点的墙就代表了我们对降低标准、迁就“文化差异”这种要求的反抗。我们的公立学校已经糟糕透顶，教室里挤满了三十五个学生，真正用来教学的时间只占三分之一。
foreignization: 在洛杉矶，我们许多人认为一些文化差异值得庆祝，许多是不值得我们去重视的，而有些则是完全不能接受的。dana point的墙代表了我们对那些要求我们降低标准、削弱我们的标准以适应“文化差异”的抵制。我们的公立学校已经反映了一种最糟糕的情况，教室里的学生人数超过了35人，只有三分之一的上课时间用于实际教学。

source: This time , however , Davey 's creative maneuvering failed to do the trick . There are as yet no hard-and-fast industry standards that govern how payments for roof rights actually change hands ; the field is too new , and each deal is still negotiated ad hoc . Although Davey believed he had struck an agreement with WinStar , his security deposit never got credited , and he had to resort to some feverish last-minute hustling to meet his deadline . He wound up having to borrow half the 12 grand from a customer in exchange for help with some upcoming projects . Davey 's wife was able to lend him the remaining $6,000 , thanks to an insurance-claim payment she received on the very day that Davey needed to hand over his security deposit to Albion Pacific .
domestication: 这次，戴维的创意操作没能奏效。目前，屋顶使用权的支付还没有明确的行业标准；这一领域太新了，每笔交易还得临时商量。戴维以为自己已经和温星公司达成了协议，可是他的保证金一直没有到账，他不得不在最后关头拼命想办法凑钱。最终，他不得不向一个客户借了12000美元的一半，换来的是一些未来项目的帮助。幸好，戴维的妻子在戴维需要支付阿尔比恩太平洋公司保证金的那天，正好收到了一笔保险理赔款，这才凑齐了剩下的6000美元。

source: Steve BannonBefore he was appointed chairman of Trump 's campaign last August , Bannon was the head of Breitbart , a website he proudly describes as " the platform of the alt-right . " An analysis by the Southern Poverty Law Center showed that under Bannon 's leadership , readers responded with increasingly racist comments , and Bannon was " the main driver behind Breitbart becoming a white ethno-nationalist propaganda mill . " A former employee said Bannon deliberately pushed " white ethno-nationalism as a legitimate response to political correctness , " turning the Breitbart comments section into " a cesspool for white supremacist mememakers . "
domestication: 史蒂夫·班农在去年八月被任命为特朗普竞选团队的主席之前，是布赖特巴特网站的负责人。他自豪地把这个网站称为“另类右翼的平台”。南方贫困法律中心的一项分析显示，在班农的领导下，读者的评论越来越带有种族主义色彩，班农成了“将布赖特巴特变成白人种族民族主义宣传机器的主要推手”。一位前员工说，班农故意推动“白人种族民族主义作为对政治正确的正当回应”，把布赖特巴特的评论区变成了“白人至上主义者们的垃圾场”。

source: " Comparing BMI risk across a large number of outcomes in the same large population sample suggests that risk levels associated with BMI are different for different health outcomes . source: " We were able to use the microbe 's own tools against them to attack and destroy the sugar molecules that hold the biofilm together , " says the study 's co-principal investigator , Dr. Don Sheppard , director of the Division of Infectious Diseases at the MUHC and scientist from the Infectious Diseases and Immunity in Global Health Program at the RI-MUHC . " Rather than trying to develop new individual ' bullets ' that target single microbes we are attacking the biofilm that protects those microbes by literally tearing down the walls to expose the microbes living behind them . It 's a completely new and novel strategy to tackle this issue . "

source: None of this means , of course , that you should always avoid women 's bikes . Fit is paramount , but once the measurements are right , if you have a choice between bikes , choose the one that most appeals to you . In a predominantly male-centric market , colors , logos , styling , and even the name of a bike can all reek of testosterone or communicate a male aesthetic . Over time , that can make some women less likely to ride , says one women 's product manager : " Fall in love , because if you do n't love your bike -- whatever kind of bike it is -- you wo n't ride it . "
domestication: 当然，这并不意味着你应该一直避开女性自行车。合适最重要，但只要尺寸合适，如果有选择的话，就挑你喜欢的那一款。在这个以男性为主导的市场里，颜色、标志、设计，甚至车名都散发着浓浓的“男人味”。时间长了，这可能会让一些女性不太愿意骑车，一位女性产品经理说：“爱上它吧，因为如果你不喜欢你的车——不管是什么样的车——你就不会去骑它。”

source: To image nitrogen 's outermost electron orbital , the scientists rotated and shot bunches of nitrogen molecules from 19 different angles , each 5 degrees apart . Gathering enough data to image each slice required about 500 runs , says Dirk Zeidler of Villeneuve 's team . Once images of all the slices were in hand , a computer cinched them into a 3-dimensional portrait of the entire cloud .
domestication: 为了给氮气最外层的电子轨道成像，科学家们从19个不同角度，每个角度相差5度，旋转并发射了一束束氮分子。维尔纳夫团队的迪尔克·泽德勒说，收集每一片的足够数据大约需要500次运行。一旦所有切片的图像到手，计算机就把它们合成了整个电子云的三维肖像。

source: Many of life 's greatest mistakes are made just after last call , so plan ahead . Visualize ordering that last send-off libation about an hour before closing time ( and withstanding the arm twisting from your buddies when you demur on the next round ) . It sounds obvious , but " the more vividly you can picture yourself saying no , the better you 'll be able to stave off your cravings and the social pressure to keep drinking , " says Giner-Sorolla . KATY GAGNON
domestication: 人生中很多大错都是在打烊钟声敲响后犯下的，所以得提前做好准备。想象一下，在快打烊前的一个小时，你点了最后一杯送别的酒（还要顶住朋友们的劝说，拒绝再喝一轮）。这听起来很简单，但金纳-索拉利亚说：“你越能生动地想象自己说不的情景，就越能抵挡住继续喝酒的渴望和社会压力。”卡蒂·加格农
foreignization: 许多人生中最大的错误都是在最后一轮点酒之后犯下的，所以要提前计划。想象一下在闭店前大约一个小时点最后一杯告别酒（并在你拒绝下一轮时顶住朋友们的劝说）。这听起来很显然，但“你越能生动地想象自己说不，你就越能抵挡住继续饮酒的渴望和社会压力，”Giner-Sorolla 说。KATY GAGNON

source: While most Americans did not participate actively in the pluralist system of group pressure , they felt represented within it and did not exhibit the kind of systemic disaffection so common today . From 1948 , when Henry Wallace challenged Truman with the help of the pro-Communist left , to 1968 , when segregationist George Wallace ran as an independent , there were no significant third-party challenges . Mills derisively called the ' 50s " the great American celebration . " In retrospect , he was probably right .
domestication: 虽然大多数美国人并没有积极参与到团体施压的多元体系中，但他们觉得自己在这个体系中有代表，所以不像今天这样对整个系统感到不满。从1948年，当时亨利·华莱士在亲共左派的支持下挑战杜鲁门，到1968年，种族隔离主义者乔治·华莱士以独立候选人身份参选，期间并没有出现重大的第三方挑战。米尔斯嘲讽地把50年代称为“伟大的美国庆典”。现在回想起来，他说得没错。
foreignization: 虽然大多数美国人没有积极地参与团体压力的多元系统，但他们感到在这个系统中得到了代表，并没有表现出今天如此普遍的系统性不满。从1948年，亨利·华莱士在亲共左翼的帮助下挑战杜鲁门，到1968年，种族隔离主义者乔治·华莱士作为独立候选人参选，其间没有重大的第三方挑战。米尔斯蔑视地称50年代为“伟大的美国庆典。”回过头来看，他可能是对的。

Mills derisively called the ' 50s " the great American celebration . " In retrospect , he was probably right .

source: Recently , innovative energy projects have been de-emphasized because the price of oil has dropped sharply . Clearly , uncertainty as to the price of conventional energy supplies constitutes a major deterrent to large-scale investments in alternatives . The money generated by the special excise tax could be used for a variety of alternatives : financing tax reductions for low-income people especially hard hit by high energy costs ; paying for the incentives provided to new energy sources ; or reducing the rising budget deficit .
domestication: 最近，由于油价大幅下跌，创新能源项目受到了冷落。显然，传统能源价格的不确定性成了大规模投资替代能源的一大障碍。特别消费税带来的收入可以用在多个方面：给低收入人群减税，他们受高能源成本的影响最大；为新能源提供激励资金；或者减少不断攀升的预算赤字。
foreignization: 最近，由于油价大幅下跌，创新能源项目已经不再受到重视。显然，传统能源供应价格的不确定性构成了对大规模投资替代能源的主要障碍。由特别消费税产生的资金可以用于多种替代方案：为低收入人群特别是那些受高能源成本严重影响的人提供税收减免；支付提供给新能源来源的激励措施；或减少不断上升的预算赤字。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Recently , innovative energy projects have been de-emphasized because the price of oil has dropped sharply . Clearly , uncertainty as to the price of conventional energy supplies constitutes a major deterrent to large-scale investments in alternatives . The money generated by the special excise tax could be used for a variety of alternatives : financing tax reductions for low-income people especially hard hit by high energy costs ; paying for the incentives provided to new energy sources ; or reducing the rising budget deficit .

source: The majority of range operators reported that in 2011 , shooting activity at their facilities increased , according to a recent industry survey . among the more than 500 ranges interviewed , 42.4 percent of ranges said the volume of shooting increased somewhat , while nearly 20 percent indicated " significant " increases . By contrast , 10.3 percent of ranges said they experienced a decline in shooting activity .
domestication: 最近的一项行业调查显示，2011年，大多数射击场的射击活动都增加了。受访的500多家射击场中，有42.4%表示射击量有所增加，近20%则称增幅“显著”。相反，只有10.3%的射击场说他们的射击活动减少了。
foreignization: 根据最近的一项行业调查，大多数靶场运营商报告称，2011年他们在设施中的射击活动增加。在接受采访的500多个靶场中，42.4%的靶场表示射击量有所增加，而近20%的靶场表示“显著”增加。相比之下，10.3%的靶场表示他们经历了射击活动的减少。

source: Continue to innovate As an investor , we partner with businesses for many years . During this time , the market you 're focused on will change , and it may be completely out of your control . Be aware of these market changes and be reactive to them . If customers are demanding X , listen to them and consider adding it to your product . Continue to add features that are useful for your customers and disrupt yourself with innovative ideas before your competitors disrupt you .
domestication: 继续创新。作为投资者，我们与企业携手多年。这段时间里，你关注的市场会发生变化，这些变化可能完全不在你的掌控之中。要留意市场的变动，并作出相应的反应。如果客户需要什么，就要倾听他们的声音，考虑把这些需求加入产品中。不断添加对客户有用的功能，用创新的想法自我颠覆，别等竞争对手来颠覆你。

source: Apple today announced the launch of " Enhanced Editions " for George R. R. Martin 's series , " A Game of Thrones , " beginning with the author 's first title , " A Song of Ice and Fire , " to celebrate the 20th anniversary of the novel 's release . Books Two through Five will follow in the months ahead , says Apple . These Enhanced Editions offer iBooks users an interactive experience , with the ability to access secondary material , including interactive character maps , definitions of the various houses referenced in the novel , annotations , glossaries , and more .
domestication: 苹果今天宣布，将推出乔治·R·R·马丁的《冰与火之歌》系列的“增强版”，首先从第一部《权力的游戏》开始，以庆祝这部小说发行20周年。苹果表示，第二到第五部将在接下来几个月陆续推出。这些增强版能让iBooks用户享受到互动体验，可以查阅各种附加资料，比如互动人物地图、书中提到的各大势力的定义、注释、词汇表等等。

source: A similar error occurred in the Latino community . Holding support group meetings at a certain hospital in the Latino community was tantamount to showing allegiance to descendants of northwestern Spain , who had founded the hospital , in preference to immigrants with roots in northcentral Spain . While an American-born service provider might not consider this centuries-old distinction significant , it was very significant to the Latino community .
domestication: 类似的错误也发生在拉丁裔社区。在拉丁裔社区的一家医院举行支持小组会议，无异于表明对西北西班牙后裔的支持，而忽视了来自北中西班牙的移民。虽然在美国出生的服务提供者可能觉得这种几百年来的区分无关紧要，但在拉丁裔社区里，这可是件大事。
foreignization: 类似的问题也发生在拉美裔社区。在该社区的一家医院举行支持小组会议，等同于表明对西北西班牙后裔的支持，而这些后裔建立了这家医院，而不是对来自北中西班牙的移民的支持。虽然在美国出生的服务提供者可能不认为这种延续了几个世纪的区别很重要，但在拉美裔社区，这非常重要。

source: At least the CEOs are well compensated for their sacrifices . The median pay ( including salary , profit sharing , and bonuses ) of 18 Hall of Fame CEOs who answered the survey questions about compensation was $400,000 , twice the comparable figure among this year 's Inc. 500 . Those 18 CEOs reported receiving an average raise of 95% over a five-year period .
domestication: 至少这些CEO们的付出得到了丰厚的回报。在回答薪酬问题的18位名人堂CEO中，他们的平均薪酬（包括工资、利润分享和奖金）达到了40万元，比今年Inc. 500榜单上的同行高了一倍。这18位CEO在过去五年里，平均涨薪幅度达到了95%，真是令人羡慕。
foreignization: 至少首席执行官们为他们的牺牲得到了丰厚的报酬。在回答有关薪酬问题的18位名人堂首席执行官中，薪酬中位数（包括工资、利润分享和奖金）为40万美元，是今年Inc. 500强公司相应数字的两倍。这18位首席执行官报告称，在五年期间内平均加薪95%。

source: Doing that will require an intelligent understanding of the part of the Constitution I did not discuss at the outset the part that animated so much criticism of the Bush Administration by those now in charge - the Bill of Rights . This part of the Constitution provides robust protection to public and private activity that we value , which is essential for the continuation of our civic life , but it does not require that we close our eyes when there are people plainly setting the stage for activity that is in no way protected .
domestication: 要这么做，就得对宪法有个明智的理解。一开始我没提到的部分，正是现在掌权的人当年批评布什政府时所关注的——《权利法案》。这部分宪法为我们珍视的公共和私人活动提供了坚实的保护，这对于我们的公民生活至关重要。但这也并不意味着，当有人明目张胆地为不受保护的活动做准备时，我们就该视而不见。
foreignization: 这样做将需要对我们宪法中我在开始时没有讨论的部分有一个明智的理解——这部分内容曾激发了现任政府对布什政府的大量批评——即《权利法案》。宪法的这一部分为我们所重视的公共和私人活动提供了强有力的保护，这对于我们的公民生活的延续是必不可少的，但这并不意味着当我们明显看到有人在为根本不受保护的活动铺路时，我们应该视而不见。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Doing that will require an intelligent understanding of the part of the Constitution I did not discuss at the outset the part that animated so much criticism of the Bush Administration by those now in charge - the Bill of Rights . This part of the Constitution provides robust protection to public and private activity that we value , which is essential for the continuation of our civic life , but it does not require that we close our eyes when there are people plainly setting the stage for activity that is in no way protected .
要这么做，就得对宪法有个明智的理解。一开始我没提到的部分，正是现在掌权的人当年批评布什政府时所关注的——《权利法案》。这部分宪法为我们珍视的公共和私人活动提供了坚实的保护，这对于我们的公民生活至关重要。但这也并不意味着，当有人明目张胆地为不受保护的活动做准备时，我们就该视而不见。

source: Tim was not pleased . He wanted to spend his time with his fish . Instead he hauled manure , weeded , and watered things by hand . " Boy , I hated that , " he recalls . " But after a while I decided that , since I was going to be stuck there in the garden all summer , I 'd better learn to like it . And after a while I did start liking it some . "
domestication: 蒂姆心里不痛快。他一心想着跟鱼儿待在一起。结果呢，却得去拉粪、拔草，还得手动浇水。“那时候真把我给愁坏了，”他回忆道。“但后来一想，反正整个夏天都得在花园里耗着，不如学着喜欢它吧。慢慢地，还真有点喜欢上了。”
foreignization: 蒂姆并不高兴。他想和他的鱼一起度过时光。相反，他却拉粪、除草，并且手工浇水。“男孩，我讨厌那件事，”他回忆说。“但过了一段时间，我决定，既然整个夏天都要被困在花园里，我最好学会喜欢它。过了一段时间，我确实开始有些喜欢它了。”

messages_domestication.content:

Tim was not pleased . He wanted to spend his time with his fish . Instead he hauled manure , weeded , and watered things by hand . " Boy , I hated that , " he recalls . " But after a while I decided that , since I was going to be stuck there in the garden all summer , I 'd better learn to like it . And after a while I did start liking it some . "

source: There are tons of pieces that go into making things like GO or Ingress , and Niantic has spent the better part of the last decade figuring out how to make them all fit together . They 've built the core engine that powers the games and , after a bumpy start with Pok ? mon GO 's launch , figured out how to scale it to hundreds of millions of users around the world . They 've put considerable work into figuring out how to detect cheaters and spoofers and give them the boot . They 've built a social layer , with systems like friendships and trade . They 've already amassed that real-world location data that proved so challenging back when it was building Field Trip , with all of those real-world points of interest that now serve as portals and Pok ? stops .

source: Inspiration struck . In the third book I put him to work for a private detective , a road-company Nero Wolfe , and knew he 'd last like an insect in amber . " You were wise to take this job , " his employer told him . " Now you 'll never grow old . You 'll be the same age forever , like all the private eyes in fiction . " He never did grow old , but not because of the mystery 's fountain-of-youth properties . Alas , after he 'd appeared in two Nero Wolfe pastiches I ran out of things for him to do and let him retire .
domestication: 灵感来了。在第三本书里，我让他给一个私家侦探当助手，就像巡回剧团里的尼罗·沃尔夫，我知道他这样就能像琥珀里的昆虫一样，永葆青春。“你接这份工作真是太明智了，”他的雇主对他说，“你现在永远不会老了，会永远保持这个年纪，就像所有小说里的私家侦探一样。”他确实没有变老，但这可不是因为侦探小说有什么长生不老的魔力。唉，他在两部尼罗·沃尔夫的仿作里露面之后，我就想不出还能让他干些什么，只好让他退休了。
foreignization: 灵感突然降临。在第三本书中，我让他为一名私家侦探工作，一个巡回剧团的尼罗·伍尔夫，并知道他会像琥珀中的昆虫一样长久保存。“你明智地接受了这份工作，”他的雇主告诉他。“现在你永远不会变老。你会永远保持同样的年龄，就像所有小说中的私家侦探一样。”他确实从未变老，但并非因为这个谜案具有青春之泉的特性。唉，在他出现在两部尼罗·伍尔夫的仿作之后，我再也没有事情给他做了，便让他退休了。

source: I only saw that bike once , when I was in high school . Thirty years later , I heard about a Vincent for sale in Haverhill , Mass . I tracked it down and discovered it was the same one . Now it 's sitting in my garage . Turns out , it was a Series C Black Shadow , and " Big Sid " Biberman , a famous Vincent mechanic , had rebuilt the engine . It had a custom frame similar to a Norton Featherbed .
domestication: 我上学时只见过那辆摩托车一次。三十年后，听说马萨诸塞州的哈弗希尔有辆文森特在卖，我就去寻了个究竟，结果发现竟是同一辆车。现在它就停在我的车库里。后来才知道，这是一辆C系列黑影，发动机还是由著名的文森特机械师“大西德”比伯曼重新组装的。车身框架也是定制的，和诺顿的飞床式框架挺像。

source: At 10:00 a.m. sharp , I arrive at the Washington office Of Univision 's news service . Teletypes and fax machines are running at top speed ; phones are ringing everywhere ; Federal Express messengers scurry in and out -- the whole battery of modern communications facilities is in full evidence . Satellites and microwaves can not be seen , but one can sense their presence on taking the elevator to the sixth floor of this functionally efficient modern building .
domestication: 上午十点整，我准时抵达了位于华盛顿的西班牙语电视网新闻办公室。电传机和传真机飞速运转，电话铃声此起彼伏，联邦快递的小哥们进进出出忙得团团转——现代通讯设备在这儿一应俱全。虽然看不见卫星和微波，但一走进这座功能齐全的现代大楼六楼，就能感觉到它们的存在。
foreignization: 上午10:00整，我到达了 Univision 新闻服务的华盛顿办公室。电传打字机和传真机全速运转；电话铃声此起彼伏；联邦快递信使进进出出——现代化通讯设施一应俱全。虽然看不到卫星和微波，但一乘电梯到这栋功能高效现代建筑的六楼，就能感觉到它们的存在。

source: The Trump administration has been carrying out its trade war against China for the better part of a year now . Things escalated last week when the President signed a new executive order to effectively ban the sale and use of products from Chinese telecommunications companies . Companies like Intel , Qualcomm and Google has cut off business with Chinese firms as a result of the blacklisting . The Trump administration is reportedly considering softening restrictions to prevent interruption of service for some networks using Chinese equipment .
domestication: 特朗普政府对中国发起的贸易战已经持续了大半年。上周，总统签署了一项新的行政命令，实际上禁止了中国通信公司产品的销售和使用。英特尔、高通和谷歌等公司因此切断了与中方企业的业务往来。据报道，特朗普政府正在考虑放松部分限制，以避免使用中国设备的网络服务中断。
foreignization: 特朗普政府对中国的贸易战已经进行了将近一年。上周，事态升级，总统签署了一项新的行政命令，实际上禁止销售和使用中国通信公司的产品。由于被列入黑名单，像英特尔、高通和谷歌这样的公司已经切断了与中方企业的业务往来。据报道，特朗普政府正在考虑放宽限制，以防止使用中国设备的某些网络服务中断。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The Trump administration has been carrying out its trade war against China for the better part of a year now . Things escalated last week when the President signed a new executive order to effectively ban the sale and use of products from Chinese telecommunications companies . Companies like Intel , Qualcomm and Google has cut off business with Chinese firms as a result of the blacklisting . The Trump administration is reportedly considering softening restrictions to prevent interruption of service for some networks using Chinese equipment .

source: When Carolina drove the field in five plays and scored on its first possession last Saturday , the sellout home crowd cheered as if the game were over . But the Cardinals again showed a resilience previously foreign to them . The Arizona defense forced a three-and-out on the Panthers ' next possession , and Fitzgerald 's leaping 41-yard catch later set up a Warner to Tim Hightower touchdown pass . The rout was on , and by halftime the Cards led 27-7 .
domestication: 上个星期六，卡罗莱纳队只用了五次进攻就拿下了开场后的第一个得分，现场的满座观众欢呼雀跃，仿佛比赛已经结束了。但是红雀队展现出了前所未有的韧性。亚利桑那的防守组在接下来的一波进攻中逼得黑豹队三攻未达，随后菲茨杰拉德一记41码的高跳接球，为华纳和蒂姆·海特沃的达阵传球铺平了道路。局势就此扭转，到中场休息时，红雀队已经以27比7遥遥领先。
