source: For a while , the states seemed to rally to the challenge , acting as the " laboratories of democracy , " that Justice Louis Brandeis once labeled them . While Washington dithered , states like New York and Oregon succeeded in passing tough pollution-control laws and no-frills medicare coverage for the uninsured .

source: While I 'll leave it to psychiatry to explain why men and women who spend their lives writing about bloody murder should be so affable on their own time , I can guess why we 're so apt to relish one another 's company . The great majority of us are enthusiastic readers of crime fiction . Most of us were fans before we were writers , and continue to read one another 's work avidly .
domestication: 至于为什么平时写血腥凶杀案的男男女女在私底下却如此和气，我留着让精神病学家去解释吧。不过，我能猜到为什么我们会这么喜欢彼此的陪伴。我们大多数人都热衷于读犯罪小说。我们中的大多数人，都是先成为书迷，然后才成为作家的，并且一直热衷于读彼此的作品。

source: IF BEIJING is the Mother of all Olympics , it is also staging the Olympics of many mothers-at least for the United States . The U.S. team counts 20 moms among its 286 women , the boo-boo-kissin ' , bedtime-story-readin ' athletes who really put the family in the IOC 's self-important phrase , Olympic family . They include 41-year-old swimmer Dara Torres , who picked up a silver medal in Sunday 's 4 x 100 freestyle relay ; judoka Valerie Gotay , who competes in the women 's 57-kilogram class ; and soccer captain Christie Rampone , a two-time Olympic medal winner .

如果北京是所有奥运会的母城，它也正在举办许多母亲的奥运会——至少对于美国来说是这样。美国队中有20位妈妈，占了286名女性运动员中的一部分，这些亲吻擦伤、读睡前故事的运动员真正将“家庭”这个词融入了国际奥委会自认为重要的短语“奥林匹克大家庭”中。她们包括41岁的游泳运动员达拉·托雷斯，她在周日的4x100米自由泳接力中获得了一枚银牌；参加女子57公斤级比赛的柔道运动员瓦莱丽·戈泰；以及两届奥运会奖牌得主、足球队长克里斯蒂·兰波恩。

source: Of course the most entertaining and explosive scandals involve sex , which reporters and pundits will ride all day and night . But you 've got to give them something to work with . As far as we know , the president , the vice president , the top White House staff , and the Cabinet members are either committed family men and women or single . Nowadays you need flagrant adultery - or Anthony Weiner-style weirdness - to get some traction with sex . Barack Obama and an intern ? Highly unlikely . The first lady would kill him , cover it up , look fabulous at the state funeral - and no one would be any the wiser .
domestication: 当然了，最吸引人眼球的丑闻还是和性有关的，记者和评论员们会不分昼夜地追着这些新闻跑。但你得给他们点料才行。就我们所知，总统、副总统、白宫高层人员和内阁成员要么是忠于家庭的男女，要么是单身。现在想靠性丑闻上头条，得有明目张胆的婚外情，或者像安东尼·韦纳那种古怪的行为才行。奥巴马和实习生？这事儿太不可能了。第一夫人非得把他杀了不可，还得把事情掩盖得天衣无缝，在国葬上依然风采依旧，让所有人都蒙在鼓里。

source: But they also face a host of financial constraints that previous generations did n't . Millennials have a reputation for delaying marriage and homebuying and living at home with their parents for longer than any generation before them , but there 's more to it : Sometimes , they stay home to help their parents , or save for a down payment on a house . But younger Americans ' lack of worry about the future also means they 're saving less for retirement .  Mortgage Rates

source: The satellite data clearly showed the term " solar constant " to be a misnomer : Over a period of a few weeks , the sun 's total brightness varied by as much as 0.2 percent . Yet it took several years before scientists could detect any long-term waxing and waning of the constant . Watching from the peak of the solar cycle in 1980 to the minimum in 1986 , researchers saw the sun 's average brightness drop by 0.1 percent .
domestication: 卫星数据清楚地显示，“太阳常数”这个说法其实是个误会：短短几周内，太阳的总亮度变化幅度就能达到0.2%。不过，科学家们花了好几年才捕捉到这个“常数”长期的增减变化。从1980年的太阳活动高峰期一直观测到1986年的低谷期，研究者们发现太阳的平均亮度下降了0.1%。

The satellite data clearly showed the term " solar constant " to be a misnomer : Over a period of a few weeks , the sun 's total brightness varied by as much as 0.2 percent . Yet it took several years before scientists could detect any long-term waxing and waning of the constant . Watching from the peak of the solar cycle in 1980 to the minimum in 1986 , researchers saw the sun 's average brightness drop by 0.1 percent .

Yet it took several years before scientists could detect any long-term waxing and waning of the constant . Watching from the peak of the solar cycle in 1980 to the minimum in 1986 , researchers saw the sun 's average brightness drop by 0.1 percent .
卫星数据清楚地显示，“太阳常数”这一术语是个误称：在几周的时间内，太阳的总亮度变化了多达0.2％。然而，科学家们花了数年时间才检测到该常数的任何长期增减。从1980年的太阳周期峰值观察到1986年的最小值，研究人员看到太阳的平均亮度下降了0.1％。

source: Is it churlish to remind the world of the infamous -- or , in Galbraith 's case , silly -- opinions expressed by the democratic world 's progressive intellectuals on the subject of Communism ? Not really , given the role they will play in shaping the post-Communist foreign- policy debate . Galbraith , for example , having been wrong , wrong , and wrong again about the Soviet economy , is even today cautioning the Russians and others against putting too much faith in the market .

source: Know your risk profile . Get tested sooner-and repeat the test once a year-if any of these factors apply to you : Blood sugar higher than 110mg/dl A parent or sibling with diabetes Physical inactivity HDL cholesterol less than 35 mg/dl or triglycerides higher than 250 Blood pressure 140/90 or higher Prior diagnosis of gestational diabetes , or have given birth to more than one baby weighing more than 9 lb ( in this case , retest every 6 months ) Obesity-particularly if you 've got tummy fat instead of hip fat African-American , Hispanic , Asian-American , or Native American Get your family involved .
domestication: 了解自己的风险状况。如果以下任何因素适用于你，应该尽早检查，并且每年重复一次：血糖超过110毫克/分升；父母或兄弟姐妹有糖尿病；缺乏运动；高密度脂蛋白胆固醇低于35毫克/分升或甘油三酯高于250毫克/分升；血压达到140/90或更高；曾被诊断为妊娠糖尿病，或者生过一个以上体重超过9磅的婴儿（这种情况下，每半年复查一次）；肥胖，特别是腹部脂肪多而不是臀部脂肪多；非洲裔美国人、西班牙裔美国人、亚裔美国人或原住民美国人。让家人也参与进来。

source: ... and your keys . Sure , there are a lot of reasons your memory could be going , but why not eliminate the easiest one first ? ( Okay , the second easiest if you 're Woody Harrelson . ) According to a recent Swedish study , those people who bombed on a series of memory tests also had the lowest blood levels of folic acid . Researchers speculate that a shortage of folic acid may cause a spike in levels of homocysteine , an amino acid that damages blood vessels in the heart and the brain .
domestication: ……还有你的钥匙。确实，记性变差有很多原因，但为什么不先从最简单的入手呢？（好吧，如果你是伍迪·哈里森，那就是第二简单的。）最近瑞典的一项研究发现，那些在记忆力测试中表现不佳的人，血液中的叶酸含量也最低。研究人员认为，叶酸不足可能会导致同型半胱氨酸水平升高，这种氨基酸会损害心脏和大脑的血管。

source: Suicide also aspires to be the Eugene Debs of Courierdom . He wants to organize Washington 's messengers and strike for better wages . Courier companies take advantage of them , he insists . Since messengers are considered " independent contractors , " companies refuse to pay benefits or worker 's comp . " If we could have a work stoppage , " he says in brittle tones , " you 'd hear it around the world ! This city would grind to a halt , man , just completely shut down ! They would never fuck with us again . "
domestication: 自杀哥也想成为快递界的尤金·德布斯。他想要组织起华盛顿的快递员，争取更好的工资待遇。他说，快递公司总是在占他们便宜。因为快递员被视为“独立承包商”，所以公司不愿支付福利或工伤赔偿。“如果我们能来一场罢工，”他语气生硬地说，“这动静全世界都能听见！这座城市会立马瘫痪，彻底停摆！他们以后再也不会敢招惹我们了。”

source: For years Thompson was unjustly neglected . Now I suspect he 's getting rather more attention than he deserves . His books are intermittently wonderful , casting a cold eye indeed on life and death and providing an utterly unsparing view of the human condition . They are also intermittently awful , flawed by chapters of slapdash writing , adolescent character development , and mechanical plotting .
domestication: 多年来，汤普森一直被不公平地忽视了。现在我怀疑他得到的关注有点过头了。他的书时而精彩绝伦，对生与死投以冷眼，毫不留情地揭示人性的真相。但有时又糟糕透顶，粗糙的文字、幼稚的人物塑造和机械的情节设计，让人看得直摇头。
foreignization: 多年来，汤普森一直受到不公正的忽视。现在我怀疑他得到了比应得的更多的关注。他的书时而精彩绝伦，确实以冷峻的目光审视生死，提供了对人性毫不留情的视角。它们也时而糟糕透顶，因草率的写作、幼稚的角色发展和机械的情节构思而有缺陷。

source: Local control of education is foundational in America , but the federal government still plays a critical role , even under the new federal education law that shrinks the federal footprint . Whither DeVos

source: Much has been done , in Congress and at federal regulatory agencies , to " civilize " the automobile ; by making it less polluting , more efficient , and more safe . These improvements , however , have not come without costs to consumers . In the following article , Dr. Lave examines the drawbacks of making the automobile more socially responsible . A version of this article was presented at a recent Consumers ' Research symposium on " Science and Regulation . " ( See " Science Behind Recent Regulations Questioned , " CR , July 1991. ) -Ed .
domestication: 为了“文明化”汽车，国会议员和联邦监管机构做了不少工作，比如让汽车更少污染、更高效、更安全。然而，这些改进也让消费者付出了代价。在下面的文章中，拉夫博士探讨了让汽车更加社会责任化带来的负面影响。这篇文章的初版曾在最近的一次消费者研究研讨会上作为“科学与监管”主题的一部分进行了展示。（参见《近期法规背后的科学受到质疑》，《消费者研究》，1991年7月。）——编者注
foreignization: 在国会和联邦监管机构做了很多工作来“文明化”汽车；通过使其污染更少、更高效、更安全。然而，这些改进并非没有给消费者带来成本。在下文中，Lave博士考察了使汽车更具社会责任感的缺点。本文的一个版本曾在最近的一次消费者研究研讨会上关于“科学与监管”的会议上提出。（参见“最近法规背后的科学受到质疑”，CR，1991年7月。）- 编者注。

source: Astronomers from the University of Hull thought that figure seemed high , so they scanned a young , massive cluster 5,000 light years away using Europe 's ground-based Very Large Telescope ( VLT ) . Surprisingly , they found that the density of brown dwarfs could be even higher , with up to 100 billion of them in the Milky Way . That 's a lot , because researchers think our galaxy only holds up to 100 billion to 400 billion stars of all types , total .
domestication: 赫尔大学的天文学家觉得这个数字有点高，于是他们用欧洲地基超大望远镜（VLT）扫描了5000光年外的一个年轻而庞大的星团。结果出乎意料，他们发现棕矮星的密度可能更高，银河系中可能有多达1000亿颗棕矮星。这可真是个天文数字，因为研究者认为我们整个银河系里所有类型的恒星加起来也只有1000亿到4000亿颗。
foreignization: 赫尔大学的天文学家认为这个数字似乎很高，因此他们使用欧洲地面甚大望远镜（VLT）扫描了5000光年外的一个年轻的大质量星团。令人惊讶的是，他们发现棕矮星的密度可能更高，银河系中可能有多达1000亿颗棕矮星。这很多，因为研究人员认为我们银河系总共只包含多达1000亿到4000亿颗各种类型的恒星。

That 's a lot , because researchers think our galaxy only holds up to 100 billion to 400 billion stars of all types , total .

source: " I definitely like something that has a bit of contrast . " the artist explains . " For instance , if I 'm painting a sheet on a clothesline , I exaggerate the background colors for vibrancy . I just did a painting of a pumpkin on a bench and the background , which is about 60 percent of the painting , is straight black . I like the way things seem to appear and disappear in paintings by Vermeer and Rembrandt , so in my newer works , I 've been losing things in the shadows . There is always something happening in the shadows . You ca n't ignore them . You have to figure out what the shadow colors are and observe the reflected light bouncing into them . "
domestication: 艺术家解释说：“我特别喜欢有点对比的东西。比如说，我在画晾衣绳上的床单时，就会把背景颜色夸张处理，让画面更加生动。最近我刚画了一幅长椅上的南瓜，背景占了大约60%的面积，全都是纯黑色的。我喜欢维米尔和伦勃朗画中那种若隐若现的效果，所以在我的新作品里，我也开始把东西藏在阴影里。阴影里总是有故事发生，你不能忽视它们。你得琢磨阴影的颜色，观察反射光是怎么映入其中的。”
foreignization: “我绝对喜欢有点对比的东西。”艺术家解释道。“例如，如果我在画晾衣绳上的床单，我会夸大背景颜色以增加鲜艳度。我刚画了一幅长椅上的南瓜，背景占了大约60%的画幅，完全是黑色的。我喜欢维米尔和伦勃朗画中事物似乎出现又消失的感觉，所以在我的新作品中，我一直在让事物在阴影中消失。阴影中总是在发生些什么。你不能忽略它们。你必须弄清楚阴影的颜色，并观察反射光如何进入其中。”

" I definitely like something that has a bit of contrast . " the artist explains . " For instance , if I 'm painting a sheet on a clothesline , I exaggerate the background colors for vibrancy . I just did a painting of a pumpkin on a bench and the background , which is about 60 percent of the painting , is straight black . I like the way things seem to appear and disappear in paintings by Vermeer and Rembrandt , so in my newer works , I 've been losing things in the shadows . There is always something happening in the shadows . You ca n't ignore them . You have to figure out what the shadow colors are and observe the reflected light bouncing into them . "

source: Organic products are still between 10 percent and 20 percent more expensive than nonorganic food , although in-season , local organic produce may not be any more expensive . If you ca n't afford to buy all organic , Snow suggests at least buying organic milk ( easy to find ) and buying meat that 's hormone- and antibiotic-free .

source: 5 . Transfer unwrapped dough to a parchment-lined work surface . Flatten dough slightly with your hand , and then top with a second sheet of parchment . ( Dust dough with flour if sticky . ) Using a rolling pin , roll out dough between sheets of parchment to about 1/8-inch thickness ; set aside . Remove plastic wrap from other dough half and repeat rolling process . Transfer dough , still sandwiched between parchment , to baking sheets and refrigerate until chilled , about 30 minutes .
domestication: 5. 把没包的面团放到铺了烘焙纸的工作台上，用手稍微按平，然后盖上第二张烘焙纸。（如果面团粘手，可以撒点面粉。）用擀面杖在两张烘焙纸之间把面团擀到大约1/8英寸厚；放一旁备用。去掉另一半面团的保鲜膜，重复擀面过程。将夹在烘焙纸中间的面团转移到烤盘上，放进冰箱冷藏大约30分钟，直到变凉。
foreignization: 5. 将未包裹的面团转移到铺有烘焙纸的工作台上。用手稍微压平面团，然后在上面盖上第二张烘焙纸。（如果面团粘手，可以撒上面粉。）使用擀面杖，将面团在两张烘焙纸之间擀至约1/8英寸的厚度；放一旁备用。取下另一片面团上的保鲜膜，重复擀制过程。将面团（仍然夹在烘焙纸之间）转移到烤盘上，放入冰箱冷藏至变凉，大约30分钟。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

5 . Transfer unwrapped dough to a parchment-lined work surface . Flatten dough slightly with your hand , and then top with a second sheet of parchment . ( Dust dough with flour if sticky . ) Using a rolling pin , roll out dough between sheets of parchment to about 1/8-inch thickness ; set aside . Remove plastic wrap from other dough half and repeat rolling process . Transfer dough , still sandwiched between parchment , to baking sheets and refrigerate until chilled , about 30 minutes .
5. 把没包的面团放到铺了烘焙纸的工作台上，用手稍微按平，然后盖上第二张烘焙纸。（如果面团粘手，可以撒点面粉。）用擀面杖在两张烘焙纸之间把面团擀到大约1/8英寸厚；放一旁备用。去掉另一半面团的保鲜膜，重复擀面过程。将夹在烘焙纸中间的面团转移到烤盘上，放进冰箱冷藏大约30分钟，直到变凉。

5 . Transfer unwrapped dough to a parchment-lined work surface . Flatten dough slightly with your hand , and then top with a second sheet of parchment . ( Dust dough with flour if sticky . ) Using a rolling pin , roll out dough between sheets of parchment to about 1/8-inch thickness ; set aside . Remove plastic wrap from other dough half and repeat rolling process . Transfer dough , still sandwiched between parchment , to baking sheets and refrigerate until chilled , about 30 minutes .
5. 将未包裹的面团转移到铺有烘焙纸的工作台上。用手稍微压平面团，然后在上面盖上第二张烘焙纸。（如果面团粘手，可以撒上面粉。）使用擀面杖，将面团在两张烘焙纸之间擀至约1/8英寸的厚度；放一旁备用。取下另一片面团上的保鲜膜，重复擀制过程。将面团（仍然夹在烘焙纸之间）转移到烤盘上，放入冰箱冷藏至变凉，大约30分钟。

source: The two tombs at Sipan date to approximately A. D. 300 , and those at San Jose de Moro at least four hundred years later -- sometime after A. D. 700 . This demonstrates that the Sacrifice Ceremony had a long duration in Moche culture , with individuals consistently dressing in the same traditional garments , ornaments , and headdresses . The ceremony was also widespread geographically . The Panamarca mural was found in the southern part of the Moche kingdom , more than 185 miles south of Sipan . Perhaps each of the river valleys that made up the Moche kingdom also had a central ceremonial precinct where the Sacrifice Ceremony was enacted .
domestication: 西潘的两座墓葬大约可追溯到公元300年，而圣何塞德莫罗的墓葬则晚了至少四百年，大概在公元700年之后。这说明摩奇文化中的献祭仪式延续时间很长，人们一直穿着同样的传统服饰、佩戴同样的首饰和头饰。这个仪式还遍布广泛。帕纳马尔卡的壁画是在摩奇王国南部发现的，距离西潘有185英里之遥。或许，构成摩奇王国的每条河谷都有一个中心仪式区，在那里举行献祭仪式。
foreignization: 西潘的两座墓葬可追溯到公元300年左右，而圣何塞德莫罗的墓葬则至少晚四百年——公元700年之后。这表明祭祀仪式在莫切文化中持续了很长一段时间，人们一直穿着相同的传统服饰、饰物和头饰。该仪式在地理上也分布广泛。帕纳马尔卡壁画发现于莫切王国南部，距西潘以南超过185英里。或许构成莫切王国的每个河谷也都拥有一个中央仪式区，在那里举行祭祀仪式。

The two tombs at Sipan date to approximately A. D. 300 , and those at San Jose de Moro at least four hundred years later -- sometime after A. D. 700 . The ceremony was also widespread geographically . The Panamarca mural was found in the southern part of the Moche kingdom , more than 185 miles south of Sipan . Perhaps each of the river valleys that made up the Moche kingdom also had a central ceremonial precinct where the Sacrifice Ceremony was enacted .

source: In May 1917 Dove wrote to Stieglitz , " I hope to be painting again by the first of June . . . but the future for anything here does n't look very bright . " It was not very bright for Stieglitz , either . The entry of the United States into World War I , coupled with increasing financial pressures , led to Stieglitz 's closing 291 just when Dove wrote to him . Dove was psychologically dependent on Stieglitz , who introduced and controlled all of his work , and the existence of the gallery guaranteed a safe harbor for it . The demise of 291 must have devastated Dove -- he exhibited only sparsely until Stieglitz returned to dealing in 1925 .
domestication: 1917年5月， Dove给Stieglitz写信说：“希望6月初能重新开始画画……但这里的情况看起来不太乐观。”Stieglitz的前景也不容乐观。美国参战加上经济压力越来越大，导致Stieglitz不得不在Dove给他写这封信的时候关闭了291画廊。Dove在精神上十分依赖Stieglitz，所有作品的展出和销售都是由Stieglitz一手操办，画廊的存在就像他的避风港。291画廊的关闭对Dove来说无疑是个沉重打击——直到1925年Stieglitz重操旧业，他才偶尔展出一些作品。
foreignization: 1917年5月，多夫写信给斯蒂格利茨：“我希望能在6月1日前重新开始绘画……但这里的一切前景看起来并不光明。” 对斯蒂格利茨来说，前景也不光明。美国加入第一次世界大战，加上不断增加的财政压力，导致斯蒂格利茨在多夫给他写信时关闭了291画廊。多夫在心理上依赖于斯蒂格利茨，后者介绍并掌控了他所有的作品，而画廊的存在为他的作品提供了一个安全的港湾。291画廊的消亡一定让多夫深受打击——直到1925年斯蒂格利茨重新从事艺术交易，他才稀疏地展出作品。

In May 1917 Dove wrote to Stieglitz , " I hope to be painting again by the first of June . . . but the future for anything here does n't look very bright . " It was not very bright for Stieglitz , either . The entry of the United States into World War I , coupled with increasing financial pressures , led to Stieglitz 's closing 291 just when Dove wrote to him . Dove was psychologically dependent on Stieglitz , who introduced and controlled all of his work , and the existence of the gallery guaranteed a safe harbor for it . The demise of 291 must have devastated Dove -- he exhibited only sparsely until Stieglitz returned to dealing in 1925 .

source: That analysis begs the question of whether trigger warnings help or hurt the traumatized , or have no effect , a matter that is hotly contested . But with elite high schools increasingly acculturating students to social-justice jargon as a form of college prep , it is likely that at least some incoming freshmen shared that reading of the letter .
domestication: 这种分析引出了一个问题：触发警告究竟是帮助了心理创伤者，还是伤害了他们，又或者根本没有影响，这个问题争议很大。但随着精英高中越来越多地将社会正义术语作为大学入学准备的一部分灌输给学生，至少部分新生对这封信的解读可能是相同的。

source: How much does it cost a hospital to perform an appendectomy ? Outside the United States , it is doubtful that any public hospital knows . Nor do government-run hospitals typically keep records that would allow anyone else to find out . In organizational skills and managerial efficiency , Canadian hospitals are far behind hospitals run by Hospital Corporation of America , Humana , or American Medical International . In fact , Canadian hospitals in several provinces have called in management groups from the United States either to retrieve them from financial difficulty or to improve their financial performance generally .
domestication: 一家医院做阑尾手术得花多少钱？在美国之外，恐怕没有哪家公立医院能说得清楚。政府办的医院通常也不会留有能让别人查出这些费用的记录。论组织能力和管理效率，加拿大的医院远不如美国医院集团、胡玛纳或美国医疗国际等公司经营的医院。事实上，加拿大好几个省的医院都请来了美国的管理团队，要么是为了摆脱财务困境，要么是为了整体提升财务表现。
foreignization: 一家医院进行阑尾切除手术需要多少费用？在美国以外的地方，任何公立医院可能都不知道。政府运营的医院通常也不会保存可以让其他人查明这些信息的记录。在组织能力和管理效率方面，加拿大医院远落后于美国医院公司、胡玛纳或美国医疗国际等公司经营的医院。事实上，加拿大几个省份的医院已经请来了美国的管理团队，要么是为了让他们摆脱财务困境，要么是为了总体上改善其财务表现。

How much does it cost a hospital to perform an appendectomy ? Outside the United States , it is doubtful that any public hospital knows . In organizational skills and managerial efficiency , Canadian hospitals are far behind hospitals run by Hospital Corporation of America , Humana , or American Medical International . In fact , Canadian hospitals in several provinces have called in management groups from the United States either to retrieve them from financial difficulty or to improve their financial performance generally .

source: Andrew Meieran , president of Albion Pacific Properties : Choose potential partners both by the technology they offer and by their financials . Make sure they have the capital to do their part . Then , ask the right questions of the people who have the authority to respond , and get all aspects of the deal in writing .
domestication: 阿尔比恩太平洋物业的总裁安德鲁·梅厄说：挑选潜在合作伙伴时，既要看他们提供的技术，也要看他们的财务状况，确保他们有实力履行自己的部分。接下来，要向有权拍板的人问对问题，并且要把交易的所有方面都落实到纸上。
foreignization: 安德鲁·米埃兰，阿尔比恩太平洋地产公司总裁：选择潜在合作伙伴时，既要考虑他们提供的技术，也要考虑他们的财务状况。确保他们有足够的资金来履行自己的部分。然后，向有权限回应的人提出正确的问题，并将交易的所有方面以书面形式确定下来。

source: Slusser : I have nothing but praise for the A 's , and the Royals and the Rays are two other clubs with spectacularly good PR departments . In fact , almost all of the league PR folks are pros ' pros , but sometimes their owners or GMs are n't media friendly or are just clueless about the nature of our jobs , and that makes it tough for some of these excellent folks to do their jobs well .
domestication: 斯莱瑟说：我对A队只有赞美之词，皇家队和光芒队的公关部门也是一绝。其实，联盟里大部分球队的公关团队都是行家里手，但有时他们的老板或总经理对媒体不太友好，或者根本不懂我们这行的门道，这就让这些优秀的公关人员工作起来困难重重。
foreignization: 斯卢瑟：我对A队只有赞美之词，而皇家队和光芒队也是另外两个拥有极其出色的公关部门的俱乐部。事实上，几乎所有的联赛公关人员都是专业人士中的佼佼者，但有时他们的老板或总经理并不友善对待媒体，或者对我们工作的性质一无所知，这使得这些优秀的人士难以很好地完成他们的工作。

source: But the forces working against Epstein are beginning to coalesce into something larger . It 's not just the victims and their stories or Edwards and his lawsuits anymore . It 's also Ward , and her memories of the allegations she heard that never got published . It 's an ongoing congressional inquiry . It 's New York prosecutors who finally decided to do their jobs . It 's #MeToo , and the way it shifted sexual abuse from the gossip columns to the front page , making room for long-form reporting about sexual exploitation committed by famous men . The imbalance of power Epstein and his ilk have relied upon has n't been reversed , but it 's certainly starting to shift .  Support our journalism

source: People today might not actually be avoiding social interaction any more than they did in past decades , but they 're certainly more vocal about it . The rise of digital communication seems to be spawning a nation of indoor cats , all humble-bragging about how introverted they are and ordering their rides and groceries without ever talking to a human .
domestication: 现在的人可能并没有比过去几十年更回避社交，但他们确实更愿意谈论这一点了。随着数字通信的兴起，好像大家都成了宅家的猫咪，一个个谦虚地吹嘘自己有多内向，连打车买菜都不愿意跟真人说上一句话。
foreignization: 今天的人们实际上可能并没有比过去几十年更回避社交互动，但他们对此的表达确实更加大声了。数字通信的兴起似乎正在孕育一个宅猫国度，所有人都在谦虚地吹嘘自己多么内向，并且在不与任何人交谈的情况下订购乘车和杂货。

source: The idea with the drive bays is that you re supposed to put a 1.2MB floppy drive in one of the 5/4-inch bays , a CD-ROM drive in the other , a 1.44MB floppy drive in the first 3 1/2-inch bay , and a 3 1/2 inch IDE drive in the last bay . It 's not an optimal arrangement , in my view , as the 3 1/2 inch bay is off-center and rotated 90 degrees from its normal orientation . leading most users to assume that the 5 1/4 inch drive is the A drive . Also , there s no place for a second hard disk But it 's an acceptable case . and indeed it s the case that 's most popular among cloners these days for a desktop PC .
domestication: 这些驱动器位的设计初衷是这样的：你得在其中一个5.25英寸的槽位里装个1.2MB的软驱，在另一个槽位里装个CD-ROM光驱；在第一个3.5英寸的槽位里装个1.44MB的软驱，最后一个槽位里则装个3.5英寸的IDE硬盘。可我觉得这布局不太合理，因为3.5英寸的槽位偏了点，还转了90度，跟常规摆放不一样，导致大多数用户以为5.25英寸的槽位才是A盘。另外，这设计里也没留地方给第二个硬盘。不过，这机箱还能凑合用，而且现在组装台式机时，这种机箱是最受欢迎的。
foreignization: 关于驱动器槽位的设想是，你应在其中一个5.25英寸槽位中安装一个1.2MB软驱，在另一个槽位中安装一个CD-ROM驱动器，在第一个3.5英寸槽位中安装一个1.44MB软驱，在最后一个槽位中安装一个3.5英寸IDE驱动器。在我看来，这不是一个最佳布局，因为3.5英寸槽位偏离中心并且从正常位置旋转了90度，导致大多数用户认为5.25英寸驱动器是A盘。此外，没有地方放置第二个硬盘。但这是一个可接受的机箱，事实上，这在当今桌面PC克隆者中最受欢迎的机箱。

It 's not an optimal arrangement , in my view , as the 3 1/2 inch bay is off-center and rotated 90 degrees from its normal orientation . leading most users to assume that the 5 1/4 inch drive is the A drive . source: Dragon Quest became the prototypical JRPG when it launched on the Nintendo Famicom in 1986 . Its first two sequels formed the Erdrick Trilogy , cementing Enix as a role-playing powerhouse . All three games will be making their way to the Nintendo Switch on September 27th to coincide with the latest release in the series , Dragon Quest XI S : Echos of an Elusive Age .
domestication: 1986年，当《勇者斗恶龙》在任天堂FC上首发时，就成为了日式角色扮演游戏的开山鼻祖。头两部续作组成了《埃尔德里克三部曲》，让ENIX一跃成为角色扮演领域的巨头。这三款经典游戏将于9月27日登陆Nintendo Switch，正好赶上系列最新作《勇者斗恶龙XI S：寻觅逝去的时光》的发布。
foreignization: 《勇者斗恶龙》在1986年登陆任天堂FC红白机时成为了JRPG的原型。其前两部续作构成了埃尔德里克三部曲，奠定了ENIX在角色扮演领域的强大地位。这三款游戏将于9月27日登陆Nintendo Switch，以配合系列最新作品《勇者斗恶龙XI S：消失的时代的回声》的发布。

source: Daguerreotypes -- photos made with a process that used mercury vapors on an iodine-sensitized silvered plate -- break down quite easily . The result is a fogged plate that , more often that not , is completely ruined by time and mistreatment . However , researchers at Western University have created a system that uses synchrotrons and " rapid-scanning micro-X-ray fluorescence imaging " to scan the plates for eight hours . The system shot an X-ray 10 ? 10 microns thick at " an energy most sensitive to mercury absorption . " This , in turn , showed the researchers where the mercury is most prevalent , thereby bringing up the image that was lost to damage or decay .
domestication: 达盖尔银版照片——这种照片是通过在碘感光的银板上使用水银蒸气制成的——非常容易损坏。结果往往是银板变得模糊不清，多数情况下，这些照片都因为时间的流逝和不当处理而彻底毁坏。不过，西方大学的研究人员开发出了一套系统，利用同步辐射和“快速扫描微X射线荧光成像”技术，对银板进行长达八小时的扫描。这套系统使用了10×10微米厚的X射线，以“最敏感于水银吸收”的能量照射。这样一来，研究人员就能看到水银分布最多的地方，从而恢复那些因损坏或老化而消失的图像。
foreignization: 达盖尔银版照片——使用汞蒸气在碘化银板上成像的过程制作的照片——非常容易分解。结果是一块起雾的板子，通常情况下，由于时间和不当处理而完全损坏。然而，西方大学的研究人员创建了一个系统，该系统使用同步加速器和“快速扫描微X射线荧光成像”技术，在八小时内扫描这些板子。该系统发射了一束10×10微米厚的X射线，“在最敏感于汞吸收的能量下。”这反过来显示了研究人员汞最集中的地方，从而恢复了因损坏或衰变而丢失的图像。

Daguerreotypes -- photos made with a process that used mercury vapors on an iodine-sensitized silvered plate -- break down quite easily . However , researchers at Western University have created a system that uses synchrotrons and " rapid-scanning micro-X-ray fluorescence imaging " to scan the plates for eight hours . The system shot an X-ray 10 ? 10 microns thick at " an energy most sensitive to mercury absorption . " This , in turn , showed the researchers where the mercury is most prevalent , thereby bringing up the image that was lost to damage or decay .

source: " When blocking in a painting , " he adds , " keep in mind that all pastels are water-soluble and will become more so if a few drops of alcohol -- rubbing , denatured , or even gin -- are added to the water . Brush over the pastel with a bristle brush dipped in water and create a solid underpainting without filling up too much of the paper 's tooth . This process works nicely with Canson Mi-Teintes paper , provided it is stretched and tacked to a board first . If the paper does buckle , spray the back lightly with water and restaple it to the board . The painting will dry as tight as a drum . "
domestication: 他说：“在画底色时，要记住所有粉彩都是可溶于水的，如果在水里加几滴酒精——无论是消毒酒精、变性酒精，甚至是杜松子酒——粉彩会更容易溶解。用硬毛刷蘸水在粉彩上轻轻刷过，形成坚实的底层，但不要把纸的纹理填得太满。这个方法特别适合康颂米坦纸，前提是先要把纸绷紧固定在木板上。如果纸张起了皱，就在背面轻轻喷点水，再重新固定到板上。这样，画干了之后就会像鼓面一样平整。”
foreignization: “在绘画中使用阻塞技法时，”他补充道，“请记住所有粉彩都是水溶性的，如果在水中加入几滴酒精——医用的、变性的或甚至是杜松子酒——它们会变得更加水溶性。用蘸有水的鬃毛刷在粉彩上涂抹，创建一个坚实的底色层，而不要填满太多纸张的纹理。这个过程与Canson Mi-Teintes纸配合得很好，前提是先将其拉伸并固定在板上。如果纸张变形了，轻轻喷些水在背面，然后重新钉到板上。画干后会像鼓面一样紧绷。”

messages_domestication.content:

" When blocking in a painting , " he adds , " keep in mind that all pastels are water-soluble and will become more so if a few drops of alcohol -- rubbing , denatured , or even gin -- are added to the water . Brush over the pastel with a bristle brush dipped in water and create a solid underpainting without filling up too much of the paper 's tooth . This process works nicely with Canson Mi-Teintes paper , provided it is stretched and tacked to a board first . If the paper does buckle , spray the back lightly with water and restaple it to the board . The painting will dry as tight as a drum . "

source: Job search site Indeed.com has its own list of criteria when pulling together its annual best jobs list ; namely , jobs that have an average base salary of at least $75,000 , at least 20 job postings per one million total postings , and positions that have seen the most growth , measured by increase in postings between 2015 and 2018 .
domestication: 招聘网站Indeed.com在编制年度最佳工作榜单时有一套自己的标准：首先，这些工作的平均基本薪资至少要达到7.5万美元；其次，每百万个职位发布中，至少要有20个相关岗位；最后，这些职位的增长速度要最快，这通过2015年到2018年间职位发布的增长量来衡量。

source: Smartphones have allowed millions to become amateur photographers , but capturing the perfect picture can still be difficult under certain conditions . So , imagine trying to capture an image of a 3-D object while simultaneously moving at almost a mile per second . The light source over 93 million miles away and the entire surface must also be accurately mapped topographically down to a level of 100 feet .
domestication: 智能手机让数百万人成了业余摄影师，但在某些条件下，拍出完美的照片还是挺难的。想象一下，要在几乎每秒一英里的速度下拍摄一个三维物体，光源远在9300万英里之外，还得把整个表面地形精确到100英尺，这得多不容易啊！

source: - ' With the cutting-edge genome sequencing technology , we can decode the genomes for hundreds of species , which was impossible before . By comparing the genomes of the different species , we are now able to answer controversial questions about their evolution . We can detect genes that are essential for the anatomical hallmarks of the ruminants , such as the multi-chambered stomach and headgear . These are found nowhere else in the animal kingdom ' , says another of the project leaders , Professor Guojie Zhang from Department of Biology , University of Copenhagen .
domestication: 借助最尖端的基因组测序技术，我们现在能解码成百上千个物种的基因组，这在以前是想都不敢想的事。通过对比不同物种的基因组，我们如今能够解答一些关于它们进化的争议问题。比如，我们能找出对反刍动物特有解剖特征至关重要的基因，像多室胃和头部装备，这些在整个动物界都是独一无二的。这是项目另一位负责人、哥本哈根大学生物系的张国杰教授说的。
foreignization: '借助尖端的基因组测序技术，我们现在可以解码数百个物种的基因组，这在过去是不可能的。通过比较不同物种的基因组，我们现在能够回答关于它们进化的一些有争议的问题。我们可以检测到对于反刍动物的解剖特征至关重要的基因，例如多室胃和头部装备。这些在动物界其他地方是找不到的'，来自哥本哈根大学生物系的项目负责人之一张国杰教授说。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

- ' With the cutting-edge genome sequencing technology , we can decode the genomes for hundreds of species , which was impossible before . By comparing the genomes of the different species , we are now able to answer controversial questions about their evolution . We can detect genes that are essential for the anatomical hallmarks of the ruminants , such as the multi-chambered stomach and headgear . These are found nowhere else in the animal kingdom ' , says another of the project leaders , Professor Guojie Zhang from Department of Biology , University of Copenhagen .
借助最尖端的基因组测序技术，我们现在能解码成百上千个物种的基因组，这在以前是想都不敢想的事。通过对比不同物种的基因组，我们如今能够解答一些关于它们进化的争议问题。比如，我们能找出对反刍动物特有解剖特征至关重要的基因，像多室胃和头部装备，这些在整个动物界都是独一无二的。这是项目另一位负责人、哥本哈根大学生物系的张国杰教授说的。

source: Some old homeowner 's policies pose a particularly significant risk , called implied co-insurance . This comes from the standard provision in most homeowner 's policies that the insurance company will not cover a portion of any loss greater than the proportion of the existing policy limit to the market value of the insured house .
domestication: 一些老的房屋保险政策存在一个特别大的风险，叫作隐性共保。这源自大多数房屋保险条款中的一项标准规定：如果房屋的实际价值高于保单限额，保险公司不会赔付超出保单限额与房屋市场价值比例的部分损失。简单来说，就是如果你的保险额度不够高，损失超过了一定比例，保险公司是不会全额赔偿的。
foreignization: 一些旧的房主保险政策存在一种特别显著的风险，称为隐含共保。这来源于大多数房主保险政策中的标准条款，即保险公司不会覆盖任何损失中超过现有保单限额与投保房屋市场价值比例的部分。

source: Kurz has exhibited her paintings nationally and internationally , and her artwork is in numerous private and corporate collections . In addition to her Fulbright fellowship , she has received numerous awards and grants , including those from the New York Foundation for the Arts , and has had residencies at New Hampshire 's MacDowell Colony , the Millay Colony for the Arts in Austerlitz , New York , the Vermont Studio Colony and Yaddo in Saratoga Springs , New York . Last year , her flower paintings were exhibited at the Brooklyn Botanic Gardens . She recently had a solo show at the Thomas Center Gallery in Gainesville , Florida .

source: Ahh , the " powerful yet corrupting object " episode . Every show that has superpowers or magic or enhanced abilities will also involve , sooner or later , the characters encountering an object that provides even more intense power , at the cost of your sanity or morals or health or something . Here , in " Stuck in the Metal with You , " the victim is Rocket , the corrupting object is the Asgardian Destroyer Armor , the power is basically Iron Man-times-infinity , and the cost is Rocket 's ( relative ) chill . It 's an episode type that has been done to death , but it makes for a good test for Guardians at this point : can the show do a cliche episode , but do it well ? The answer is surprisingly yes , signaling Guardians is finally settling down into the show it always meant to be , allowing it to tackle even generic plotlines with a certain amount of enjoyability .
domestication: 哎呀，这又是“强大却腐化的宝物”那一套了。但凡有超能力、魔法或者特殊技能的剧集，迟早都会来这么一出：主角们碰到一个能提供更强大能力的物件，代价嘛，要么是精神崩溃，要么是道德沦丧，或者是身体受损什么的。在这集《金属中的你》里，中招的是火箭，那件腐化宝物就是阿斯加德毁灭者盔甲，这东西简直是钢铁侠级别的加强版，而火箭付出的代价就是他那（相对而言）的冷静。这种剧情设定已经烂大街了，不过对于《银河护卫队》来说，倒是不错的考验：能不能把老套路拍得精彩？结果还真让人意外地满意，说明《银河护卫队》终于找到了自己的定位，即使是陈词滥调的故事，也能拍得有声有色。
foreignization: 啊，这个“强大但腐蚀人心的物品”情节。每一部拥有超能力、魔法或增强能力的剧集，迟早都会涉及到角色们遇到一个能提供更加强大能量的物品，但要付出精神、道德、健康或其他方面的代价。在这里，《金属中的你》中，受害者是火箭，腐蚀性的物品是阿斯加德毁灭者盔甲，力量基本上相当于无限倍的钢铁侠，而代价是火箭（相对）的冷静。这种情节类型已经被用滥了，但对于守护者来说，这是一次不错的考验：这部剧能否将陈词滥调的情节处理得很好？答案出人意料地是肯定的，这表明《守护者》终于开始成为它一直以来想要成为的剧集，即使处理一些通用的情节线也能有一定的观赏性。

source: The information blackout on financial institutions has been so severe that even law enforcement officials have had trouble getting the information they need to stop crooks . Jim Watson , one of the California attorney general 's top narcotics officers , said that two years ago he could n't even get the Federal Reserve to tell him whether banks in its Los Angeles region were sending a lot more cash back to the Reserve than they were taking and , hence , possibly laundering drug money . The Reserve now acknowledges that Los Angeles area banks do have large cash surpluses , but it still wo n't release cash totals for individual banks . Reserve spokesman Ron Supinski says the secrecy stems from " a business relationship . The banks do n't want that released , and the Federal Reserve does not want it released , so it 's not released . "
domestication: 对金融机构的信息封锁严重到连执法人员都难以获取打击犯罪所需的信息。加州总检察长的高级缉毒官员吉姆·沃森说，两年前他甚至无法让美联储告诉他，洛杉矶地区的银行是否比提取更多现金存回美联储，从而可能在洗钱。现在，美联储承认洛杉矶地区的银行确实存在大量现金盈余，但仍然不愿公布各银行的具体现金总额。美联储发言人罗恩·苏皮斯基表示，这种保密源于“商业关系。银行不想公开这些信息，美联储也不想公开，所以就不公开了。”
foreignization: 对金融机构的信息封锁已经如此严重，以至于就连执法官员也难以获得他们需要的信息来阻止罪犯。Jim Watson，加州总检察长的顶级毒品官员之一，表示两年前他甚至无法让联邦储备银行告诉他，洛杉矶地区的银行是否比提取的现金多退回了大量现金，因此可能在洗钱。美联储现在承认，洛杉矶地区的银行确实存在大量现金盈余，但仍然不会公布个别银行的现金总额。美联储发言人Ron Supinski说，这种保密源于“一种商业关系。银行不希望这些信息被公开，而联邦储备银行也不希望这些信息被公开，所以这些信息就不会被公开。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The information blackout on financial institutions has been so severe that even law enforcement officials have had trouble getting the information they need to stop crooks . Jim Watson , one of the California attorney general 's top narcotics officers , said that two years ago he could n't even get the Federal Reserve to tell him whether banks in its Los Angeles region were sending a lot more cash back to the Reserve than they were taking and , hence , possibly laundering drug money . The Reserve now acknowledges that Los Angeles area banks do have large cash surpluses , but it still wo n't release cash totals for individual banks . Reserve spokesman Ron Supinski says the secrecy stems from " a business relationship . The banks do n't want that released , and the Federal Reserve does not want it released , so it 's not released . "

source: " Reagan was successful because he was not a member of the governing establishment when he came into office , and he was not a member when he left office , " says Minority Whip Newt Gingrich , whose just-released tax package was designed in part to get the President back on track . " George Bush is a member of that governing establishment , and his success will be to change that system . The next sixty days will be crucial in determining whether Bush will govern with the American people and coercing the Left or with the Left coercing the people . "

source: 4 . Transfer unwrapped dough to a parchment-lined work surface . Flatten dough slightly with your hand , and then top with a second sheet of parchment . domestication: 4. 把没有包装的面团放到铺了烘焙纸的工作台上，用手稍微压平，再盖上一张烘焙纸。（如果面团粘手，可以撒点面粉。）用擀面杖在两张烘焙纸中间把面团擀到大约1/16英寸厚；然后放一旁备用。去掉另一片面团上的保鲜膜，重复擀面过程。把夹在烘焙纸中间的面团移到烤盘上，放入冰箱冷藏约30分钟，直到变凉。

source: The most common justification for women-specific bikes is heard daily in bike shops around the country , dogmatically declared on web forums and sites , and has even appeared in the pages of ­ BICYCLING : Women have proportionally longer legs and shorter torsos than men , and therefore need shorter top tubes . Too bad it 's inaccurate . Many women may well benefit from a bike with a shorter top tube , but it 's not because the torso dogma is true .

source: The whips come down hard at the Basement in Dallas , an underground club where the last night of every weekend is celebrated as Sadistic Sunday . This particular October evening , several dominatrixes in body paint lash a patron 's bare back with their riding crops , dig their nails into his shoulder blades , then pour vinegar into the wounds before rubbing honey and pillow feathers over his upper torso .
domestication: 在达拉斯的地下室俱乐部，每个周末的最后一个夜晚都会举行“施虐星期天”。这天晚上，几位身穿彩绘紧身衣的女主宰用马鞭狠狠抽打一位顾客的裸背，接着用指甲掐进他的肩胛骨，然后往伤口上倒醋，最后在他的上半身抹上蜂蜜，撒上枕羽。
foreignization: 鞭子在达拉斯的地下室狠狠地落下，这是一个地下俱乐部，每个周末的最后一晚都被庆祝为施虐星期天。在这个特定的十月夜晚，几名身穿身体彩绘的女支配者用马鞭抽打一位顾客的裸露背部，用指甲抠进他的肩胛骨，然后将醋倒入伤口，再在他的上半身涂上蜂蜜并撒上枕头羽毛。

source: Although the eight mainstem dams on the lower Columbia and Snake rivers were designed with somewhat useful fish ladders for returning adults , there was virtually no thought given to outmigrating juveniles . Smolts , which used to be flushed to the sea with the high spring runoff , now face a long , stressful journey through a series of warm , slackwater reservoirs teeming with predators . And getting past the dams themselves is tricky as well , with power-generating turbines injuring , stunning , and killing young fish .
domestication: 尽管哥伦比亚河和蛇河下游的八座主干水坝建有还算有用的成鱼洄游通道，但对幼鱼的出海迁徙几乎没怎么考虑。过去，随着春季高水位的泄洪，幼鲑能够顺畅地被冲向大海，如今却要经历一段漫长而充满压力的旅程，穿过一系列温暖、水流缓慢的水库，这些水库里还潜伏着大量的捕食者。此外，幼鱼要想通过水坝本身也是一大难题，发电涡轮机不仅会伤害、还会使幼鱼晕眩甚至致死。
foreignization: 尽管在下哥伦比亚河和蛇河干流上的八个主要水坝设计时考虑了对回游成年鱼较为有用的鱼道，但几乎没有考虑到出游的幼鱼。过去随着高春季洪水冲向海洋的幼鲑现在面临着穿越一系列温暖、滞水的水库的漫长而压力重重的旅程，这些水库中充满了捕食者。而且，通过水坝本身也是困难重重，发电涡轮机会造成幼鱼受伤、昏迷甚至死亡。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Although the eight mainstem dams on the lower Columbia and Snake rivers were designed with somewhat useful fish ladders for returning adults , there was virtually no thought given to outmigrating juveniles . Smolts , which used to be flushed to the sea with the high spring runoff , now face a long , stressful journey through a series of warm , slackwater reservoirs teeming with predators . And getting past the dams themselves is tricky as well , with power-generating turbines injuring , stunning , and killing young fish .
尽管哥伦比亚河和蛇河下游的八座主干水坝建有还算有用的成鱼洄游通道，但对幼鱼的出海迁徙几乎没怎么考虑。过去，随着春季高水位的泄洪，幼鲑能够顺畅地被冲向大海，如今却要经历一段漫长而充满压力的旅程，穿过一系列温暖、水流缓慢的水库，这些水库里还潜伏着大量的捕食者。此外，幼鱼要想通过水坝本身也是一大难题，发电涡轮机不仅会伤害、还会使幼鱼晕眩甚至致死。

source: An Atlantic analysis of the latest census data shows that the House districts represented by the two parties overwhelmingly track the same demographic and economic fissures that guided the fierce presidential race between Donald Trump and Hillary Clinton . This widening chasm between the two sides will shape both the legislative debate over the coming two years and the next competition for control of the House in the 2018 midterm elections .  Mirror Images
domestication: 大西洋杂志对最新人口普查数据的分析显示，两党代表的众议院选区几乎映射了唐纳德·特朗普和希拉里·克林顿激烈总统竞选时相同的种族和经济裂痕。这道越来越宽的鸿沟将影响未来两年的立法辩论，也将决定2018年中期选举中谁将掌控众议院的较量。真是镜像般的对立啊。
foreignization: 《大西洋月刊》对最新人口普查数据的分析显示，两党所代表的众议院选区在很大程度上反映了指导唐纳德·特朗普和希拉里·克林顿之间激烈总统竞选的相同的人口和经济裂痕。这一双方之间的日益扩大的鸿沟将塑造未来两年的立法辩论，以及2018年中期选举中对众议院控制权的下一次争夺。镜像映射

source: When the $13 billion insurance subsidiaries of Los Angeles-based First Executive Corp . were taken over by state regulators in New York and California in April , most Americans did n't much care . But as they see how the junk-bond-driven debacle could eventually cost them -- even if they never heard of First Executive until now -- they 'll start caring a lot . The public , you included , could end up paying higher state taxes , forking over more in life insurance premiums or getting lower rates of return on policies and annuities .
domestication: 四月时，总部位于洛杉矶的First Executive Corp的130亿美元保险子公司被纽约和加州的州监管机构接管，大多数美国人并没有太在意。但当他们意识到这场由垃圾债券引发的灾难最终可能会影响到自己时——即使之前从未听说过First Executive——他们就会开始关注了。包括你在内，公众可能会面临更高的州税，支付更多的人寿保险费，或者从保单和年金中获得的回报率降低。
foreignization: 当洛杉矶的First Executive Corp.旗下的130亿美元保险子公司在四月份被纽约和加利福尼亚州的监管机构接管时，大多数美国人并不太在意。但随着他们看到这次由垃圾债券引发的灾难最终可能会对他们造成影响——即使他们直到现在才听说First Executive——他们会开始非常关心。公众，包括你在内，最终可能要支付更高的州税，缴纳更多的寿险保费，或从保单和年金中获得更低的回报率。

source: Later , Hudson was supervising Sonic 's $31 million public offering in 1991 . ( Most of the proceeds went to pay down bank debt . ) Within two years Hudson became chief operating officer , responsible for helping the company rediscover growth . He unloaded unprofitable divisions like the equipment sales unit , and pushed for modern computer systems to expedite accounting procedures and make better purchasing and sales projections .
domestication: 后来，哈德森在1991年负责监督索尼克3100万美元的公开募股。（大部分资金用来偿还银行债务了。）两年后，哈德森升任首席运营官，负责帮助公司重拾增长之路。他甩掉了像设备销售部门这样不赚钱的业务单元，推动引入现代化计算机系统，以加快会计流程，改进采购和销售预测。
foreignization: 后来，Hudson 在 1991 年监督了 Sonic 的 3100 万美元公开募股。(大部分收益用于偿还银行债务。) 在两年内，Hudson 成为首席运营官，负责帮助公司重新发现增长。他剥离了像设备销售部门这样的无利可图的部门，并推动采用现代计算机系统以加快会计程序并做出更好的采购和销售预测。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Later , Hudson was supervising Sonic 's $31 million public offering in 1991 . ( Most of the proceeds went to pay down bank debt . ) Within two years Hudson became chief operating officer , responsible for helping the company rediscover growth . He unloaded unprofitable divisions like the equipment sales unit , and pushed for modern computer systems to expedite accounting procedures and make better purchasing and sales projections .

source: You may want to offer your new cultivar directly to a seed company . Many of the smaller or family-owned seed companies are happy to introduce vegetables bred by amateurs . Choose just one seed company to approach , however . Testing and introducing a new cultivar is work , and the introducing company has no legal protection . If a new introduction is successful , many companies will offer it . The introducing company receives no reward for its work other than the satisfaction of being first to offer something special .

source: Despite the reduced of opportunity for life , the discovery is still exciting . Astronomers always thought that brown dwarf stars were out there , but never actually imaged one until 1994 thanks to improved infrared telescope imaging . In 2013 , a NASA team used the infrared cameras on the Spitzer and Hubble space telescopes , and found that there are up to 70 billion of them in the Milky Way galaxy .
domestication: 虽然生命存在的机会减少了，但这发现仍然让人激动。天文学家一直认为褐矮星存在，但直到1994年，得益于红外望远镜成像技术的提升，才首次拍到它们的真容。2013年，NASA的研究团队利用斯皮策和哈勃太空望远镜上的红外相机，发现银河系中竟然有多达700亿颗褐矮星。这数字真是让人目瞪口呆，证明了宇宙的奥秘无穷无尽。

source: Midwesterners and New Englanders yearning for a Sonic burger will have to wait , though . There are no imminent plans to go national . source: Given that The Magic School Bus was designed to teach kids science , Keesha -- with her skepticism of the non-scientific and her desire to lay out the facts -- is an invaluable resource . And when you go after her friends , she 'll go after you , Janet . Keesha is definitely an asset to the bus and despite not being the best character on the show , definitely the first pick in your " young children to take on random science adventures " draft .

source: Unusual in this category , Jamis offers an aluminum frame with slightly relaxed geometry and carbon seat-stays to damp road buzz . This bike is also available in a women 's configuration , offering a shorter reach and higher stem angle. -A.J.B .

source: Granted , it is difficult to live without friends and neighbors . So we sometimes dream of a friendly community springing up around us -- people who share similar ideals . Unfortunately , most people who come north are a transient breed . They seem to he holdovers from the gold rush era , and they want to head north , strike it rich , rape the land , and flee south again to the rewards of civilization . Meanwhile , we 'll continue to live in harmony with the wild , respecting the thousand and one creatures , understanding our own insignificance in the great scheme of things and loving this land that we have chosen to call home .
domestication: 没有朋友和邻居的日子确实难熬。所以有时候我们会梦想周围能出现一个友好和睦的社区——大家有着相似的理想。可惜的是，来北方的人大多都是匆匆过客。他们就像是淘金热时期的遗留者，一心想着北上发财，掠夺这片土地后，再南下享受文明带来的好处。而我们呢，会继续与大自然和谐共处，尊敬这里的千千万万生灵，明白自己在宇宙中的微不足道，热爱这片我们选择作为家园的土地。
foreignization: 承认了，没有朋友和邻居很难生活。所以我们有时梦想着一个友好的社区在我们周围建立起来——与我们分享相似理想的人们。不幸的是，大多数来北方的人都是一群过客。他们似乎是淘金热时代的遗留者，他们想向北进发，发财致富，掠夺土地，然后再次南下逃回文明的怀抱。与此同时，我们将继续与荒野和谐共处，尊重千千万万的生灵，理解我们在伟大计划中的渺小，并热爱这片我们选择称之为家的土地。

承认了，没有朋友和邻居很难生活。所以我们有时梦想着一个友好的社区在我们周围建立起来——与我们分享相似理想的人们。不幸的是，大多数来北方的人都是一群过客。他们似乎是淘金热时代的遗留者，他们想向北进发，发财致富，掠夺土地，然后再次南下逃回文明的怀抱。与此同时，我们将继续与荒野和谐共处，尊重千千万万的生灵，理解我们在伟大计划中的渺小，并热爱这片我们选择称之为家的土地。

source: Even on minor matters , swift , decisive action is not a defining quality of state legislators . The Maryland Legislature , for instance , took 11 years to decide the less-than-vexing question of whether optometrists should administer diagnostic eye drops during ocular exams . Ophthalmologists , fearing encroachment on their turf , argued that the optometrists were n't qualified - even though 49 other states grant optometrists the right . State Senator John Bambacus calls the " eye-drops bill , " which became law last year , a " cash cow , " suggesting that the interminable length of debate was due to legislators ' eagerness to maintain the flow of campaign funds , restaurant meals and theater tickets provided by lobbyists on both sides of the issue . Maryland Delegate Royd Smith denies that contributions slowed the process , but cheerfully confesses that " my social life was not the same after I voted for that bill . '
domestication: 即使是处理小事，迅速果断也并不是州立法者的特点。比如，马里兰州的立法机构花了11年时间才决定了一件并不复杂的事——验光师在眼科检查时是否可以使用诊断眼药水。眼科医生担心自己的地盘被抢占，认为验光师没有资格做这件事，尽管其他49个州都允许验光师这样做。州参议员约翰·班巴卡斯称去年通过的“眼药水法案”是个“摇钱树”，暗示辩论拖延这么久是因为立法者们想继续从双方游说团体那里获得竞选资金、餐厅宴请和剧院票。马里兰州议员罗伊德·史密斯否认捐款拖慢了进程，但还是乐呵呵地说：“我投了赞成票之后，社交生活可就大不一样了。”
foreignization: 即使在小事情上，迅速果断的行动也不是州立法者的特点。例如，马里兰立法机构花了11年时间才决定验光师在眼科检查中是否应该使用诊断性眼药水这一不太棘手的问题。眼科医生担心自己的领域受到侵犯，认为验光师没有资格这样做——尽管其他49个州都授予了验光师这种权利。州参议员约翰·班巴卡斯称去年成为法律的“眼药水法案”为“摇钱树”，暗示辩论持续时间过长是由于立法者热衷于维持来自双方游说者的竞选资金、餐厅用餐和剧院门票的流动。马里兰州议员罗伊德·史密斯否认捐款减缓了进程，但欣然承认“我在投票支持该法案后，社交生活就不一样了。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even on minor matters , swift , decisive action is not a defining quality of state legislators . The Maryland Legislature , for instance , took 11 years to decide the less-than-vexing question of whether optometrists should administer diagnostic eye drops during ocular exams . Ophthalmologists , fearing encroachment on their turf , argued that the optometrists were n't qualified - even though 49 other states grant optometrists the right . State Senator John Bambacus calls the " eye-drops bill , " which became law last year , a " cash cow , " suggesting that the interminable length of debate was due to legislators ' eagerness to maintain the flow of campaign funds , restaurant meals and theater tickets provided by lobbyists on both sides of the issue . Maryland Delegate Royd Smith denies that contributions slowed the process , but cheerfully confesses that " my social life was not the same after I voted for that bill . '

source: A disappearance of sunspots would not in itself exert much effect on the overall warmth of the sun , so it should n't have had a major impact on Earth 's climate . But the sunspot deficiency could have been symptomatic of some change in the surfs total brightness - the so-called solar constant . Eddy suggested that the frigid conditions could have developed if the sun 's total radiation had dimmed by only 1 percent .
domestication: 太阳黑子消失本身对太阳的整体热量影响不大，因此对地球气候的影响也不会太明显。但太阳黑子的缺失可能反映出太阳总亮度——也就是所谓的“太阳常数”——发生了变化。艾迪认为，如果太阳的总辐射强度减弱了哪怕1%，就可能导致那种寒冷的天气。
foreignization: 太阳黑子的消失本身不会对太阳的整体热量产生很大影响，因此不应该对地球的气候有重大影响。但是，太阳黑子的缺乏可能是太阳总亮度（所谓的太阳常数）发生某些变化的症状。埃迪建议，如果太阳的总辐射仅减弱1％，那么寒冷的条件就可能形成。

Eddy suggested that the frigid conditions could have developed if the sun 's total radiation had dimmed by only 1 percent .

source: Motorcycles do n't have a " gait " anymore , but riding a Vincent is a little like riding a thoroughbred horse . The engine fires about once every lamppost . There 's a measurable heartbeat-like quality to the sound of the V-twin that does n't exist with a four-cylinder or a high-revving parallel twin . You accelerate and the engine goes **34;15755;TOOLONG ! ! !

source: IT CAN BE SURPRISINGLY difficult to find a herd of more than a million wildebeest roaming across the Serengeti , but sometimes the herd finds you . It is n't . Under a half-moon sky , the pounding of hooves and frog-like croaking of wildebeest envelope me . I poke my head out of the tent and watch in wonder . By sunrise , the horde

source: Vuillard 's portrait of Bonnard at work demonstrates that the precious victories in the struggle to make art depend , in large measure , on the ability of artists to enchant themselves , to put irrelevant distractions behind them . Often , this artistic self-enchantment takes place in studios like Bonnard 's , improvised in rooms that may revert at other times to bedrooms , children 's playrooms , or basements . In the final analysis , the studio is a magical space that is called into being from within . It is defined not by its furnishings or its lack of them but by the intensity of the artist 's vision in the moments of creation .
domestication: 维尔纳给博纳尔画的工作肖像展示了，艺术创作这场战斗中的宝贵胜利，很大程度上依赖于艺术家自我陶醉的能力，把无关的干扰抛在脑后。这种艺术上的自我沉迷，常常发生在博纳尔这样的工作室里，这些空间往往是临时拼凑出来的，平时可能当卧室、孩子的游戏室或是地下室用。说到底，工作室是个神奇的空间，是从内心召唤而来的。它不是靠家具或装饰来定义的，而是靠艺术家在创作瞬间的那份强烈愿景。
foreignization: Vuillard 对 Bonnard 工作时的肖像画证明了在艺术创作斗争中取得的宝贵胜利在很大程度上取决于艺术家自我迷恋的能力，将无关的干扰抛诸脑后。通常，这种艺术性的自我迷恋发生在像 Bonnard 的工作室这样的地方，这些工作室临时搭建在其他时候可能用作卧室、儿童游戏室或地下室的房间。归根结底，工作室是一个从内在召唤出来的神奇空间。它不是由其家具或缺乏家具来定义的，而是由艺术家在创作时刻的视野强度来定义的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Vuillard 's portrait of Bonnard at work demonstrates that the precious victories in the struggle to make art depend , in large measure , on the ability of artists to enchant themselves , to put irrelevant distractions behind them . Often , this artistic self-enchantment takes place in studios like Bonnard 's , improvised in rooms that may revert at other times to bedrooms , children 's playrooms , or basements . In the final analysis , the studio is a magical space that is called into being from within . It is defined not by its furnishings or its lack of them but by the intensity of the artist 's vision in the moments of creation .

source: These stereotypes are undoubtedly useful , but they have their downside . Their rules are broken in book after book . British writers drag the reader through London 's mean streets while Americans employ country-house settings . Women write hard-boiled private-eye novels about tough female detectives , and other women read them , while men turn out intricately plotted cozies .
domestication: 这些刻板印象固然有用，但也有其弊端。书接书，它们的规矩就被打破了。英国作家领着读者在伦敦的陋巷里转悠，美国作家却偏爱乡村别墅的背景。女性作家写硬汉派侦探小说，主角是强悍的女侦探，而女性读者也津津有味地读这些故事；男作家则玩起了情节错综复杂的舒适推理小说。
foreignization: 这些刻板印象无疑是有用的，但它们也有其缺点。它们的规则在一本又一本书中被打破。英国作家带着读者穿过伦敦的贫民区街道，而美国作家则使用乡村庄园的背景。女性作家写硬汉侦探小说中的坚强女侦探，而其他女性则阅读这些小说，同时男性则创作出情节错综复杂的舒适推理小说。

source: There 's a view that entrepreneurship education is hampered by ambivalence ; some critics charge that it smacks of corporate control of public education . Still , inroads are being made . The Clinton administration 's School-to-Work Initiative is inspiring new business-education partnerships around the country . Two innovative economic and entrepreneurship education programs , KinderEconomy and Mini-Society , are being taught at **26;710;TOOLONG levels in an estimated 100,000 classrooms in 40-odd states . Nonprofit business-education organizations like Junior Achievement are upping enrollment in their elementary , middle , and high school programs every year . And entrepreneurship is flourishing as a topic of study at universities and business schools worldwide .
domestication: 有一种观点认为，创业教育受到了模棱两可的态度的阻碍；一些批评者指责这似乎是企业对公共教育的控制。不过，情况正在逐步改善。克林顿政府的“从学校到工作”倡议激励了全国各地新的商教合作。两个创新的经济和创业教育项目——KinderEconomy和Mini-Society——已经在大约40个州的10万多间教室里开展，覆盖了各个教育阶段。像青年成就这样的非营利性商教组织，每年都在增加其小学、初中和高中的项目参与人数。同时，创业已经成为世界各地大学和商学院的研究热门话题。

source: The basic sunscreening agent is the chemical para-aminobenzoic acid ( PABA ) . PABA is very effective against the sun 's burning ultraviolet-B rays ( those that contribute most directly to skin cancer ) and also provides minimal protection against ultraviolet-A rays . However , it can cause an allergic reaction in some people and may also stain fabrics .
domestication: 最基本的防晒成分是化学物质对氨基苯甲酸（PABA）。PABA 对太阳中导致晒伤的紫外线B（UVB）非常有效，这些紫外线与皮肤癌关系最直接，同时也能提供一些防紫外线A（UVA）的保护。不过，PABA 有可能引起某些人的过敏反应，还可能会染色衣物。

source: This free-form puzzle game has players drawing paths to guide the flocking spirits to their home planets . It 's both beautiful and -- thanks to its soundtrack -- calming . Frost uses Metal technology to create its smooth animations , and takes advantage of other technologies like multi-touch . This is the second win for the team , which previously won for their game Blek .
domestication: 这款自由形式的解谜游戏让玩家绘制路径，引导成群的小精灵回到它们的家园星球。这游戏既漂亮又因为背景音乐而让人感到宁静。《霜》利用了Metal技术，创造了流畅的动画效果，还充分利用了多点触控等其他技术。这是该团队第二次获奖，他们之前凭借《Blek》这款游戏已经拿过一次奖了。

source: A long story by Gary Baum in the Hollywood Reporter reveals the mysterious Angelyne Llyne to have been born Renee Goldberg to a pair of Polish Holocaust survivors who , after the war , immigrated to Israel and then to Los Angeles . After a brief marriage to a Beverly Hills executive in the late 1960s , Goldberg 's paper trail ends , according to an anonymous , hobbyist genealogist who first tips off Baum .
domestication: Gary Baum 在《好莱坞报道者》上发表了一篇长文，揭开了神秘人物安吉琳·林的面纱。原来她本名是蕾妮·戈德堡，父母是波兰大屠杀的幸存者。战后，他们先移民到了以色列，后来又搬到了洛杉矶。据一位匿名的家谱爱好者透露，20世纪60年代末，蕾妮与一位比佛利山庄的高管短暂结过婚，之后她的行踪就销声匿迹了。
foreignization: 《好莱坞报道者》上Gary Baum的一篇长文揭示了神秘的Angelyne Llyne实际上是出生于一对波兰大屠杀幸存者的家庭，名为Renee Goldberg。战后，这对夫妇移民到以色列，然后又移居洛杉矶。据一位匿名的业余家谱学家首先向Baum透露，Goldberg在1960年代末与一位比佛利山庄的高管短暂结婚后，她的记录就中断了。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: It 's just after 9 in the morning , and 375 people , nearly all of them women , sit at rows of tables in quiet anticipation . In front of each is a bottle of water , a thick loose-leaf binder , and a paper tent printed with their names and hometowns : Boynton Beach , Florida ; Kodiak , Alaska ; Libby , Montana ; Traralgon , Australia ; Martha 's Vineyard ; San Diego .

source: PHOTO ( BLACK &; WHITE ) : By carefully moving the hexagonal magic wrist within its frictionless magnetic cushion , a researcher can precisely steer the STM tip over a sample 's surface . source: But a youth movement does n't address one pressing need : recruiting more mid-level and senior employees to counter the outflow of experienced , longtime employees . The government simply does n't have " the bench strength " to fill all its openings internally , warns a recent report from the nonpartisan Partnership for Public Service . " It is not enough to grow management from within while ignoring pools of talent from the outside . "

source: In the Latino community , older immigrants often were especially resistant to attending the support groups . This was partly because these older immigrants had been forced in their younger years to survive by their own wits , without benefiting from the social policies or services that are now focused on more recent immigrants . Often the only way to get the older people involved in the support groups was through their children or grandchildren who , because they were born here , are more familiar with the service system .
domestication: 在拉丁裔社区里，老一辈的移民往往特别抵触参加支持小组。这主要是因为他们在年轻时为了生存，不得不依靠自己的智慧和努力，没有享受到现在新一代移民能享受的社会政策和服务。通常，只有通过他们的子女或孙子孙女，这些在这里出生的人更熟悉服务系统，才能把这些老人拉进支持小组。
foreignization: 在拉美裔社区，老年移民往往特别抗拒参加支持小组。这 partly 是因为这些老年移民在年轻时被迫依靠自己的智慧生存，而没有受益于现在更多针对新移民的社会政策或服务。通常，让老年人参与支持小组的唯一方法是通过他们的子女或孙子孙女，因为他们在这里出生，更熟悉服务系统。

Often the only way to get the older people involved in the support groups was through their children or grandchildren who , because they were born here , are more familiar with the service system .

source: Mother Nature chills you out for a reason . Duhamel just turned 34 , which is hardly ancient , but it ai n't 24 , either . He considers two fistfuls of birthday candles a huge advantage in the battle for prosperity . And the earlier a guy figures this out , the better off he is . " These days I see more of a path toward what I want to do , " he says , " and what I feel like I 'm capable of doing . I know what it takes now to accomplish my goals . That 's the biggest thing . " Then he pauses and laughs . " And I appreciate downtime . Man , I really appreciate having a weekend to hang . " LEAD YOURSELF NOT INTO TEMPTATION
domestication: 大自然让你冷静下来，自有它的道理。杜哈梅尔刚过34岁生日，这年纪还算不上老，但也不算年轻了。他认为，吹灭两大把生日蜡烛，在追求成功路上是个大优势。男人要是早点明白这个道理，就更占上风了。“现在我更清楚自己想做什么，”他说，“也知道自己的能力范围。现在我知道要达成目标需要付出什么。这才是最重要的。”接着他停顿了一下，笑着说：“还有，我更加珍惜闲暇时光了。真的，能有个周末放松，真是太好了。”别让自己陷入诱惑。
foreignization: 大自然让你冷静下来是有原因的。杜哈梅尔刚刚34岁，这远非老态龙钟，但也不是24岁了。他认为生日蜡烛能拿两把是一大优势，有助于争取繁荣。一个人越早明白这一点，他就越好。“现在我更能看到一条通向我想做的事情的道路，”他说，“以及我认为自己有能力做的事情。我现在知道要实现目标需要什么。这是最重要的。”然后他停顿了一下，笑了起来。“而且我喜欢空闲时间。伙计，我真的很喜欢有一个周末可以放松。” 引导自己远离诱惑。

source: Kobayashi credits George B. Bridgman , a renowned instructor of anatomy at The Art Students League of New York , in Manhattan , for more than 50 years , for this approach to drawing the figure in which the human form is reduced to blocks wedged into other blocks . " His method was simple and easy , and the blocks showed the direction of the different elements of the body , " he explained . " This approach lets you get the skeleton right without worrying too much about the muscles -- which works for my kind of painting . " Kobayashi recommended that students purchase copies of Bridgman 's books for reference : Bridgman 's Complete Guide to Drawing From Life ( Sterling Publications , New York , New York ) ; Heads , Figures and Faces ( Dover Publications , Mineola , New York ) ; Constructive Anatomy ( Dover Publications , Mineola , New York ) .
domestication: 小林把这种人体绘画的方法归功于乔治·B·布里奇曼，这位在纽约曼哈顿的艺术学生联盟教解剖学的著名导师，在那里教了五十多年。他这种方法简单易懂，把人体分解成一块块，再把这些块嵌入其他块中，小林解释说：“他的方法非常简便，这些块能清楚地显示出身体各部分的方向。”他还说：“这样画可以先把骨骼画准确，不用太担心肌肉的问题，正适合我这种风格的绘画。”小林建议学生们买一些布里奇曼的书作为参考，比如《布里奇曼人体绘画完全指南》、《头部、人物与面部》和《结构解剖学》，这些书都能从书店找到。
foreignization: 小林将这种将人体简化为嵌入其他块中的块的方法归功于乔治·B·布里奇曼，他在曼哈顿的纽约艺术学生联盟担任解剖学讲师超过50年。“他的方法简单易懂，这些块显示了身体不同部分的方向，”他解释道。“这种方法让你可以在不必过多担心肌肉的情况下正确画出骨骼——这适合我这种类型的绘画。”小林建议学生们购买布里奇曼的书籍作为参考：《布里奇曼的人体写生完整指南》（Sterling Publications，纽约，纽约）；《头部、人物与面孔》（Dover Publications，米尼奥拉，纽约）；《构造解剖学》（Dover Publications，米尼奥拉，纽约）。

Bridgman , a renowned instructor of anatomy at The Art Students League of New York , in Manhattan , for more than 50 years , for this approach to drawing the figure in which the human form is reduced to blocks wedged into other blocks . source: The other master is an avenging angel on a radical mission : to transform Harvard College -- of all places ! -- into a utopian society , an egalitarian gathering of young people of all backgrounds , including the poor , the homeless , those who will be the first in their family to attend college . While the god of rich things favors the children of white men ( almost all of the super-wealthy and most of the legacies are white ) , the god of reparations wants to see fewer and fewer white students on campus . Last year , the college reached an important mile marker : For the first time in history , Harvard 's freshman class had fewer white students than nonwhite ones .
domestication: 另一位大师可是个复仇天使，他立志要掀起一场彻底的变革：要把哈佛大学——就是这么个地方！——变成一个乌托邦社会，一个年轻人平等相聚的地方，无论贫富贵贱，甚至是无家可归者，或是家族中第一个上大学的孩子都能在此找到一席之地。财富之神偏爱白人子弟（超级富豪和大部分校友子女都是白人），而补偿正义之神则希望校园里的白人学生越来越少。去年，学院迎来了一座重要的里程碑：哈佛大学有史以来第一次，新生中非白人学生的数量超过了白人。
foreignization: 另一位大师是一个激进使命的复仇天使：将哈佛学院——在所有地方中！——改造成一个乌托邦社会，一个平等聚集的年轻人社团，包括穷人、无家可归者，以及那些将成为家中第一个上大学的人。当富裕之神偏爱白人男性（几乎所有超级富豪和大多数继承人都为白人）的孩子时，赔偿之神则希望看到校园里白人学生的数量越来越少。去年，学院达到了一个重要里程碑：历史上首次，哈佛大学的新生班级中，白人学生人数少于非白人学生。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The other master is an avenging angel on a radical mission : to transform Harvard College -- of all places ! -- into a utopian society , an egalitarian gathering of young people of all backgrounds , including the poor , the homeless , those who will be the first in their family to attend college . While the god of rich things favors the children of white men ( almost all of the super-wealthy and most of the legacies are white ) , the god of reparations wants to see fewer and fewer white students on campus . Last year , the college reached an important mile marker : For the first time in history , Harvard 's freshman class had fewer white students than nonwhite ones .

While the god of rich things favors the children of white men ( almost all of the super-wealthy and most of the legacies are white ) , the god of reparations wants to see fewer and fewer white students on campus . Last year , the college reached an important mile marker : For the first time in history , Harvard 's freshman class had fewer white students than nonwhite ones .
另一位大师是一个激进使命的复仇天使：将哈佛学院——在所有地方中！——改造成一个乌托邦社会，一个平等聚集的年轻人社团，包括穷人、无家可归者，以及那些将成为家中第一个上大学的人。当富裕之神偏爱白人男性（几乎所有超级富豪和大多数继承人都为白人）的孩子时，赔偿之神则希望看到校园里白人学生的数量越来越少。去年，学院达到了一个重要里程碑：历史上首次，哈佛大学的新生班级中，白人学生人数少于非白人学生。

source: Political leaders often ignore the tradeoffs among the energy policies that they legislate . Thus , rising fuel efficiency requirements for motor vehicles have forced automobile manufacturers to shift from heavy metals such as steel to lighter aluminum . However , producing the lighter cars uses far more electricity than the older models , exacerbating overall energy problems . Moreover , the lighter cars are legs safe than the heavier vehicles in terms of accident and death rates .
domestication: 政治领导人常常忽视他们立法的能源政策之间的权衡取舍。结果，为了提高机动车的燃油效率，汽车制造商不得不从使用重金属如钢铁转向更轻的铝材。这样一来，生产这些更轻的车比老款车耗电多了，反而加重了整体能源问题。此外，这些轻车在事故和死亡率方面，不如重车安全。
foreignization: 政治领导人经常忽视他们立法的能源政策之间的权衡。因此，对机动车燃油效率要求的提高迫使汽车制造商从重型金属如钢铁转向更轻的铝。然而，生产更轻的汽车比旧车型消耗更多的电力，加剧了整体能源问题。此外，从事故和死亡率的角度来看，较轻的汽车比更重的车辆更不安全。

source: Tomorrow -- Tuesday , July 2 -- is technically the halfway point from 2019 to 2020 , but we 've had a year 's worth of feuds to unpack so far . That may sound like measuring a year by celebrity feuds actually makes our time here go faster , but when you really get into these kerfuffles , lay out the timelines , check the receipts , weigh your allegiances , assign blame , cheer your champion , you 've lived a thousand lifetimes in a mere hour . See ? Getting into celebrity feuds is a way to expand our tiny allotment of time on Earth .
domestication: 明天，也就是7月2号星期二，算是从2019年到2020年的中点。不过，今年我们已经经历了一整年的恩怨情仇了。听起来好像用明星的纷争来衡量时间，会让日子过得更快，但真要深入这些乱局，理清时间线，核实证据，权衡立场，分清对错，给自己支持的人加油打气，你就像在短短一小时内活了一千辈子。你看，沉迷于明星的恩怨情仇，其实是延长我们在地球上短暂时光的一种方法。
foreignization: 明天——7月2日，星期二——从技术上讲是2019年到2020年的中点，但到目前为止，我们已经经历了一整年的恩怨。这听起来好像用名人恩怨来衡量一年的时间实际上让我们的时光过得更快，但当你真正深入这些纷争，列出时间线，检查证据，权衡你的忠诚，分配责任，为你的冠军加油时，你在一个小时内仿佛经历了千百种人生。看？深入名人恩怨是一种扩展我们在地球上短暂时间的方式。

source: Those are the kinds of regional effects that researchers and policymakers are now trying to forecast . Last month more than 400 scientists , economists , physicians , resort owners , fishermen , farmers and business people met in Washington to discuss how global warming could affect everything from ski resorts in Vermont to oystering in Puget Sound . And this week in Kyoto , the IPCC will distribute a 600-page report on how climate change will harm , or help , specific regions worldwide . At the end of a paragraph listing all sorts of potentially irreversible ' adverse effects , the report acknowledges that some effects of climate change are likely to be beneficial . '
domestication: 研究人员和政策制定者正在努力预测这些地区的影响。上个月，400多名科学家、经济学家、医生、度假村老板、渔民、农民和商界人士齐聚华盛顿，讨论全球变暖如何影响从佛蒙特的滑雪场到普吉特湾的养蚝业。这周在京都，IPCC将发布一份长达600页的报告，详细说明气候变化将如何对世界各地的特定区域造成危害或带来益处。报告在列举了一系列可能不可逆转的负面影响后，也承认气候变化的某些影响可能是有利的。
foreignization: 这些都是研究人员和政策制定者现在试图预测的区域影响。上个月，400多名科学家、经济学家、医生、度假村业主、渔民、农民和商界人士在华盛顿会面，讨论全球变暖如何影响从佛蒙特州的滑雪胜地到普吉特湾的牡蛎养殖的一切。本周在京都，IPCC将发布一份600页的报告，内容涉及气候变化将如何损害或帮助世界各地的具体区域。在列出各种可能不可逆转的“不利影响”的段落末尾，该报告承认气候变化的一些影响可能是有益的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Those are the kinds of regional effects that researchers and policymakers are now trying to forecast . Last month more than 400 scientists , economists , physicians , resort owners , fishermen , farmers and business people met in Washington to discuss how global warming could affect everything from ski resorts in Vermont to oystering in Puget Sound . And this week in Kyoto , the IPCC will distribute a 600-page report on how climate change will harm , or help , specific regions worldwide . At the end of a paragraph listing all sorts of potentially irreversible ' adverse effects , the report acknowledges that some effects of climate change are likely to be beneficial . '

source: At a time when no other motorcycle manufacturer gave a hoot about brakes -- American bikes had just one rear brake for years -- Vincents had four brake drums , one on each side of the hub , each with a balance bar ; Shadows had finned drums . Vincents also boasted four speeds when a Harley-Davidson had only three .

source: A couple of years ago , 20 megs seemed like a lot of storage . But nowadays everything burns up disk space at a furious rate . Windows 3.0 takes up 5 or more megabytes , Lotus several more-heck , even Wing Commander , a game with unbelievable graphics , can only manage those graphics by taking up 5 megs on your disk .
domestication: 几年前，20兆的存储空间可算是海量了。但如今，什么东西都疯狂地占硬盘空间。Windows 3.0 就得吃掉五六个兆，Lotus 还得再加几个兆——唉，就连《翼指挥官》这样画面超炫的游戏，也只能靠占五个兆的空间来实现那些效果。
foreignization: 几年前，20兆似乎像是很大的存储空间。但现在一切都以惊人的速度消耗着磁盘空间。Windows 3.0 占用5兆或更多的空间，Lotus则占用更多——嘿，甚至《翼指挥官》，一款拥有难以置信图形的游戏，也只能通过占用你磁盘上的5兆空间来实现那些图形。

几年前，20兆的存储空间可算是海量了。但如今，什么东西都疯狂地占硬盘空间。Windows 3.0 就得吃掉五六个兆，Lotus 还得再加几个兆——唉，就连《翼指挥官》这样画面超炫的游戏，也只能靠占五个兆的空间来实现那些效果。

source: Goold : We have seen this improve greatly in the past decade-plus . That 's partially because of how conscientious teams , the union and players themselves have become . It 's obvious the importance of translators or English classes , or both , even in the minor leagues . It 's also worth pointing out , that there are many bilingual and talented baseball writers who show how valuable that can be to accurate coverage , and I think that has made our business better equipped and just better .

source: " Children draw and paint before they form letters , " says Smith , who is also the director of the graduate program Special Education : Learning Disabilities at The American University in Washington , DC . " The arts ignite the whole learning process , especially for LD youngsters , who are unable to understand their senses . The pattern on the tablecloth and the food on their plates come through to them with equal intensity and they ca n't focus on either one . With their scattered attention or over-reactiveness , they need order . "

source: Legitimate online pharmacies such as CVS.com , an adjunct to the drugstore chain , as well as properly licensed Internet-only drugstores such as PlanetRx.com and drugstore.com , follow those procedures . They require confirmation from your doctor for any drug you request and let you e-mail or phone questions to a pharmacist . To open an account , you submit credit-card and insurance information . The pharmacy openly lists facts about its licensing .

source: Free-market principles are said to be an integral part of Bush 's energy creed . But he 's a pragmatist at heart , shedding his laissez-faire mantle when pushing for subsidies to the energy industry , and donning it again when confronted with talk of new regulations , taxes , and import fees . " Too heavy-handed , " he declares these traditional policy tools .

source: During the weeklong trip , she readily agreed when I asked her to sit for a videotaped interview with a friend who produces family histories . I watched it only many months later . What got her through this illness , she explained to the camera , was " the idea that I was not going to be a whining , complaining wife and mother .... I do n't want my children to remember me that way .... I want my children to remember me as an active , useful human being . And that 's why I 've struggled so long .
domestication: 在这为期一周的旅行中，我问她是否愿意接受一位制作家庭历史的朋友的视频采访，她爽快地答应了。可我过了好几个月才去看这段录像。在镜头前，她解释说，支撑她度过这场病痛的是“我不想成为一个整天抱怨的妻子和母亲……我不希望我的孩子们这样记住我……我希望他们记住的是一个积极向上、有用的人。这就是我坚持这么久的原因。”

source: Politics also ca n't be reformed as long as a spirit of craven individualism consumes the nation 's elite . Former high government officials like C. Boyden Gray III think nothing of selling their expertise to drug companies looking to impede the Food and Drug Administration . Think tanks like AEI think nothing of accepting grants from the Japanese Foreign Ministry to turn out ostensibly objective studies on U.S.-Japanese trade . The old cold war establishment certainly ca n't be revived , but a new establishment -- dedicated to public service -- will have to emerge over the decade . Otherwise , our politics will continue to be dominated by the culture of lobbyists .
domestication: 只要国家的精英被一种卑躬屈膝的个人主义吞噬，政治就无法改革。像C. 波伊登·格雷三世这样的前高官，毫不在意地把他们的专业知识卖给那些想阻挠食品药品监督管理局的制药公司。像美国企业研究所这样的智库，也毫不犹豫地接受日本外务省的资助，来撰写看似客观的美日贸易研究报告。老冷战时期的建制派当然不可能东山再起，但在未来十年里，必须出现一个新的建制派，致力于公共服务。否则，我们的政治将继续被游说文化所主导。
foreignization: 政治也无法改革，只要一种怯懦的个人主义精神吞噬了国家的精英。像C.博伊登·格雷三世这样的前高级政府官员，毫不介意将他们的专业知识出售给试图阻挠食品药品监督管理局的制药公司。像美国企业研究所这样的智库，也毫不介意接受日本外务省的资助，以出具表面上看似客观的美日贸易研究报告。旧的冷战建制派当然无法复兴，但一个新的致力于公共服务的建制派必须在十年内出现。否则，我们的政治将继续被游说文化的主导。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Politics also ca n't be reformed as long as a spirit of craven individualism consumes the nation 's elite . Former high government officials like C. Boyden Gray III think nothing of selling their expertise to drug companies looking to impede the Food and Drug Administration . Think tanks like AEI think nothing of accepting grants from the Japanese Foreign Ministry to turn out ostensibly objective studies on U.S.-Japanese trade . The old cold war establishment certainly ca n't be revived , but a new establishment -- dedicated to public service -- will have to emerge over the decade . Otherwise , our politics will continue to be dominated by the culture of lobbyists .

source: " Watson and I agreed that science was too important for the nation and the coming generation to be neglected in the high schools , " Pendray later recalled . So they devised a plan to publicize the importance of science education by encouraging teenagers to design and perform their own experiments . The promise of college scholarship money would provide a financial incentive for the students , they reasoned , and science teachers could earn recognition through their students ' awards .
domestication: 沃森和我后来回忆起都认为，科学对于国家和下一代来说太重要了，不能在高中阶段被忽视。于是我们想出了一个计划，要宣传科学教育的重要性，鼓励青少年自己设计并进行实验。我们琢磨着，提供奖学金作为奖励能激发学生们参与的热情，而科学老师也能通过学生的获奖来获得认可。
foreignization: “沃森和我都认为科学对国家和下一代来说太重要了，不能在高中被忽视，”彭德雷后来回忆道。因此，他们制定了一个计划，通过鼓励青少年设计并进行自己的实验来宣传科学教育的重要性。他们认为，提供奖学金的承诺将为学生提供经济激励，而科学教师则可以通过学生的获奖获得认可。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

So they devised a plan to publicize the importance of science education by encouraging teenagers to design and perform their own experiments . The promise of college scholarship money would provide a financial incentive for the students , they reasoned , and science teachers could earn recognition through their students ' awards .

source: But there 's another way that galaxies such as C153 , which are hurtling through a galactic cluster , can be torn apart . The rushing galaxy is subject to enormous pressure from the vast cloud of gas that envelops the cluster . The galaxy 's stars can withstand this impact , known as ram pressure , but its fluffy gas clouds are easily torn from their gravitational moorings and blown outward .
domestication: 但是，像C153这样的星系在穿越星系团时，还有另一种被撕裂的方式。当星系疾驰而过时，会受到星系团外围巨大气体云的巨大压力。这种压力被称为冲压作用，虽然星系中的恒星能够经受住这种撞击，但其周围松散的气体云却容易被引力束缚撕开，吹散出去。
foreignization: 但是，像C153这样的星系，当它们以高速穿过星系团时，还有一种方式可以使它们被撕裂。快速移动的星系会受到包裹着星系团的巨大气体云所产生的巨大压力的影响。星系中的恒星可以承受这种被称为冲压的压力，但其松散的气体云很容易从它们的引力系泊中被撕开并被吹向外。

source: To show how farfetched correlations could be , Eddy once noted that the period of the Maunder minimum coincided almost exactly with the reign of the Sun King , Louis XIV , who ruled France between 1643 and 1715 . Should one conclude from that correlation that the solar variations produced le Roi Soleil ?
domestication: 埃迪曾指出，蒙德极小期几乎与太阳王路易十四的统治时期完全吻合，这位国王从1643年到1715年统治法国。难道我们能从这种巧合中得出结论，认为太阳活动的变化造就了太阳王吗？这可真是风马牛不相及了。
foreignization: 为了展示相关性可能有多么牵强，埃迪曾指出，蒙德极小期几乎与太阳王路易十四的统治时期完全重合，后者在1643年至1715年间统治法国。从这种相关性中，是否可以得出太阳活动变化产生了太阳王的结论？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

To show how farfetched correlations could be , Eddy once noted that the period of the Maunder minimum coincided almost exactly with the reign of the Sun King , Louis XIV , who ruled France between 1643 and 1715 . Should one conclude from that correlation that the solar variations produced le Roi Soleil ?
埃迪曾指出，蒙德极小期几乎与太阳王路易十四的统治时期完全吻合，这位国王从1643年到1715年统治法国。难道我们能从这种巧合中得出结论，认为太阳活动的变化造就了太阳王吗？这可真是风马牛不相及了。

为了展示相关性可能有多么牵强，埃迪曾指出，蒙德极小期几乎与太阳王路易十四的统治时期完全重合，后者在1643年至1715年间统治法国。从这种相关性中，是否可以得出太阳活动变化产生了太阳王的结论？

source: Rosenthal : It varies team to team , day to day . Generally we get a window for clubhouse access before batting practice . Sometimes , it coincides with the time the manager talks , making things problematic . Often , players , particularly from the home team , are nowhere to be found . Until a few years ago we also were allowed in the clubhouse after batting practice ( relevant only for the home team , which hits first ) . That was taken away , which mostly penalized the people who want to keep working . By and large , though , our access is good -- clubhouses are always open post-game . And it 's important to remember that baseball is a day-to-day sport . My guess is that we get the most access of any writers covering professional team sports .
domestication: 罗斯塔尔：这事儿得看队伍和日子。一般来说，我们在打击练习前能进更衣室。有时候，偏偏这时候教练也在接受采访，这就让人头疼了。很多情况下，尤其是主队的球员，根本找不到人影。几年前，我们还能在打击练习后进更衣室，但这对主队才有用，因为他们是第一个上场的。后来这个特权被取消了，主要影响的是那些还想继续工作的记者。不过总体来说，我们的采访条件还是不错的——比赛结束后，更衣室总是开放的。别忘了，棒球可是每天都打的比赛。我猜，我们可能是所有报道职业团队运动的记者中，得到的采访权限最多的。
foreignization: 罗森塔尔：这因团队而异，因日而异。通常我们会在击球练习前获得进入休息室的时间段。有时，这与经理讲话的时间重合，使得事情变得复杂。经常，尤其是主队的球员们，根本就找不到人。直到几年前，我们还被允许在击球练习后进入休息室（这仅适用于先击球的主队）。这个权限被取消了，这主要是惩罚了那些想要继续工作的人。不过总体来说，我们的访问权限是很好的——比赛结束后休息室总是开放的。重要的是要记住，棒球是一项日复一日的运动。我猜测，我们是所有报道职业团队运动的记者中获得最多访问权限的。

source: Next up at the podium was Rob Reiner , a longtime supporter of LGBTQ rights . Having known Griffin since he was 19 years old , Reiner spoke about how the activist " transformed equality in the deep South " and was the " mastermind behind the undoing of Prop 8 . " He went on to consider the way forward for politics , telling the audience , " We all know what we need to do in 2020 . " The director added that , after the senate and White House are ours , " maybe we can have a decent country . "
domestication: 接下来上台的是罗伯·莱纳，他是LGBTQ权益的长期支持者。莱纳认识格里芬已有多年，从他19岁起就相识了。莱纳讲述了这位活动家如何“在南部深处推动了平等”，并称他是“推翻8号提案的幕后策划者”。他还谈到了政治的未来方向，对观众说：“我们都知道2020年该做什么。”导演还补充道，等参议院和白宫都掌握在我们手里后，“或许咱们国家就能像样点儿了。”

source: The Mauna Kea astronomers do n't really need a total eclipse to study , for instance , the sun 's corona . They do it all year round . They make their own eclipses , when they want them , by sliding a sun-sized opaque disc into the optics of their telescopes , and with the bright solar disc hidden the corona pops right out . But then sunglow lights the air around the image , and besides , the chance of comparing the natural eclipse with the coronagraph studies lets them check their simulation , and anyway they certainly want to see it . They 've been setting up for this once-inseveral-lifetimes photo opportunity on Mauna Kea for a long time , and the clouds that are now hovering around the top of the mountain have never been more unwelcome .
domestication: 莫纳克亚的天文学家研究太阳日冕，其实并不需要真正的日全食。他们一年到头都能研究。想看的时候，就往望远镜里滑入一个和太阳一样大的遮光盘，把明亮的太阳盘遮住，日冕立刻就显现出来了。不过，阳光还是会照亮图像周围的空气，而且，能够将自然日食与日冕仪的研究结果进行对比，可以检验他们的模拟效果。再说，他们当然也想亲眼看看。为了这次千载难逢的拍摄机会，他们在莫纳克亚已经准备了很久，现在山顶上盘旋的云朵从来没有这么让人讨厌过。
foreignization: 莫纳克亚的天文学家们实际上并不需要日全食来研究太阳的日冕。他们全年都在进行这项研究。他们根据需要通过将一个与太阳大小相当的不透明圆盘滑入望远镜的光学系统中制造自己的日食，当明亮的太阳圆盘被遮挡时，日冕就会立即显现出来。但随后阳光会照亮图像周围的空气，此外，将自然日食与日冕仪研究结果进行比较的机会使他们能够检查他们的模拟结果，而且无论如何，他们当然想亲眼看到这一现象。他们已经为这个一生难得几次的拍摄机会在莫纳克亚做了很长时间的准备，而现在围绕山顶盘旋的云层从未如此不受欢迎。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The Mauna Kea astronomers do n't really need a total eclipse to study , for instance , the sun 's corona . They do it all year round . They make their own eclipses , when they want them , by sliding a sun-sized opaque disc into the optics of their telescopes , and with the bright solar disc hidden the corona pops right out . But then sunglow lights the air around the image , and besides , the chance of comparing the natural eclipse with the coronagraph studies lets them check their simulation , and anyway they certainly want to see it . They 've been setting up for this once-inseveral-lifetimes photo opportunity on Mauna Kea for a long time , and the clouds that are now hovering around the top of the mountain have never been more unwelcome .

source: It 's like using strobe lights in high-speed photography to capture the wing of a hummingbird in midbeat or a drop of milk at the moment of impact , says Thomas C. Weinacht of the State University of New York at Stony Brook . The briefer the light pulse , he notes , the faster the process that can be probed , prodded , and recorded .

source: The age of a home is an important factor to insurance companies . Companies may charge up to 20% less to insure new homes than to insure older ones , which may be more susceptible to damage in storms and fires . Outdated building standards and old wiring can also make older homes riskier to insure . ( See " What Do You Mean It 's Not Covered ? " CR , September 1995 . )
domestication: 房子的年龄对保险公司来说是个大问题。给新房上保险，公司可能会少收20%的保费，因为老房子在风暴和火灾中更容易受损。老旧的建筑标准和电线也让老房子的风险更高。这事儿你得了解，不然到时候可能发现自己很多东西都不在保险范围内，那就晚了。（参见《怎么就不在保险范围内了？》1995年9月《消费者报告》）
foreignization: 房屋的年龄是保险公司的重要考虑因素。公司为新房屋投保的费用可能比为老房屋投保低至20%，因为老房屋在风暴和火灾中可能更容易受损。过时的建筑标准和旧电线也使得老房屋的保险风险更大。（见《你什么意思，不保？》消费者报告，1995年9月。）

source: During his research in Thailand , the doctoral student discovered further unidentified fossils . They also belong to a predatory dinosaur , which was a bit smaller with a length of about 4.5 meters . The material was not sufficient to clarify the exact ancestry . However , scientists assume that smaller dinosaur , named Vayuraptor nongbualamphuenisis , is also related to Phuwiangvenator and T. rex . " Perhaps the situation can be compared with that of African big cats , " explains Samathi . " If Phuwiangvenator were a lion , Vayuraptor would be a cheetah . "
domestication: 博士生在泰国做研究时，发现了一些尚未鉴定的化石。这些化石也属于一种肉食恐龙，体长约4.5米，比其他已知种类稍小一些。由于材料不足，无法明确其确切的起源。不过，科学家们猜测，这种体型较小的恐龙，名为Vayuraptor nongbualamphuenisis，可能与Phuwiangvenator和T. rex有亲缘关系。Samathi解释说：“这种情况或许可以和非洲大型猫科动物相提并论。如果Phuwiangvenator是狮子的话，那么Vayuraptor就像是猎豹。”
