source: With the toad 's populations nearly depleted , researchers at the USGS continue to dedicate countless hours to understanding the driving forces behind these declines . Habitat loss , invasive species , and disease epidemics are still the most significant causes of global amphibian decline . Today , toads persist in only three of the 19 breeding sites known two decades ago . Only one site has had consistent breeding over the last decade - at a lake deep within the park 's interior , which the Park Service would rather not identify to the public , given the species ' fragile exisrence . And that 's where Kenison and Swartz are focusing much of their research , to find out iust what makes this population so special .
domestication: 蟾蜍的数量几乎耗尽，美国地质调查局的研究人员仍在投入大量时间研究导致这一现象的背后原因。栖息地丧失、外来物种入侵和疾病爆发依然是全球两栖动物数量减少的主要因素。如今，蟾蜍仅在20年前已知的19个繁殖地中存活于3处。过去十年里，只有一个地方的繁殖活动一直保持稳定——那是在公园深处的一个湖泊，由于这个物种生存状况十分脆弱，公园管理部门并不愿意向公众透露具体位置。肯尼森和斯沃茨正将大部分研究精力集中于此，想要弄清楚为何这里的种群如此特别。
foreignization: 随着蟾蜍的数量几乎耗尽，美国地质调查局的研究人员继续投入无数小时来理解导致这些数量减少的背后原因。栖息地丧失、入侵物种和疾病流行仍然是全球两栖动物数量下降的最主要原因。今天，蟾蜍仅在20年前已知的19个繁殖地点中的3个地点存活。只有一个地点在过去十年中一直有稳定的繁殖——位于公园深处的一个湖，鉴于该物种脆弱的存在，公园管理局不愿向公众透露具体位置。而肯尼森和斯沃茨正是将大部分研究集中在这个地方，以找出这个种群如此特别的原因。

And that 's where Kenison and Swartz are focusing much of their research , to find out iust what makes this population so special .

source: The books of Frederic Dannay and Manfred Lee , two cousins from Brooklyn , were by-lined Ellery Queen and featured a detective of the same name . ( They were not firstperson narratives , however ; Ellery Queen wrote about himself in the third person . ) They took the intellectual puzzle of S. S. Van Dine 's insufferable Philo Vance and elevated it to its highest level . Vintage Ellery Queen mysteries ( The Greek Coffin Mystery , The Chinese Orange Mystery ) feature a formal challenge to the reader at the point where all the clues needed to solve the puzzle have been furnished . The books were always fair , and diabolically clever .
domestication: 弗雷德里克·丹奈和曼福德·李这两位表兄弟来自布鲁克林，他们的作品署名为埃勒里·昆恩，并且书中的侦探也叫埃勒里·昆恩。（不过，这些书并不是第一人称叙述，埃勒里·昆恩是以第三人称讲述自己的故事。）他们借鉴了S.S.范达因那令人难以忍受的菲洛·万斯所创造的知识谜题，将其提升到了顶峰。经典埃勒里·昆恩探案集（如《希腊棺材之谜》、《中国橘子之谜》）中，在所有解开谜题的线索都已提供给读者时，会有一个正式的挑战环节。这些书既公平又极富智慧，让人拍案叫绝。
foreignization: 弗雷德里克·丹奈和曼弗雷德·李这两位来自布鲁克林的表兄弟所写的书，署名埃勒里·奎因，并且以同名侦探为主角。（然而，这些书并不是第一人称叙述；埃勒里·奎因是以第三人称描写自己的。）他们将S. S. 范达因那难以忍受的菲洛·万斯所代表的知识谜题提升到了最高水平。经典的埃勒里·奎因 mysteries（《希腊棺材之谜》、《中国橘子之谜》）在提供了解谜所需的所有线索时，会向读者发出正式挑战。这些书总是公平的，而且极其巧妙。

Van Dine 's insufferable Philo Vance and elevated it to its highest level . Vintage Ellery Queen mysteries ( The Greek Coffin Mystery , The Chinese Orange Mystery ) feature a formal challenge to the reader at the point where all the clues needed to solve the puzzle have been furnished . The books were always fair , and diabolically clever .

source: That the subject of warfare may have been on the minds of the monks at this time is not surprising . The monastery was a rich and powerful fortress that dominated the surrounding area , and it was a favorite target of the Magyars , a Central Asiatic tribe rampaging through Europe in the 10th century . Ancestors of the modern Hungarians and distant relatives of the Finns , the Magyars operated mainly in central Europe but ranged as far as France in the west and Italy in the south . Between 924 and 933 , they repeatedly threatened St. Gall , though they never captured the abbey , whose territory went on to become an independent polity and eventually one of the cantons in the Swiss Confederation .
domestication: 那时候，战事频繁，僧侣们心里琢磨着战争也不足为奇。修道院不仅富甲一方，还是一座坚不可摧的堡垒，控制着周围的大片土地，自然成了马扎尔人眼中的肥肉。这帮来自中亚的部落，在10世纪的时候横扫欧洲，简直是乱世魔王。马扎尔人是现代匈牙利人的祖先，与芬兰人也有点亲戚关系，主要活动在中欧地区，但势力范围远至西边的法国和南边的意大利。从924年到933年间，他们多次对圣加仑构成威胁，但始终没能攻破修道院。修道院后来成为一个独立的政治实体，最终成为瑞士联邦的一个州。
foreignization: 战争这个主题在这个时候出现在修道士的脑海中并不令人惊讶。修道院是一个富裕而强大的堡垒，统治着周边地区，而且它是10世纪横扫欧洲的中亚部落马扎尔人的首选攻击目标。马扎尔人是现代匈牙利人的祖先，也是芬兰人的远亲，他们主要在中欧活动，但活动范围远至西边的法国和南边的意大利。在924年至933年间，他们多次威胁圣加尔，尽管从未攻占过这座修道院，其领土后来成为一个独立的政治实体，并最终成为瑞士联邦的一个州。

Between 924 and 933 , they repeatedly threatened St. Gall , though they never captured the abbey , whose territory went on to become an independent polity and eventually one of the cantons in the Swiss Confederation .

source: The fugitives in Kuwait are much worse off . One of them , a New England man whose family wishes to preserve his anonymity , wrote to his wife that Americans are " cowering here like hunted animals . " in fear of being captured and sent " to poison-gas and munitions plant " . in Iraq . " He asked : " What are we to do ' ? The Voice of America is silent . The U.S. Embassy is silent . Hostage-taking will not determine B.S. foreign policy , but what of American foreign policy -- is it to free us or leave us to languish in this hell ? "
domestication: 在科威特的逃亡者境况更糟糕。其中一个来自新英格兰的人，他的家人希望保持匿名，给妻子写信说：“美国人在这里像被追捕的动物一样瑟瑟发抖。” 他们害怕被抓起来送到伊拉克的“毒气工厂和军火库”。“他还问道：‘我们该怎么办？美国之音沉默了，美国大使馆也无动于衷。人质事件不会决定美国的外交政策，但美国的外交政策呢——是要解救我们，还是让我们在这地狱中自生自灭？’”

Hostage-taking will not determine B.S. foreign policy , but what of American foreign policy -- is it to free us or leave us to languish in this hell ? "

source: One fall day , after missing the group ride , I rolled out solo on one of our area 's most popular routes , a relatively flat , hour-long spin that requires little thought or attention after years of repetition . But I found myself taking the left-hand turn that lead me away from the flats , and toward Spring Drive , a long , curvy ascent -- then adding more climbing on a side street . It was a surprising departure ; I tend to amble along slowly when alone , and rarely choose to tackle extra climbing .
domestication: 一个秋天的下午，我没能跟上大部队的骑行，便独自一人踏上了我们这带最受欢迎的一条路线。这条路相对平坦，骑个把小时就到了，多年来重复了无数次，早已熟门熟路，几乎不用怎么费心。可那一次，我竟鬼使神差地拐进了左手边的岔路，远离了平坦的大道，驶向了春景大道，一条长长的、蜿蜒曲折的上坡路，还额外加了一段爬坡的小路。这一变故让我自己都感到意外，平时一个人骑行时，我总是悠哉游哉的，很少会选择去挑战额外的爬坡。
foreignization: 一个秋天的日子，错过团队骑行后，我独自一人滚出了我们地区最受欢迎的路线之一，这是一条相对平坦、耗时一小时的轻松骑行，经过多年的重复，几乎不需要思考或注意。但发现自己左转离开了平坦的道路，朝向Spring Drive，一条长而曲折的上坡路——然后又在一条侧街上增加了更多的爬升。这是一个令人惊讶的偏离；我独自一人时倾向于慢悠悠地前行，很少会选择额外的爬升。

source: Murder is a plot element in most Shakespearean tragedy , and many of the plays have their echoes in what we recognize as crime and mystery fiction , even as they have their antecedents in the playwright 's own resource material . source: Bacterial wilt is a common disease spread by cucumber beedes . Initially , a single stem wilts , followed by another , and within a week infected plants are barely alive . The best defense is to grow resistant varieties , such as ' County Fair ' or ' Litde Leaf , ' or to protect plants with row covers .

source: The campaign did not respond to requests for comment , but the financial picture is in line with what was disclosed on the Carson campaign 's most recent filings . According to the Carson campaign 's disclosures , which were filed last week , the campaign raised an impressive $22.6 million in the final three months of the year . But , the same reports show , it spent even more , about $27.3 million -- an average of $379,000 a day . As of December 31 , the campaign had $6.5 million on hand , which is not nearly enough to sustain a burn rate of $379,000 .
domestication: 活动方没有回应评论请求，但财务状况与卡森竞选团队最近的申报文件中披露的内容一致。根据卡森竞选团队上周提交的文件，他们在去年最后三个月筹集了令人印象深刻的2260万美元。然而，同一报告显示，他们花得更多，大约2730万美元——平均每天花费37.9万美元。截至12月31日，竞选团队手头只剩下650万美元，这远远不够支撑每天37.9万美元的开销。

source: Meanwhile , the decentralization of leadership has made consensus harder to build and easier to shatter . Commanding a majority on any issue is " difficult at best , " admits Illinois Senate President Philip Rock , one of the country 's more powerful legislative leaders . It takes longer to pass a law in a state legislature today than 10 years ago , according to the National Conference of State Legislatures . Yet the number of bills considered by all state legislatures , about 200,000 annually , has remained about the same , and legislatures have 40 percent more staff to help them .
domestication: 与此同时，领导权的分散使得达成共识越来越难，一旦形成也更容易瓦解。伊利诺伊州参议院议长菲利普·洛克坦言，在任何议题上争取到多数支持“最多也只能说是困难重重”。这位美国立法界的大佬还说，根据全国州议会会议的数据，如今在州立法机构通过一项法律所需的时间比十年前更长了。然而，各州立法机构审议的法案数量每年大约20万件，基本保持不变，而且立法机构的工作人员增加了40%来辅助他们工作。
foreignization: 同时，领导层的分散使得共识更难建立，更容易破裂。伊利诺伊州参议院议长、美国最具影响力的立法领导者之一菲利普·洛克承认，在任何问题上获得多数支持“充其量是困难的”。根据全国州议会会议的数据，今天在州立法机构通过一项法律所需的时间比10年前更长。然而，所有州立法机构审议的法案数量，每年大约20万件，基本保持不变，而且立法机构的工作人员增加了40%来帮助他们。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Meanwhile , the decentralization of leadership has made consensus harder to build and easier to shatter . Commanding a majority on any issue is " difficult at best , " admits Illinois Senate President Philip Rock , one of the country 's more powerful legislative leaders . It takes longer to pass a law in a state legislature today than 10 years ago , according to the National Conference of State Legislatures . Yet the number of bills considered by all state legislatures , about 200,000 annually , has remained about the same , and legislatures have 40 percent more staff to help them .
与此同时，领导权的分散使得达成共识越来越难，一旦形成也更容易瓦解。伊利诺伊州参议院议长菲利普·洛克坦言，在任何议题上争取到多数支持“最多也只能说是困难重重”。这位美国立法界的大佬还说，根据全国州议会会议的数据，如今在州立法机构通过一项法律所需的时间比十年前更长了。然而，各州立法机构审议的法案数量每年大约20万件，基本保持不变，而且立法机构的工作人员增加了40%来辅助他们工作。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Meanwhile , the decentralization of leadership has made consensus harder to build and easier to shatter . Commanding a majority on any issue is " difficult at best , " admits Illinois Senate President Philip Rock , one of the country 's more powerful legislative leaders . It takes longer to pass a law in a state legislature today than 10 years ago , according to the National Conference of State Legislatures . Yet the number of bills considered by all state legislatures , about 200,000 annually , has remained about the same , and legislatures have 40 percent more staff to help them .
同时，领导层的分散使得共识更难建立，更容易破裂。伊利诺伊州参议院议长、美国最具影响力的立法领导者之一菲利普·洛克承认，在任何问题上获得多数支持“充其量是困难的”。根据全国州议会会议的数据，今天在州立法机构通过一项法律所需的时间比10年前更长。然而，所有州立法机构审议的法案数量，每年大约20万件，基本保持不变，而且立法机构的工作人员增加了40%来帮助他们。

source: So you 're not as gutsy as Amelia Earhart or Chuck Yeager . You can still be a fearless backyard pilot-and one-up them by building the craft yourself Design stores are stocking Whitewings kits ( AG Industries , Inc. $17 ) with 15 sleek paper airplanes , old favorites or futuristic fantasies . source: The road from the camp was a pock-marked hard dirt ribbon threading into the hills . Game was everywhere . Friends mingled with friends , so all of the herbivores grazed together -- horned animals of all kinds , along with giraffes , wildebeests , and zebras -- with no carnivore in sight . The latter stayed within their own groups : cheetah families , a pride of -- imagine ! -- 17 lions , and a lone leopard in a tree . A small group of hyenas emerged from the bush , muzzles and necks fleshly stained red and abdomens bulging from their recent breakfast .
domestication: 从营地出发的路像一条坑坑洼洼的硬土带，蜿蜒伸入山丘。四处都是野兽。朋友们和朋友们混在一起，所以各种食草动物都聚在一起吃草——有长角的、长颈鹿、牛羚和斑马，连个肉食动物的影子都没有。那些肉食动物各自待着：猎豹一家子，十七头狮子组成的狮群——想一想吧！——还有一只独行的豹子躲在树上。一小群鬣狗从灌木丛中钻出来，嘴角和脖子上还沾着新鲜的血迹，肚子圆滚滚的，显然刚吃完早餐。
foreignization: 从营地通向山丘的道路是一条布满坑洼的硬土带。到处都是猎物。朋友们与朋友们混在一起，所以所有的草食动物都聚在一起吃草——各种有角的动物，还有长颈鹿、牛羚和斑马——没有肉食动物的踪影。后者则待在自己的群体中：猎豹家庭，一群——想象一下！——17头狮子，还有一只独居的豹子在树上。一小群鬣狗从灌木丛中出现，它们的嘴和脖子上沾着新鲜的红肉，腹部因刚刚吃过早餐而鼓起。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The road from the camp was a pock-marked hard dirt ribbon threading into the hills . Game was everywhere . Friends mingled with friends , so all of the herbivores grazed together -- horned animals of all kinds , along with giraffes , wildebeests , and zebras -- with no carnivore in sight . The latter stayed within their own groups : cheetah families , a pride of -- imagine ! -- 17 lions , and a lone leopard in a tree . A small group of hyenas emerged from the bush , muzzles and necks fleshly stained red and abdomens bulging from their recent breakfast .
从营地出发的路像一条坑坑洼洼的硬土带，蜿蜒伸入山丘。四处都是野兽。朋友们和朋友们混在一起，所以各种食草动物都聚在一起吃草——有长角的、长颈鹿、牛羚和斑马，连个肉食动物的影子都没有。那些肉食动物各自待着：猎豹一家子，十七头狮子组成的狮群——想一想吧！——还有一只独行的豹子躲在树上。一小群鬣狗从灌木丛中钻出来，嘴角和脖子上还沾着新鲜的血迹，肚子圆滚滚的，显然刚吃完早餐。

The road from the camp was a pock-marked hard dirt ribbon threading into the hills . Game was everywhere . Friends mingled with friends , so all of the herbivores grazed together -- horned animals of all kinds , along with giraffes , wildebeests , and zebras -- with no carnivore in sight . The latter stayed within their own groups : cheetah families , a pride of -- imagine ! -- 17 lions , and a lone leopard in a tree . A small group of hyenas emerged from the bush , muzzles and necks fleshly stained red and abdomens bulging from their recent breakfast .
从营地通向山丘的道路是一条布满坑洼的硬土带。到处都是猎物。朋友们与朋友们混在一起，所以所有的草食动物都聚在一起吃草——各种有角的动物，还有长颈鹿、牛羚和斑马——没有肉食动物的踪影。后者则待在自己的群体中：猎豹家庭，一群——想象一下！——17头狮子，还有一只独居的豹子在树上。一小群鬣狗从灌木丛中出现，它们的嘴和脖子上沾着新鲜的红肉，腹部因刚刚吃过早餐而鼓起。

source: Pungent black radishes are beloved in coldclimate countries , where they last months in storage . Alongside hearty black bread , pickled mushrooms , roasted beets , herring , sturgeon and , of course , vodka and caviar , you 'd find black radishes grated into a chilly soured cream .

source: " It 's somewhat haunting because they are anonymous and yet it is striking at the same time , " said Madalena Kozachuk , a PhD student in Western 's Department of Chemistry . " The image is totally unexpected because you do n't see it on the plate at all . It 's hidden behind time . But then we see it and we can see such fine details : the eyes , the folds of the clothing , the detailed embroidered patterns of the table cloth . "

source: The historically sharp divisions surrounding Trump -- who drew near-record support from blue-collar whites , but faced intense opposition from minorities and unusually widespread resistance from white-collar whites -- appear certain to push each party further in targeting those opportunities . " By no means , " Ruffini said , in a view echoed across party lines , " are we finished with this process . " And that means the powerful electoral sorting that has left the two sides representing such divergent Americas in the House may only accelerate as the tumultuous Trump presidency takes shape .  Most Popular
domestication: 围绕特朗普的历史性分歧——他几乎赢得了蓝领白人的创纪录支持，却遭到少数族裔的强烈反对，以及白领白人史无前例的广泛抵制——肯定会推动两党在争取这些群体上更进一步。“我们绝不会就此止步。”鲁菲尼说，这一观点得到了两党人士的广泛认同。这意味着，在特朗普动荡的总统任期内，这种导致两党在众议院代表截然不同“美国”的强大选民分化趋势可能会进一步加剧。

source: Sullivan anticipates a small rise in interest rates as the bond market adjusts to the oil shock , but over the next 12 to 24 months , he expects the sluggish economy to drive rates back below recent levels by three-quarters of a point or so . Accordingly , he has shifted the portfolio into GNMAs with lower payouts , which tend to be more sensitive to interest-rate declines .

source: Corn-and-Zucchini Queso Chowder : Omit hash browns . Prepare recipe as directed in Step I , adding 2 cups frozen whole kernel corn , thawed , and 2 cups chopped zucchini with cumin , and decreasing simmering time to 15 minutes . Proceed as directed , stirring in Vi tsp. kosher salt with cheese in Step 3 . Top each serving with chopped cooked bacon , shredded Cheddar cheese , and diced red onion , MAKES : If cups , HANDS-ON TIME : 40 min. ; TOTAL TIME : I hr .

source: GLENN DROWNS , Ewald Eliason , and Tim Peters all developed useful new vegetable cultivars -- ones that met their requirements better than anything else available . You can do it too . source: Flower and Vegetable Plant Breeding , by Leslie Watts ( Grower Books , 1980 ) . A more extensive introduction than North 's to the genetics behind plant breeding . source: Fruits that act as antioxidants due to their oligomeric proanthocyanidin ( OPC ) content ( as well as , in many cases , high concentrations of vitamin C ) include both the American ( Vaccinium corymbosum ) and European ( V. myrtillus ) blueberry . The European variety is commonly called a bilberry . Another berry ( not often grown in the US because it is an alternate host to the rust fungus that destroys white pine trees ) is the American black currant ( Ribes americanum ) . Flavorful European black currant ( Ribes nigrum ) jams made in France and Switzerland are widely available in the US .
domestication: 富含寡聚原花青素（OPC）的水果具有抗氧化作用，其中还包括大量维生素C，比如美国蓝莓（Vaccinium corymbosum）和欧洲蓝莓（V. myrtillus）。欧洲蓝莓通常称为越橘。还有一种在美国不太常见的浆果——美洲黑醋栗（Ribes americanum），因为它能成为锈菌的寄主，而这种锈菌会毁掉白松树。相比之下，风味独特的欧洲黑醋栗（Ribes nigrum）果酱在法国和瑞士很受欢迎，在美国也容易买到。

Another berry ( not often grown in the US because it is an alternate host to the rust fungus that destroys white pine trees ) is the American black currant ( Ribes americanum ) . source: Sen. Harris said at the podium , " We are in the midst of a whole situation , this is an inflection point in our history . " She invited everyone to look in the mirror and ask the question : " Who are we ? " Answering it for herself , Harris said , " We are better than this . " She continued by noting that this inflection point is inspiring us to " restore the importance of truth and justice , " adding that " speaking the truth can make people uncomfortable , " yet implying it must be done . She said that we all must speak our truth to rise above the homophobia , xenophobia and anti-semitism in our country , which are " born out of hate . " Harris added , " We must stand together and never let anyone stand alone in their fight . "
domestication: 哈里斯参议员在讲台上说：“我们正处在一个全新的局面中，这是我国历史的一个转折点。”她邀请大家照照镜子，问自己：“我们究竟是谁？”她自答道：“我们比这更好。”接着，她提到这个转折点激励我们“重振真相和正义的重要性”，并补充说：“说出真相可能会让人感到不舒服，但这必须去做。”哈里斯强调，我们必须说出真相，才能超越国内的恐同、排外和反犹太主义，这些都源于仇恨。她还说：“我们必须团结起来，决不能让任何人孤军奋战。”

source: Tuesday , Sept. 4 . Sen. Symms 's office told me Maria 's name is on list of women and children who have applied for exit visas . Apparently Mom has decided to stay with Dad . Also , someone has placed Dad 's name on a list of people with emergency medical conditions . He has a heart condition and is low on medication ( probably out by now ) . This is the first time it has really hit me and I feel like crying .
domestication: 9月4日星期二。辛姆斯参议员办公室告诉我，玛丽亚的名字在申请出境签证的妇女和孩子名单上。看来妈妈决定留下来陪爸爸了。还有，有人把爸爸的名字列在有紧急医疗状况的人的名单上了。爸爸有心脏病，药也快没了（可能已经没了）。这是第一次真切地感到这一切，我好想哭。

source: Fed policy makers will meet for a two-day meeting ending Sept. 26 . The market is pricing in over a 90% chance of a quarter-point rate hike then . The Fed has penciled in four moves in total this year . That means another hike is likely in December , a move that financial markets are largely expecting though traders have shown some flashes of wavering confidence of late , citing trade uncertainty and global economic hiccups .

source: Sometimes we assign nobility to important figures in our spheres to show others how highly we regard them : Kendrick Lamar 's " King Kunta , " for instance , subversively reimagines the iconic enslaved character from Alex Haley 's Roots as a royal figure . And some just anoint themselves , with support from their fans . The " King of Pop , " ( who had a well-documented fondness for epaulette-adorned jackets and bedazzled sashes ) , imagines a love triangle set in an ancient Egyptian palace for his " Remember the Time " video . King Lebron James rules over his basketball court . Queen Beyonc ? commands us to " Bow Down . " ( And we heed . ) Rihanna channels Queen Nefertiti for a photo shoot .
domestication: 有时候，我们会给一些重要人物加上高贵的头衔，来表明我们对他们的崇敬：比如肯德里克·拉马尔的《King Kunta》就把亚历克斯·哈里的《根》中那个标志性的奴隶角色重新塑造成了一个王室人物。有些人则自封为王，得到了粉丝的支持。比如“流行音乐之王”（他可是非常喜欢肩章装饰的夹克和镶钻腰带）在他的《Remember the Time》MV中，设定了一场发生在古埃及宫殿的爱情三角故事。勒布朗·詹姆斯国王统治着他的篮球场。碧昂斯女王命令我们“跪下”。（我们当然听命。）蕾哈娜在一次拍摄中化身奈菲尔塔利女王。
foreignization: 有时我们会赋予我们领域中重要人物以贵族身份，以向他人展示我们对他们的高度评价：例如，肯德里克·拉马尔的“King Kunta”颠覆性地将亚历克斯·黑利《根》中的标志性奴隶角色重新想象为一个王室人物。有些人则在粉丝的支持下自封为王。“流行音乐之王”（他对缀有肩章的夹克和镶嵌珠宝的腰带有着众所周知的喜爱），在他的“Remember the Time”音乐视频中设想了一个设置在古埃及宫殿的爱情三角故事。勒布朗·詹姆斯国王统治着他的篮球场。碧昂斯女王命令我们“鞠躬”。（而我们听从。）蕾哈娜在一次摄影中化身为奈菲塔里女王。

source: Qualifying for the show is a complex process . Aspiring contestants call in to a special toll-free phone line . If they get through -- and for days it seemed as though no one could -- they then must answer a series of three questions , by pressing the correct buttons on their phone within 10 seconds . After two further rounds of random selection and quiz questions , 12 people per show are flown to New York City .

source: UNDER PRESSURE A galaxy can get gutted in two ways . The most familiar is the gravitational tug of a nearby , massive object . Gravity exerts a stronger force on a galaxy 's near side than its far side . That uneven tug can stretch and shear the galaxy over time , tearing out long streamers of stars and gas .
domestication: 压力之下，星系也会被“掏空”，而且方式有两种。最常见的一种是附近的大质量天体的引力牵引。这种引力对星系近端的作用力比远端强，时间一长，这种不均衡的拉扯就会把星系拉伸、撕裂，拽出长长的星流和气体带。
foreignization: 在压力下 一个星系可以通过两种方式被剥离。最熟悉的是附近大质量物体的引力牵引。引力对星系的近端施加的力比远端强。这种不均匀的牵引可以随着时间拉伸和剪切星系，撕裂出长长的恒星和气体流。

source: " In essence , this is telling you that a cooler component of gas has intruded into the cluster 's vast supply of hot gas , " explains Keel . What 's more , this cooler material " lies just at the same place that we have documented gas being pulled out of the galaxy . " That 's yet another piece of evidence that ram pressure exerted by the cluster 's gas deformed the galaxy .
domestication: 凯尔解释说，这实际上是在告诉你，有一团较冷的气体侵入了星团中大量的热气体里。而且，这团较冷的物质正好位于我们记录到有气体被拉出的银河位置。这又是一个证据，说明是星团中的气体产生的冲压作用使银河发生了变形。

source: Aside from being fast , Vincents are technically interesting . Their narrow-angle V-twins have aluminum pistons , forged connecting rods , a unique rocker arm design , twin Amal carburetors and a dry sump oiling system . There is no front downtube ; the engine itself is a stressed member . Changing wheels requires only simple T-handles , or tommy bars , as the British call them . The rigid Girdraulic front forks are easily adapted for sidecar work by flipping a cam over to change the setting , and there are two rear sprockets , quickly reversible , so you can run a sidecar with a lower gear ratio .
domestication: 文森特摩托车不仅速度快，技术上也十分有趣。它们的窄角V型双缸发动机配备了铝制活塞、锻造连杆、独特的摇臂设计、双Amal化油器和干式油底壳润滑系统。前下管是省略的，发动机本身作为受力部件。换轮子只需要一个简单的T型手柄，英国人称之为“汤米棒”。坚固的Girdraulic前叉很容易改装成边车配置，只需翻转一个凸轮就能改变设置，还有两个后链轮可以快速互换，这样你就能用较低的传动比来搭载边车了。
foreignization: 除了速度快之外，文森特摩托车在技术上也很有趣。它们的窄角V型双缸发动机采用铝制活塞、锻造连杆、独特的摇臂设计、双阿马尔化油器和干式油底壳润滑系统。没有前下管；发动机本身是受力部件。更换车轮只需要简单的T形把手，或者如英国人所称的汤米棒。刚性的Girdraulic前叉通过翻转凸轮轻松调节以适应边斗使用，而且有两个后链轮，可以快速反转，因此你可以使用较低的齿轮比来拖曳边斗。

source: It 's an unforgettable scene from Apocalypse Now , the epic Francis Ford Coppola movie . Although fictitious , it draws from fact . For millennia , soldiers have sought an advantage in war through sound - whether music , voices , or simply loud noise . They use it not only to organize and gird themselves for battle , but also to undermine the courage of the enemy , knowing that while we may dose our eyes to fear , we can not close our ears .
domestication: 这是电影《现代启示录》里的一个令人难忘的场景，这部史诗般的电影出自弗朗西斯·福特·科波拉之手。虽然情节是虚构的，但灵感来源于现实。千百年来，士兵们一直在战场上寻求声音的优势，无论是音乐、人声还是震耳欲聋的噪音。他们不仅用声音来组织队伍，鼓舞士气，还用来动摇敌人的斗志，深知我们可以闭上眼睛拒绝恐惧，但耳朵却无处可逃。
foreignization: 这是《现代启示录》中一个令人难忘的场景，这部弗朗西斯·福特·科波拉的史诗电影。尽管是虚构的，但它源于事实。数千年来，士兵们一直试图通过声音——无论是音乐、人声还是单纯的巨大噪音——在战争中获得优势。他们不仅用声音来组织和激励自己投入战斗，还用来瓦解敌人的勇气，因为他们知道，虽然我们可以闭上眼睛躲避恐惧，但无法关闭耳朵。

source: Many of these organizations and associations had offices in Washington and exercised their influence through lobbyists , but they were also directly linked to their members outside Washington . In the 1950s , workers did not view union leaders and the leadership of the new AFL-CIO as distant bureaucrats more interested in Washington salon life than in the welfare of their locals . The main business and consumer groups had active chapters around the country and raised their money through membership dues rather than direct mail . They were representative institutions rather than what we have come to call " inside the Beltway " groups .
domestication: 这些组织和协会在华盛顿设有办公室，通过游说者施加影响，但它们也直接与华盛顿以外的成员保持联系。20世纪50年代，工人并不认为工会领导人或新成立的劳联-产联领导层是只关心华盛顿社交圈的遥远官僚，他们更关注地方组织的利益。主要的商业和消费者团体在全国各地都有活跃的分支机构，资金主要来自会员会费，而不是直接邮寄募捐。这些机构代表的是成员利益，而不是我们现在所说的“环路内的”小圈子。

Many of these organizations and associations had offices in Washington and exercised their influence through lobbyists , but they were also directly linked to their members outside Washington . In the 1950s , workers did not view union leaders and the leadership of the new AFL-CIO as distant bureaucrats more interested in Washington salon life than in the welfare of their locals . The main business and consumer groups had active chapters around the country and raised their money through membership dues rather than direct mail . They were representative institutions rather than what we have come to call " inside the Beltway " groups .

source: Use your sunscreen all the time -- not just when you 're planning to be outside . UV-A rays can penetrate glass , so that even in your car or sitting indoors in a sunny spot , you 're exposed to them . UV-A is also present all day all year long , unlike UV-B , which is much more intense in the summer .
domestication: 防晒霜要随时用，不只是外出时才涂。UVA射线能穿透玻璃，所以即使在车里或坐在室内阳光充足的地方，也会被晒到。UVA一年四季、从早到晚都有，不像UVB，夏天才会特别强烈。
foreignization: 请一直使用防晒霜——不仅仅是在计划外出时。UV-A射线可以穿透玻璃，因此即使在车内或在室内阳光充足的地方，你也会暴露在其中。UV-A全年每天都有，而UV-B在夏天则要强烈得多。

source: So are a lot of families less well-off than Harrigan 's . According to a Carnegie Endowment study , huge loan debts are increasingly forcing many poorer students to forget about going to college . Financial worries have also led to a trend toward educational " buying down . " Kenneth Green of the UCLA Higher Education Research Institute says , " Students who would have gone full time are going part time . Students who would have gone to four-year colleges are going to two-year colleges . And more students from poor homes go to vocational schools instead of colleges . " Indeed , vocational schools -- schools of cosmetology , drafting , barbering , air-conditioner repair and the like -- have thrived on the flood of student-loan money that has poured out of Washington in the eighties and nineties .
domestication: 很多家庭的经济状况都不如哈里根家。卡内基基金会的一项研究显示，巨额贷款债务正迫使越来越多的贫困学生放弃上大学的梦想。经济压力还导致了一种“向下求学”的趋势。加州大学洛杉矶分校高等教育研究所的肯尼思·格林说：“原本打算全日制学习的学生现在选择半工半读，原本打算上四年制大学的学生现在选择两年制学院，而更多来自贫困家庭的学生则选择了职业学校而非大学。”确实，美容美发、制图、理发、空调维修等职业学校，在20世纪八九十年代联邦政府大量发放学生贷款的情况下，迎来了发展的春天。
foreignization: 所以很多家庭的经济状况都不如哈里根家。根据卡内基基金会的一项研究，巨额贷款债务正越来越多地迫使许多贫困学生放弃上大学的想法。经济上的担忧还导致了一种教育“向下购买”的趋势。加州大学洛杉矶分校高等教育研究所的肯尼斯·格林说：“原本打算全日制就读的学生现在选择半工半读。原本打算上四年制大学的学生现在选择两年制大学。而且，更多来自贫困家庭的学生选择去职业学校而不是大学。”事实上，职业学校——如美容学校、制图学校、理发学校、空调维修等——在八九十年代从华盛顿大量流出的学生贷款资金中得到了蓬勃发展。

source: Take 3 tablespoons of dried boneset , and pour about 24 oz of boiled water over it . Add 1 tablespoon of echinacea tincture . Steep , covered , for 15 to 20 minutes , then strain and drink . I like to use a French coffee press to make the tea . Sip all of the tea , slowly , over the next few hours . Most people report feeling better within hours . Susan 's Poison Ivy Eraser

source: When eating out , sample and share . As you read about how unhealthy certain restaurant foods are , you 'll often find that the spotlighted dishes , such as Kung Pao chicken or fettuccine Alfredo , are the most fattening on the menu . And the portions being analyzed are shockingly huge . " Most people already know how fattening these foods are ; says Dr. Callaway . But face it , it 's hard to finish a heaping plate of high-fat food . You might share it , you might leave it , you might even doggie-bag it . You might even shape the stuff left on the plate into a lovely design to impress the help . But you probably wo n't eat as much of the stuff as the CSPI is analyzing .
domestication: 外出就餐时，尝一尝，分一分。你可能常听说某些餐馆的食物多么不健康，通常那些被点名的菜肴，比如宫保鸡丁或阿尔弗雷多意面，正是菜单上最让人发胖的。而且，分析的分量大得惊人。卡莱威博士说：“大多数人都知道这些食物有多容易让人长胖。”但说实话，想吃完一大盘高脂肪的食物还真不容易。你可以和别人分享，可以剩下不吃，甚至可以打包带走。你还可以在盘子里摆出个好看的图案，给服务员留下好印象。不过，你肯定不会像美国公共利益科学中心分析的那样，吃掉那么多。

source: " I was 24 and I wanted to purchase a property just because I know how financially beneficial it can be . I still own the place , it 's been rented out for an additional six and a half years since I moved ( to Chicago ) . I manage it all myself and I 've had great tenants , mostly long-term . It 's been a great investment . Obviously the purchase price has appreciated a lot . 2010 was a really interesting time because Barack Obama had a first-time homebuyer credit where if you were purchasing , you got $8,000 back . I had an FHA loan and I put 3 ? % down , I think my down payment was $8,250 and I got $8,000 back from Obama .
domestication: 我那会儿24岁，一心想着买套房，因为我知道这在财务上有多划算。现在那房子我还留着，从我搬到芝加哥后又租了六年半。我自己打理一切，租客都挺不错，大多是长租的。这笔投资真是划算。房价涨了不少，这是显而易见的。2010年那会儿挺有意思的，巴拉克·奥巴马推出了首次购房者补贴，只要你买房就能退8000美元。我当时办的是联邦住房管理局贷款，首付比例是3%，我记得首付大概是8250美元，结果奥巴马给了我8000美元补贴。
foreignization: 我24岁，我想购买一处房产，只是因为我了解它在财务上的益处。我仍然拥有那处房产，自从我搬到（芝加哥）后，它又出租了六年半。我自己管理一切，而且我有很好的租户，大部分是长期租户。这是一笔很好的投资。显然，购买价格已经升值了很多。2010年是一个非常有趣的时期，因为巴拉克·奥巴马有一个首次购房者信贷，如果你购买房产，可以返还8,000美元。我有一笔联邦住房管理局贷款，我支付了3%的首付，我认为我的首付款是8,250美元，而从奥巴马那里得到了8,000美元的返还款。

source: It did n't , because the videotaped statement was ruled inadmissible . Javier Card and several members of his gang were convicted and went to prison . But the jurors , presented with an unsigned , heavily edited version of the transcript of Moore 's statement , balked . They acquitted her of murder and several other charges and failed to agree whether she was guilty of conspiracy to murder . Prosecutor G. Paul Howes will try her again for conspiracy to commit murder early next year ; the case against her for conspiracy to distribute cocaine will be tried separately . Moore was suspended without pay from the police department . Neither she nor her attorney will discuss the case , and there is no way to say how the trials will turn out .
domestication: 这事没成，因为录像口供被裁定为不可采纳。贾维尔·卡德和他的几个同伙被判有罪，进了监狱。但陪审团面对的是摩尔陈述的未经签字且大幅删减的笔录版本，他们表示不满。摩尔被无罪释放了谋杀和其他几项指控，但对于她是否参与谋杀共谋，陪审团未能达成一致。检察官G. 保罗·豪斯计划明年年初再次以谋杀共谋罪对她提起诉讼；而她涉及的毒品分销共谋案将单独审理。摩尔已被停职停薪，离开了警局。她和她的律师都闭口不谈此事，这两次审判的结果如何，现在还说不准。
foreignization: 它没有，因为录像带陈述被裁定为不可采纳。贾维尔·卡德和他的几个帮派成员被定罪并入狱。但陪审团面对了一份未经签署且大量编辑过的摩尔陈述的笔录，表示了异议。他们宣布她谋杀和其他几项指控不成立，并且未能就她是否犯有阴谋杀人罪达成一致。检察官G.保罗·豪斯将于明年早些时候再次对她进行阴谋杀人罪的审判；对她参与共谋分销可卡因的案件将单独审理。摩尔被警察局停职且无薪。她和她的律师都不愿讨论此案，也没有办法说审判的结果会如何。

It did n't , because the videotaped statement was ruled inadmissible . Javier Card and several members of his gang were convicted and went to prison . But the jurors , presented with an unsigned , heavily edited version of the transcript of Moore 's statement , balked . They acquitted her of murder and several other charges and failed to agree whether she was guilty of conspiracy to murder . Prosecutor G. Paul Howes will try her again for conspiracy to commit murder early next year ; the case against her for conspiracy to distribute cocaine will be tried separately . Moore was suspended without pay from the police department . Neither she nor her attorney will discuss the case , and there is no way to say how the trials will turn out .

source: In the spring of 1937 , Dove was able to sell the family farm , and some of the burden of the estate eased ; better still , Duncan Phillips gave Dove a retrospective and , separately from the stipend ( which he raised to $100 a month ) , bought Goin ' Fishin ' for $2,000 , a price the artist never dreamed of achieving . Escape from Geneva was in sight . On April 16 , 1938 , the couple departed for New York City and never looked back .

source: When it comes to addressing the issue of other " underrepresented minorities " on college campuses , college administrators do not simply throw up their hands and complain of a shallow talent pool . At Columbia , for instance , the diversity committee is " tasked with finding ways to strengthen the pipeline bringing women and minority students into the University 's undergraduate , graduate , and postdoctoral programs . "
domestication: 说到在大学校园里解决其他“少数群体”代表性不足的问题，校方管理人员并不是一筹莫展，怨天尤人。比如在哥伦比亚大学，多样性委员会就肩负着“拓宽渠道，吸引更多女性和少数族裔学生进入本科、研究生和博士后项目”的任务。
foreignization: 当涉及到解决大学校园中其他“代表性不足的少数群体”的问题时，大学管理者并不会简单地举手投降并抱怨人才库浅薄。例如，在哥伦比亚大学，多样性委员会被“赋予了寻找方法以加强将女性和少数族裔学生带入大学本科、研究生和博士后项目的渠道的任务。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When it comes to addressing the issue of other " underrepresented minorities " on college campuses , college administrators do not simply throw up their hands and complain of a shallow talent pool . At Columbia , for instance , the diversity committee is " tasked with finding ways to strengthen the pipeline bringing women and minority students into the University 's undergraduate , graduate , and postdoctoral programs . "
说到在大学校园里解决其他“少数群体”代表性不足的问题，校方管理人员并不是一筹莫展，怨天尤人。比如在哥伦比亚大学，多样性委员会就肩负着“拓宽渠道，吸引更多女性和少数族裔学生进入本科、研究生和博士后项目”的任务。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When it comes to addressing the issue of other " underrepresented minorities " on college campuses , college administrators do not simply throw up their hands and complain of a shallow talent pool . At Columbia , for instance , the diversity committee is " tasked with finding ways to strengthen the pipeline bringing women and minority students into the University 's undergraduate , graduate , and postdoctoral programs . "
当涉及到解决大学校园中其他“代表性不足的少数群体”的问题时，大学管理者并不会简单地举手投降并抱怨人才库浅薄。例如，在哥伦比亚大学，多样性委员会被“赋予了寻找方法以加强将女性和少数族裔学生带入大学本科、研究生和博士后项目的渠道的任务。”

source: The second reason is that new cars are a minor source of air pollution compared with stationary sources and gross polluters . It makes no sense to single out new cars for stringent regulation . Congress and state legislatures seem to be locked into the idea that , since automobile emissions regulation accomplished a great deal in the past , the more stringent standards could accomplish much more in the future . They are deluding themselves . The air would get cleaned up much more quickly and cheaply by focusing on old cars and stationary sources . Regulatory Contradictions
domestication: 第二个原因是，新车相比固定污染源和严重污染车辆来说，对空气污染的贡献其实微乎其微。因此，单单对新车实施严格监管实在是不合情理。国会和各州立法机构似乎陷入了一种误区，认为既然过去汽车排放管控成效显著，那么未来更严格的排放标准就能带来更大的改善。他们这是在自欺欺人。实际上，如果把重点放在老旧车辆和固定污染源上，空气治理的效果会更快更好，成本也会更低。管得不对劲啊。
foreignization: 第二个原因是，与固定源和严重污染者相比，新车是空气污染的一个较小来源。单独对新车实施严格监管是没有道理的。国会和州立法机构似乎固执地认为，既然汽车排放监管在过去取得了很大成就，那么更严格的標準將能在未來實現更大的成效。他们是在自欺欺人。通过集中精力治理旧车和固定源，空气将能够更快、更便宜地得到净化。监管矛盾

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The second reason is that new cars are a minor source of air pollution compared with stationary sources and gross polluters . It makes no sense to single out new cars for stringent regulation . Congress and state legislatures seem to be locked into the idea that , since automobile emissions regulation accomplished a great deal in the past , the more stringent standards could accomplish much more in the future . They are deluding themselves . The air would get cleaned up much more quickly and cheaply by focusing on old cars and stationary sources . Regulatory Contradictions

source: Apple has just released iOS 10.3 to the general public , an update which is likely to be the last major release of iOS 10 ; at this point in the year , work usually begins in earnest on the next major release of iOS , which will be revealed at WWDC in June . The update is available for everything that runs iOS 10 : the iPhone 5 and newer , the fourth-generation iPad and newer , the iPad Mini 2 and newer , both iPad Pros , and the sixth-generation iPod Touch .
domestication: 苹果刚给大众放出了iOS 10.3，这更新估计是iOS 10的最后一次大升级了。一年到这个时候，苹果团队通常会加足马力开始研发下一个大版本的iOS，这个新版本会在六月的WWDC上亮相。这次的更新适用于所有能跑iOS 10的设备：从iPhone 5起，第四代iPad及以后的版本，iPad Mini 2和更新的，两款iPad Pro，还有第六代iPod Touch。
foreignization: Apple 刚刚向公众发布了 iOS 10.3，这可能是 iOS 10 的最后一次主要更新；在一年的这个时候，通常会开始认真开发下一个主要版本的 iOS，该版本将在六月的 WWDC 上公布。此次更新适用于所有运行 iOS 10 的设备：iPhone 5 及更新的型号、第四代 iPad 及更新的型号、iPad Mini 2 及更新的型号、两款 iPad Pro 以及第六代 iPod Touch。

source: But that success has come at a price not easily measured in dollars and cents . Take Carl Botterud , who graduated last year from Whittier College of Law in California . Botterud had thought about doing public-interest law ; then , after contemplating his $50,000 debt -- or $600 a month -- he thought again . Many public-interest attorneys earn about $25,000 a year , if that . Now he 's working for a mid-sized law firm in Los Angeles for $48,000 a year .
domestication: 但这成功背后付出的代价，可不仅仅是用金钱可以衡量的。比如卡尔·博特鲁德，去年从加州惠提尔法学院毕业。他原本考虑过从事公益法律工作；但一想到自己背负着5万美元的债务——每个月要还600美元——他就改了主意。很多做公益律师的，一年到头也就挣个25000美元，如果能有这么多的话。现在，他在洛杉矶的一家中小型律师事务所工作，年薪48000美元。
foreignization: 但是，这一成功却付出了难以用金钱衡量的代价。以卡尔·博特鲁德为例，他去年从加州惠提尔法学院毕业。博特鲁德曾考虑过从事公益法律工作；然而，在考虑到自己5万美元的债务——或者每月600美元——之后，他又重新考虑了。许多公益律师每年的收入约为2.5万美元，如果有的话。现在，他在洛杉矶一家中型律师事务所工作，年薪4.8万美元。

source: The SPF number on a sunscreen tells you how much longer the sunscreen will let you be exposed to sunlight without your getting sunburn , compared to your reddening time when not using the sunscreen . For instance , an SPF of 15 lets you stay out 15 times longer than you could without it . ( The SPF numbers pertain to protection from UV-B rays only ; there is no established standard of measurement for UV-A protection . )
domestication: 防晒霜上的SPF值告诉你，用了这个防晒霜后，你能在太阳下待多久不会晒伤，这比你不涂防晒霜时的晒红时间要长多少倍。比如，SPF15的防晒霜能让你在太阳下待的时间延长15倍。不过要注意，SPF值只针对UV-B射线的防护，而UV-A射线的防护目前还没有统一的标准。
foreignization: 防晒霜上的SPF数字告诉你使用防晒霜后你可以在阳光下停留的时间比不使用防晒霜时延长多少倍而不被晒伤。例如，SPF 15可以使你在阳光下的停留时间比不使用它时长15倍。（SPF数字仅涉及对UV-B射线的防护；目前没有建立对UV-A防护的测量标准。）

source: As the 3-D fad waned in 1960 , producer Michael Todd Jr . tried to take the moviegoer into the fourth dimension . Not time . Smell . His film , Scent of a Mystery ( with Peter Lorre as a dirty old man named Smiley ) , was the premiere and finale of Smell-O-Vision , in which odors were pumped into the theater from the projection room at pre-established cues . Director John Waters sent up the concept by having scratch-and-sniff cards passed out with tickets at his 1981 film , Polyester . Nuclear Bombs as Steam Shovels
domestication: 到了1960年，3D电影的热潮逐渐退去，制片人小迈克尔·托德却想给观众来点新鲜的，带他们进入“第四维度”。不是时间，而是气味。他在电影《神秘的香味》（彼得·洛雷饰演一个名叫斯迈利的老色鬼）中首次也是最后一次尝试了“嗅觉电影”，通过放映室在预设的时间向影院里释放气味。导演约翰·沃特斯也在1981年的电影《宝丽莱》中恶搞了这个概念，给观众发了一张随票附赠的刮刮卡，让他们自己闻。核弹当铲车用，这事儿也够离谱。
foreignization: 当3-D热潮在1960年减弱时，制片人迈克尔·托德 Jr. 尝试将电影观众带入第四维度。不是时间。而是气味。他的电影《神秘的香味》（彼得·洛雷饰演一个名叫斯迈利的老色鬼）是Smell-O-Vision的首映和终结，在这种技术中，气味会在预设的提示下从放映室输送到电影院。导演约翰·沃特斯通过在1981年的电影《宝丽莱》中分发与电影票一起的刮嗅卡来讽刺这一概念。核弹作为蒸汽铲车

Director John Waters sent up the concept by having scratch-and-sniff cards passed out with tickets at his 1981 film , Polyester . Nuclear Bombs as Steam Shovels

source: As the looters proceeded to sell the treasures , many of the ornaments were taken apart and sold piecemeal . Some of the objects were purchased by Peruvian collectors , while others were illegally smuggled out of Peru and sold in Europe , Japan , and the United States . Within months , the tomb contents were so widely dispersed that there was little hope of reconstructing an inventory of what the looters had found .
domestication: 盗贼们开始倒卖这些珍宝，许多装饰品被拆散，零零碎碎地卖了出去。有的文物被秘鲁的收藏家买下，有的则非法走私出境，在欧洲、日本和美国市场上出售。短短几个月，墓中的宝物就流散各地，想要重建一份完整的清单，几乎是不可能的事了。
foreignization: 随着掠夺者开始出售这些宝藏，许多装饰品被拆解并分件出售。一些物品被秘鲁收藏家购买，而其他物品则非法走私出秘鲁，并在欧洲、日本和美国出售。几个月内，墓葬中的物品如此广泛地分散，以至于几乎不可能重建掠夺者所发现的物品清单。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As the looters proceeded to sell the treasures , many of the ornaments were taken apart and sold piecemeal . Some of the objects were purchased by Peruvian collectors , while others were illegally smuggled out of Peru and sold in Europe , Japan , and the United States . Within months , the tomb contents were so widely dispersed that there was little hope of reconstructing an inventory of what the looters had found .
盗贼们开始倒卖这些珍宝，许多装饰品被拆散，零零碎碎地卖了出去。有的文物被秘鲁的收藏家买下，有的则非法走私出境，在欧洲、日本和美国市场上出售。短短几个月，墓中的宝物就流散各地，想要重建一份完整的清单，几乎是不可能的事了。

Within months , the tomb contents were so widely dispersed that there was little hope of reconstructing an inventory of what the looters had found .

source: Since the advent of AMR , three other ambulance companies have gone public to emulate its strategy . But AMR is the behemoth in the field , and Verrochi is gunning for more . " There were 2,200 private companies when we started , and there are 2,000 left -- we have only 50 , " he says . " We have lots of room to grow . " THE WINNER PAUL VERROCHI
domestication: 自AMR问世以来，其他三家救护车公司也纷纷上市，效仿其策略。但AMR在这一行里是个巨无霸，Verrochi的野心更大。“我们刚起步时有2200家私营公司，现在只剩2000家了——我们只留下了50家。”他说，“我们还有很大的发展空间。”胜者：Paul Verrochi
foreignization: 自从AMR出现以来，另外三家救护车公司也上市效仿其策略。但AMR是该领域的巨无霸，Verrochi还在寻求更多发展。“我们开始时有2200家私营公司，现在只剩下2000家——我们只有50家，”他说。“我们有很大的成长空间。”胜者 保罗·维罗奇

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Since the advent of AMR , three other ambulance companies have gone public to emulate its strategy . But AMR is the behemoth in the field , and Verrochi is gunning for more . " There were 2,200 private companies when we started , and there are 2,000 left -- we have only 50 , " he says . " We have lots of room to grow . " THE WINNER PAUL VERROCHI
自AMR问世以来，其他三家救护车公司也纷纷上市，效仿其策略。但AMR在这一行里是个巨无霸，Verrochi的野心更大。“我们刚起步时有2200家私营公司，现在只剩2000家了——我们只留下了50家。”他说，“我们还有很大的发展空间。”胜者：Paul Verrochi

source: These strains were apparent during U.S. Assistant Secretary of State for Asia Kurt Campbell 's visit to Beijing this week , capping off the diplomat 's tour of East Asia that aimed to emphasize America 's sway in the region . On Monday , China 's Vice Foreign Minister Cui Tiankai held a press conference to warn of a potential trade war and a lose-lose situation between the two superpowers if Washington decides to penalize Beijing for allegedly manipulating its currency . The Chinese media was even more disparaging of the U.S. Headlines claimed that greedy Wall Street is the root of the financial crisis , exhorted America to cure its addiction to debt , and alleged that the U.S. is trying to co-opt the hearts and minds of China 's neighbors through social media .
domestication: 这些矛盾在美国助理国务卿坎贝尔本周访问北京时表现得尤为明显，结束了他在东亚的一系列访问，旨在强调美国在该地区的影响力。周一，中国外交部副部长崔天凯召开新闻发布会，警告如果华盛顿决定因所谓的汇率操纵对中国进行惩罚，可能会引发贸易战，导致两败俱伤的局面。中国的媒体对美国的批评更为激烈。标题声称贪婪的华尔街是金融危机的根源，敦促美国戒掉债务成瘾，并指责美国试图通过社交媒体拉拢中国周边国家的心和民众。

source: Here 's a fact few people know : The IRS does not want to take you to tax court as long as you have a reasonable explanation for the deductions you have taken . If a judge rules in your favor , the verdict may establish a standard that will make it more difficult for the IRS to challenge taxpayers in the future .
domestication: 有这么个鲜为人知的事实：只要你对所申报的减免项目能给出合理解释，国税局其实是不愿意把你告上税务法庭的。如果法官判你胜诉，这个判决可能会树立一个先例，今后国税局再想挑战纳税人就难了。
foreignization: 这里有一个鲜为人知的事实：只要您对自己的扣除项目有合理的解释，国税局并不想将您告上税务法庭。如果法官裁定对您有利，这一判决可能会确立一个标准，使得国税局未来挑战纳税人变得更加困难。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Here 's a fact few people know : The IRS does not want to take you to tax court as long as you have a reasonable explanation for the deductions you have taken . If a judge rules in your favor , the verdict may establish a standard that will make it more difficult for the IRS to challenge taxpayers in the future .

source: Perez said he last traveled to his father 's country in January of 1992 after signing professionally with the California Angels . ( He played 13 MLB seasons for six teams . ) He had had some economic means to offer something to his family so he brought clothing , medicine , glasses , shampoo and other supplies . Perez said he speaks to his father daily and that Tony Perez was proud of him for going but also had mixed emotions about the trip . " He 's proud that I am going to see his sister and nephew , but he is not one to speak a lot on it , " Eduardo Perez said . " He just wants to make sure I am okay . "
domestication: 佩雷斯说，他上次去父亲的家乡是在1992年1月，那时候他已经和加州天使队签了职业合同。（他在大联盟打了13个赛季，效力过6支球队。）当时他手头有点儿钱，可以给家人带点儿东西，所以他就带了些衣服、药品、眼镜、洗发水和其他日用品。佩雷斯说，他每天都会和父亲通电话，托尼·佩雷斯为他这次旅行感到骄傲，但心情也有些复杂。“他为我能去看望他的姐姐和侄子感到高兴，但他不是个爱多说话的人，”埃杜阿多·佩雷斯说，“他只是希望我一切安好。”
foreignization: 佩雷斯说他上次去父亲的国家是在1992年1月，在与加州天使队签约成为职业球员之后。（他在六个球队打了13个大联盟赛季。）他有一些经济能力可以给家人提供一些东西，所以他带了衣服、药品、眼镜、洗发水和其他物资。佩雷斯说他每天和他的父亲通话，托尼·佩雷斯为他去而感到自豪，但也对这次旅行有复杂的情感。“他为我能去看他的姐姐和侄子感到骄傲，但他不是那种会多谈这件事的人，”爱德华多·佩雷斯说。“他只是想确保我一切安好。”

source: PRES . BARACK OBAMA campaigned for office largely on the claim that his predecessor had shredded the Constitution . By the Constitution , he could not have meant the document signed on Sept 17 , 1787 . Article H of that parchment begins with a simple declaration : ' The executive Power shall be vested in a President of the United States of America " Not " some " or " most " or even " all but a teeny-weeny bit " of the executive power . The president is vested with all of iL This particularly is noteworthy when compared with the enumerated legislative powers vested in Congress : " All legislative Powers herein granted . " The Founders understood , based in part on their unfortunate experience under the Articles of Confederation , that the branch of government most likely to be in need of the ability to act quickly and decisively is the executive . The branch most likely to overreach is the legislature .
domestication: 奥巴马总统竞选时，主要指控他的前任践踏了宪法。他所说的“宪法”肯定不是指1787年9月17日签署的那份文件。那张羊皮纸上的第八条开篇明言：“美利坚合众国的行政权应赋予总统。”不是“部分”、“大部分”，甚至不是“几乎全部”，而是全部的行政权都归总统所有。这与国会享有的立法权表述形成鲜明对比：“此处授予的所有立法权。” 创立者们基于他们在邦联条例下的不愉快经历，深知政府中最需要快速果断行动的部门就是行政部门。而最容易越权的，则是立法部门。
foreignization: 总统巴拉克·奥巴马竞选时很大程度上声称他的前任已经撕毁了宪法。他所说的宪法不可能是指1787年9月17日签署的那份文件。该文件第八条以一个简单的声明开始：“行政权力将赋予美利坚合众国的总统。”不是“一些”或“大部分”甚至“除了微不足道的一部分”之外的所有行政权力。总统被赋予了全部的行政权力。这一点在与国会所享有的列举立法权力进行比较时尤为值得注意：“本宪法授予的所有立法权力。” 创立者们基于部分源于他们在《邦联条例》下不幸的经历，认为政府中最需要能够迅速而果断行动的能力的是行政部门。最有可能越权的是立法部门。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The president is vested with all of iL This particularly is noteworthy when compared with the enumerated legislative powers vested in Congress : " All legislative Powers herein granted . " The Founders understood , based in part on their unfortunate experience under the Articles of Confederation , that the branch of government most likely to be in need of the ability to act quickly and decisively is the executive . The branch most likely to overreach is the legislature .

source: " This food plan is so unique and effective because it lays out exactly what to eat , how much , and when , " says Cynthia Sass , M.P.H. , R.D. , whose " No-Hunger , NoHassle Diet . " page 94 , was based on her book . S.A.S.S ! Yourself Slim . " But you also have enough flexibility to customize the meals to fit your preferences . " Sass is a SHAPE contributing editor who splits her time between New York City and Los Angeles . Her go-to workout is hiking .
domestication: 这个饮食计划非常独特且有效，因为它明确地告诉你吃什么、吃多少、什么时候吃，注册营养师辛西娅·萨斯（Cynthia Sass）在她的书《S.A.S.S！让自己苗条》第94页中提到过这一点，这本书也是她“无饥饿、无烦恼饮食”的基础。不过，你也有足够的灵活性来调整餐食，以适应自己的口味。辛西娅是《SHAPE》杂志的特约编辑，她的时间主要在纽约和洛杉矶之间分配。她最喜欢的运动就是徒步。
foreignization: “这个饮食计划之所以独特且有效，是因为它确切地列出了吃什么、吃多少以及何时吃，”Cynthia Sass，M.P.H.，R.D. 说，她的《无饥饿、无麻烦饮食》第94页是基于她的书《S.A.S.S！ yourself slim》。“但你也足够灵活，可以根据自己的喜好定制餐食。”Sass 是《SHAPE》的特约编辑，她的时间在纽约市和洛杉矶之间分配。她的首选锻炼方式是远足。

source: A recent 12,000-person survey by Canada 's official statistical agency led to an estimate that 1,379,000 people ( out of a total population of 26 million ) are waiting for some medical service , ranging from a visit to their general practitioner to nursing home admission . Of those , more than 177,000 people are waiting for surgical procedures . These people must endure lengthy waits before meeting with a specialists and even longer waits before obtaining needed surgery .
domestication: 加拿大官方统计机构最近进行了一项12000人的调查，估计在总人口2600万中，有137万9千人正在等待某种医疗服务，从看家庭医生到入住养老院不等。其中，超过17万7千人正等着做手术。这些人得先排长队才能见到专家，而要等真正动手术，时间就更久了。

source: To help scientists correlate the feel of atomic landscapes with the visual appearance of STM images , the IBM team plans to program an auxiliary computer to display images of sample surfaces that also show the path of the tip as it was steered by the teleoperator . Other possible extensions of the system include controlling the tip 's vertical position by moving the wrist vertically , and using an atomic force microscope ( an STM cousin ) to " feel " atomic forces such as van der Waals forces . And by making the system responsive to sideways ( as opposed to vertical ) forces on the tip , researchers might get a feel for the tip as it automatically " slides off " a hillside , Hollis suggests . This feature could give an operator the sensation of gravity within the atomscape . In the present system , wrist operators feel no resistance or falling sensation as the STM tip ascends and descends over sample surfaces .
domestication: 为了帮助科学家将原子景观的触感与STM图像的视觉效果联系起来，IBM团队计划编写辅助计算机程序，展示样品表面的图像，同时显示操作员通过远程操作系统引导探针路径的过程。系统的其他可能扩展包括：通过手腕上下移动来控制探针的垂直位置，以及使用原子力显微镜（STM的表亲）来“感受”如范德华力等原子间的作用力。此外，霍利斯建议，通过使系统响应探针受到的横向力（而非垂直力），研究人员可以感受到探针自动“滑下”斜坡的感觉，这可能会让操作者在原子世界中体验到重力的存在。目前的系统中，当STM探针在样品表面上升和下降时，操作者的手腕不会感觉到任何阻力或坠落感。
foreignization: 为了帮助科学家将原子景观的感觉与STM图像的视觉外观相关联，IBM团队计划编程一台辅助计算机来显示样本表面的图像，这些图像还显示了由远程操作员引导的探针路径。系统的其他可能扩展包括通过垂直移动手腕来控制探针的垂直位置，以及使用原子力显微镜（STM的近亲）来“感受”如范德华力等原子力。通过使系统对探针横向（而不是垂直）受力作出响应，研究人员可能会感受到探针自动“滑下”山坡的感觉，霍利斯建议。此功能可以给操作员在原子景观中感受到重力的感觉。在目前的系统中，手腕操作员在STM探针上升和下降样本表面时感觉不到任何阻力或坠落感。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

To help scientists correlate the feel of atomic landscapes with the visual appearance of STM images , the IBM team plans to program an auxiliary computer to display images of sample surfaces that also show the path of the tip as it was steered by the teleoperator . Other possible extensions of the system include controlling the tip 's vertical position by moving the wrist vertically , and using an atomic force microscope ( an STM cousin ) to " feel " atomic forces such as van der Waals forces . And by making the system responsive to sideways ( as opposed to vertical ) forces on the tip , researchers might get a feel for the tip as it automatically " slides off " a hillside , Hollis suggests . This feature could give an operator the sensation of gravity within the atomscape . In the present system , wrist operators feel no resistance or falling sensation as the STM tip ascends and descends over sample surfaces .

source: My freelance television crew and I arrived in Paplaka and drove directly to the gray and dismal multi-story military housing that dominates this village of single-family dwellings . Most of the military apartments appeared empty , their windows broken or the panes covered with Russian newspapers . The Russians had simply gone -- no one had announced their departure , and no one mourned their passing . Once the target of demonstrations by local residents and independence activists , Paplaka was now strangely quiet . The gates to the base were open , and a plaque proclaiming the glory of Soviet aviators decorated an empty plinth .
domestication: 我和我的自由职业电视团队一到帕普拉卡，就直奔村里那些灰扑扑、阴沉沉的军属多层住宅楼。这些楼房在这片独栋民宅中显得格外扎眼。大多数军属公寓都空着，窗户要么破了，要么用俄文报纸糊着。俄罗斯人就这么走了，没留下只言片语，也没人表示惋惜。曾经是当地居民和独立活动人士抗议目标的帕普拉卡，现在却出奇地安静。军事基地的大门敞开着，一座空荡荡的底座上立着一块牌子，上面还刻着苏联飞行员的光辉事迹。

source: Katherine Dunn 's Nov. /Dec. essay on women and violence drew strong ( but , thankfully , nonviolent ) responses , both pro and con . We also received feedback on our immigration and obscenity stories , and got the inside story on Western land ( mis ) use from former Bureau of Land Management head , Jim Baca . Plus : the " Dear Bill " postcards keep pouring in ( see opposite page ) . A WOMAN 'S PLACE ?
domestication: 凯瑟琳·邓在11月/12月刊上关于女性与暴力的文章引发了强烈反响，好在都是非暴力的。有人支持，也有人反对。我们还收到了关于移民和猥亵事件的反馈，前土地管理局局长吉姆·巴卡也向我们讲述了西部土地使用不当的内幕。此外，“给比尔的明信片”还在源源不断地寄来（详情见对面页）。妇女的地位究竟何在？

source: " Some questions that are helpful to consider are : What 's my schedule this week ? What 's the weather ? Do I need to use anything up before it goes bad ? What 's the stock on my staples ? , " said Friedman . If you wo n't be home for dinner or have time to make lunch for five days in a row , it could shape your purchases .

source: Nowhere are high hopes more baked in than with Amazon , whose 55 percent rally in 2018 has left it neck-and-neck with Apple in the race to be the first U.S. company with a 13-digit market value . Results from Jeff Bezos 's online superstore cheered investors Thursday . Its six-month net income was more than the previous seven quarters combined .
domestication: 要说期望最高，莫过于亚马逊了。2018年股价飙升55%，让它和苹果在成为美国首个市值破千亿美元的公司竞赛中难分伯仲。杰夫·贝索斯的在线超级商店周四公布的业绩让投资者欣喜若狂。其六个月的净利润超过了过去七个季度的总和。

Nowhere are high hopes more baked in than with Amazon , whose 55 percent rally in 2018 has left it neck-and-neck with Apple in the race to be the first U.S. company with a 13-digit market value . Results from Jeff Bezos 's online superstore cheered investors Thursday . Its six-month net income was more than the previous seven quarters combined .
要说期望最高，莫过于亚马逊了。2018年股价飙升55%，让它和苹果在成为美国首个市值破千亿美元的公司竞赛中难分伯仲。杰夫·贝索斯的在线超级商店周四公布的业绩让投资者欣喜若狂。其六个月的净利润超过了过去七个季度的总和。

source: As Alva 's excavation at Sipan continued in 1988 and 1989 , another rich tomb was also discovered . source: According to Apple-tracking site 9to5Mac , which earlier reported on the note , Kuo believes Apple 's ( aapl ) TrueDepth technology , which uses face scanning to determine whether to open access to a particular phone , is a major technological leap forward . He added that is n't something Android competitors can easily replicate because of its ability to analyze a person 's facial features in 3D . Most competing face scanners analyze a person 's face in 2D .
domestication: 据苹果追踪网站9to5Mac报道，分析师郭明錤认为，苹果的TrueDepth技术是一大飞跃，这项技术通过面部扫描来决定是否解锁手机。他还说，由于这项技术能够三维分析人脸特征，安卓竞争对手很难模仿。大多数竞争者的面部识别系统都只能二维分析人脸。
foreignization: 据追踪苹果的网站9to5Mac报道，Kuo认为苹果(aapl)的TrueDepth技术，该技术通过面部扫描来决定是否开启特定手机的访问权限，是一个重大的技术飞跃。他还补充说，由于其能够三维分析一个人的面部特征，这不是安卓竞争对手可以轻易复制的。大多数竞争的面部扫描仪是二维分析人脸的。

source: Trump also said he liked " to have fun on the course , and that means sort of razzing " his golfing partners . And he demonstrated his idea of razzing : at one point he stopped to chat and brag with a couple playing a round : " You got some place here , I 'll tell you . " He then pointed to one of his foursome and said , " Even these spoiled , rich Jewish guys , they ca n't believe how good this is , you know ? "
domestication: 特朗普还说，他喜欢在球场上“逗乐”，这意思是“逗一逗”他的高尔夫球友。他还展示了他怎么逗乐：有一次他停下来跟一对正在打球的夫妇聊天，吹嘘道：“你们这里真不错，我得告诉你。”然后他指着自己的一个球友说：“就连这些有钱的犹太人都不敢相信这里有多好，你知道吗？”
foreignization: 特朗普还说他喜欢“在球场上寻开心，这意味着有点调侃”他的高尔夫球伙伴。他展示了他所说的调侃：有一次他停下来与一对正在打球的人聊天并吹嘘：“你们在这里可真是有福了，我跟你说。”然后他指着自己四人组中的一位说：“即使是这些被宠坏的、富有的犹太人，他们也无法相信这有多好，你知道吗？”

source: According to the College Scholarship Service , the average student today finishes school $10,000 in debt . For graduate students , the figure is a crushing $35,000 . This level of indebtedness among young adults is unprecedented in American history . Indeed , for all the media hubbub about twenty-somethings , the one thing that really sets them apart from their elders is n't Nirvana or lumberjack shirts , but coming out of college deep in hock . Forget Generation X. Call them Generation Debt .
domestication: 据大学奖学金服务组织的数据，如今的学生毕业时平均背负1万美元的债务。对于研究生来说，这个数字更是高达3.5万美元，让人喘不过气来。年轻人负债累累，在美国历史上前所未有。其实，尽管媒体对二十几岁的年轻人议论纷纷，但真正让他们与长辈不同的，不是涅槃乐队或伐木工衬衫，而是从大学毕业时已经欠下了一屁股债。Forget Generation X吧，干脆叫他们“负债一代”得了。
foreignization: 根据大学奖学金服务的统计，如今平均每个学生毕业时负债10,000美元。对于研究生，这个数字高达令人窒息的35,000美元。年轻成年人中这种程度的负债在美国历史上是前所未有的。确实，尽管媒体对二十多岁的年轻人有很多热议，但真正使他们与长辈区分开来的，并不是涅槃乐队或伐木工衬衫，而是从大学毕业时就背负着沉重的债务。忘记X世代吧。称他们为债务世代。

According to the College Scholarship Service , the average student today finishes school $10,000 in debt . For graduate students , the figure is a crushing $35,000 . Forget Generation X. Call them Generation Debt .

source: Lobbying and campaign finance reform could clearly help , but they are no panaceas . Both kinds of reform run up against the constitutional right of free speech . Lobbyists can be asked to disclose their activities but not to desist from them . Candidates can be financed publicly , but nothing prevents private interests from waging their own campaign on behalf of a candidate . If there were campaign reform , these kind of efforts would probably multiply .
domestication: 游说和竞选资金改革显然能起到一定作用，但它们并非万能药。这两种改革都面临着言论自由这一宪法权利的障碍。可以要求游说者公开他们的活动，但不能阻止他们继续游说。候选人可以接受公共资助，但私利集团照样可以为自己支持的候选人开展独立的竞选活动。一旦实施了竞选改革，这类活动反而可能会更多。
foreignization: 游说和竞选财务改革显然有助于解决问题，但它们并非万能药。这两种改革都会遇到宪法赋予的言论自由权利的障碍。可以说要求游说者披露他们的活动，但不能要求他们停止这些活动。候选人可以得到公共资金的支持，但并不能阻止私人利益集团为某位候选人开展自己的竞选活动。如果实行了竞选改革，这类努力可能会增加。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Lobbying and campaign finance reform could clearly help , but they are no panaceas . Both kinds of reform run up against the constitutional right of free speech . Lobbyists can be asked to disclose their activities but not to desist from them . Candidates can be financed publicly , but nothing prevents private interests from waging their own campaign on behalf of a candidate . If there were campaign reform , these kind of efforts would probably multiply .
游说和竞选资金改革显然能起到一定作用，但它们并非万能药。这两种改革都面临着言论自由这一宪法权利的障碍。可以要求游说者公开他们的活动，但不能阻止他们继续游说。候选人可以接受公共资助，但私利集团照样可以为自己支持的候选人开展独立的竞选活动。一旦实施了竞选改革，这类活动反而可能会更多。

source: What had started as a lark became a regular weekly event . The original purpose of these jams was to simply blow off steam and encourage camaraderie . " There 's not a lot of community spirit among musicians in L.A. , " Crow says . She soon discovered that the album she had really wanted to make all along was taking shape . With Bottrell producing and everyone collaborating on the writing and playing . Crow achieved the loose , organic feel she desired . " And it was good for my confidence to be among those very healthy egos . I had to really stand up for myself , and that made me commit to my ideas . "
domestication: 一开始只是图个乐子，后来却成了每周固定的活动。这些即兴演奏会的初衷就是放松心情，增进友谊。克劳说：“洛杉矶的音乐圈里，大家之间的团结精神可不多见。”她很快发现，自己一直想做的专辑正在逐渐成形。在博特雷尔的制作下，大家一起写歌、一起演奏，克劳实现了那种随性自然的感觉。“和那些自信满满的人在一起，对我的自信心也有好处。我得挺直腰板，坚守自己的想法。”
foreignization: 起初只是一时兴起，后来变成了每周一次的固定活动。这些即兴演奏会的初衷只是简单地发泄一下情绪，增进彼此间的友谊。“在洛杉矶的音乐圈子里，大家并没有太多的社区精神，”克劳说。她很快发现，自己一直以来真正想要制作的专辑正在成形。在博特尔的制作下，每个人都参与了创作和演奏，克劳实现了她所期望的那种轻松、自然的感觉。“在那些非常自信的人中间，这对我的自信心也有好处。我必须坚定地维护自己的立场，这让我对自己的想法更加坚定。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

What had started as a lark became a regular weekly event . The original purpose of these jams was to simply blow off steam and encourage camaraderie . " There 's not a lot of community spirit among musicians in L.A. , " Crow says . She soon discovered that the album she had really wanted to make all along was taking shape . With Bottrell producing and everyone collaborating on the writing and playing . Crow achieved the loose , organic feel she desired . " And it was good for my confidence to be among those very healthy egos . I had to really stand up for myself , and that made me commit to my ideas . "
一开始只是图个乐子，后来却成了每周固定的活动。这些即兴演奏会的初衷就是放松心情，增进友谊。克劳说：“洛杉矶的音乐圈里，大家之间的团结精神可不多见。”她很快发现，自己一直想做的专辑正在逐渐成形。在博特雷尔的制作下，大家一起写歌、一起演奏，克劳实现了那种随性自然的感觉。“和那些自信满满的人在一起，对我的自信心也有好处。我得挺直腰板，坚守自己的想法。”

What had started as a lark became a regular weekly event . The original purpose of these jams was to simply blow off steam and encourage camaraderie . " There 's not a lot of community spirit among musicians in L.A. , " Crow says . She soon discovered that the album she had really wanted to make all along was taking shape . With Bottrell producing and everyone collaborating on the writing and playing . Crow achieved the loose , organic feel she desired . " And it was good for my confidence to be among those very healthy egos . I had to really stand up for myself , and that made me commit to my ideas . "

起初只是一时兴起，后来变成了每周一次的固定活动。这些即兴演奏会的初衷只是简单地发泄一下情绪，增进彼此间的友谊。“在洛杉矶的音乐圈子里，大家并没有太多的社区精神，”克劳说。她很快发现，自己一直以来真正想要制作的专辑正在成形。在博特尔的制作下，每个人都参与了创作和演奏，克劳实现了她所期望的那种轻松、自然的感觉。“在那些非常自信的人中间，这对我的自信心也有好处。我必须坚定地维护自己的立场，这让我对自己的想法更加坚定。”

source: Speaking of armchair-traveling , The Splender of France : Chatsaux , Mansions , and Coon . try Houses ( Rizzoli. $110 ) provides a breathtaking tour . source: Warner Cable brought the first interactive TV system to Columbus , Ohio in 1977 . The Qube came with an 18-button remote control and a cable box that sent and received data at 256K per second , five times the speed of a 56K modem . Subscribers got access to 30 channels , including pay-per-view movies . Three years later American Express invested $175 million to form Warner-Amex Cable , offering the Qube in Dallas . The company spent $23 million to get 50,000 subscribers in Columbus . But viewers were turned off by the higher prices : $40 for a standard cable box and $200 for the Qube .
domestication: 1977年，华纳电缆把首个互动电视系统带到了俄亥俄州的哥伦布市。这个叫Qube的系统配有一个18键遥控器和一个可以每秒发送和接收256K数据的机顶盒，速度是56K调制解调器的五倍。用户可以收看30个频道，包括按次付费的电影。三年后，美国运通投资1.75亿美元与华纳成立了华纳-美国运通电缆公司，在达拉斯推出了Qube服务。公司在哥伦布市花了2300万美元才拉到5万用户。但观众对高价望而却步：普通有线电视机顶盒要40美元，而Qube则要200美元。
foreignization: 沃纳电缆于1977年在俄亥俄州哥伦布市推出了首个交互式电视系统。Qube配备了一个18键遥控器和一个每秒可发送和接收256K数据的有线电视盒，速度是56K调制解调器的五倍。用户可以访问30个频道，包括按次付费的电影。三年后，美国运通投资1.75亿美元与沃纳成立沃纳-美国运通有线电视公司，在达拉斯提供Qube服务。该公司花费2300万美元在哥伦布市获得了50,000名订户。但观众对较高的价格感到不满：标准有线电视盒的价格为40美元，而Qube的价格为200美元。

The company spent $23 million to get 50,000 subscribers in Columbus . But viewers were turned off by the higher prices : $40 for a standard cable box and $200 for the Qube .

source: Take the test . Everyone 45 or older should have a fasting plasma glucose test-a snapshot of blood sugar levels after an 8-to-12-hour fast . High readings indicate that glucose is n't entering the body 's cells , a sign of insulin resistance or a lack of insulin . Levels higher than 126 mg/dl on 2 different days indicate the presence of diabetes . But a reading higher than 110 can signal impaired fasting glucose , a condition that can lead to type 2 diabetes and that raises the risk of heart attack and stroke .
domestication: 去做个检查吧。45岁以上的人都应该做一次空腹血糖测试，这能反映出在8到12小时不吃东西后，你的血糖水平。如果数值偏高，说明葡萄糖不能顺利进入身体的细胞，这可能是胰岛素抵抗或胰岛素不足的迹象。连续两天的检测结果超过126毫克/分升，就表明有糖尿病了。但只要读数高于110毫克/分升，就可能是空腹血糖受损，这种情况容易发展成二型糖尿病，还会增加心脏病和中风的风险。

But a reading higher than 110 can signal impaired fasting glucose , a condition that can lead to type 2 diabetes and that raises the risk of heart attack and stroke .

source: That said , the Model X we eventually received had solid build quality , and the doors opened and closed without issue approximately 120 times during our tests . And , while I 'm still not a fan of doors that open up like I 'm in an episode Miami Vice or 2000s music video , the Model X does give me faith that the Model 3 , the $35,000 Tesla for the average person , will be a well-made car that also happens to change the world of driving with its electric power train .
domestication: 话说回来，我们最终收到的Model X质量还是很不错的，测试中车门开了关了大约120次，都没出什么问题。虽然我还是不太喜欢那些打开就像进了《迈阿密风云》或者千禧年音乐视频的车门，但Model X还是让我对Model 3这款平民版的35000美元特斯拉充满了信心。这车不仅做工出色，而且凭借其电动驱动系统，肯定会改变驾驶世界。

source: Nielsen , in other words , carried Trump 's immigration crackdown as far as she could without risking contempt of court . Under her leadership , the agency engaged in horrific human rights abuses and violence against innocent migrants , including children . Nonetheless , it could , indeed , get worse . Trump 's " near-systematic purge " at " the nation 's second-largest national security agency , " as one senior administration official put it to CNN , is an ominous indication that Trump will now brook no independent judgment at DHS . He wants an agency that does exactly what he asks . And what he asks is frequently cruel , brutal , and lawless .
domestication: 换句话说，尼尔森在不冒法庭蔑视风险的情况下，尽其所能地执行了特朗普的移民打击政策。在她的领导下，相关部门对无辜的移民，包括儿童，实施了骇人听闻的人权侵犯和暴力行为。然而，情况可能会更糟。据一位高级政府官员对CNN所说，特朗普在“全国第二大国家安全机构”进行的“近乎系统的清洗”，预示着特朗普将不再容忍国土安全部的任何独立判断。他要的是一个唯命是从的部门。而他的命令往往残忍、野蛮、无法无天。
foreignization: 尼尔森，换句话说，在不冒蔑视法庭风险的情况下，将特朗普的移民打击行动推进到了极致。在她的领导下，该机构对无辜移民（包括儿童）实施了可怕的侵犯人权和暴力行为。尽管如此，情况确实可能变得更糟。正如一位高级政府官员向CNN所说，特朗普在“全国第二大国家安全机构”进行的“近乎系统性的清洗”是一个不祥的信号，表明特朗普现在不容许国土安全部有任何独立判断。他想要一个完全按照他的要求行事的机构。而他的要求往往是残忍、野蛮和无法无天的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nielsen , in other words , carried Trump 's immigration crackdown as far as she could without risking contempt of court . Under her leadership , the agency engaged in horrific human rights abuses and violence against innocent migrants , including children . Nonetheless , it could , indeed , get worse . Trump 's " near-systematic purge " at " the nation 's second-largest national security agency , " as one senior administration official put it to CNN , is an ominous indication that Trump will now brook no independent judgment at DHS . He wants an agency that does exactly what he asks . And what he asks is frequently cruel , brutal , and lawless .
换句话说，尼尔森在不冒法庭蔑视风险的情况下，尽其所能地执行了特朗普的移民打击政策。在她的领导下，相关部门对无辜的移民，包括儿童，实施了骇人听闻的人权侵犯和暴力行为。然而，情况可能会更糟。据一位高级政府官员对CNN所说，特朗普在“全国第二大国家安全机构”进行的“近乎系统的清洗”，预示着特朗普将不再容忍国土安全部的任何独立判断。他要的是一个唯命是从的部门。而他的命令往往残忍、野蛮、无法无天。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nielsen , in other words , carried Trump 's immigration crackdown as far as she could without risking contempt of court . Under her leadership , the agency engaged in horrific human rights abuses and violence against innocent migrants , including children . Nonetheless , it could , indeed , get worse . Trump 's " near-systematic purge " at " the nation 's second-largest national security agency , " as one senior administration official put it to CNN , is an ominous indication that Trump will now brook no independent judgment at DHS . He wants an agency that does exactly what he asks . And what he asks is frequently cruel , brutal , and lawless .

尼尔森，换句话说，在不冒蔑视法庭风险的情况下，将特朗普的移民打击行动推进到了极致。在她的领导下，该机构对无辜移民（包括儿童）实施了可怕的侵犯人权和暴力行为。尽管如此，情况确实可能变得更糟。正如一位高级政府官员向CNN所说，特朗普在“全国第二大国家安全机构”进行的“近乎系统性的清洗”是一个不祥的信号，表明特朗普现在不容许国土安全部有任何独立判断。他想要一个完全按照他的要求行事的机构。而他的要求往往是残忍、野蛮和无法无天的。

source: Modern research has shown frankincense to have potentially useful medicinal properties . In the lab , its boswellic acids have acted as anti-inflammatory agents by preventing the formation of leukotrienes , substances that can trigger allergic reactions . Another lab study showed that boswellic acids can inhibit the growth of human leukemia cells . Additional research is required to verify these activities and to determine how useful this herb may be in treating inflammatory conditions or cancer .
domestication: 现代研究显示，乳香可能具有有用的药用价值。在实验室里，它所含的乳香酸能阻止白三烯的形成，而白三烯是引发过敏反应的罪魁祸首。另一项实验室研究表明，乳香酸还能抑制人类白血病细胞的生长。不过，还需要进一步的研究来验证这些效果，看看这种草药在治疗炎症或癌症方面到底有多大用处。

source: We sail after sunset . When it 's full dark and we 're well away from the light pollution of Honolulu and Waikiki , Joe Rao takes a bunch of us out on deck to look at the constellations . Captain L. Richard Haugh has turned off all the lights the rules of the sea will allow , and the seeing is good .

source: NEAR THE WIND- and water-swept expanse of a park on the coast of Washington State , energy born in distant storms rises out of the seas to break against the bar of one of the great rivers of North America , the Columbia . In the park there 's a terrific view of a bay north of the breakers , and in the middle of the view there 's a sink .
domestication: 在华盛顿州海滨公园附近的风起云涌之地，远处风暴孕育的能量从海中涌出，拍打着北美大河之一哥伦比亚河的河口。公园里可以远眺到破浪北边的一片海湾，而在这片景色正中央，有一个下沉的洼地。
foreignization: 在华盛顿州海岸一个风蚀水侵的公园附近，远方风暴中产生的能量从海中升起，冲向北美一条大河——哥伦比亚河的沙洲。在公园里，可以看到破浪北侧的一个海湾的壮丽景色，在这片景色的中央有一个下沉区。

source: The largest externalities of the automobile are : ( 1 ) highway congestion , ( 2 ) injuries from crashes , and ( 3 ) emissions causing air pollution . Other important externalities are noise , water pollution due to people dumping used motor oil down the drain , leaky underground storage tanks , abandoned cars , etc. ; they are less important than the big three .
domestication: 汽车带来的最大外部性问题有三个：一是高速公路拥堵，二是交通事故造成的伤害，三是排放导致的空气污染。其他一些重要的外部性问题包括噪音、因为人们把废旧机油倒进下水道造成的水污染、地下储油罐泄漏、废弃车辆等；不过这些问题相比前三大问题来说，重要性要小得多。
foreignization: 汽车最大的外部性是：(1) 高速公路拥堵，(2) 碰撞造成的伤害，以及 (3) 导致空气污染的排放。其他重要的外部性包括噪音、由于人们将用过的发动机油倒入下水道造成的水污染、地下储油罐泄漏、废弃汽车等；它们的重要性不如前三者。

source: " The big picture is the key , " says renowned predator biologist Maurice Hornocker , who founded the nonprofit Wildlife Research Institute , which is administering the $120,000 coyote study and a simultaneous study of Yellowstone mountain lions , which could be sharply affected by wolves cutting into their hunting base . " What Murie did and what we 're doing on an even more advanced basis is looking at all the environmental influences that affect an organism directly and indirectly . It 's a seamless fabric . "
domestication: 大局为重，著名掠食者生物学家莫里斯·霍恩克这样说道。他创立了非营利的野生动物研究所，该研究所正在管理一项耗资120万美元的郊狼研究，同时也在进行一项关于黄石公园山狮的研究，这些山狮可能因为狼群侵入它们的猎物基地而受到严重影响。“马里做的和我们现在在更先进层面上做的，都是在看所有直接影响和间接影响一个生物体的环境因素。”霍恩克说，“这就像一张无缝的织网。”
foreignization: “大局是关键，”著名的捕食者生物学家莫里斯·霍恩克说，他创立了非营利的野生动物研究所，该研究所正在管理12万美元的郊狼研究和同时进行的黄石山狮研究，后者可能因狼群侵入其狩猎基地而受到严重影响。“穆里所做的以及我们正在以更先进基础进行的是研究所有直接影响和间接影响有机体的环境因素。这是一个无缝的整体。”

" The big picture is the key , " says renowned predator biologist Maurice Hornocker , who founded the nonprofit Wildlife Research Institute , which is administering the $120,000 coyote study and a simultaneous study of Yellowstone mountain lions , which could be sharply affected by wolves cutting into their hunting base . " What Murie did and what we 're doing on an even more advanced basis is looking at all the environmental influences that affect an organism directly and indirectly . It 's a seamless fabric . "

source: Comics , shows , and films about people blessed with incredible gifts almost invariably end up telling stories about how understanding the balance between power and responsibility is what keeps them human despite the overly-dramatic lives they lead . Shuichi Aso 's The Disastrous Life of Saiki K dabbles in that space some , but also knows how played out that narrative is .

source: That is the question behind research from the University of Wisconsin-Madison , and a new study suggests that as little as two weeks of compassion meditation training -- intentionally cultivating positive wishes to understand and relieve the suffering of others -- may reduce the distress a person feels when witnessing another 's suffering . It may also improve their ability and likelihood to respond with compassion .
domestication: 这正是威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校研究背后的问题。最新的一项研究表明，仅仅两周的慈悲冥想训练——即有意培养理解并减轻他人痛苦的正面愿望——就能减少人在目睹他人受苦时的不适感。同时，这种训练还能增强人们以慈悲回应的能力和意愿。

That is the question behind research from the University of Wisconsin-Madison , and a new study suggests that as little as two weeks of compassion meditation training -- intentionally cultivating positive wishes to understand and relieve the suffering of others -- may reduce the distress a person feels when witnessing another 's suffering . It may also improve their ability and likelihood to respond with compassion .
这正是威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校研究背后的问题。最新的一项研究表明，仅仅两周的慈悲冥想训练——即有意培养理解并减轻他人痛苦的正面愿望——就能减少人在目睹他人受苦时的不适感。同时，这种训练还能增强人们以慈悲回应的能力和意愿。

That is the question behind research from the University of Wisconsin-Madison , and a new study suggests that as little as two weeks of compassion meditation training -- intentionally cultivating positive wishes to understand and relieve the suffering of others -- may reduce the distress a person feels when witnessing another 's suffering . It may also improve their ability and likelihood to respond with compassion .
这是威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校研究背后的问题，一项新的研究表明，短短两周的慈悲冥想训练——有意培养理解并减轻他人痛苦的积极愿望——可能会减少人在目睹他人痛苦时感受到的痛苦。它还可能提高他们以慈悲回应的能力和可能性。

source: Sunday , Oct. 29 . I got a message that the men hope to see us " after the dark moon of November . " Mom says she has heard reference to this also but wo n't say from where . A lieutenant colonel at Ft . Bragg says to prepare ourselves mentally because something is going to happen in next two weeks . Of course we have heard this before , too ! Mom called tonight . Apparently Don says he would give anything to see the light of day . They are getting angry and I hope my intuition is wrong but it sounds like they may be starting to panic . They have requested a gun .
domestication: 10月29日，周日。我收到消息说，男人们希望在“11月的黑月之后”见我们。妈妈也听说过这个说法，但不愿透露是从哪儿听来的。布拉格堡的一位中校说，我们要做好心理准备，因为接下来两周可能会有事情发生。当然，这种话我们也听过不少次了！妈妈今晚打来电话。看来唐说他什么都愿意做，就为了再见天日。他们越来越烦躁了，我希望我的直觉是错的，但他们听起来像是快慌了。他们还要求提供枪支。

source: This multi-award winning puzzle-adventure platformer from the team behind Limbo includes gorgeous art and animation , but with a darker and even frightening tone . You play as an unnamed boy exploring a monochromatic , scary world , solving puzzles along the way . The ( creepy ) sound design also stands out , and works well to immerse players in the world when wearing their headphones . The app works across iPhone , iPad and Apple TV and has 10,000 5-star reviews on the App Store .
domestication: 这款由《地狱边境》团队打造的屡获殊荣的解谜冒险平台游戏，画面精美，动画流畅，但氛围更加阴暗甚至有些吓人。你将扮演一个无名的小男孩，在这个黑白恐怖的世界中探索，一路上还要解开各种谜题。声音设计也相当诡异，戴上耳机后，这种效果会让你更加身临其境。这款游戏支持iPhone、iPad和Apple TV，还在App Store上收获了10000条五星级评价。
foreignization: 这款由制作《地狱边境》的团队打造的屡获殊荣的解谜冒险平台游戏，包括了精美的艺术和动画，但带有更加阴暗甚至令人恐惧的基调。你将扮演一个无名男孩，在一个单色、恐怖的世界中探索，沿途解决谜题。游戏的（诡异的）音效设计也非常突出，当你戴着耳机时，能够很好地将玩家沉浸在游戏世界中。该应用可在iPhone、iPad和Apple TV上使用，并在App Store上有10,000条五星评价。

source: Sallie Mae has reaped its rewards as well . Set up as a federally chartered corporation by President Nixon , Sallie Mae buys student loans from banks and then resells the debt to investors . Currently , Sallie Mae owns about 5 million such loans , or a third of the total outstanding . Yet for a quasi-governmental agency , Sallie Mae has bosses who pay themselves like princes of the private sector . The General Accounting Office says that Lawrence Hough , Sallie Mae 's president , paid himself more than $2 million in 1991 . His deputy got $1.7 million . Jack Anderson recently reported that even the fifth man on Sallie Mae 's totem pole earns more than twice what the president of the United States is paid .
domestication: 萨莉·梅也尝到了甜头。这家公司在尼克松总统任内成立，是一家联邦特许的公司，专门从银行手中收购学生贷款，再把这些债务打包卖给投资者。目前，萨莉·梅手握大约500万笔这样的贷款，占了整个市场近三分之一的份额。作为一家半官方机构，萨莉·梅的高管们却像私营企业的大老板一样给自己开高薪。据政府会计办公室透露，萨莉·梅的总裁劳伦斯·豪夫在1991年给自己发了超过200万美元的薪酬。他的副手也不少，拿了170万美元。杰克·安德森最近还报道说，萨莉·梅薪酬榜上排第五的人，挣得都比美国总统还要多两倍。
foreignization: 萨莉·梅公司也获得了它的回报。该公司由尼克松总统设立为联邦特许公司，萨莉·梅从银行购买学生贷款，然后将债务转售给投资者。目前，萨莉·梅拥有约500万笔此类贷款，占总未偿贷款的三分之一。然而，作为一家准政府机构，萨莉·梅的管理层支付给自己的薪酬如同私营部门的王子。总审计局称，萨莉·梅的总裁劳伦斯·豪在1991年支付给自己超过200万美元。他的副手得到了170万美元。杰克·安德森最近报道，即使在萨莉·梅的权力图腾柱上排第五的人，其收入也超过了美国总统薪酬的两倍。

Because right now I 'm not seeing it .

source: MOTHER JONES : Your film , which hits theaters this summer , was inspired by Alex 's New York Times Magazine piece on CeaseFire , a group that aims to stop the spread of violence by training former criminals to intervene in street feuds and convince people not to retaliate . What got you interested ?
domestication: 母亲琼斯：你今年夏天上映的电影灵感来自亚历克斯在《纽约时报杂志》上关于CeaseFire的文章。CeaseFire这个组织旨在通过培训前罪犯来干预街头争斗，劝说人们不要报复，从而阻止暴力蔓延。你是怎么对这个话题感兴趣的？
foreignization: 《母亲琼斯》：您今年夏天上映的电影是受到亚历克斯在《纽约时报杂志》上关于CeaseFire的文章的启发。CeaseFire是一个旨在通过培训前罪犯介入街头争端并说服人们不要报复来阻止暴力蔓延的组织。是什么引起了您的兴趣？

source: No answer . Paper rattled . She could n't , she told herself , hear teeth sinking into white fontiana any more than Peter could see her and Chris in bed , Chris 's long smooth arms pulling her to him , his long smooth body hairless and pure in a way she thought only women 's bodies could be . Only the ravenousness of the two men made any sound .
domestication: 没有回答。纸张沙沙作响。她告诉自己，她听不到牙齿咬合白番红花的声音，就像彼得看不见她和克里斯在床上一样，克里斯长长的光滑手臂将她拥入怀中，他那颀长的身体毫无毛发，纯净得让她以为只有女性的身体才会如此。唯一能听见的，就是两个男人的饕餮之声。
foreignization: 没有回答。纸张沙沙作响。她告诉自己，她听不到牙齿咬合白色枫丹尼的声音，就像彼得看不见她和克里斯在床上一样，克里斯的长而光滑的手臂将她拉向自己，他那长而光滑的身体毫无毛发，以一种她认为只有女性身体才有的纯净方式。只有两个男人的贪婪发出了声音。

source: Yet more telescope data soon weighed in . Visible-light spectra taken with telescopes at Kitt Peak near Tucson , Ariz. , indicated that C153 had undergone a strong burst of star formation in its recent past , a sign that it had been subject to some cataclysmic event . Kitt Peak observations also identified a bright tail extending from the galaxy .

source: Breeding Vegetable Crops , edited by Mark J. Bassett ( AVI Publishing , 1986 ) . Fourteen chapters covering 14 vegetables : asparagus , bean , cabbage , carrot , corn ( sweet ) , cucumber , lettuce , onion , pea , pepper , squash , sweet potato , tomato , and watermelon . Each chapter includes sections on the general botany of the vegetable floral botany and controlled pollination ( doing or avoiding crosses ) , major breeding achievements of the past , an overview of current breeding goals , genetics , gene lists , and an extensive bibliography of the current professional literature . If your vegetable love is one of the 14 , this book is a must . It assumes an extensive background in genetics and plant breeding , but much of the book is useful for novices too .
domestication: 《蔬菜作物育种》，马克·J·巴斯贝特编著（AVI出版社，1986年）。这本书共有十四章，分别介绍了十四种蔬菜：芦笋、豆类、卷心菜、胡萝卜、甜玉米、黄瓜、生菜、洋葱、豌豆、辣椒、南瓜、红薯、番茄和西瓜。每章内容包括这些蔬菜的一般植物学知识、花的植物学特性及控制授粉（做杂交或避免杂交）、过去的主要育种成就、当前的育种目标概述、遗传学、基因列表，还有大量的专业文献参考书目。如果你对这十四种蔬菜中的任何一种情有独钟，这本书可不能错过。书中假定读者有一定的遗传学和植物育种背景，但很多内容对初学者来说也很有用。

source: " First and foremost , I want our paper to help people understand how much we do n't know about hate -- hate is not a uniform phenomenon . source: The few messengers who are still around tend to be diehard romantics , a leaner and meaner breed scrapping for a dwindling number of pickups . They know that , beleaguered as it is , the courier business is not likely to vanish anytime soon . There will always be vital documents that must be notarized , blueprints to be hauled crosstown , depositions and payroll sheets in need of signatures . The laws of human procrastination being more or less constant , one can assume there will always be people with packages that absolutely , positively must get there in fifteen minutes . And there will always be a handful of American business districts -- New York , Boston , Chicago , San Francisco , and Washington -- where crowds and thick traffic make bicycle travel the only practical form of express delivery .
domestication: 现在还留在快递行业的信使，大多是死忠的浪漫主义者，他们是一支更精干、更顽强的小队伍，在越来越少的业务中奋力拼搏。他们知道，尽管这个行业处境艰难，但不太可能很快消失。总有些重要文件需要公证，总有些设计图纸需要跨城运送，总有些庭审记录和工资单需要签名。人总是会拖延，所以总会有人，他们的包裹绝对、必须在十五分钟内送达。在美国的一些商业区——纽约、波士顿、芝加哥、旧金山和华盛顿——人群和拥堵的交通使得自行车送货成为唯一实际的快速配送方式。
foreignization: 仍然在从事这份工作的少数信使往往是不折不扣的浪漫主义者，他们是更加精干且更具竞争力的一群人，在逐渐减少的送货机会中拼争。他们知道，尽管快递业务已经陷入困境，但不太可能很快消失。总有一些重要文件需要公证，蓝图需要运送到市区另一端，还需要有人去取存档和工资单以获取签名。由于人类拖延的规律大致不变，可以假设总是会有人有必须在十五分钟内送达的包裹。而且，总会有几个美国商业区——纽约、波士顿、芝加哥、旧金山和华盛顿——在那里，拥挤的人群和密集的交通使得自行车运输成为唯一实际的快速送货方式。

The few messengers who are still around tend to be diehard romantics , a leaner and meaner breed scrapping for a dwindling number of pickups . There will always be vital documents that must be notarized , blueprints to be hauled crosstown , depositions and payroll sheets in need of signatures . The laws of human procrastination being more or less constant , one can assume there will always be people with packages that absolutely , positively must get there in fifteen minutes . And there will always be a handful of American business districts -- New York , Boston , Chicago , San Francisco , and Washington -- where crowds and thick traffic make bicycle travel the only practical form of express delivery .
