source: Kobayashi proceeded by covering the canvas , laying in all values and shapes . " At this point , I want to know how every thing relates , " he explained . He next asked the students to decide what color to make the model 's blouse . He suggested a cool color so the color of the face would n't look drab . The students decided on lavender , and Kobayashi mixed a periwinkle from a combination of violet gray and rose . He then covered the background with a warm beige using a No. 8 brush and a palette knife , cutting into the hair form with the background paint . He kept this color light to maintain the silhouette of the figure . The artist says he avoids blue for the background because it looks too much like the sky .
domestication: 小林接着给画布铺色，把所有明暗和形状都勾勒出来。“这一步，我得看看每个部分怎么搭配。”他解释道。然后，他让同学们决定模特的上衣要用什么颜色。他建议选个冷色调，这样脸部的颜色才不会显得暗淡。同学们商量后决定用淡紫色，小林便将灰紫和玫瑰红混合，调出了石青色。接下来，他用8号笔和调色刀，将背景涂成暖米色，并用背景色切入头发的轮廓，保持人物剪影的清晰。小林说他从不在背景中使用蓝色，因为那样看起来太像天空了。
foreignization: 小林接着覆盖了画布，铺陈了所有的明暗和形状。“在这一点上，我想知道每样东西是如何关联的，”他解释道。接下来，他让学生们决定模特的衬衫要涂成什么颜色。他建议使用冷色调，这样脸部的颜色就不会显得暗淡。学生们选择了紫罗兰色，小林将紫色灰和玫瑰混合，调出了天蓝色。然后，他用8号画笔和调色刀将背景涂成了暖米色，并用背景颜料切进头发的形状。他保持这种颜色较浅，以维持人物的轮廓。这位艺术家说，他避免在背景中使用蓝色，因为这样看起来太像天空。

source: Laureano allows me to copy my mother 's file . From 1973 until her mammogram in 1983 , there is only one apparent reference to her breasts . source: As it turns out , one might not have to ask too hard . Enectali Figueroa dreamed of space exploration when he was growing up in Puerto Rico and now at age 33 is an astrophysicist at NASA 's Goddard Space Flight Center . An aspiring astronaut , he turned aside academic and business overtures after getting a graduate degree from Stanford . A stint helping design roller coasters at Walt Disney Imagineering could n't compete with " going into space and beyond , " he says .
domestication: 结果呢，有时候梦想真的不必苦苦追求。埃涅克塔利·菲格罗亚从小在波多黎各长大，儿时就梦想着探索太空，如今33岁的他已经成为美国宇航局戈达德太空飞行中心的天体物理学家了。他一直向往成为宇航员，在斯坦福大学取得研究生学位后，面对学术界和商界的邀请，他都婉言谢绝了。他说，即便是在迪士尼幻想工程帮忙设计过山车，也比不上“飞向太空，探索未知”的吸引力。

source: WHEN PETER DUNDAS swaggers into a room , his hunky six-foot-two-inch frame poured into low-slung , hip-hugging white jeans and his blond tresses burnt to an ocean crisp , you could be forgiven for miscalculating his vocation . The heeled Yves Saint Laurent boots , giant silver belt buckle , and sharp-shouldered jacket summon Jim Morrison ambling freely along Venice Beach , but Dundas , 41 , is no spoiled , tortured rocker . And he 's no beach bum either , though his never-fade golden tan , hard body , and super-chill attitude seem to be the spoils of a life spent hunting for the perfect wave .
domestication: 彼得·邓达斯大步走进房间，他高大健硕的身材，一米八八的个头，穿着低腰贴身的白色牛仔裤，金发在阳光下晒得格外耀眼，你可能会误以为他是干啥的。脚上一双高跟的圣罗兰靴子，腰间一个巨大的银色皮带扣，再加上一件肩部线条硬朗的夹克，这造型让人联想到吉姆·莫里森在威尼斯海滩上随意漫步的样子。但其实，41岁的邓达斯既不是个被宠坏的摇滚歌手，也不是整天泡在海滩上的懒汉，尽管他那永不褪色的古铜肤色、结实的肌肉和随性自在的态度，似乎是在寻找完美海浪时的意外收获。

source: In fact , the U.S. Senate should refuse to confirm anyone President Trump nominates to the Supreme Court -- until Trump renominates and the Senate confirms Judge Merrick Garland . source: That history did not come to these shores on Sept 1 1 , 2001- or even on Feb. 26 , 1993 , when a duck bomb detonated in the basement of the World Trade Center , killing six and wounding hundreds . It came - at the latest - in the 1980s , when a couple of FBI agents spotted a group of men taking what looked like particularly aggressive target practice in Calverton , N. Y , ironicaUy enough , the Long Island town in which a veterans ' National Cemetery is located . When they approached , they were accused of what we now caU racial profiling , and they backed off .
domestication: 历史的阴影并非是在2001年9月11日才降临这片土地，也不是在1993年2月26日世贸中心地下室的卡车炸弹爆炸，造成六人死亡、数百人受伤时才初现端倪。其实，最晚在上世纪80年代，当两位联邦调查局特工在纽约州卡尔弗顿镇发现一群男子进行异常激烈的射击训练时，这一切就已经埋下了伏笔。卡尔弗顿这个小镇，恰好还有一座国家公墓，安息着许多老兵。特工们上前询问时，却被指责为“种族歧视”，只好作罢。
foreignization: 这段历史并没有在2001年9月11日来到这片土地上——甚至不是在1993年2月26日，当时一枚汽车炸弹在世界贸易中心地下室爆炸，造成6人死亡，数百人受伤。它最迟是在上世纪80年代到来的，当时有几名联邦调查局特工发现一群人在纽约卡尔弗顿进行看起来特别具侵略性的射击训练，具有讽刺意味的是，卡尔弗顿是长岛的一个小镇，那里有一座国家退伍军人公墓。当他们靠近时，被指控我们现在称之为种族定性的行为，于是他们退缩了。

source: " If you have a business that has sufficient revenues to cover operational expenses and a little left over to cover debt , that is a business that can survive bankruptcy . " But if you have a business that ca n't meet operational expenses even after you have trimmed all that fat , then that is a candidate for liquidation , says Salerno .
domestication: 如果你的生意收入能覆盖运营成本，还能剩下一点来还债，这样的生意就能挺过破产的难关。但萨勒诺说，如果即便你已经削减了一切不必要的开支，收入还是不够支付日常运营费用，那这个生意就该考虑清算了。
foreignization: “如果你的业务有足够收入来覆盖运营支出，并且还有一些盈余可以覆盖债务，那么这就是一个能够在破产中生存下来的业务。”但如果即使在削减了所有不必要的开支后，你的业务仍然无法满足运营支出，那么这就成为了清算的对象，萨尔诺说。

source: A few years ago my wife and I were in West Africa for three weeks . We had plenty of luxuries , like food and water , but nothing to read , and the only books and magazines available were in French . Then , in our hotel in Lome , the capital of Togo , I discovered five Lew Archers , secondhand paperbacks that had been badly printed in India . The newsdealer wanted an extortionary ten dollars apiece for them , and I paid it willingly . They sustained us all the way back to JFK .
domestication: 几年前，我和妻子在西非待了三个星期。那里的吃喝不愁，就是没啥可读的东西，唯一的书和杂志都是法文的。后来，在多哥首都洛美的酒店里，我发现了五本刘易斯·阿彻的小说，是印度出版的二手平装书，印刷质量很差。卖报的小贩要价十美元一本，贵得离谱，但我还是心甘情愿地买了下来。这些书陪我们一路回到了肯尼迪机场。
foreignization: 几年前我和妻子在西非待了三个星期。我们有很多奢侈品，比如食物和水，但没有什么可读的，唯一可用的书籍和杂志都是法语的。然后，在多哥首都洛美的酒店里，我发现有五本刘易斯·阿彻的小说，这些是印度印刷的二手平装书。报摊老板每本要价十美元，我觉得这是敲竹杠，但我还是愿意地付了钱。它们一直陪伴我们直到回到肯尼迪机场。

source: In 1666 , Dutch artist Jan Vermeer created The Allegory of Painting ( also known as The Painter and His Model as Clio ) , a prototype of this invitation style rendering of an artist 's studio . Vermeer 's painting depicts an elegantly furnished interior where an artist , seen from the back , sits at an easel painting a female model . To reveal this scene , Vermeer has pulled aside a drapery . Its heavy folds produce a deep chiaroscuro on the left side of the painting , rendering the weight and richness of the fabric nearly palpable .
domestication: 1666年，荷兰画家维梅尔创作了《绘画的寓言》（也叫《画家和他的模特》或《克利俄》），这幅画是这种邀请风格展现艺术家工作室的原型。画中描绘了一个装饰考究的室内场景，一位画家背对着观众坐在画架前，正在给一位女性模特画像。为了展示这一幕，维梅尔拉开了一块窗帘。厚重的布褶在画的左侧形成了强烈的明暗对比，几乎能让人感受到布料的重量和奢华质感。
foreignization: 1666年，荷兰艺术家扬·维米尔创作了《绘画的寓言》（也称为《画家和他的模特作为克利俄》），这是这种邀请式渲染艺术家工作室风格的原型。维米尔的画作描绘了一个装饰优雅的室内场景，其中一位艺术家从背面看到，坐在画架前绘制一位女性模特。为了揭示这一场景，维米尔拉开了窗帘。其厚重的褶皱在画面左侧产生了深邃的明暗对比，几乎可以触摸到织物的重量和丰富性。

source: " FROM NOW ON , all protesters will be treated as Israeli spies . " This was the announcement made by the Revolutionary Guard a monlh after the Iranian people last took to the streets . In all likelihood , this quiet period can be explained by the revelations of torture cases and repeated prison rapes , as well as by the show trials in which numerous young protesters and key reformist ligures have been seen on television making peculiar confessions .
domestication: 从今往后，所有抗议者都将被视为以色列间谍。这是革命卫队在伊朗人民上次走上街头一个月后发布的声明。这番话或许可以解释为什么最近一片沉寂。这段时间的平静，多半是因为揭露了酷刑案件和反复的监狱强奸事件，还有那些电视上播放的审判，年轻抗议者和改革派重要人物被迫做出的奇怪认罪。
foreignization: “从现在起，所有抗议者将被视为以色列间谍。”这是伊朗革命卫队在伊朗人民上次走上街头抗议一个月后发布的声明。很可能，这段平静期可以归因于酷刑案件的揭露和反复发生的监狱强奸事件，以及在电视上看到的许多年轻抗议者和关键改革派人物在作秀审判中做出的奇怪供词。

source: University of the Witwatersrand ( Wits ) paleontologist Professor Jonah Choiniere noted that Ledumahadi is closely related to other gigantic dinosaurs from Argentina , hammering home the idea that Pangaea was still forming during the early Jurassic period . " It shows how easily dinosaurs could have walked from Johannesburg to Buenos Aires at that time , " Choiniere said in the statement .
domestication: 威特沃特斯兰德大学（简称“威茨”）的古生物学家乔纳·乔伊尼教授指出，莱杜马哈迪与阿根廷的巨型恐龙有密切关系，这进一步证明了在早侏罗纪时期，盘古大陆仍在形成中。“这说明那时的恐龙可以从约翰内斯堡一路走到布宜诺斯艾利斯，易如反掌。”乔伊尼在声明中说道。
foreignization: 威特沃特斯兰德大学（Wits）的古生物学家乔纳·乔伊尼尔教授指出，莱杜马哈迪与来自阿根廷的其他巨型恐龙密切相关，这进一步证实了在早侏罗纪时期盘古大陆仍在形成中的观点。“这显示了在那个时期恐龙可以多么容易地从约翰内斯堡走到布宜诺斯艾利斯，”乔伊尼尔在声明中说。

source: " The answer is no . " Alexander Wu , a doctoral candidate in occupational epidemiology . " The data strongly support the fact that travelling by air is by far the safest form of public transportation . And our study does not change that fact . And we want everyone to know that for sure . They should not be afraid to fly . " Still , he and his co-authors recommend that airlines boost their support for preventative mental health treatment . To make sure it 's friendly skies for passengers -- and pilots -- alike .
domestication: 答案是否定的。 Occupational epidemiology 的博士生吴亚历山大说：“数据强有力地支持了一个事实，那就是航空旅行是迄今为止最安全的公共交通方式。我们的研究并没有改变这一点。我们希望每个人都能确信这一点，大家不必害怕坐飞机。”尽管如此，他和他的合著者还是建议航空公司加强对预防心理健康问题的支持，确保天空对乘客和飞行员都是一片祥云。
foreignization: "答案是否定的。" 亚历山大·吴，一位职业流行病学的博士候选人说。"数据强烈支持航空旅行是迄今为止最安全的公共交通方式这一事实。我们的研究并没有改变这一事实。我们希望每个人都能确定这一点。他们不应该害怕乘坐飞机。" 尽管如此，他和他的合著者建议航空公司加强预防心理健康治疗的支持。以确保天空对乘客——和飞行员——都是友好的。

source: Regular daily consumption of caffeine in three or more cups of coffee is known to reduce cognitive decline among the aging . It now seems to preserve- even restoreworking memory in those with Alzheimer 's disease , by inhibiting production of beta-amyloid , a protein that accumulates in the aging brain and forms plaques that give rise to the degenerative disease . University of South Florida scientists found that caffeine reduces amyloid deposition in the hippocampi of rats .
domestication: 每天喝三杯以上的咖啡，里面的咖啡因能减缓老年人的认知衰退。现在看来，它还能保护甚至恢复阿尔茨海默病患者的短期记忆，因为它能抑制一种叫β-淀粉样蛋白的生成。这种蛋白会在大脑中积累，形成斑块，导致退行性疾病。南佛罗里达大学的研究人员发现，咖啡因可以减少大鼠海马区的淀粉样蛋白沉积。
foreignization: 每天常规摄入三杯或更多咖啡中的咖啡因已知可以减少老年人的认知衰退。现在看来，它可以通过抑制β-淀粉样蛋白的产生来保护甚至恢复阿尔茨海默病患者的日常工作记忆，这种蛋白质在衰老的大脑中积累并形成导致退行性疾病斑块。南佛罗里达大学的科学家发现，咖啡因可以减少大鼠海马体中的淀粉样蛋白沉积。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Regular daily consumption of caffeine in three or more cups of coffee is known to reduce cognitive decline among the aging . It now seems to preserve- even restoreworking memory in those with Alzheimer 's disease , by inhibiting production of beta-amyloid , a protein that accumulates in the aging brain and forms plaques that give rise to the degenerative disease . University of South Florida scientists found that caffeine reduces amyloid deposition in the hippocampi of rats .

source: This could happen to any man or woman , and it has : He or she meets someone who seems genuine . They fall in love . They go through all of the actions that that entails , and then when the marriage contract is signed , everything changes . Perhaps she did think she was in love , did n't care about money or a Green Card , but at some point knew her heart was n't in it and simply did n't have the words to back out .
domestication: 这事儿谁身上都可能发生，也确实发生过：他或她遇到了一个看似真诚的人。两人坠入爱河。经历了一切恋爱过程，直到签了婚书，一切都变了。也许她当时真的以为自己是爱的，不在乎金钱或绿卡，但后来发现心里没那么回事，却找不到合适的说辞来退出。

source: Job realities . One obvious solution is to entice more young people into government work . But that wo n't be easy . While a survey earlier this year for the Council for Excellence in Government found that 47 percent of young adults 17 through 24 felt that the most appealing feature of government work was " helping people and making a difference " -- up from 33 percent in 1997 -- only a third said a government career might appeal to them , down from about 40 percent two years ago .
domestication: 工作现实。一个明显的解决办法是吸引更多年轻人进入政府工作。但这绝非易事。尽管今年早些时候为政府卓越委员会进行的一项调查显示，17到24岁的年轻人中有47%认为政府工作的最大吸引力在于“帮助别人，有所作为”——这一比例比1997年的33%有所提高——但只有三分之一的年轻人表示可能会对政府职业感兴趣，这一数字较两年前的约40%有所下降。
foreignization: 工作现实。一个显而易见的解决方案是吸引更多年轻人进入政府工作。但这不会容易。虽然今年早些时候为政府卓越委员会进行的一项调查显示，17至24岁的年轻人中有47%认为政府工作的最吸引人的特点是“帮助他人和有所作为”——这一比例从1997年的33%上升——但只有三分之一的人表示政府职业可能吸引他们，这一数字比两年前的大约40%有所下降。

source: Moreover , Facebook exacerbated self-reinforcing media bubbles and allowed " fake news " to become a significant force in 2016 . source: Alan Bateman , son of famed wildlife artist Robert Bateman , is n't certain whether he was born with talent or whether he acquired it hanging around his father 's studio . Early in his career , he realized he did n't share his father 's passion for painting wildlife and instead chose subject matter closer to his Nova Scotia farm home . However , he and his father do share some of the same painting techniques , including using many layers of washes .
domestication: 艾伦·巴特曼是著名野生动物画家罗伯特·巴特曼的儿子，他不确定自己是天生就有才华，还是在父亲的工作室里耳濡目染得来的。起初，他发现自己并没有像父亲那样对画野生动物充满热情，反而选择了离自家新斯科舍农场更近的题材。不过，他和父亲在绘画技巧上还是有不少共同点，比如都喜欢用多层渲染的手法。

source: PHOTO ( COLOR ) : Waitsfield , Vermont , artist Frank Covino working on a grisaille of Leonardo'a Mona Lisa . Covino made this monochromic study in preparing for an upcoming painting trip to Paris and the Louvre with a group of his students . He believes it 's critical to create an accurate record of black , white , and gray tones .

source: This morning The Washington Post has revealed that Batman will gain a key ally in his quest to discover the secrets of the ' Dark Multiverse ' that will drive the new event -- and although unfamiliar to Batman himself , it 's a figure Vertigo readers will be more than aware of : Dream of the Endless , from Neil Gaiman 's seminal dark fantasy series Sandman .

source: The 4.75%-load fund 's largest holdings , making up 25% of the portfolio , are U.S. Treasuries and agency issues . source: At February 's Micro Electro Mechanical Systems meeting in Napa , Calif. , Hollis reported using a prototype magic wrist repeatedly to find and feel the same bumps on a surface of gold atoms . He estimates that he felt clumps containing about 10 gold atoms . " And there 's no reason electronically why they should n't be able to get to the point of feeling single atoms , " says meeting organizer Kurt Petersen , who co-founded NovaSensor , Inc. , a microdevice- and sensor-making firm in Fremont , Calif .
domestication: 二月份，在加州纳帕举行的微机电系统会议上，霍利斯报告说，他使用了一个原型的“魔法腕带”，多次在同一金原子表面上找到了并感受到了相同的小突起。他估计自己感受到的每个团块大约包含10个金原子。会议组织者库尔特·彼得森说：“从电子技术上讲，他们没有理由不能达到感受单个原子的程度。”库尔特是NovaSensor公司的联合创始人，该公司位于加州弗里蒙特，专门制造微型设备和传感器。
foreignization: 在二月份于加利福尼亚州纳帕举行的微机电系统会议上，霍利斯报告说使用了一个原型魔腕反复找到并感觉到金原子表面上的相同凸起。他估计自己感觉到了包含大约10个金原子的团簇。“而且从电子学的角度来看，没有理由不能达到感觉到单个原子的地步，”会议组织者库尔特·彼得森说，他是位于加利福尼亚州弗里蒙特的微设备和传感器制造公司NovaSensor, Inc.的联合创始人。

At February 's Micro Electro Mechanical Systems meeting in Napa , Calif. , Hollis reported using a prototype magic wrist repeatedly to find and feel the same bumps on a surface of gold atoms . He estimates that he felt clumps containing about 10 gold atoms . " And there 's no reason electronically why they should n't be able to get to the point of feeling single atoms , " says meeting organizer Kurt Petersen , who co-founded NovaSensor , Inc. , a microdevice- and sensor-making firm in Fremont , Calif .

source: How light keeps our circadian rhythms in sync is still a mystery . But some findings suggest that it affects the activity of serotonin , the " feel-good " brain chemical targeted by antidepressants like Prozac . Serotonin is also a precursor to melatonin , a hormone associated with sleep , explains Anthony Levitt , MD , a light researcher at the University of Toronto .
domestication: 光如何调节我们的生物钟仍然是个谜。不过有些发现表明，光会影响血清素的活动，这种被称为“快乐激素”的脑化学物质是抗抑郁药如百忧解的作用目标。血清素还是褪黑激素的前体，而褪黑激素与睡眠有关，多伦多大学的光研究专家安东尼·利维特博士解释说。
foreignization: 光如何使我们的生物钟保持同步仍然是一个谜。但一些研究结果表明，它会影响血清素的活性，血清素是一种被抗抑郁药如百忧解所针对的“感觉良好”的脑化学物质。血清素也是褪黑激素的前体，褪黑激素是一种与睡眠有关的激素，多伦多大学的光研究员安东尼·利维特博士解释说。

source: The lack of moral fibre shown by his constant shifting onto others of his own ultimate responsibility for the defeat , and his failure to reflect on his own mistakes , have drawn the most critical comments . Readers have also raised questions about his dismissal of his first prime minister , Tanaka Giichi , in 1929 , his decision to sanction the starting of the Pacific War in 194 1 ; and his role , three and a half years later , in Japan 's decision to surrender unconditionally to the Allies .
domestication: 他总是把自己的失败责任推到别人身上，不肯反省自己的错误，这种缺乏道德勇气的行为遭到了最严厉的批评。读者还对他在1929年撤换第一位首相田中义一、1941年决定发动太平洋战争，以及三年半后在日本无条件投降给盟军时所扮演的角色提出了质疑。
foreignization: 他不断将自己对失败的最终责任推卸给他人，以及未能反思自己的错误，这些缺乏道德勇气的表现招致了最严厉的批评。读者还对他在1929年解雇首位首相田中义一、1941年决定批准发起太平洋战争，以及三年半后在日本决定无条件向盟军投降中的角色提出了质疑。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The lack of moral fibre shown by his constant shifting onto others of his own ultimate responsibility for the defeat , and his failure to reflect on his own mistakes , have drawn the most critical comments . Readers have also raised questions about his dismissal of his first prime minister , Tanaka Giichi , in 1929 , his decision to sanction the starting of the Pacific War in 194 1 ; and his role , three and a half years later , in Japan 's decision to surrender unconditionally to the Allies .
他总是把自己的失败责任推到别人身上，不肯反省自己的错误，这种缺乏道德勇气的行为遭到了最严厉的批评。读者还对他在1929年撤换第一位首相田中义一、1941年决定发动太平洋战争，以及三年半后在日本无条件投降给盟军时所扮演的角色提出了质疑。

source: After years spent in a frustrating search , renowned astronomer Giovanni Domenico Cassini must have wondered if he would die before seeing a legendary sunspot grace the heavens again . These dark blemishes on the surfs face , so common during the days of Cassini 's youth , had virtually disappeared by the time he started observing the sky in the mid-17th century So rare were sunspots , in fact , that any reported sighting caused a celebration among European astronomers of the day . When Cassini finally spied one in 1671 , the editor of the PHILOSOPHICAL TRANSACTIONS OF THE ROYAL SOCIETY OF LONDON felt obliged to describe the last recorded sighting in 1660 , in case some readers had forgotten what a sunspot was during the intervening years .
domestication: 多年来，著名天文学家乔瓦尼·多梅尼科·卡西尼在令人沮丧的搜寻中，也许曾担心自己会不会在再次见到传说中的太阳黑子之前就去世了。这些在太阳表面出现的黑斑，在卡西尼年轻时十分常见，但到了17世纪中期他开始观测天空时，几乎已经销声匿迹了。太阳黑子变得如此罕见，以至于任何一次目击报告都会让当时的欧洲天文学家们欢庆一番。直到1671年，卡西尼才终于看到了一个太阳黑子，《伦敦皇家学会哲学学报》的编辑觉得有必要描述一下1660年的最后一次记录，以防有些读者在这段时间里忘记了太阳黑子是什么样子。
foreignization: 经过多年的沮丧搜寻，著名天文学家乔瓦尼·多梅尼科·卡西尼一定曾怀疑自己是否会在再次目睹传说中的太阳黑子装点天空之前去世。这些在卡西尼年轻时非常常见的太阳表面的暗斑，到17世纪中期他开始观测天空时几乎消失了。事实上，太阳黑子如此罕见，以至于当时的欧洲天文学家每当有人报告看到太阳黑子时都会庆祝一番。当卡西尼终于在1671年发现一个太阳黑子时，《伦敦皇家学会哲学学报》的编辑觉得有必要描述1660年的最后一次记录，以防一些读者在这段时间内忘记了太阳黑子是什么样子。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

After years spent in a frustrating search , renowned astronomer Giovanni Domenico Cassini must have wondered if he would die before seeing a legendary sunspot grace the heavens again . These dark blemishes on the surfs face , so common during the days of Cassini 's youth , had virtually disappeared by the time he started observing the sky in the mid-17th century So rare were sunspots , in fact , that any reported sighting caused a celebration among European astronomers of the day . When Cassini finally spied one in 1671 , the editor of the PHILOSOPHICAL TRANSACTIONS OF THE ROYAL SOCIETY OF LONDON felt obliged to describe the last recorded sighting in 1660 , in case some readers had forgotten what a sunspot was during the intervening years .

After years spent in a frustrating search , renowned astronomer Giovanni Domenico Cassini must have wondered if he would die before seeing a legendary sunspot grace the heavens again . These dark blemishes on the surfs face , so common during the days of Cassini 's youth , had virtually disappeared by the time he started observing the sky in the mid-17th century So rare were sunspots , in fact , that any reported sighting caused a celebration among European astronomers of the day . When Cassini finally spied one in 1671 , the editor of the PHILOSOPHICAL TRANSACTIONS OF THE ROYAL SOCIETY OF LONDON felt obliged to describe the last recorded sighting in 1660 , in case some readers had forgotten what a sunspot was during the intervening years .

经过多年的沮丧搜寻，著名天文学家乔瓦尼·多梅尼科·卡西尼一定曾怀疑自己是否会在再次目睹传说中的太阳黑子装点天空之前去世。这些在卡西尼年轻时非常常见的太阳表面的暗斑，到17世纪中期他开始观测天空时几乎消失了。事实上，太阳黑子如此罕见，以至于当时的欧洲天文学家每当有人报告看到太阳黑子时都会庆祝一番。当卡西尼终于在1671年发现一个太阳黑子时，《伦敦皇家学会哲学学报》的编辑觉得有必要描述1660年的最后一次记录，以防一些读者在这段时间内忘记了太阳黑子是什么样子。

source: When the popular literary magazine Bungei Shunju conveniently published the dokuhakuroku in December 1990 , it created a sensation by enabling readers to get a new and deeper insight into the emperor 's character . For the first time since the war , many saw the forgotten fighting generalissimo side to Hirohito - a side that Yamada Akira and other Japanese historians had already documented on the basis of the emperor 's ' questions ' to his military commanders , and their reports to him on the unfolding war situation .
domestication: 1990年12月， popular 文学杂志《文藝春秋》方便地刊发了这本独白录，一时间引起了轰动。读者们得以从新的角度更深入地了解这位天皇的个性。战后首次，许多人看到了一个被遗忘的、指挥战争的统帅形象——这个形象之前已被山田昭和及其他日本历史学家基于天皇对军事指挥官的“提问”及他们关于战争局势进展的报告中记录下来。
foreignization: 当流行的文学杂志《文艺春秋》在1990年12月方便地出版了独白录时，它通过使读者能够获得对天皇性格的新和更深入的了解而引起了轰动。自战争以来，许多人第一次看到了被遗忘的战斗总司令的一面——这是山田昭和其他日本历史学家已经根据天皇向其军事指挥官提出的“问题”以及他们向他报告的战争局势的发展情况所记录的一方面。

When the popular literary magazine Bungei Shunju conveniently published the dokuhakuroku in December 1990 , it created a sensation by enabling readers to get a new and deeper insight into the emperor 's character . source: Late in the 14th century , a French gentleman in his 5Os married a 15-year-old orphan and ( in response to her pleading , he claims ) wrote for her edification a volume of instructions on how to care for home and husband . A Medieval Home Companion ( HarperCollins. $20 ) has lovely period woodcuts , and is full of thought-provoking tips : walk with your head down , speak as little as possible , emulate faithful dogs who think only of their masters , and if you are planning to carry around a live carp all day , wrap it in wet hay .
domestication: 14世纪末，一位五十多岁的法国绅士娶了一位15岁的孤儿为妻。据他说，是应妻子的请求，他写了一本书，教她如何照顾家和丈夫。《中世纪家庭指南》（哈珀柯林斯出版社，20美元）里有许多精美的木版画，内容也引人深思：走路要低着头，尽量少说话，要像忠心耿耿的狗一样，只想着主人。如果你打算整天带着一条活鱼，记得用湿草把它包起来。
foreignization: 14世纪晚期，一位50多岁的法国绅士娶了一位15岁的孤儿为妻，并（据他说，是应她的请求）为她编写了一本教导如何照顾家庭和丈夫的指南。《中世纪家庭伴侣》（HarperCollins，20美元）中有精美的时期木刻插图，书中充满了发人深思的建议：低头行走，尽可能少说话，模仿只想着主人的忠诚狗，如果你打算整天带着一条活鲤鱼，要用湿草包裹它。

source: THESE WERE MY MOTHER 'S PARTICULARS AT THE TIME SHE WAS diagnosed with breast cancer : age sixty-one ; white ; history of benign breast lumps ; Jewish ; affluent ; postmenopausal ; first menstruation at age eleven ; sister of a woman who had cancer in both breasts before menopause ; resident of the urban , northeastern United States . Any woman over thirty is considered at risk of contracting breast cancer . But my mother 's characteristics together placed her , statistically , at far higher risk for contracting the disease .
domestication: 那时我妈妈查出乳腺癌时的情况是这样的：六十一岁，白人，有良性乳房肿块的病史，犹太人，家境富裕，绝经后，初潮在十一岁，有一个姐姐在绝经前双侧乳房都患了癌症，住在美国东北部的城市里。三十岁以上的女性都有患乳腺癌的风险，但综合我妈妈的各种特点，她在统计数据上患这种病的风险要高得多。
foreignization: 这些是我母亲在被诊断出患有乳腺癌时的特征：61岁；白人；有良性乳腺肿块病史；犹太人；富裕；绝经后；11岁初潮；有一个在绝经前双乳患癌的姐妹；居住在美国东北部城市。任何30岁以上的女性都被认为有患乳腺癌的风险。但根据统计，我母亲的这些特征加在一起使她患病的风险远高于常人。

source: This applies particularly to the " safe space " discussion . The letter 's critics correctly tout the value of domestic-violence shelters , gay nightclubs , gatherings where pregnant women discuss their bodily experiences , and undocumented immigrants grappling with the unique challenges of their circumstances with people who share it . But those hardly run afoul of the dean 's qualified denunciation of " intellectual " safe spaces where individuals retreat " from ideas and perspectives . "
domestication: 这尤其适用于“安全空间”的讨论。批评信的人正确地强调了家暴庇护所、同志夜店、孕妇们聚在一起分享身体体验，以及无证移民在面对自己独特困境时与有相同经历的人交流的价值。但这些地方和院长对“知识”安全空间的有限谴责几乎没有冲突，那些人从观点和想法中退缩，这才是问题所在。

source: AMD 's amd new Polaris line of chips will allow gamers and others desiring to add VR capability to their computers to purchase the required graphics for under $200 , about half what such cards cost today . But that will bring down the price of an entry-level PC suitable for virtual reality only from about $1,000 to $800 . And that does n't include the price of the VR gear -- an Oculus Rift setup costs another $600 , for example .
domestication: AMD新推出的Polaris芯片系列能让玩家和其他希望给电脑添加VR功能的人，以不到200美元的价格买到所需的显卡，这差不多是目前显卡价格的一半。不过，这样一来，适合虚拟现实的入门级电脑价格也只会从大约1000美元降到800美元。而且这还不包括VR设备的钱，比如Oculus Rift的套装就要另加600美元。
foreignization: AMD的新Polaris芯片系列将使游戏玩家和其他希望为其计算机添加VR功能的人能够以不到200美元的价格购买所需的显卡，这大约是此类显卡当前价格的一半。但这只会将适合虚拟现实的入门级PC的价格从大约1,000美元降至800美元。而且这还不包括VR设备的价格——例如，Oculus Rift的设置另外需要600美元。

source: Sow seeds direcdy into prepared rows or hills one to two weeks after your last spring frost , and make a second planting a month later . Where summers are short and cool , start seeds indoors under bright fluorescent lights two weeks before your last spring frost . If kept moist and warm ( above 70 degrees Fahrenheit ) , cucumber seeds should sprout within five days . Set out 3- to 4-week-old seedlings after your last frost has passed .
domestication: 春霜过后一周到十天，就可以在整理好的行或堆里直接播种了，一个月后再种一次。如果夏天短且凉爽，可以在春霜前两周，在室内明亮的荧光灯下育苗。保持湿润和温暖（华氏70度以上），黄瓜种子五天内就能发芽。最后一次霜冻过后，就可以移栽3到4周大的幼苗了。

source: My mother complained of becoming a " cancer cripple , " of being " bored out of her gourd , " as my sister put it . Her body had turned on her . source: Remember the parody Swiss Amy knife that opened into a three-bedroom bungalow ? Life imitates jokes : now the Eddie Bauer catalogue has one called the Hero ( $99.95 ) whose 16 blades can pop a beer , carve " The Rubaiyat " on a pinhead and pirate the pay-per-view signal for Wrestlemania . Well , almost . Closed , it 's big enough to serve as a chock for a parked DC-10 .

source: This comes as emerging market currencies have sold off . The MSCI emerging market currencies index is on track to notch its sixth consecutive monthly decline from April . The Turkish lira TRYUSD , -0.4990% and the Argentina peso ARSUSD , +0.009041% are both down more than 40% against the dollar this year , FactSet data shows .
domestication: 新兴市场货币纷纷下挫。MSCI新兴市场货币指数从4月开始已经连续第六个月下跌。据FactSet数据显示，土耳其里拉和阿根廷比索今年对美元的跌幅都超过了40%。

source: At this point , the attentive reader may wonder how on earth this happened . How did the ethnic composition of California change so dramatically in the space of a dozen years that it turned the Golden State from a solid link in the " Republican lock " on the electoral college into a safe house for recidivist liberal Democrats ? Barnes offers no assistance on this question . One is left to imagine that , in a scene reminiscent of the movie Watermelon Man , a lot of Anglo suburbanites woke up one morning to discover that they could read Don Quixote in the original .
domestication: 这时候，细心的读者可能会纳闷，这到底是怎么一回事。加利福尼亚的种族构成怎么会在十几年间发生如此戏剧性的变化，使得这个黄金之州从共和党的铁票仓变成了民主党自由派的安乐窝？巴恩斯对此并没有给出答案。人们只能想象，就像电影《西瓜人》中的场景一样，有一天早上，许多住在郊区的盎格鲁居民醒来后，发现自己竟能读懂原版的《堂吉诃德》。
foreignization: 在这一点上，细心的读者可能会想知道这究竟是如何发生的。加利福尼亚的族裔构成是如何在十几年的时间里发生了如此戏剧性的变化，使得这个黄金州从“共和党锁定”选举团的稳固一环变成了屡教不改的自由民主党人的安全港？巴恩斯对此问题没有任何帮助。人们只能想象，在一个让人联想到电影《西瓜人》的场景中，许多盎格鲁郊区居民有一天早晨醒来后发现自己能够阅读原版的《堂吉诃德》。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

At this point , the attentive reader may wonder how on earth this happened . How did the ethnic composition of California change so dramatically in the space of a dozen years that it turned the Golden State from a solid link in the " Republican lock " on the electoral college into a safe house for recidivist liberal Democrats ? Barnes offers no assistance on this question . One is left to imagine that , in a scene reminiscent of the movie Watermelon Man , a lot of Anglo suburbanites woke up one morning to discover that they could read Don Quixote in the original .
这时候，细心的读者可能会纳闷，这到底是怎么一回事。加利福尼亚的种族构成怎么会在十几年间发生如此戏剧性的变化，使得这个黄金之州从共和党的铁票仓变成了民主党自由派的安乐窝？巴恩斯对此并没有给出答案。人们只能想象，就像电影《西瓜人》中的场景一样，有一天早上，许多住在郊区的盎格鲁居民醒来后，发现自己竟能读懂原版的《堂吉诃德》。

Barnes offers no assistance on this question . One is left to imagine that , in a scene reminiscent of the movie Watermelon Man , a lot of Anglo suburbanites woke up one morning to discover that they could read Don Quixote in the original .

source: Indeed , the FDIC once even sued the comptroller 's office for information and still did n't get everything it wanted . Courts have also declined to require regulators to release information on competing bids to take over a failed thrift and have refused to help the Consumers Union get information on banks that are miscalculating interest rates . Former regulator James Barth said that when he was with the Bank Board , people would sometimes ask for information about an S &L; that , unbeknownst to them , was in the thrift 's own annual report and on file with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission , but the Bank Board still would n't give it out .
domestication: 确实，联邦存款保险公司（FDIC）曾经起诉货币监理署要求提供信息，但最终还是没能得到它想要的一切。法院也不愿意命令监管机构公布接手失败储贷机构的竞争性投标信息，拒绝帮助消费者联盟获取那些计算利率出错的银行的信息。前监管者詹姆斯·巴特回忆说，当他还在联邦储蓄委员会工作时，有人会来要关于某个储贷机构的信息，其实这些信息已经在该机构的年报里了，也提交给了美国证券交易委员会，但联邦储蓄委员会仍然不给。
foreignization: 确实，联邦存款保险公司（FDIC）曾经甚至起诉货币监理署以获取信息，但仍然没有得到它想要的所有东西。法院还拒绝要求监管机构发布接管失败储贷机构的竞标信息，并且拒绝帮助消费者联盟获取银行误算利率的信息。前监管者詹姆斯·巴思说，当他还在储蓄机构管理局时，有时人们会要求提供关于某个储贷协会的信息，而这些信息其实就在该储贷机构自己的年度报告中，并已提交给美国证券交易委员会，但储蓄机构管理局仍然不会提供这些信息。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Indeed , the FDIC once even sued the comptroller 's office for information and still did n't get everything it wanted . Courts have also declined to require regulators to release information on competing bids to take over a failed thrift and have refused to help the Consumers Union get information on banks that are miscalculating interest rates . Former regulator James Barth said that when he was with the Bank Board , people would sometimes ask for information about an S &L; that , unbeknownst to them , was in the thrift 's own annual report and on file with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission , but the Bank Board still would n't give it out .

source: That 's about the same time that Keel and his colleagues began studying a cluster of galaxies called Abell 2125 , located some 1 billion light-years from Earth . Observations with the Very Large Array radio telescopes near Socorro , N.M. , showed that the cluster contains an unusually large number of galaxies that are high-intensity radio emitters . C153 is among them . The radio emissions indicated that the galaxies either contain supermassive black holes or have recently undergone a burst of star formation .
domestication: 这差不多是基尔和他的同事们开始研究距离地球约10亿光年的一个星系团——阿贝尔2125的时候。他们在新墨西哥州索科罗附近的超大阵列射电望远镜观测中发现，这个星系团里有异常多的星系，它们都是强烈的射电源，C153就是其中之一。这些射电信号表明，这些星系要么包含超大质量黑洞，要么最近经历了一轮恒星形成的爆发。
foreignization: 那大约是基尔和他的同事开始研究距地球约10亿光年的星系团Abell 2125的时候。新墨西哥州索科罗附近的甚大天线阵的观测显示，该星系团包含异常多的高强度无线电发射星系。C153就是其中之一。无线电发射表明，这些星系要么含有超大质量黑洞，要么最近经历了一次恒星形成的爆发。

That 's about the same time that Keel and his colleagues began studying a cluster of galaxies called Abell 2125 , located some 1 billion light-years from Earth . Observations with the Very Large Array radio telescopes near Socorro , N.M. , showed that the cluster contains an unusually large number of galaxies that are high-intensity radio emitters . C153 is among them . The radio emissions indicated that the galaxies either contain supermassive black holes or have recently undergone a burst of star formation .

source: Will it work ? Last September Lorie demonstrated his approach at the National Library of the Netherlands , successfully translating a PDF version of a scientific paper on drug research into his universal format . The reconstruction not only kept the look of the original 's fonts and formatting , it also created " metadata " to clue in future users about its content .
domestication: 这方法管用吗？去年九月，洛里在荷兰国家图书馆展示了他的一套方案，成功将一份关于药物研究的科学论文的PDF版本转换成了他的通用格式。不仅保留了原版的字体和排版风格，还生成了“元数据”，让未来的用户能更轻松地了解文档内容。

source: The second lesson we learned was to test out the intervention models espoused in the literature about minorities before acting . My review of the community health literature on African Americans , for example , found ample support for the dictum that any change or introduction of services in the community requires the sanction of African American churches . I took this lesson to heart and sought help from an African American pastor , who accompanied me to several churches where I delivered what I thought was a scintillating presentation on the benefits of the support group and how this fit into the scope of the " missionary societies " that each church operated . At the end of each presentation , I announced the time and location of the support group meetings-at the pastor 's own church .
domestication: 我们学到的第二课是，在采取行动之前，要先测试文献中提到的针对少数群体的干预模式。比如，我在研究关于非裔美国人的社区健康文献时，发现有大量的支持观点认为，任何社区内的变化或服务的引入，都必须得到非裔美国人教会的认可。我牢牢记住了这一点，并寻求了一位非裔美国牧师的帮助，他陪我去了几家教会，我在那里做了一场自认为非常精彩的演讲，讲述了支持小组的好处，以及这如何融入每个教会运营的“传教社团”之中。每次演讲结束时，我都宣布了支持小组会议的时间和地点，就在那位牧师自己的教会里。
foreignization: 我们学到的第二课是在采取行动之前，测试文献中关于少数群体所提倡的干预模式。例如，我对非裔美国人社区健康文献的回顾发现，有充分的支持证明任何社区的变化或服务的引入都需要获得非裔美国人教堂的认可。我谨记这一教训，并寻求了一位非裔美国牧师的帮助，他陪同我前往几个教堂，在那里我进行了我认为非常精彩的演讲，介绍了支持小组的好处以及这如何融入每个教堂运营的“传教士社团”范围。每次演讲结束时，我都宣布了支持小组会议的时间和地点——在那位牧师自己的教堂。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The second lesson we learned was to test out the intervention models espoused in the literature about minorities before acting . My review of the community health literature on African Americans , for example , found ample support for the dictum that any change or introduction of services in the community requires the sanction of African American churches . I took this lesson to heart and sought help from an African American pastor , who accompanied me to several churches where I delivered what I thought was a scintillating presentation on the benefits of the support group and how this fit into the scope of the " missionary societies " that each church operated . At the end of each presentation , I announced the time and location of the support group meetings-at the pastor 's own church .

我们学到的第二课是，在采取行动之前，要先测试文献中提到的针对少数群体的干预模式。比如，我在研究关于非裔美国人的社区健康文献时，发现有大量的支持观点认为，任何社区内的变化或服务的引入，都必须得到非裔美国人教会的认可。我牢牢记住了这一点，并寻求了一位非裔美国牧师的帮助，他陪我去了几家教会，我在那里做了一场自认为非常精彩的演讲，讲述了支持小组的好处，以及这如何融入每个教会运营的“传教社团”之中。每次演讲结束时，我都宣布了支持小组会议的时间和地点，就在那位牧师自己的教会里。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

I took this lesson to heart and sought help from an African American pastor , who accompanied me to several churches where I delivered what I thought was a scintillating presentation on the benefits of the support group and how this fit into the scope of the " missionary societies " that each church operated . source: Amazon Prime 's video-on-demand service just unlocked a musical milestone : it will be airing the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame 's induction ceremony for the first time ever . HBO has been the Hall of Fame 's conventional broadcasting home , but from July 1st , devotees will be able to watch the event in over 30 countries and eight languages on any device supported by Amazon 's streaming service .
domestication: 亚马逊Prime的点播服务刚解锁了一个音乐里程碑：首次播出摇滚名人堂的 induction 仪式。过去，HBO一直是摇滚名人堂的常规播放平台，但从7月1日起，粉丝们可以在超过30个国家和地区、用8种语言，在任何支持亚马逊流媒体服务的设备上观看这场盛会。

source: In their talks Keene and Rao are covering the skies and the weather , so when I do my first lecture I talk about the geology of the Hawaiian islands . They 're definitely volcanic , but they 're also situated a long way from the " ring of fire " around the Pacific Ocean , where colliding tectonic plates produce Mexico 's Paricutin and Washington State 's Mount St. Helens and all the others , up through Alaska and down through Kamchatka and Japan . Hawaii sits right in the middle of the biggest tectonic plate of all , where you do n't expect volcanoes to be . Yet the islands are nothing but a long string of volcanoes , the newest one , the Big Island , to the south and east of the island arc ; the others growing older as they stretch off to the north and west , past Kauai , as far as the eroded surface atolis and underwater seamounts that end the chain .
domestication: 基恩和拉奥在他们的讨论中谈到了天空和天气，所以当我第一次讲课时，就聊起了夏威夷群岛的地质情况。这些岛屿显然是火山岛，但它们远离太平洋周边的“火环”，这个区域由于板块碰撞，诞生了墨西哥的帕里库廷火山和华盛顿州的圣海伦斯山等一连串火山，从阿拉斯加一路延伸到勘察加和日本。而夏威夷却位于最大的板块中央，按理说这里不应该有火山。然而，夏威夷群岛就是一串长长的火山链，最年轻的火山是南边和东边的大岛；越往北往西去，岛链上的岛屿就越古老，一直延伸到考艾岛，最远的地方是一些被侵蚀的环礁和平顶山，标志着这条链子的尽头。
foreignization: 在他们的谈话中，Keene 和 Rao 讨论了天空和天气，所以当我进行第一次讲座时，我谈到了夏威夷群岛的地质。它们肯定是火山形成的，但它们也位于远离太平洋“火环”的地方，在那里，碰撞的构造板块产生了墨西哥的帕里库廷火山和华盛顿州的圣海伦斯山以及所有其他火山，从阿拉斯加延伸到勘察加和日本。夏威夷正好位于最大的构造板块的中央，在这里你不会期望有火山。然而，这些岛屿只不过是一长串火山，最新的一个，大岛，位于岛链的南端和东端；其他火山随着向北和向西延伸而变得越来越老，一直延伸到考艾岛，直到侵蚀的环礁表面和水下海山结束了这一系列。

Yet the islands are nothing but a long string of volcanoes , the newest one , the Big Island , to the south and east of the island arc ; the others growing older as they stretch off to the north and west , past Kauai , as far as the eroded surface atolis and underwater seamounts that end the chain .

source: Her recollections are confirmed by Ron Haskins , a Republican child-welfare advocate who was the staff director of the Ways and Means Human Resources Subcommittee at the time the ASFA passed . He says Hillary Clinton was n't engaged with the Republicans generally . " I never heard from Hillary or anybody on her staff , " says Haskins , who now works at the Brookings Institution think tank . " I do n't have an ax to grind against her . Just never talked to her . "
domestication: 她的回忆得到了共和党儿童福利倡导者罗恩·哈斯金斯的证实。当时哈斯金斯是众议院筹款委员会人力资源小组委员会的工作人员，ASFA通过时他就在那里。他说，希拉里·克林顿一般不与共和党人打交道。“我从来没听过希拉里或她手下任何人的话，”现在在布鲁金斯学会工作的哈斯金斯说，“我对她没有意见，就是没跟她说过话。”
foreignization: 她的回忆得到了罗恩·哈斯金斯的证实，罗恩是一名共和党儿童福利倡导者，在ASFA通过时担任众议院筹款委员会人力资源小组委员会的工作人员主任。他说，希拉里·克林顿通常不与共和党人接触。“我从未听说过希拉里或她手下任何人的话，”现在在布鲁金斯学会智囊团工作的哈斯金斯说。“我对她没有意见。只是从未与她交谈过。”

source: At a bit over 18 pounds , the Composite 's weight is its most prominent weakness . Yet , calling it a weakness is n't really fair : The weight is average for the price point , but we noticed the difference on group rides , when we struggled to keep up with riders on lighter bikes . If every sub-$2,000 bike was stiff , rode great and hit the scales at the UCI limit , we 'd all be riding one . Barring that , hitting two out of those three attributes is still amazing. -R.K .
domestication: 这辆复合材料的自行车重18磅多一点，这个重量是它最明显的缺点。但说它是缺点也不完全公平：在这个价格区间里，这个重量算是平均水平。不过，在团队骑行时，我们确实感觉到差距了，要跟上那些骑轻量级自行车的车友真是费劲。如果所有2000美元以下的自行车都能做到既硬朗、骑感又好，还能达到UCI的最低重量限制，那我们就都骑这样的车了。退一步讲，能同时满足这三个条件中的两个也已经很不错了。
foreignization: 复合材料的重量略超过18磅，这是它最突出的弱点。然而，称其为弱点其实并不公平：这个重量在其价位上是平均水平，但在团体骑行时，我们注意到与骑着更轻便自行车的车手相比，我们很难跟上他们的步伐。如果所有价格低于2000美元的自行车都既刚性好、骑行体验佳，又能达到UCI的最低重量限制，那我们都会选择这样的自行车。除非能做到这一点，否则在三个属性中达到两个仍然令人惊叹。-R.K.

If every sub-$2,000 bike was stiff , rode great and hit the scales at the UCI limit , we 'd all be riding one . Barring that , hitting two out of those three attributes is still amazing. -R.K .

复合材料的重量略超过18磅，这是它最突出的弱点。然而，称其为弱点其实并不公平：这个重量在其价位上是平均水平，但在团体骑行时，我们注意到与骑着更轻便自行车的车手相比，我们很难跟上他们的步伐。如果所有价格低于2000美元的自行车都既刚性好、骑行体验佳，又能达到UCI的最低重量限制，那我们都会选择这样的自行车。除非能做到这一点，否则在三个属性中达到两个仍然令人惊叹。-R.K.

source: The biologists raised eyebrows even more by suggesting that this Hsp90-based evolution mechanism could help explain the rapid bursts of body-plan changes that occasionally punctuate the fossil record . Most evolutionary theory predicts small , gradual changes in a species over long periods and is hard-pressed to explain such morphological explosions .

source: Lack of accountability . Because they 're not licensed to dispense drugs or because they do so in a way that violates the law , operators of rogue sites do n't usually divulge critical information about their operation : their owners ' names ; their location ; and the names , qualifications , and specialties of their consulting doctors . In fact , you 'd be hard pressed to contact a prescribing doctor . When Marks called the phone number on his bottle of Meridia and asked to speak to the doctor named on the bottle , his request was denied . PAYING THE PRICE
domestication: 缺乏责任。这些非法网站的经营者要么没有药品经营许可，要么违法经营，通常不会透露关键信息：比如老板的名字、网站所在地，以及咨询医生的姓名、资质和专长。实际上，想找开药的医生都难如登月。马克斯就遇到了这种情况，他拨打药瓶上的电话，想联系那位开药的医生，结果被拒之门外。付出了代价，却得不到应有的服务。
foreignization: 缺乏问责制。由于他们没有获得分发药物的许可，或者以违反法律的方式这样做，流氓网站的运营者通常不会披露有关其运营的关键信息：所有者的姓名；他们的位置；以及他们的咨询医生的姓名、资格和专长。事实上，你很难联系到开具处方的医生。当马克斯拨打他所服用的默迪亚药瓶上的电话号码并要求与药瓶上注明的医生通话时，他的请求被拒绝了。付出代价

source: So , after a year 's search , I am left with nothing . During my research , I have realized that I never tried to imagine my mother 's suffering at her own mutilation , or to experience her fear and frustration with her unrelenting decline . She did not encourage me to do so either . Her approach , always , was to protect those she loved . After all , she had seen me off to Paris , forbidding anyone to tell me what was about to happen to her . I never opened myself to her pain .
domestication: 所以，经过一年的寻找，我一无所获。在研究过程中，我意识到自己从未尝试去想象母亲遭受痛苦的情景，也未曾体会过她面对不断恶化的病情时的恐惧与无助。她也没有鼓励我去这样做。她的做法一直都是保护她所爱的人。毕竟，她送我去巴黎时，还不允许任何人告诉我她即将面临的遭遇。我从未真正向她的痛苦敞开心扉。
foreignization: 所以，在一年的寻找之后，我一无所获。在研究过程中，我意识到我从未试图想象母亲在自己被摧残时的痛苦，也未曾体验过她面对无法遏制的衰退时的恐惧和挫败感。她也没有鼓励我去这样做。她的做法始终是保护她所爱的人。毕竟，她送我去了巴黎，禁止任何人告诉我即将发生的事情。我从未对她所承受的痛苦敞开心扉。

So , after a year 's search , I am left with nothing . During my research , I have realized that I never tried to imagine my mother 's suffering at her own mutilation , or to experience her fear and frustration with her unrelenting decline . She did not encourage me to do so either . Her approach , always , was to protect those she loved . After all , she had seen me off to Paris , forbidding anyone to tell me what was about to happen to her . I never opened myself to her pain .
所以，经过一年的寻找，我一无所获。在研究过程中，我意识到自己从未尝试去想象母亲遭受痛苦的情景，也未曾体会过她面对不断恶化的病情时的恐惧与无助。她也没有鼓励我去这样做。她的做法一直都是保护她所爱的人。毕竟，她送我去巴黎时，还不允许任何人告诉我她即将面临的遭遇。我从未真正向她的痛苦敞开心扉。

source: He was 20 years old and knew nothing about business , and the first year of running the gym was often terrifying . Heavin struggled to find money to pay the gym 's electricity bill and often spent his nights on the floor of the facility 's daycare center . But in the process , he learned a few things about himself . First , he loved the fitness business . Plus , he was a good salesperson , particularly when it came to dealing with women . He soon limited the gym 's membership to women only and named it Women 's World of Fitness .
domestication: 他二十岁，对生意一窍不通，经营健身房的第一年常常让他感到恐惧。希文为了付电费，绞尽脑汁，晚上常常睡在健身房儿童看护中心的地板上。但在这个过程中，他发现自己有几个优点。首先，他爱上了健身这行。而且，他还挺会卖东西，特别是跟女士打交道时。于是，他很快就把健身房会员限制为女性专属，并取名为“女性健身世界”。
foreignization: 他20岁，对生意一无所知，经营健身房的第一年常常感到害怕。希文努力寻找资金支付健身房的电费，经常在设施的日托中心地板上过夜。但在这个过程中，他了解到了一些关于自己的事情。首先，他热爱健身行业。此外，他是个不错的销售人员，尤其是在与女性打交道时。他很快将健身房的会员限制为仅限女性，并将其命名为女性健身世界。

source: It is not clear how Walker wound up in Afghanistan . A friend from a San Francisco mosque told NEWSWEEK that he received an e-mail from Walker a month before he left Bannu for the " cooler mountains " in May of this year . " He was intrigued by Afghanistan , " said the friend . " He said he was interested in getting a bird's-eye view of how Sharia was being applied . " ( In Bannu , Walker turned down the offer of an air conditioner as decadent , but he took an additional $1,200 from his father . ) In his search for purity , Walker gravitated to the most extreme expression of Islam , the Taliban .
domestication: 沃克是怎么跑到阿富汗的，这事儿说来话长。他的一位来自旧金山清真寺的朋友告诉《新闻周刊》，就在今年五月沃克离开班努前往“更凉快的山区”前的一个月，他还收到了沃克发来的邮件。朋友说：“他对阿富汗很感兴趣，想亲眼看一看那里的伊斯兰教法是如何实施的。”（在班努时，沃克拒绝了安装空调的提议，认为那是奢侈的表现，但他还是接受了父亲给他的额外1200美元。）为了寻找心中的纯净，沃克逐渐走向了伊斯兰教最极端的形式——塔利班。
foreignization: 目前尚不清楚沃克是如何最终到达阿富汗的。一位来自旧金山清真寺的朋友告诉《新闻周刊》，他在今年5月离开班努前往“更凉爽的山区”前一个月收到了沃克的一封电子邮件。“他对阿富汗很感兴趣，”这位朋友说。“他说他有兴趣从高处看看伊斯兰教法是如何实施的。”（在班努，沃克认为空调是堕落的表现而拒绝了，但他从父亲那里额外拿了1200美元。）在追求纯洁的过程中，沃克倾向于伊斯兰教最极端的表现形式，即塔利班。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It is not clear how Walker wound up in Afghanistan . A friend from a San Francisco mosque told NEWSWEEK that he received an e-mail from Walker a month before he left Bannu for the " cooler mountains " in May of this year . " He was intrigued by Afghanistan , " said the friend . " He said he was interested in getting a bird's-eye view of how Sharia was being applied . " ( In Bannu , Walker turned down the offer of an air conditioner as decadent , but he took an additional $1,200 from his father . ) In his search for purity , Walker gravitated to the most extreme expression of Islam , the Taliban .

沃克是怎么跑到阿富汗的，这事儿说来话长。他的一位来自旧金山清真寺的朋友告诉《新闻周刊》，就在今年五月沃克离开班努前往“更凉快的山区”前的一个月，他还收到了沃克发来的邮件。朋友说：“他对阿富汗很感兴趣，想亲眼看一看那里的伊斯兰教法是如何实施的。”（在班努时，沃克拒绝了安装空调的提议，认为那是奢侈的表现，但他还是接受了父亲给他的额外1200美元。）为了寻找心中的纯净，沃克逐渐走向了伊斯兰教最极端的形式——塔利班。

source: " The King 's Speech " shows how a man coped with stuttering almost a century ago . and now the film and its Academy Award-winning buzz have people talking about this speaking disorder in the 21 st century . " The history of stuttering goes back to the ancient Greeks when people put pebbles in their mouth to try to cure the problem , " relates Anne Smith , professor of speech , language , and hearing sciences at Purdue University . West Lafayette . Ind .
domestication: 《国王的演讲》展示了近一个世纪前一个人如何应对口吃的困境，而如今这部电影及其奥斯卡获奖的热议让人们开始讨论21世纪的这一言语障碍。说起口吃的历史，可以追溯到古希腊时期，那时候人们会把鹅卵石放在嘴里试图治愈这个问题，普渡大学西拉法叶分校的言语、语言和听力科学教授安妮·史密斯如是说。
foreignization: 《国王的演讲》展示了一个人在一个世纪前是如何应对口吃的，而现在这部电影及其获得奥斯卡奖的热议让人们在21世纪谈论这一言语障碍。“口吃的历史可以追溯到古希腊时期，当时人们将鹅卵石放在嘴里试图治愈这一问题，”普渡大学西拉斐特分校的言语、语言和听力科学教授安妮·史密斯讲述道。印第安纳州。

source: First introduced in comic books in 1941 ( not long after Marvel Comics debuted a similar hero , the Sub-Mariner ) , the Atlantean adventurer Aquaman has had a choppy journey to the big screen . Never the most popular of the DC superheroes , the character has been rebooted and retconned multiple times over the past 70-plus years , although the basic elements of his origin story have remained fairly constant . Arthur " Aquaman " Curry is the mixed-race son of a human lighthouse keeper and a refugee from the underwater city of Atlantis . He has the power to communicate with aquatic creatures , and to perform superhuman feats of strength and speed underwater . As a founding member of the original Justice League back in 1960 , he 's part of DC 's core .
domestication: 1941年首次出现在漫画书里（差不多和漫威的海王纳摩同时登场），这位来自亚特兰蒂斯的冒险家海王经历了颇为坎坷的大银幕之旅。在DC超级英雄中，海王从来不是最受欢迎的一个，过去的70多年里，他的角色设定多次被重启和修改，但他的起源故事的基本元素一直保持不变。阿瑟·“海王”·库里是人类灯塔看守人与亚特兰蒂斯难民的混血儿。他能与水生生物交流，能在水下展现出超人的力量和速度。作为1960年成立的初代正义联盟成员之一，他是DC的核心英雄。
foreignization: 首次在1941年的漫画书中登场（不久之后，漫威漫画推出了类似的英雄，海王纳摩），亚特兰蒂斯冒险家海王经历了坎坷的大银幕之旅。作为DC超级英雄中人气不高的角色，该角色在过去70多年里多次被重启和重新诠释，尽管其起源故事的基本元素相对保持不变。亚瑟“海王”库里是一位混血儿，父亲是人类灯塔看守人，母亲则是来自水下城市亚特兰蒂斯的难民。他拥有与水生生物交流的能力，并能在水下展示超人的力量和速度。作为1960年原初正义联盟的创始成员之一，他是DC核心阵容的一部分。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

First introduced in comic books in 1941 ( not long after Marvel Comics debuted a similar hero , the Sub-Mariner ) , the Atlantean adventurer Aquaman has had a choppy journey to the big screen . Never the most popular of the DC superheroes , the character has been rebooted and retconned multiple times over the past 70-plus years , although the basic elements of his origin story have remained fairly constant . Arthur " Aquaman " Curry is the mixed-race son of a human lighthouse keeper and a refugee from the underwater city of Atlantis . He has the power to communicate with aquatic creatures , and to perform superhuman feats of strength and speed underwater . As a founding member of the original Justice League back in 1960 , he 's part of DC 's core .

source: Janus Venture . You might expect this $245 million Denver no-load to be our riskiest entry , since it specializes in small-company stocks , a notoriously flighty corner of the market . But under manager James Craig , 34 , who has run the fund since 1985 , Venture has been only 80% as volatile as the S &P; 500 , even while beating the market by an average of 4.5 percentage points over each of the past three years . Craig 's secret , in large part , is his willingness to shed stocks when he considers the market shaky . In early August , the fund was a cautious 25% in cash , and in light of the Mideast crisis , Craig is in no hurry to put that money to work : " Rising oil prices could keep interest rates high , which is not good for my kind of stocks . "
domestication: 詹纳斯创投基金。你可能以为这个位于丹佛、无需前端费用的2.45亿美元基金会是我们名单上风险最大的，因为它专门投资小型公司的股票，这一市场部分以波动著称。但自从1985年起由34岁的詹姆斯·克雷格管理以来，该基金的波动性仅为标准普尔500指数的80%，同时在过去三年中平均每年跑赢市场4.5个百分点。克雷格的秘密，在很大程度上在于他愿意在市场不稳定时抛售股票。8月初，该基金谨慎地持有25%的现金，鉴于中东局势紧张，克雷格并不急于动用这笔资金：“油价上涨可能会维持高利率，这对我的股票不利。”

source: Kerwin , along with a couple who built a home near the gun club in 2007 , filed a federal lawsuit in December 2011 , alleging that the club is violating numerous environmental laws and is a noise nuisance , and that stray projectiles from the club are striking his property , according to published reports in the Mail Tribune . The plaintiffs want the defendants to pay tens of thousands of dollars in fines for every day they allegedly violated the Clean Water act , dating back for decades , as well as pay for their at orney 's fees and mental anguish , the paper reported .
domestication: 据《邮报论坛》报道，克温和一对2007年在射击场附近建房的夫妇，在2011年12月提起联邦诉讼，指控该射击场违反多项环保法律，造成噪音骚扰，还有 stray 弹药飞到他的地界上。原告要求被告支付数十年来每天因涉嫌违反《清洁水法》而产生的数万美元罚款，还要支付律师费和精神痛苦赔偿金。
foreignization: 克温以及一对在2007年在枪支俱乐部附近建造房屋的夫妇于2011年12月提起了联邦诉讼，指控该俱乐部违反了多项环境法律并构成噪音骚扰，并称该俱乐部的流弹击中了他的财产，据《邮报》报道。原告要求被告支付自数十年前起每天因涉嫌违反《清洁水法》而产生的数万美元罚款，以及支付他们的律师费和精神痛苦赔偿，《邮报》报道。

source: But some of these techniques are the flip side of political success . Feldstein notes that neither FDR nor LBJ were lawyers . They were interested in results , not strict adherence to the law . " You do n't get the sense that Obama relishes exercising power , " says Feldstein . " He 's both cleaner and less effective than some of his predecessors . "
domestication: 但这些手段往往是政治成功的一面。费尔德斯坦指出，无论是罗斯福还是约翰逊都不是律师出身，他们关注的是结果，而不是严格遵守法律。“你不会觉得奥巴马喜欢行使权力，”费尔德斯坦说，“他既干净又不如某些前任那么有效。”

source: Dave Beckett is a member of the Pastel Society of America and of the Pastel Society of Canada , which has designated him a Premier Pastelist of Canada . His work is represented by Big Horn Galleries in Fairfield , Connecticut , and by numerous galleries in Canada .

source: SoGen International . Despite its name and French sponsor ( the megabank Societe Generale ) , this uniquely flexible 3.75%-load fund defies categorization as a conventional international fund -- or , for that matter , as a conventional anything . Recently , Jean-Marie Eveillard , 50 , SoGen 's helmsman since 1979 , had 26% of the $203 million portfolio in U.S. stocks , 14% in foreign equities , 28% in U.S. and foreign bonds , 8% in gold and a liberal 24% in cash . Such broad diversification has helped make SoGen not only the least volatile of our four growth choices , but also less risky than 194 of the 196 growth funds we follow . At the same time , the five-year average annual gain has been superb : 17% compared with 13.8% for the typical growth fund .
domestication: 尽管名字里带着“国际”两个字，还由法国大银行——兴业银行撑腰，索根国际基金却是个例外，3.75%的申购费也挡不住它成为一只难以归类的基金，甚至不能简单地称其为常规的国际基金。自1979年起，50岁的让-马里·埃韦伊亚德就掌舵索根，最近他在2.03亿美元的基金组合中，26%投资了美国股票，14%投向了外国股票，28%配置在美国和外国债券上，8%买了黄金，还有宽裕的24%留成了现金。这种广泛的分散投资，不仅使索根成为我们四个成长型基金选择中最稳定的一个，还比我们跟踪的196只成长型基金中的194只风险更低。同时，五年平均年化收益率也非常出色：达到了17%，而一般成长型基金的这一数字仅为13.8%。
foreignization: SoGen International。尽管其名称和法国赞助商（megabank Societe Generale）让人联想到，这只具有独特灵活性的3.75%费用基金却无法被归类为传统的国际基金——实际上，也无法被归类为任何传统意义上的基金。最近，自1979年以来一直执掌SoGen的50岁的Jean-Marie Eveillard将其2.03亿美元的投资组合中26%配置在美国股票，14%在外国股票，28%在美国和外国债券，8%在黄金，以及慷慨的24%以现金持有。这种广泛的多元化帮助SoGen不仅成为我们四个增长选项中最不波动的基金，而且比我们跟踪的196个增长基金中的194个风险更低。同时，五年平均年收益率也非常出色：17%，而典型增长基金的这一数字为13.8%。

source: What information is released is not only difficult for lay people to interpret but also may be based on wildly misleading figures . The nation 's banks and thrifts produce their own quarterly reports , which are in turn analyzed for the investment community by financial rating firms . But the firms ' analyses rely on figures supplied by the financial institutions themselves . ( And occasionally the ratings outfits reaped big bucks for their glowing reports at the very same time regulators were privately noting serious problems . )
domestication: 发布的信息不仅让外行人难以理解，还可能基于严重误导的数据。全国的银行和储蓄机构会自己制作季度报告，这些报告随后会被金融评级公司分析，以供投资界参考。但这些公司的分析依据的数据都是金融机构自己提供的。有时候，评级公司一边从金融机构那里赚得盆满钵满，另一边监管机构却在私下里记录着严重的问题。
foreignization: 发布的信息不仅难以被外行人解读，而且可能是基于极具误导性的数字。全国的银行和储蓄机构会制作自己的季度报告，这些报告随后由金融评级公司分析，以供投资界参考。但这些公司的分析依赖于金融机构自身提供的数字。（有时，就在监管机构私下注意到严重问题的同时，评级机构却因出具光彩夺目的报告而赚取了大笔资金。）

But the firms ' analyses rely on figures supplied by the financial institutions themselves . ( And occasionally the ratings outfits reaped big bucks for their glowing reports at the very same time regulators were privately noting serious problems . )

source: This , almost more than any other aspect of my mother 's disease , has haunted me since the night I awoke and began asking questions . How could she have done this to herself ? How could she , with her personal and family medical history , have neglected to have a mammogram for so long ? In the mountain of material I have amassed over the past year , I stumbled across the only explanation that seems to make any sense . It was buried in an editorial in the Journal of the National Cancer Institute .
domestication: 这件事，几乎比母亲疾病的任何其他方面都更让我挥之不去，自从那个晚上我醒来开始问问题以来，就一直萦绕在我心头。她怎么能这样对待自己呢？她明明有个人和家族的病史，怎么会长时间不去做乳房X光检查呢？在过去的一年里，我在收集的一大堆资料中，偶然发现了唯一一个说得通的解释。这个解释藏在《国家癌症研究所杂志》的一篇社论里。
foreignization: 这，几乎比关于我母亲疾病的任何其他方面，自那个夜晚我醒来并开始提出问题以来就一直困扰着我。她怎么可能这样做呢？她怎么可能在有个人和家族病史的情况下，这么长时间没有做乳腺X光检查呢？在过去一年里我收集的大量资料中，我偶然发现了唯一一个看似合理的解释。它埋藏在《国家癌症研究所杂志》的一篇社论中。

source: That does not include the sanctuary of Yellowstone , but it once did . When the world 's first national park was established in 1872 , it was a haven for big-game hunters who reasoned that coyotes , wolves , mountain lions , and other predators unfairly cut into their take . So hunters and park managers began lacing carcasses with strychnine and broken glass and dynamiting dens to kill any scavenging " flesh-eaters . "
domestication: 这还不包括黄石的圣地，但曾经是。1872年，世界上第一个国家公园建立时，这里成了大猎物猎人的天堂。他们认为，土狼、狼、山狮和其他食肉动物不公平地减少了他们的收获。于是，猎人和公园管理者开始在尸体上撒毒药和碎玻璃，甚至用炸药炸毁巢穴，来杀死这些“食肉者”。
foreignization: 这不包括黄石的保护区，但曾经是这样。当世界上第一个国家公园于1872年建立时，它是一个大型猎物猎人的天堂，他们认为土狼、狼、山狮和其他捕食者不公平地减少了他们的猎获。因此，猎人和公园管理者开始在尸体中掺入毒鼠强和碎玻璃，并用炸药炸毁巢穴，以杀死任何食腐的“食肉动物”。

source: Some have speculated that one of the captured Wasp Network spies provided federal agents with the information that led them to Montes . This seems unlikely . " The Cuban intelligence service is one of the best in the world , " says a former CIA official . They almost certainly would have built firewalls between Montes and the Wasp Network . Yet it 's difficult to keep all their efforts completely compartmentalized .

source: The class instructors have found that the addicted women under their treatment are like all mothers -- they truly want to have a healthy baby . Unfortunately , the desire for a healthy baby is complicated by a powerful addiction and overwhelming odds against recovery . The tragedy of drug abuse-characterized by chronic or periodic compulsive , uncontrolled substance use -- is a treatable disease . Support services can help these women concentrate on their recovery . Public Health Nurses can provide that support link between treatment programs and the home environment to ensure enhancement and continuity of care so that addicted women can have more positive pregnancy outcomes. 6
domestication: 老师们发现，接受治疗的这些上瘾妇女和所有的妈妈一样，真心想要一个健康的宝宝。可惜的是，这种愿望被强烈的毒瘾和极低的康复几率所困扰。吸毒成瘾是一种可治之病，表现为长期或间歇性的强迫性、无法控制的药物使用。支持服务可以帮助这些女性专注于康复。公共卫生护士可以成为治疗项目与家庭环境之间的桥梁，确保护理的提升和连续性，让上瘾的女性能够拥有更积极的怀孕结果。
foreignization: 课程指导老师发现，接受他们治疗的成瘾女性就像所有母亲一样——她们真的希望有一个健康的宝宝。不幸的是，对于一个健康宝宝的渴望被强烈的成瘾和恢复的压倒性困难所复杂化。药物滥用——其特征是慢性或周期性的强迫性、无法控制的物质使用——是一种可治疗的疾病。支持服务可以帮助这些女性专注于她们的康复。公共卫生护士可以提供治疗计划与家庭环境之间的支持联系，以确保护理的提升和连续性，从而使成瘾女性能够获得更积极的妊娠结果。6

source: Qutb later returned to Egypt , quit the civ service , and joined the Muslim Brotherhood . He welcomed Gamal Abdel Nasser 's coup against the corrupt monarchy of King Farouk in 1952 , but then became dislusioned with Nasser for failing to institute Sharia law . He opposed Nasser , and was subsequently arrested and tortured . However , he continued to write and agitate for Islam and against Western civilization , particularly against Jews , whom he blamed for atheistic materiaHsm and considered the worst enemies of Muslims . He was released for a time , but eventually was re-arrested , convicted of conspHacy against the government and hanged in 1 966 .
domestication: 库特布后来回到埃及，辞去了公职，加入了穆斯林兄弟会。他对1952年纳赛尔推翻法鲁克国王的腐败君主制表示欢迎，但很快就对纳赛尔感到失望，因为纳赛尔没有推行伊斯兰教法。库特布开始反对纳赛尔，结果被逮捕和折磨。不过，他仍然坚持写作，抨击西方文明，尤其是犹太人，他认为是犹太人导致了无神论的物质主义，视其为穆斯林的最大敌人。库特布曾获短暂释放，但最终再次被捕，因密谋反对政府罪被判处绞刑，于1966年被处决。
foreignization: 库特卜后来返回埃及，退出了文官系统，并加入了穆斯林兄弟会。他欢迎加迈勒·阿卜杜勒-纳赛尔在1952年对法鲁克国王腐败君主制的政变，但随后因纳赛尔未能实施伊斯兰教法而感到幻灭。他反对纳赛尔，并因此被逮捕和折磨。然而，他继续写作并为伊斯兰辩护，反对西方文明，尤其是反对犹太人，他认为犹太人是无神论物质主义的罪魁祸首，并认为他们是穆斯林最恶劣的敌人。他曾一度获释，但最终再次被捕，被控阴谋反对政府，并于1966年被处绞刑。

However , he continued to write and agitate for Islam and against Western civilization , particularly against Jews , whom he blamed for atheistic materiaHsm and considered the worst enemies of Muslims . source: In 1984 , Harper 's magazine Index , a page of pointedly selected stats . What Counts : The Complete Harper 's Index ( Henry Holt . $12.95 ) tells us that 26 brand-name products appear in " Back to the Future , Part II " and that 30,000 Americans hold Pan Am reservations for a trip to the moon-or did , before other airlines took over many of its routes . Is Delta ready for this ?
domestication: 1984年，《哈珀斯》杂志的索引页上列出了些让人深思的数据。《重要的数字：完整的哈珀斯索引》（亨利霍尔特出版社，12.95美元）里提到，在《回到未来2》这部电影中出现了26个品牌的产品；另外，3万名美国人预订了泛美航空的月球之旅——不过，在其他航空公司接手了泛美的许多航线后，这些计划不知所措了。达美航空准备好接招了吗？

source: " It 's a mistake for conservationists or the Tanzanian government to make this a matter of wildebeest versus economic development . Rather , the wildebeest are part of the economic development of the region , " says Richard Leakey , whose parents discovered some of the oldest human ancestors at Olduvai Gorge next to the Serengeti and who himself once served as director of the Kenya Wildlife Service , responsible for protecting the northern part of the migration . " The issue is whether this highway , as it is now planned , will kill the goose that lays the golden egg . I believe it will . But with a different design , the migration and the highway can both easily exist in a win-win solution . "
domestication: 保护主义者或坦桑尼亚政府把这当成是角马与经济发展之间的对决，这实在是一个错误。其实，角马本身就是该地区经济发展的一部分。理查德·利基如是说。他的父母在塞伦盖蒂旁边的奥杜威峡谷发现了最古老的人类祖先，而他自己也曾担任过肯尼亚野生动物服务局的局长，负责保护迁徙路线的北部区域。他说：“问题在于，按照目前的计划，这条公路是否会让下金蛋的母鸡死去。我认为会的。但若能改变设计，迁徙和公路完全可以共存，实现双赢的局面。”
foreignization: “保护主义者或坦桑尼亚政府将此视为角马与经济发展之间的对立是一个错误。相反，角马是该地区经济发展的一部分，”理查德·利基说，他的父母在塞伦盖蒂附近的奥杜威峡谷发现了最早的人类祖先之一，他自己曾担任肯尼亚野生动物服务局局长，负责保护迁徙的北部地区。“问题在于，这条高速公路按目前的规划是否会杀死下金蛋的鹅。我相信它会。但通过不同的设计，迁徙和高速公路都可以轻松共存，实现双赢的解决方案。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" It 's a mistake for conservationists or the Tanzanian government to make this a matter of wildebeest versus economic development . Rather , the wildebeest are part of the economic development of the region , " says Richard Leakey , whose parents discovered some of the oldest human ancestors at Olduvai Gorge next to the Serengeti and who himself once served as director of the Kenya Wildlife Service , responsible for protecting the northern part of the migration . " The issue is whether this highway , as it is now planned , will kill the goose that lays the golden egg . I believe it will . But with a different design , the migration and the highway can both easily exist in a win-win solution . "

保护主义者或坦桑尼亚政府把这当成是角马与经济发展之间的对决，这实在是一个错误。其实，角马本身就是该地区经济发展的一部分。理查德·利基如是说。他的父母在塞伦盖蒂旁边的奥杜威峡谷发现了最古老的人类祖先，而他自己也曾担任过肯尼亚野生动物服务局的局长，负责保护迁徙路线的北部区域。他说：“问题在于，按照目前的计划，这条公路是否会让下金蛋的母鸡死去。我认为会的。但若能改变设计，迁徙和公路完全可以共存，实现双赢的局面。”

source: Trudeau reiterated his government would n't concede to U.S. demands to dismantle its dairy system , known as supply management . Talks were also hung up on U.S. insistence to eliminate dispute-resolution panels that Ottawa considers essential , two Canadian officials said Friday .  ' Win-Win-Win '
domestication: 特鲁多重申，加拿大政府不会屈服于美国要求拆解其奶制品体系，也就是所谓的供应管理制。谈判还因为美方坚持取消争端解决机制而陷入僵局，渥太华认为这一机制至关重要。两位加拿大官员周五表示，“三赢”局面。

source: Facebook is facing backlash after a Cleveland man uploaded a video of himself shooting someone to the social network , and followed it with a Live video confessing to the murder . The slaying and its subsequent distribution across Facebook has raised questions about how the company moderates violent content .
domestication: 脸书最近摊上大事了，一个克利夫兰的男子先是上传了一段自己开枪打人的视频，接着又直播承认了这起谋杀案。这事儿一出，人们就开始质疑脸书怎么处理暴力内容的。杀人视频在网络上传播开来，真是让人不得不对脸书的内容审查打个问号。
foreignization: Facebook在一名克利夫兰男子上传了一段自己射杀某人的视频到社交网络，并随后发布了一段直播视频承认谋杀后，正面临强烈反对。这起凶杀案及其随后在Facebook上的传播引发了关于该公司如何监管暴力内容的质疑。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Facebook is facing backlash after a Cleveland man uploaded a video of himself shooting someone to the social network , and followed it with a Live video confessing to the murder . The slaying and its subsequent distribution across Facebook has raised questions about how the company moderates violent content .
脸书最近摊上大事了，一个克利夫兰的男子先是上传了一段自己开枪打人的视频，接着又直播承认了这起谋杀案。这事儿一出，人们就开始质疑脸书怎么处理暴力内容的。杀人视频在网络上传播开来，真是让人不得不对脸书的内容审查打个问号。

Facebook在一名克利夫兰男子上传了一段自己射杀某人的视频到社交网络，并随后发布了一段直播视频承认谋杀后，正面临强烈反对。这起凶杀案及其随后在Facebook上的传播引发了关于该公司如何监管暴力内容的质疑。

source: As Sunday-afternoon children 's parties go , the Nov. 30 birthday celebration in a quiet neighborhood of Pueblo , Colo. , was a standard free-for-all . " My son Dezmond was just learning how to throw rocks , " says Brian Huckabay , 24 , the father of 20-month-old twins Dezmond and Diego . " He would pick up a rock and throw it , then pick it up again and throw it farther . Before you know it , he was zinging the rocks . " But by the following morning the boy was showing signs of illness . " My hijo Spanish for son woke up sick , " recalls Huckabay . " We thought it was just a cold . He had a runny nose , coughing and wheezing . "
domestication: 周日下午的孩子聚会，说起来也就那样，没什么特别的。11月30日，在科罗拉多州普韦布洛一个安静的社区里，一场生日派对就是典型的乱哄哄。24岁的布莱恩·哈卡贝说：“我儿子德兹蒙德才刚学会扔石头。”他是一对20个月大双胞胎德兹蒙德和迭戈的父亲。“他会捡起一块石头，扔出去，再捡起来，扔得更远。不一会儿，他就扔得飞快了。”但第二天早上，孩子就生病了。“我的儿子醒来时就病了，”哈卡贝回忆道，“我们还以为只是感冒了。他流鼻涕，咳嗽，还喘。”

source: Nonetheless , several authorities on American cultural trends agree that ingrained animosity towards Spanish persists in pockets throughout this society : from the Europhiles in the upper echelons who find the language dclass to the middle-classic Hispanic-Americans who want to shed their hyphenated backgrounds ( or want their children to ) , to the struggling laborers in the lower strata who resent the growing Hispanic presence in the American workforce and see the Spanish language as the embodiment of their competition .
domestication: 不过，美国文化趋势的一些专家认为，社会上仍然存在对西班牙语的根深蒂固的敌意：从上层的欧洲迷们觉得这门语言低人一等，到中产阶级的拉丁裔美国人想摆脱他们的双重身份（或者希望他们的孩子能摆脱），再到下层挣扎的劳工们，他们对美国劳动力市场中不断增长的拉丁裔感到不满，视西班牙语为竞争对手的象征。
foreignization: 然而，几位美国文化趋势的权威人士一致认为，在这个社会的某些角落里，对西班牙语的根深蒂固的敌意依然存在：从上层的欧洲迷们认为这种语言低俗，到中产阶级的拉丁裔美国人希望摆脱他们的混合背景（或希望他们的孩子摆脱），再到下层挣扎的劳工们，他们对美国劳动力市场中日益增长的拉丁裔人口感到不满，并将西班牙语视为他们竞争对手的象征。

Nonetheless , several authorities on American cultural trends agree that ingrained animosity towards Spanish persists in pockets throughout this society : from the Europhiles in the upper echelons who find the language dclass to the middle-classic Hispanic-Americans who want to shed their hyphenated backgrounds ( or want their children to ) , to the struggling laborers in the lower strata who resent the growing Hispanic presence in the American workforce and see the Spanish language as the embodiment of their competition .

source: The Canadian health system already imposes limits on premiums and budget spending . Under Canada 's government-funded health system , established nationwide in 1971 , patients shoulder little or none of the cost of their care . This predictably has escalated demands for services and thus prompted a steady tightening of government regulations to control costs . The results : physician fees are rigidly controlled and the introduction of new technology and certain services are limited . ( See " Should We Adopt Canada 's Health Care System ? " CR , May 1990 . ) To see how the Clinton plan might affect patients , therefore , it is instructive to look at what global budgets and price controls have meant for Canada .
domestication: 加拿大的医疗系统已经对保费和预算支出设定了限制。加拿大自1971年起在全国范围内实行政府资助的医疗体系，患者几乎不需要承担任何治疗费用。这自然而然地导致了医疗服务需求的激增，迫使政府不断加强对成本的控制。结果就是：医生的费用被严格控制，新技术和某些服务的引入也受到了限制。要想了解克林顿计划可能会如何影响患者，看看全球预算和价格控制对加拿大意味着什么，就很有启发性了。
foreignization: 加拿大的医疗系统已经对保费和预算支出设定了限制。根据1971年在全国建立的加拿大政府资助的医疗系统，患者几乎或完全不承担其医疗费用。这可预见地导致了对服务需求的增加，从而促使政府不断收紧规定以控制成本。结果是：医生的费用被严格控制，新技术和某些服务的引入受到了限制。（参见“我们是否应该采用加拿大的医疗保健系统？”《CR》，1990年5月。）因此，要了解克林顿计划可能如何影响患者，研究全球预算和价格控制对加拿大意味着什么是有指导意义的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The Canadian health system already imposes limits on premiums and budget spending . Under Canada 's government-funded health system , established nationwide in 1971 , patients shoulder little or none of the cost of their care . This predictably has escalated demands for services and thus prompted a steady tightening of government regulations to control costs . The results : physician fees are rigidly controlled and the introduction of new technology and certain services are limited . ( See " Should We Adopt Canada 's Health Care System ? " CR , May 1990 . ) To see how the Clinton plan might affect patients , therefore , it is instructive to look at what global budgets and price controls have meant for Canada .

source: At Courier Happy Hour you meet people like Scrooge , a quiet , imposing figure in Olympian good shape with ocher skin , matted dreadlocks , and missing front teeth . At 41 , Scrooge is the dean of the Washington bike messengers . He works with Action Couriers ( Dispatcher #135 ) and makes about $500 a week . " We do real work , " Scrooge boasts . " And we 're good at it . We 're like the Pony Express , man -- heroes , thirty times a day . "
domestication: 在快递欢乐时光，你会遇到像斯克鲁奇这样的人。他是个沉默寡言但气场十足的壮汉，身材健硕如奥林匹亚众神，皮肤呈橙黄色，头发打着脏辫，还缺了两颗门牙。41岁的斯克鲁奇是华盛顿自行车快递员中的老大，在行动快递公司工作（调度员135号），每周能赚大约500美元。“我们干的是真活儿，”斯克鲁奇自豪地说，“而且我们干得特棒。我们就像当年的邮递马队，一天下来，得成三十回英雄。”

source: It 's been five days since the bodies of seven adults and a 16-year-old boy were found shot in their homes in the hills near Piketon , a poor Appalachian Mountain town roughly 80 miles east of Cincinnati . Authorities say they 've interviewed more than 50 people but have n't made arrests or confirmed a motive for the slayings .

source: " Vascular dementia is a form of dementia that clearly arises from alteration in typically small blood vessels , " Ray said . " Something happens , not slowly but pretty quickly , and when that happens the person takes a step downward in their cognition . Something changes , and it is n't noticeable over years . "

source: In the afternoon Taralon and I wander the streets in search of the blue-and-white patterns that inspired the intricate designs of Bleus d'Ailleurs . At the Galerie Tindouf , a boutique selling ceramics and art on the Rue de la Libert , we find 19th-century Moroccan butter jars that resemble enormous lidded vases with the same pattern as his salad plates . Taralon winks at me . In Tangier the color combination is everywhere : on the wall of a riad , the two colors splitting apart in dense stripes as if magnetized , effectively cutting the building in half ; in the ever-changing hues of the sea , a glimpse of which always seems to be right around the corner of the next building .
domestication: 下午，塔拉隆和我漫步街头，寻找那些激发了《异域蓝》精美设计的青花图案。在自由路上的廷杜夫画廊，一家售卖陶瓷和艺术品的小店，我们找到了19世纪的摩洛哥黄油罐，像巨大的带盖花瓶，上面的图案和塔拉隆的沙拉盘一模一样。塔拉隆朝我眨眨眼。在丹吉尔，这种颜色组合随处可见：在一个riad的墙上，两种颜色像被磁铁吸开似的，密集的条纹仿佛将建筑劈成两半；在变幻莫测的大海中，转过下一个街角总能看到大海的一抹蓝白。

source: Using the Play Store for the prompt would require an Android device to have Google 's app store pre-loaded -- and licensing tweaks made to the OS in Europe last year were supposedly intended to enable OEMs to choose to unbundle Google apps from Android forks . Ergo making only the Play Store the route for enabling choice would be rather contradictory . ( As well as spotlighting Google 's continued grip on Android . )

source: But it 's not their hypocrisy that most amazes me . It 's their ignorance . Many are under the impression that people who hang their clothes on a line , fix their own cars , and are door-to-door vendors are exhibiting cultural ( specifically Latino ) traits . However , these are not cultural traits , but traits poor people , regardless of ethnic background , exhibit .
domestication: 但最让我吃惊的不是他们的虚伪，而是他们的无知。很多人以为那些晾衣服、自己修车、走街串巷卖东西的人是在展示文化特色，尤其是拉丁美洲的文化。其实这些都不是文化特色，而是穷人，不论什么种族背景，都会有的行为。

source: The feud burst into the open earlier this month when Dustin Nemos , a prolific conspiracy theorist and one of the book 's co-authors , tweeted that fans should stop asking him when the QAnon book would come out as an audiobook . Nemos blamed " JoeM , " another co-author , as the reason for the hold-up , saying JoeM was afraid of making too much money from the book and being called a " grifter " -- the ultimate insult for QAnon boosters .
domestication: 这个月早些时候，争端终于公开化了。多产的阴谋论者、这本书的合著者之一德斯汀·内莫斯在推特上发帖说，粉丝们不要再问他那本QAnon的有声书什么时候能出来。内莫斯指责另一位合著者“乔姆”是拖后腿的原因，说乔姆害怕从书中赚太多钱而被骂成“骗子”，这可是QAnon支持者最忌讳的帽子。

source: Maintaining that balance between feminism and femininity is especially tricky in the pop mainstream ; it has taken Crow a while to be accepted on her own terms . Aside from the obvious classic-rock influences that inform the textures on Music Club , there are lyrics that convey brutal candor and celebrate independence , two virtues that -- before Madonna , at least -- were n't traditionally associated with light female pop .
domestication: 在流行音乐界里，平衡女权主义和女性魅力特别难；克劳花了好一阵子才让大家接受她的真实自我。除了《音乐俱乐部》中显而易见的经典摇滚影响外，她的歌词直言不讳，颂扬独立自主，这两点在麦当娜之前，可不太被看作是女性流行音乐的标签。
foreignization: 维持女权主义和女性气质之间的平衡在流行音乐主流中尤其棘手；克劳花了很长时间才被人们按照她自己的条件接受。除了《音乐俱乐部》中显而易见的经典摇滚影响之外，还有一些歌词传达了残酷的坦率并颂扬独立，这两种美德——至少在麦当娜之前——并不传统上与轻松的女性流行音乐相关联。

source: These days , the sites sell almost everything from Allegra to Zyban , including often-overprescribed antibiotics . Details on our own shopping expedition are in " Why It Pays to Play by the Rules , " on the facing page . What we could n't buy -- narcotics , stimulants , depressants , and anabolic steroids -- are controlled substances regulated by the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration . DEA officials scrutinize prescriptions for those often-abused drugs to track down and prosecute people who sell or buy them illegally . HERE 'S THE HARM
domestication: 如今，这些网站几乎什么都能买到，从阿勒格拉到齐班，包括那些常常被过度开的抗生素。我们自己购物探险的详情见对面页的《为什么遵守规则有利》。买不到的东西——比如麻醉品、兴奋剂、镇静剂和同化类固醇，这些都是受美国缉毒局管制的药物。缉毒局的官员会仔细审查这些常被滥用的药物的处方，追踪并起诉非法买卖这些药物的人。这就是危害所在。

source: They 'll find common ground in realizing that they need things from each other -- someone as level-headed and experienced as Sansa has become matched with the might Daenerys ' lofty pull has brought with it -- to make it out of this alive . source: Recently , twenty art instructors from around the country were invited to the school for a seminar called The Power of Art -- Educating Students With Learning Disabilities , the school 's first such program . Some of the instructors were accredited teachers , some were professional artist-teachers , and one was adocent-turned-teacher . They displayed their students ' quilts , self-portrait masks , ethnic puppets , sculptured animals , totempoles , and hieroglyphics created for history , writing , and science projects .
domestication: 最近，来自全国各地的二十位艺术指导老师受邀来到学校，参加了一个名为“艺术的力量——教育学习障碍学生”的研讨会，这是学校首次举办此类活动。这些老师有的是注册教师，有的是职业艺术家兼教师，还有一位是从讲解员转行过来的。他们展示了学生们的作品，有拼布被、自画像面具、民族玩偶、雕塑动物、图腾柱，还有为历史、写作和科学项目创作的象形文字。

source: Any legislation that would increase accountability and oversight would be welcome . However , rogue sites wo n't go away without a curb on two enablers in the process : the doctors who review questionnaires and the customers . Doctors who participate can face criminal prosecution for prescribing across state lines without an appropriate license . They can also have their medical license suspended or revoked because writing prescriptions to unseen patients falls far below the acceptable standard of patient care .
domestication: 任何能增强问责制和监管的立法都值得欢迎。但是，要想彻底解决那些非法网站的问题，还得从两个关键环节入手：审查问卷的医生和顾客。参与其中的医生可能会因为无照跨州开药而面临刑事起诉。他们的行医执照也可能被暂停或吊销，因为给从未见过面的病人开处方，这远远低于合理的患者护理标准。
foreignization: 任何增加问责制和监督的立法都会受到欢迎。然而，如果没有对过程中的两个推动者进行限制，流氓网站不会消失：审查问卷的医生和客户。参与的医生可能因未经适当许可跨州开处方而面临刑事起诉。他们还可能因为向未见过面的病人开具处方而被吊销或暂停行医执照，因为这种行为远远低于可接受的病人护理标准。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Any legislation that would increase accountability and oversight would be welcome . However , rogue sites wo n't go away without a curb on two enablers in the process : the doctors who review questionnaires and the customers . Doctors who participate can face criminal prosecution for prescribing across state lines without an appropriate license . They can also have their medical license suspended or revoked because writing prescriptions to unseen patients falls far below the acceptable standard of patient care .

source: Creating large-scale pastel paintings is one of my greatest pleasures . The medium offers a fantastic intensity of color as well as the potential for developing a wide range of textures . When working on supports that are larger than the standard-size papers available at local art-supply stores , I take special consideration in choosing the right paper , handling and applying the pastel , and framing the finished piece . CHOOSING THE RIGHT PAPER

source: Tim Peters had been an amateur vegetable breeder for more than a decade when he read that Territorial Seed Company was looking for a vegetable breeder . He could not imagine anything more wonderful than being paid to breed vegetables . But he had only a high-school diploma . Nevertheless , he screwed up his courage and went to talk with the people at Territorial -- and ended up losing his amateur status . He now handles the seed company 's trial and breeding program .
domestication: 蒂姆·彼得斯种菜育种已经十多年了。一天，他看到特里托里尔种子公司在招蔬菜育种师，觉得这活儿再好不过了，能拿钱干自己喜欢的事。不过，他只有高中文凭。尽管如此，他还是鼓足勇气去找公司的人谈。结果，业余爱好变成了正经工作。如今，他在公司负责试验和育种项目。
foreignization: 蒂姆·彼得斯在阅读到特里托利亚尔种子公司正在寻找一名蔬菜育种者时，已经是一位业余蔬菜育种者十多年了。他无法想象还有比被付钱去育种蔬菜更美好的事情了。但他只有高中文凭。尽管如此，他鼓足勇气去找特里托利亚尔种子公司的人交谈——最终失去了他的业余身份。他现在负责该种子公司试验和育种计划。

蒂姆·彼得斯在阅读到特里托利亚尔种子公司正在寻找一名蔬菜育种者时，已经是一位业余蔬菜育种者十多年了。他无法想象还有比被付钱去育种蔬菜更美好的事情了。但他只有高中文凭。尽管如此，他鼓足勇气去找特里托利亚尔种子公司的人交谈——最终失去了他的业余身份。他现在负责该种子公司试验和育种计划。

source: The roughly 9,700-square-mile Serengeti ecosystem straddles two countries and two parks - Tanzania 's Serengeti and Kenya 's Masai Mara . The parks protect not only the wildebeest but also some 300,000 gazelles and 200,000 zebras . The migration sustains such predators as lions , leopards , cheetahs , and hyenas , along with a host of smaller species from vultures to dung beetles . As they have for millennia , all depend on the wildebeest returning year after year .
domestication: 大约9700平方英里的塞伦盖蒂生态系统横跨两个国家和两个公园——坦桑尼亚的塞伦盖蒂和肯尼亚的马赛马拉。这两个公园不仅保护了角马，还守护着约30万只羚羊和20万匹斑马。每年的大迁徙养活了狮子、豹子、猎豹、鬣狗等捕食者，还有秃鹫、蜣螂等众多小型物种。千百年来，它们都指望角马年复一年地归来。

source: Promoting science and technology education to the exclusion of the humanities may seem like a good idea , but it is deeply misguided . Scientific American has always been an ardent supporter of teaching STEM : science , technology , engineering and mathematics . But studying the interaction of genes or engaging in a graduate-level project to develop software for self-driving cars should not edge out majoring in the classics or art history .

source: MY MOTHER HAD LIED TO ME ABOUT HER BIOPSY . THE RESULTS actually showed that she had cancer of the right breast . But even worse news was ahead . When Dr. Citrone first examined her , he immediately noticed a dimple in the skin just below the nipple of her left breast and felt a firm mass beneath it . He also detected swelling in her lymph nodes . All of these findings were potential signals of cancer .
domestication: 我妈在她的活检结果上骗了我。结果其实显示她得了右乳癌。然而，更糟糕的消息还在后头。希特龙医生第一次检查时，立刻注意到她左乳头下方的皮肤有个凹陷，还摸到了下面的一个硬块。此外，他还发现她的淋巴结肿大。这些迹象都可能是癌症的征兆。

source: Gretchen Daily 's timely interview on the subject of optimal population " Visions , " Nov. /Dec. recalls my first visit to Haiti some 15 years ago . Once the richest prize in the Caribbean , Haiti had already been almost completely denuded of its centuries-old tropical hardwoods , and the daily wash-off of topsoil had just about killed offshore fishing .
domestication: 格雷琴·戴利最近在《愿景》杂志11/12月刊上关于最优人口的访谈，让我想起了大约15年前第一次访问海地的情景。曾经的海地是加勒比海上的明珠，但那时几乎已经完全失去了几百年来的热带硬木，每天都有大量表土被冲走，近海的渔业也因此受到了致命打击。

source: Then came the questions . After a reporter said Trump had called Putin a " rival , " the American president responded , " Actually , I called him a competitor , and a good competitor he is . And the word competitor is a compliment . " Trump was then asked directly whether he held Russia responsible for anything ; he responded by saying everyone was responsible , before once again criticizing the United States . Over time , things degenerated in the ways that they tend to do when Trump is speaking . He kept ranting -- but again , in a more subdued fashion -- about his election win and kept making the point that the Mueller investigation was really about denying him a fair victory .
domestication: 接着，问题就来了。有个记者说特朗普称普京为“对手”，特朗普回应说：“事实上，我叫他竞争对手，而且还是个不错的竞争对手。竞争这个词本身就是一种赞美。”随后，有人直接问特朗普是否认为俄罗斯有任何责任；他回答说，大家都得负责任，然后又开始批评美国。时间一长，情况就像特朗普讲话时经常发生的那样，越来越糟糕。他继续喋喋不休——不过这次语气稍微缓和一些——谈论他的选举胜利，反复强调穆勒调查实际上是想剥夺他公平获胜的机会。
foreignization: 然后是提问环节。在一名记者说特朗普称普京为“对手”后，美国总统回应道：“实际上，我称他为竞争对手，而且他是一个很好的竞争对手。‘竞争对手’这个词是一种赞美。”随后，特朗普被直接问及是否认为俄罗斯应对此事负有任何责任；他回答说每个人都有责任，然后再次批评了美国。随着时间的推移，事情的发展就像特朗普讲话时常见的那样变得糟糕。他不断抱怨——但方式较为克制——关于他的选举胜利，并不断强调穆勒调查实际上是为了剥夺他公平获胜的机会。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Then came the questions . After a reporter said Trump had called Putin a " rival , " the American president responded , " Actually , I called him a competitor , and a good competitor he is . And the word competitor is a compliment . " Trump was then asked directly whether he held Russia responsible for anything ; he responded by saying everyone was responsible , before once again criticizing the United States . Over time , things degenerated in the ways that they tend to do when Trump is speaking . He kept ranting -- but again , in a more subdued fashion -- about his election win and kept making the point that the Mueller investigation was really about denying him a fair victory .

source: Stanley Ellin ( 1916-86 ) . Stanley Ellin was a perfectionist , working slowly and deliberately , producing a page of typescript on a good day . He admitted to having rewritten the opening paragraph of a short story as many as forty times before going on to the next paragraph and polishing each subsequent page in similar fashion before proceeding further .
domestication: 斯坦利·埃林（1916-1986）是个完美主义者，做事慢条斯理，精雕细琢，一天能写出一页打字稿就很不错了。他自己曾说，一篇短篇小说的开头段落，他最多重写了四十次才接着往下写，每页都这样反复打磨，才继续往下推进。
foreignization: 斯坦利·埃林（1916-86）。斯坦利·埃林是一个完美主义者，工作缓慢而谨慎，一天能写出一页打字稿就很不错了。他承认曾重写过一个短篇小说的开头段落多达四十次，才继续写下一个段落，并以类似的方式润色每一页后续内容，然后进一步进行下去。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Stanley Ellin ( 1916-86 ) . Stanley Ellin was a perfectionist , working slowly and deliberately , producing a page of typescript on a good day . He admitted to having rewritten the opening paragraph of a short story as many as forty times before going on to the next paragraph and polishing each subsequent page in similar fashion before proceeding further .
斯坦利·埃林（1916-1986）是个完美主义者，做事慢条斯理，精雕细琢，一天能写出一页打字稿就很不错了。他自己曾说，一篇短篇小说的开头段落，他最多重写了四十次才接着往下写，每页都这样反复打磨，才继续往下推进。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.
