He admitted to having rewritten the opening paragraph of a short story as many as forty times before going on to the next paragraph and polishing each subsequent page in similar fashion before proceeding further .
斯坦利·埃林（1916-86）。斯坦利·埃林是一个完美主义者，工作缓慢而谨慎，一天能写出一页打字稿就很不错了。他承认曾重写过一个短篇小说的开头段落多达四十次，才继续写下一个段落，并以类似的方式润色每一页后续内容，然后进一步进行下去。

source: Lillemeier 's lab studied ZAP70 , a protein that associates with T cell receptors and becomes activated when the receptors recognize a foreign molecule . To track the activity and location of ZAP70 molecules , the team tagged them with a fluorescent marker while anchoring each T cell receptor in place . To the group 's surprise , ZAP70 molecules were being activated by the T cell receptors and then moving away , spreading throughout the cell .
domestication: 利勒梅尔的实验室研究了一种名为ZAP70的蛋白质，这种蛋白质与T细胞受体结合，并在受体识别外来分子时被激活。为了追踪ZAP70分子的活动和位置，团队给它们标上了荧光标记，同时将每个T细胞受体固定住。让研究小组意外的是，ZAP70分子先是被T细胞受体激活，然后就跑开了，在整个细胞里扩散开来。
foreignization: Lillemeier的实验室研究了ZAP70，这是一种与T细胞受体相关联并在受体识别外来分子时激活的蛋白质。为了追踪ZAP70分子的活动和位置，团队用荧光标记对其进行了标记，同时将每个T细胞受体固定在原位。令研究小组惊讶的是，ZAP70分子被T细胞受体激活后会移开，扩散到整个细胞中。

source: All the food she and Ryan , her husband , buy is organic or natural , including the herbal tea she 's sipping . She uses cloth bags for purchases . Their German shepherd , Makana , eats natural dog food . Their bath towels , bed sheets , and bathrobes are made from organic cotton . She points out pieces of secondhand furniture--a small table , decorative tubs made of recycled tires .
domestication: 她和丈夫瑞安买的所有东西都是有机或天然的，包括她正在喝的草药茶。购物时她用的是布袋。他们的德国牧羊犬马卡娜吃的是天然狗粮。他们的浴巾、床单和浴袍都是用有机棉制成的。她还指出了几件二手家具——一张小桌子，还有用回收轮胎做的装饰桶。

source: Describing the sensation of first seeing the biological children he 'd never known , Raul told me , " It released a lot of brain chemicals . It felt bigger than me . It was not a benign feeling . " I asked Raul if he 'd donate again , knowing how he feels now . He shrugged . " I probably would , " he said . " But then , I 'm open to chaos . " AuthorAffiliation
domestication: 劳尔第一次见到自己从未谋面的亲生子女时，他告诉我：“那种感觉就像大脑里的化学物质全被释放出来了。这感觉超出了我的掌控，不是什么轻松的事。”我问劳尔，现在知道了这种感受，还会不会再次捐精。他耸了耸肩，说：“我大概还是会的。不过，我对混乱是来者不拒的。”
foreignization: 描述第一次见到他从未认识的亲生子女的感觉时，劳尔告诉我：“这释放了很多大脑化学物质。感觉比我自己还要大。这不是一种良性感觉。”我问劳尔，如果他知道现在的感觉，是否会再次捐献。他耸了耸肩。“我可能会的，”他说。“但话说回来，我对混乱是开放的。”作者归属

source: " We crushed the Caliphate of ISIS ... in 2014 , the ISIS Caliphate was eight million people . It had oil fields , it had wheat fields , it had taxation , and was recruiting actively in Europe and recruiting actively in the United States . He has physically destroyed the Caliphate . If you listen to the morning talk shows , you would think that all President Trump is doing is just following Obama 's plan . It could n't be farther from the truth . He told General Mattis , not a war of attrition , I want a war of annihilation . I want to physically destroy the Caliphate in Mosul , in Raqqa and other cities . He 's done that , and I do n't think he 's gotten the credit . "
domestication: 我们把ISIS的哈里发国给彻底捣毁了……2014年的时候，ISIS的哈里发国有八百万人，有油田，有麦田，还能收税，而且在欧洲和美国招兵买马。特朗普总统可没跟着奥巴马的老路走，你要是听那些早晨脱口秀，还以为他就是按部就班呢，其实差得远了。他对马蒂斯将军说，不要打消耗战，我要的是灭绝战，我要在摩苏尔、拉卡和其他城市彻底摧毁哈里发国。他做到了，这功劳可不能埋没了。
foreignization: 我们摧毁了ISIS的哈里发国……2014年，ISIS的哈里发国有八百万人。它有油田，有麦田，有税收，并且在欧洲和美国积极招募。他物理上摧毁了哈里发国。如果你听早晨的谈话节目，你会以为特朗普总统所做的只是遵循奥巴马的计划。这与事实相差甚远。他告诉马蒂斯将军，不是消耗战，我想要一场歼灭战。我要在摩苏尔、拉卡和其他城市物理上摧毁哈里发国。他已经做到了这一点，我认为他没有得到应有的赞誉。

He told General Mattis , not a war of attrition , I want a war of annihilation . I want to physically destroy the Caliphate in Mosul , in Raqqa and other cities . source: Largely through the efforts of this postwar establishment , Americans came to support the Marshall Plan , the liberalization of trade and a neo-Keynesian fiscal strategy . Establishment organizations were also critical in winning national acceptance of the early civil rights movement . They served as orchestral conductors that transformed the cacophony of interests and associations into acceptable initiatives on behalf of the national interest .
domestication: 二战后的这批精英们努力奔走，美国人逐渐支持了马歇尔计划，接受了贸易自由化和新凯恩斯主义的财政政策。这些组织在争取国民对早期民权运动的支持上也起到了关键作用。他们就像乐队的指挥，把各种声音和利益协调起来，转化为符合国家利益的行动。
foreignization: 很大程度上通过战后建制派的努力，美国人开始支持马歇尔计划、贸易自由化和新凯恩斯主义财政战略。建制派组织在赢得全国对早期民权运动的接受方面也起到了关键作用。它们充当了乐队指挥的角色，将各种利益和团体的杂音转化为符合国家利益的可接受倡议。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Largely through the efforts of this postwar establishment , Americans came to support the Marshall Plan , the liberalization of trade and a neo-Keynesian fiscal strategy . Establishment organizations were also critical in winning national acceptance of the early civil rights movement . They served as orchestral conductors that transformed the cacophony of interests and associations into acceptable initiatives on behalf of the national interest .

source: How can you bring together a Puerto Rican who has lived in New York since 1961 with a man from the Dominican Republic who has been driving a taxi in Manhattan for only four years ? An Argentine doctor with his Central American patients ? Millions of women of all ages and nationalities with Julio Iglesias ? Millions of men with Maradona and Jose Canseco ? The Pope with his millions of followers , north and south ?
domestication: 要把一个自1961年起就在纽约生活的波多黎各人和一个仅在曼哈顿开了四年出租车的多米尼加人拉到一起，这该怎么个拉法？一个阿根廷医生和他的中美洲病人又怎么沟通呢？还有，要把成千上万不同年龄、不同国籍的女性和胡里奥·伊格莱西亚斯联系起来，该怎么弄？要把无数男人和马拉多纳、何塞·坎塞科绑在一起，又该怎么办？教皇和他的千百万追随者，南北各地的，又该怎么团结呢？

source: It seems these days we 're living in the midst of a true crime renaissance , particularly when those awful crimes seem to happen in the state of Wisconsin . Like Making a Murderer , the SXSW premiere documentary Beware the Slenderman probes beyond the headlines into the human side of a horrific act -- in this case , a murder attempt five months in the making by Anissa Weier and Morgan Geyser on their unsuspecting classmate , whom they lured into the woods to kill one Saturday morning following Geyser 's sleepover birthday party .
domestication: 最近这阵子，真实犯罪题材好像又火了起来，尤其是发生在威斯康星州的那些骇人听闻的案件。就像《制造杀人犯》一样，《小心瘦长怪》这部纪录片在SXSW电影节上首映，它不仅挖掘了新闻头条背后的真相，还深入探讨了这起可怕事件的人性一面——具体来说，就是安妮莎·维亚和摩根·盖瑟精心策划了五个月，最终在一个星期六的早晨，在盖瑟的生日派对之后，把她们毫无防备的同学骗到树林里企图杀害。
foreignization: 似乎如今我们正生活在一场真实犯罪复兴的时代，尤其是当那些可怕的罪行似乎发生在威斯康星州时。就像《制造杀人犯》一样，SXSW首映的纪录片《小心瘦高男人》超越了头条新闻，深入探究了一起可怕行为的人性一面——在这个案例中，是一次由安妮莎·魏尔和摩根·格塞尔策划了五个月的谋杀未遂案，她们在格塞尔的生日派对后的周六早晨，将毫无防备的同学引诱到树林里企图杀害。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It seems these days we 're living in the midst of a true crime renaissance , particularly when those awful crimes seem to happen in the state of Wisconsin . Like Making a Murderer , the SXSW premiere documentary Beware the Slenderman probes beyond the headlines into the human side of a horrific act -- in this case , a murder attempt five months in the making by Anissa Weier and Morgan Geyser on their unsuspecting classmate , whom they lured into the woods to kill one Saturday morning following Geyser 's sleepover birthday party .
最近这阵子，真实犯罪题材好像又火了起来，尤其是发生在威斯康星州的那些骇人听闻的案件。就像《制造杀人犯》一样，《小心瘦长怪》这部纪录片在SXSW电影节上首映，它不仅挖掘了新闻头条背后的真相，还深入探讨了这起可怕事件的人性一面——具体来说，就是安妮莎·维亚和摩根·盖瑟精心策划了五个月，最终在一个星期六的早晨，在盖瑟的生日派对之后，把她们毫无防备的同学骗到树林里企图杀害。

source: The staff of life may be exactly that , scientists from the National Cancer Institute say . Their study of 388,122 men and women found that those who ate the most fiber from grains -- an average of 9 grams a day for women -- were 19% less likely to die over the nine-year research period than those who ate the least . They were also 28% less likely to die from cardiovascular disease . Although the high-fiber eaters took in a lot from fruits , veggies , and beans , whole grains were the key , say the researchers , probably because of the foods ' anti-inflammatory prowess . To fill up on whole-grain fiber , try these carb superstars .

source: Yes , but it was catastrophic . The tiny settlement was called La Navidad because the plan to set it up was made on Christmas Day of 1492 . Located in a shallow bay off the northeast coast of the large island that Columbus called Hispaniola , the site was not the most advantageous , but then Columbus had not exactly chosen it . Nor had it been his intention to establish a colony . The heady step of planting Europeans in the New World came about as the result of the shipwreck of the Santa Maria . While Columbus slept on Christmas Eve , his helmsman ran the flagship aground on the reefs of a Haitian bay .
domestication: 对，但那是一场灾难。这个小定居点被命名为拉纳维达，因为建立它的计划是在1492年的圣诞节定下的。地点选在了伊斯帕尼奥拉大岛东北海岸的一个浅湾里，其实这地方并不理想，但这也不是哥伦布亲自选的。他原本也没打算要在这儿建立殖民地。欧洲人在新大陆扎根这个大胆的举动，其实是由于“圣玛利亚”号的沉船事故造成的。在圣诞节前夜，哥伦布正在睡觉，舵手却让旗舰撞上了海地海湾的珊瑚礁。
foreignization: 是的，但这是灾难性的。这个小定居点被称为拉纳维达，因为建立它的计划是在1492年的圣诞节制定的。位于哥伦布称为伊斯帕尼奥拉的大岛东北海岸的一个浅湾中，这个地方并不是最有利的，但当时哥伦布并没有确切地选择它。建立殖民地也不是他的本意。将欧洲人种植在新世界这一大胆的步骤，是由于圣玛丽亚号失事的结果。当哥伦布在平安夜睡觉时，他的舵手将旗舰搁浅在海地海湾的珊瑚礁上。

Yes , but it was catastrophic . The tiny settlement was called La Navidad because the plan to set it up was made on Christmas Day of 1492 . Located in a shallow bay off the northeast coast of the large island that Columbus called Hispaniola , the site was not the most advantageous , but then Columbus had not exactly chosen it . Nor had it been his intention to establish a colony . The heady step of planting Europeans in the New World came about as the result of the shipwreck of the Santa Maria . While Columbus slept on Christmas Eve , his helmsman ran the flagship aground on the reefs of a Haitian bay .
对，但那是一场灾难。这个小定居点被命名为拉纳维达，因为建立它的计划是在1492年的圣诞节定下的。地点选在了伊斯帕尼奥拉大岛东北海岸的一个浅湾里，其实这地方并不理想，但这也不是哥伦布亲自选的。他原本也没打算要在这儿建立殖民地。欧洲人在新大陆扎根这个大胆的举动，其实是由于“圣玛利亚”号的沉船事故造成的。在圣诞节前夜，哥伦布正在睡觉，舵手却让旗舰撞上了海地海湾的珊瑚礁。

source: It 's getting harder and harder to decide whether to laugh or worry about the Russian military Gotterdammerung in the Baltic States . In places like Paplaka , once-haughty military units appear to have collapsed into barely disciplined bands of uniformed scavengers , vandals , and drunks . But that is only half the picture .
domestication: 现在真是让人哭笑不得，俄羅斯軍隊在波羅的海國家的這場「諸神的黃昏」越來越難以評判。像在帕普拉卡這樣的地區，昔日驕傲的軍事單位如今淪為了幾乎毫無紀律可言的穿著制服的蟊賊、搗亂分子和酒鬼。不過這只是一方面。

source: A second problem with Dunn 's article is its implicit celebration of violence . She writes as if women should take pride in the fact that they are occasionally as reprehensible as men often are . Would n't our energy be better spent condemning and trying to discourage reprehensible behavior ? There is reason to believe that professional and amateur boxing permanently damage the brains of hundreds of men each year . ( Had a conversation with Muhammad Ali lately ? ) Now Dunn wants to applaud women who are making pioneering efforts to damage the brains of other women .
domestication: 邓的文章的另一个问题在于她对暴力的暗中赞美。她笔下的意思是女性应该为偶尔和男性一样不可原谅的行为感到自豪。我们难道不应该把精力放在谴责和阻止这种不可原谅的行为上吗？有证据表明，职业拳击和业余拳击每年都会给数百名男性的大脑带来永久性伤害。（你最近和穆罕默德·阿里聊过吗？）现在邓还想为那些试图伤害其他女性大脑的女性先锋鼓掌叫好。
foreignization: 邓的文章的第二个问题是它隐含地庆祝暴力。她写得好像是女性应该为她们偶尔和男性一样不可原谅而感到自豪。我们不是应该更好地花精力谴责并试图阻止不可原谅的行为吗？有理由相信，职业和业余拳击每年都会永久性地损害数百名男性的大脑。（最近和穆罕默德·阿里交谈过吗？）现在邓想要赞扬那些正在努力损害其他女性大脑的女性的开创性努力。

A second problem with Dunn 's article is its implicit celebration of violence . She writes as if women should take pride in the fact that they are occasionally as reprehensible as men often are . ( Had a conversation with Muhammad Ali lately ? ) Now Dunn wants to applaud women who are making pioneering efforts to damage the brains of other women .

source: While in Stewart , I heard stories about the wild hermit who lived in the Bob Quinn Lake area near the fire tower . His bare feet would inevitably beat a path to my door , people said . His reputation as an unpredictable barbarian left such an impression in my mind that when I bought a buck knife it was n't with the bears in mind .

His reputation as an unpredictable barbarian left such an impression in my mind that when I bought a buck knife it was n't with the bears in mind .
在斯图尔特时，我听到了关于住在鲍勃·奎因湖地区靠近火塔的那位野生隐士的故事。人们说，他的赤脚总会不自觉地走到我的门前。他作为一个不可预测的野蛮人的名声给我留下了如此深刻的印象，以至于当我买了一把猎刀时，并不是因为想到了熊。

source: The predictable result of all this special-interest cash and legislative career-mindedness is lawmakers who can not be dislodged . During the 1960s , one third of all state legislative seats turned over every electoral season . In 1988 , only 16 percent changed hands . Incumbents win by bigger margins today , too .
domestication: 这些利益集团的钱和议员们追求连任的心态导致了一个结果：议员们几乎无法被击败。上世纪60年代，每个选举季都有三分之一的州立法席位易主。到了1988年，这个比例降到了16%。如今，现任议员的胜选优势更大了。

source: But as with many of the recommendations , there was n't a centralized strategy for deploying party reps to such events . Mahoney says teams were never formally organized and dedicated to the goal as the report suggested . Instead , who attended and how often was up to local parties , local RNC staffers and their availability -- an approach that still netted 40,000 new voters over the past year at hundreds of naturalization ceremonies . The return on voter registrationswas small , the RNC concedes -- yet it 's a result that could have been bolstered by a more concerted effort .
domestication: 但就像许多建议一样，并没有一个集中的策略来部署党代表参加这些活动。马霍尼说，团队从未正式组织和专门致力于这个目标，尽管报告中有所提及。实际上，谁去参加以及参加的频率都由地方党组织、地方共和党工作人员及其可用性决定——尽管如此，过去一年在数百场入籍仪式上还是吸引了4万名新选民。共和党全国委员会承认，选民注册的回报率不高，但如果有更加协调一致的努力，这一结果本可以得到加强。

But as with many of the recommendations , there was n't a centralized strategy for deploying party reps to such events . Mahoney says teams were never formally organized and dedicated to the goal as the report suggested . Instead , who attended and how often was up to local parties , local RNC staffers and their availability -- an approach that still netted 40,000 new voters over the past year at hundreds of naturalization ceremonies . The return on voter registrationswas small , the RNC concedes -- yet it 's a result that could have been bolstered by a more concerted effort .

But as with many of the recommendations , there was n't a centralized strategy for deploying party reps to such events . Mahoney says teams were never formally organized and dedicated to the goal as the report suggested . Instead , who attended and how often was up to local parties , local RNC staffers and their availability -- an approach that still netted 40,000 new voters over the past year at hundreds of naturalization ceremonies . source: Speaking of Disney , the good news is that Fantasia , the beloved animated celebration of classical music , will finally be available for holiday gift giving this year ( Walt Disney Home Video . $24.99 for video alone , $99.99 for Deluxe Collector 's package ; also on laser disc ) . The bad news is that this will be the first and last time the original will be offered for home viewing . Furthermore , the next time the landmark feature is released theatrically , in 1996 or 1997 , it will appear under the title " Fantasia Continued , " with some of the eight original sequences replaced by new selections . NEWSWEEK to Disney : in our opinion , the apprentice sorcerer with the big ears has an ironclad no-cut contract .
domestication: 说到迪士尼，好消息是，大家喜爱的古典音乐动画庆典《幻想曲》终于可以在今年作为节日礼物送人了（沃尔特·迪士尼家庭视频。单独购买录像带需24.99美元，豪华收藏版需99.99美元；还有激光视盘版）。坏消息是，这将是原版《幻想曲》唯一一次提供家庭观看的机会。而且，下次这部经典影片在电影院重映时，大概是在1996年或1997年，片名将变成《幻想曲续集》，部分原版的八个片段将被新选段取代。《新闻周刊》对迪士尼说：依我们看，大耳朵的小巫师学徒可是签了铁打的不可剪辑合同呢。

source: Five . As a consequence , the GOP 's share of the Latino vote has indeed been on a declining path . But how responsible is Pete Wilson or Proposition 187 for this ? Wilson himself received 23 percent of the Hispanic vote in 1994-a better performance than that of Dan Lungren , who received only 17 percent of Latinos in 1998 after running a campaign that stressed his support for immigration and his Catholic sympathy for Hispanic values . It is highly implausible that Latino voters would punish Lungren more harshly than Wilson for Wilson 's sins .
domestication: 五、结果呢，共和党在拉美裔选民中的支持率确实一路下滑。但皮特·威尔逊或187号提案对此有多大责任呢？威尔逊自己在1994年获得了23%的拉美裔选票，这比丹·伦格林在1998年的表现还要好。后者虽然强调支持移民政策和天主教对拉美文化的同情，却只得到了17%的拉美裔选票。要说拉美裔选民因为威尔逊的过错，反而对伦格林更狠，这实在说不通。
foreignization: 五. 因此，共和党在拉丁裔选民中的得票率确实呈下降趋势。但 Pete Wilson 或者 Proposition 187 对此有多大责任？Wilson 本人在1994年获得了23%的西班牙裔选票——这比 Dan Lungren 在1998年的表现要好，尽管 Lungren 的竞选活动强调了他对移民的支持以及他对西班牙裔价值观的天主教同情，但他只获得了17%的拉丁裔选票。很难相信拉丁裔选民会因为 Wilson 的过失而对他比对 Lungren 更加严厉地进行惩罚。

Five . As a consequence , the GOP 's share of the Latino vote has indeed been on a declining path . But how responsible is Pete Wilson or Proposition 187 for this ? Wilson himself received 23 percent of the Hispanic vote in 1994-a better performance than that of Dan Lungren , who received only 17 percent of Latinos in 1998 after running a campaign that stressed his support for immigration and his Catholic sympathy for Hispanic values . It is highly implausible that Latino voters would punish Lungren more harshly than Wilson for Wilson 's sins .

source: The new steps may still not be enough to reverse the impending personnel crisis in the federal government . But to many , they are an important and long overdue change in direction that may once again make a career in public service attractive to a broader segment of the workforce . " Government workers have often been the punching bag of politicians , comedians , and the news media , " says Max Stier , president of the Partnership for Public Service . " But for people whose top priority is to make a difference rather than a dollar , the federal government is a great place to be . " PUBLIC-SERVICE CHALLENGE
domestication: 新措施可能仍不足以扭转联邦政府迫在眉睫的人力危机。但对许多人来说，这些举措是朝着正确方向迈出的重要一步，也是姗姗来迟的改变，可能会重新让公共服务职业对更广泛的劳动力群体产生吸引力。公共事业合作组织的总裁马克斯·斯蒂尔说：“政府雇员常常被政客、喜剧演员和新闻媒体当作替罪羊。”他又说，“但对于那些首要目标是创造价值而不是追求财富的人来说，联邦政府是一个很好的去处。” 公共服务的挑战
foreignization: 新的措施可能仍不足以扭转联邦政府即将面临的人事危机。但对许多人来说，这是朝着正确方向迈出的重要且姗姗来迟的一步，可能会再次使公共服务职业对更广泛的工作人群产生吸引力。“政府工作人员经常成为政治家、喜剧演员和新闻媒体的出气筒，”公共服务伙伴关系组织的总裁马克斯·斯蒂尔说。“但对于那些首要目标是有所作为而不是赚钱的人来说，联邦政府是一个很好的选择。” 公共服务挑战

The new steps may still not be enough to reverse the impending personnel crisis in the federal government . " But for people whose top priority is to make a difference rather than a dollar , the federal government is a great place to be . " PUBLIC-SERVICE CHALLENGE

source: The role of the energy policy decisionmaker is quite frustrating . The public can be convinced to support high-minded actions--whether they be conserving energy or cleaning up environmental pollution--but a great many citizens want the costs to be borne by someone else , preferably a large and impersonal institution .
domestication: 能源政策决策者的角色真是够呛。大众可以被说服支持高尚的行为，无论是节能减排还是治理环境污染，但很多老百姓都希望这些成本由别人来承担，最好是那些大型的、没脸没皮的机构。

source: Lead character Kusuo Saiki has a bevy of psionic abilities that would put Jean Grey and Franklin Richards to shame , not just because of their sheer magnitude , but also because of his ( mostly ) fine-tuned control over them . After Saiki begins manifesting his powers as a baby , his regular human parents settle into a lifetime of raising a child who regularly reads their minds , teleports at will , and bends reality with the slightest of his thoughts .
domestication: 主角(saiki)拥有各种超能力，就连琴·格雷和弗兰克林·理查兹都得甘拜下风，不仅因为这些能力的强大，还因为他对这些能力的（大部分）掌控自如。小.saiki还在婴儿时期就开始展现他的超能力，他的普通人类父母便开始了漫长的育儿之路，面对一个能随心所欲读心、瞬移、甚至稍一念动就能扭曲现实的孩子，日子可不轻松。

source: The development of Blacktail Mountain ' was unusually easy . The plants of the first generation after Glenn 's cross already had the characteristics he was looking for , and there was little variation thereafter . It 's more common for the desired type to show up in a later generation . Glenn 's development of Mexigold ' squash is more typical . He started by crossing Mexican Banana ' , a blue-green banana squash , with the orange , heart-shaped Golden Delicious ' .
domestication: 布莱克特尔山的开发出奇地顺利。格伦第一次杂交后，第一代植物就已具备他想要的特征，之后几乎没有变化。通常情况下，理想的类型会在后代中出现。相比之下，格伦开发墨西哥金南瓜的过程更为典型。他先是将蓝绿色的墨西哥香蕉南瓜与橙色心形的金美味南瓜进行杂交。
foreignization: 黑尾山的开发异常顺利。格伦杂交后的第一代植物就已经具备了他所寻找的特征，此后变异很少。通常情况下，所需类型会在后代中较晚出现。格伦开发墨西哥金南瓜的过程更为典型。他首先将墨西哥香蕉（一种蓝绿色的香蕉南瓜）与橙色心形的金 Delicious 进行杂交。

source: My kitchen is my baby . I do n't have kids , so cooking is sort of like my child . Renovating my kitchen has allowed me to channel my creativity the way parents work on a nursery . source: Because Saiki 's always privy to everyone 's innermost thoughts , there 's never really a moment for him to have interactions with people that feel meaningful , because people generally do n't say what 's on their minds . source: " I also find that yellow dock tincture and evening primrose oil prevent outbreaks of acne . " To keep her skin clear , Sari takes a teaspoon of yellow dock tincture in a little water twice a day and takes 3,000 mg of evening primrose oil daily . Herbalists suggest that yellow dock may help clear up chronic skin problems ; evening primrose is recommended for inflammatory conditions such as acne .

source: The results take a new look at the history of the megaraptors ( " giant thieves " ) . The relatives of this group of carnivorous predatory dinosaurs include the Tyrannosaurus rex . Like the T. rex , they ran on their hind legs . Unlike the tyrant lizard , however , their arms were strong and armed with long claws . They also had more delicate heads that ended in a long snout . " We were able to assign the bones to a novel megaraptor , which we baptized Phuwiangvenator yaemniyomi , " explains Samathi . The name is reminiscent on the one hand of the location , the Phuwiang district , and on the other hand of the discoverer of the first Thai dinosaur fossil , Sudham Yaemniyom .
domestication: 这些发现让我们对“巨盗龙”有了新的认识。这群凶猛的食肉恐龙中，有霸王龙的亲戚。和霸王龙一样，它们也是用后腿奔跑。不过，与霸王龙不同的是，它们的前肢非常强壮，长着锋利的爪子。它们的头部也更为精致，尖嘴长长的。“我们确认这些骨头属于一种新发现的巨盗龙，我们给它命名为暹罗猎龙亚尼耶姆。”萨玛提解释道。这个名字既让人联想到发现地——泰国的普汪区，也纪念了泰国第一具恐龙化石的发现者——苏丹·亚尼耶姆。
foreignization: 这些结果以新的视角审视了巨盗龙（"巨型盗贼"）的历史。这个食肉捕食恐龙群体的亲戚包括霸王龙。像霸王龙一样，它们用后腿奔跑。然而，与暴君蜥蜴不同的是，它们的前臂强壮并装备有长爪。它们还拥有更加精致的头部，头部以一个长吻结束。“我们能够将这些骨骼归类为一种新发现的巨盗龙，我们将其命名为Phuwiangvenator yaemniyomi，”Samathi解释道。这个名字一方面让人联想到地点，即Phuwiang地区，另一方面则纪念了第一位发现泰国恐龙化石的发现者Sudham Yaemniyom。

source: In 2005 and 2007 , Snow created and hosted two eco-lifestyle series , now shown in reruns on Discovery Health and FitTV . They 're called Living Fresh and Get Fresh With Sara Snow . source: The men of Jamestown desperately wanted wives , but women were refusing to immigrate . They had heard disturbing reports of dissension , famine , and disease , and had decided it simply was n't worth it . Consequently , barely a decade after its founding in 1607 , Jamestown was almost entirely male , and because these men were unable to find wives , they were deserting the colony in droves .
domestication: 詹姆斯敦的男人们急切地想要娶妻，但女人们却不愿意移民过来。她们听到了关于内讧、饥荒和疾病的可怕消息，觉得这根本不值得冒险。结果，这个1607年建立的殖民地，短短十年后几乎全是男人。由于找不到妻子，这些男人们纷纷逃离殖民地。
foreignization: 詹姆斯敦的男人们迫切希望有妻子，但妇女们拒绝移民。她们听到了关于分歧、饥荒和疾病的令人不安的报道，决定这根本不值得。因此，在1607年建立后不到十年，詹姆斯敦几乎完全由男性组成，由于这些男人无法找到妻子，他们大批逃离殖民地。

source: Christ , it had to be something serious . Did n't it ? What else would trigger this sort of crying ? The noise he made included a falsetto trilling that did something to me . It seemed to reach into my skull through my mouth , to grasp my brain stem , to shake the inner core of my being . It was the strangest sensation : His crying was actually rattling my brain . I looked down at him and he was apoplectic . I 've never seen any human being look that angry . Is ttis OK ? I thought . Is this normal ?
domestication: 哎呀，这事儿肯定严重了，不然怎么会哭成这样？他哭得那声音，尖细得刺耳，直往我脑子里钻，好像抓住了我的脑干，摇晃着我的灵魂深处。这种感觉真是奇怪，他的哭声竟然能把我的脑子都震得嗡嗡响。我低头看他，他气得脸都变形了，我从没见过人能生气到这种程度。这正常吗？我心里想着。这到底有没有问题？
foreignization: 基督，这肯定是什么严重的事情。不是吗？还有什么会引发这种哭泣？他发出的声音包括一种假声颤音，对我产生了影响。这声音似乎从我的嘴巴穿透到我的颅骨，抓住了我的脑干，摇晃着我存在的核心。这是一种最奇怪的感觉：他的哭声实际上在震动我的大脑。我低头看他，他已经气得要命。我从未见过任何人看起来那么生气。这样可以吗？我在想。这是正常的吗？

source: From the outset , Heavin was looking for a different kind of franchisee -- someone who was looking less for a business opportunity than for a mission . The typical franchiser , he says , " looks for people . who want to run a business and tries to teach them passion . We 're looking for people with passion , and we 'll teach them how to run a business . " So rather than plastering the franchise trades with ads like most franchisers , Curves has found nearly all of its franchisees through word of mouth -- as often as not from its own membership base . Many share Heavin 's Christian faith . Franchisees are not required to have any background in entrepreneurship or experience in the fitness industry , but Heavin says that the company is selective : Applicants must display a willingness to work hard and , more important , have a passion to serve .
domestication: 从一开始，海文就在寻找一种不同类型的加盟者——这些人更看重的是一份使命，而不是一个商业机会。他说，典型的特许经营者“寻找的是想做生意的人，然后试图教会他们激情。而我们寻找的是有激情的人，我们会教他们如何经营生意。”所以，与大多数特许经营者不同，曲线并不是在行业展览会上大肆投放广告来招揽加盟者，而是几乎都是通过口碑传播找到的加盟者，很多还是来自其会员基础。许多加盟者还和海文一样，信仰基督教。对于加盟者，并不要求必须有创业背景或健身行业的经验，但海文说公司很挑剔：申请者必须表现出愿意努力工作，更重要的是，要有服务的热情。
foreignization: 从一开始，Heavin 就在寻找一种不同类型的特许经营商——那些寻求的不仅仅是商业机会，而是使命的人。他说，典型的特许经营者“寻找想要经营业务的人，并试图教导他们热情。我们则寻找有热情的人，并教他们如何经营业务。” 因此，与大多数特许经营者不同，Curves 并没有通过在特许经营行业刊登广告来招募，而是几乎完全通过口碑找到了其所有特许经营商——这些特许经营商往往来自其自身的会员基础。许多人与 Heavin 拥有相同的基督教信仰。特许经营商不需要有任何创业背景或健身行业的经验，但 Heavin 表示，公司是挑剔的：申请人必须表现出愿意努力工作，并且更重要的是，拥有服务的热情。

Many share Heavin 's Christian faith . Franchisees are not required to have any background in entrepreneurship or experience in the fitness industry , but Heavin says that the company is selective : Applicants must display a willingness to work hard and , more important , have a passion to serve .

从一开始，海文就在寻找一种不同类型的加盟者——这些人更看重的是一份使命，而不是一个商业机会。他说，典型的特许经营者“寻找的是想做生意的人，然后试图教会他们激情。而我们寻找的是有激情的人，我们会教他们如何经营生意。”所以，与大多数特许经营者不同，曲线并不是在行业展览会上大肆投放广告来招揽加盟者，而是几乎都是通过口碑传播找到的加盟者，很多还是来自其会员基础。许多加盟者还和海文一样，信仰基督教。对于加盟者，并不要求必须有创业背景或健身行业的经验，但海文说公司很挑剔：申请者必须表现出愿意努力工作，更重要的是，要有服务的热情。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

From the outset , Heavin was looking for a different kind of franchisee -- someone who was looking less for a business opportunity than for a mission . The typical franchiser , he says , " looks for people . who want to run a business and tries to teach them passion . We 're looking for people with passion , and we 'll teach them how to run a business . " So rather than plastering the franchise trades with ads like most franchisers , Curves has found nearly all of its franchisees through word of mouth -- as often as not from its own membership base . Many share Heavin 's Christian faith . Franchisees are not required to have any background in entrepreneurship or experience in the fitness industry , but Heavin says that the company is selective : Applicants must display a willingness to work hard and , more important , have a passion to serve .

从一开始，Heavin 就在寻找一种不同类型的特许经营商——那些寻求的不仅仅是商业机会，而是使命的人。他说，典型的特许经营者“寻找想要经营业务的人，并试图教导他们热情。我们则寻找有热情的人，并教他们如何经营业务。” 因此，与大多数特许经营者不同，Curves 并没有通过在特许经营行业刊登广告来招募，而是几乎完全通过口碑找到了其所有特许经营商——这些特许经营商往往来自其自身的会员基础。许多人与 Heavin 拥有相同的基督教信仰。特许经营商不需要有任何创业背景或健身行业的经验，但 Heavin 表示，公司是挑剔的：申请人必须表现出愿意努力工作，并且更重要的是，拥有服务的热情。

source: Marketing also proved easy . Curves promised a fast-yet-effective workout , along with a sense of community with like-minded women . This promise was particularly attractive during the mid- to late 1990s . Aging boomers were being urged by their doctors to spend more time at the gym . But few women are able to put this advice into practice : Some 66 percent of women say they never get 10 minutes or more of any kind of vigorous physical activity a week , according to a 2004 report by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention . What 's more , Heavin 's frank talk about religiously inspired values could not have been timed better . Not only were megachurches on the rise , but the family-friendly aspect of Curves ownership -- hours that allow you to be home to have dinner with your family -- also had a strong appeal and stood in stark contrast with the around-the-clock service required by other franchisers .
domestication: 营销也显得轻松。Curves 承诺提供快速而有效的锻炼，同时还能让志同道合的女性感受到社区的温暖。这个承诺在上世纪90年代中期到末期特别有吸引力。那时候，老一辈人听从医生建议，需要花更多时间去健身房。但真正能做到的女性寥寥无几：根据美国疾病控制与预防中心2004年的一份报告，大约66%的女性每周连10分钟以上的任何一种剧烈运动都做不到。更巧的是，Heavin 谈论宗教价值观的方式恰到好处。那时不仅大型教会正在兴起，而且 Curves 的经营方式对家庭友好——营业时间允许你回家和家人共进晚餐，这与其他特许经营需要全天候服务形成了鲜明对比，非常吸引人。
foreignization: 市场营销也证明是容易的。Curves承诺提供快速而有效的锻炼，同时与志同道合的女性建立社区感。这一承诺在1990年代中期到晚期尤其具有吸引力。老一代的婴儿潮人口正被医生敦促花更多时间在健身房。但很少有女性能够将此建议付诸实践：根据疾病控制和预防中心2004年的一份报告，约66%的女性表示她们每周从未进行过10分钟或更长时间的任何形式的剧烈身体活动。此外，Heavin关于宗教启发价值观的坦率言论时机恰到好处。不仅大型教堂正在兴起，而且Curves所有权的家庭友好方面——允许你回家与家人共进晚餐的时间——也具有强烈的吸引力，并与其他特许经营者的全天候服务要求形成鲜明对比。

Marketing also proved easy . Curves promised a fast-yet-effective workout , along with a sense of community with like-minded women . This promise was particularly attractive during the mid- to late 1990s . Aging boomers were being urged by their doctors to spend more time at the gym . But few women are able to put this advice into practice : Some 66 percent of women say they never get 10 minutes or more of any kind of vigorous physical activity a week , according to a 2004 report by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention . What 's more , Heavin 's frank talk about religiously inspired values could not have been timed better . Not only were megachurches on the rise , but the family-friendly aspect of Curves ownership -- hours that allow you to be home to have dinner with your family -- also had a strong appeal and stood in stark contrast with the around-the-clock service required by other franchisers .

source: The styling , while polarizing , grew on me . I 'm a fan of the front end that looks futuristic and bland at the same time . The rear of the car still feels too heavy design-wise . Some passengers entered the car ambivalent about its looks but once they got out and saw it at certain angles ( usually from the front ) decided it that " on second thought " it 's something they would want in their driveway .
domestication: 这车的造型虽然一开始褒贬不一，但越看越顺眼。前脸设计既前卫又不失低调，挺有感觉的。车尾的设计还是显得有些沉闷。有的乘客刚上车时对它的外观还有些犹豫，但下车后从某些角度（特别是前面）一看，心里就想“哎呀，其实这车停在自家门口也挺不错的”。
foreignization: 这款车型的造型虽然两极分化，但越来越让我喜欢。我非常喜欢它那既前卫又平淡的前脸设计。车尾在设计上仍然显得过于笨重。一些乘客起初对它的外观持保留态度，但一旦下车从某些角度（通常是正面）看到它时，他们改变了主意，觉得这是一款他们想停在自家车道上的车。

source: Matthew Scudder is an alcoholic ex-cop , divorced , living alone in a cheap hotel in the West Fifties , eking out a living as an unlicensed private eye . source: Tesla has stores across the globe , including the U.S. , Germany , China , and Australia . But it has none in Africa , which has been broadly left out of the electric-car revolution Tesla pioneered . Lower average incomes and poor power infrastructure mean gasoline-powered cars -- often bought second hand -- dominate most markets on the continent .
domestication: 特斯拉的门店遍布全球，美国、德国、中国和澳大利亚都有，但唯独在非洲没有开店。非洲基本上被特斯拉引领的电动车革命抛在了脑后。由于平均收入较低，加上电力基础设施落后，非洲大陆上的大多数市场还是汽油车的天下，而且这些车很多都是二手的。
foreignization: 特斯拉在全球各地都有门店，包括美国、德国、中国和澳大利亚。但在非洲，这个被特斯拉引领的电动汽车革命广泛忽视的地区，特斯拉却没有任何门店。较低的平均收入和落后的电力基础设施意味着汽油车——通常是二手车——在该大陆的大多数市场上占据主导地位。

source: Rosemary 's ( Rosmarinus officinalis ) spiky , evergreen-like leaves contain flavonoids that have antioxidant properties . In fact , this tasty herb 's antioxidant power was used for centuries to preserve food . One flavonoid in rosemary , diosmin , is reported to help strengthen capillaries , which can ease problems such as varicose veins and hemorrhoids .

source: In fact , Weingarten is the MONEY 20 's purest example of growth investing . The fund 's 80 stocks have a five-year average earnings growth rate of 21% -- compared with 8.2% for the stocks in the S &P; 500 . Up 9.8% in the seven months to Aug. 1 , the fund has the highest five-year total return of our 20 funds . But there 's a price : volatility , again the highest of our selections .
domestication: 其实，温加滕基金是“MONEY 20”中最典型的成长投资范例。这只基金持有的80只股票，五年平均盈利增长率达到了21%，而标普500指数的成分股只有8.2%。截至8月1日的七个月里，该基金上涨了9.8%，在我们跟踪的20只基金中，五年的总回报率是最高的。不过，这也有代价：波动性，同样是我们所选基金中最高的。

source: United Income . All that you can count on in the stock market , says United manager Russell Thompson , 50 , is that things wo n't stand still . In his view , the way to make money is to anticipate changes before anyone else . Specifically , Thompson , the $1.7 billion fund 's manager since 1979 , looks for solid , dividend-paying blue chips that will benefit from cyclical economic trends . " Most of the stocks we own are household names , " he says . Example : ITT ( NYSE , $54.75 ) , which at 2.5% of assets is the fund 's largest holding .
domestication: 联合收益。联合基金的经理拉塞尔·汤普森，50岁，说，在股市里唯一能指望的就是事情不会一成不变。在他看来，赚钱的秘诀就是要比别人先预见变化。具体来说，自1979年起就管理着这只17亿美元基金的汤普森，寻找那些稳健的、派息的蓝筹股，这些股票会从周期性的经济趋势中受益。“我们持有的大多数股票都是大家耳熟能详的名字。”他说。比如：ITT（纽约证券交易所，每股54.75美元），占基金资产2.5%，是该基金最大的持仓股。

source: Passan : I 'm not sure the last time Fred Wilpon , the Mets owner , gave a substantive interview . Maybe five years ago with The New Yorker ? Either way , he never talks because he 's an owner and nobody can force him to answer questions about his ties to Bernie Madoff and the ruinous effect they had on one of the most important franchises in baseball . MLB has protected the Wilpon family for years with loans and high-ranking positions on committees . Wilpon learned his lesson from that New Yorker story on the dangers of honesty .
domestication: 帕桑：我不记得大都会队的老板弗雷德·威尔庞上次认真接受采访时啥时候了，可能是五年前在《纽约客》上吧？反正他就是不开口，因为他是老板，谁也逼不了他说出跟伯尼·麦道夫的关系，以及这对棒球界一个最重要球队造成的灾难性影响。大联盟这些年来一直护着威尔庞家，给他们贷款，还让他们在委员会里占据重要位置。威尔庞从那篇《纽约客》的文章中学到了，诚实是有风险的。
foreignization: 帕桑：我不确定大都会队的老板弗雷德·威尔彭上次进行实质性采访是什么时候了。也许是五年前在《纽约客》？不管怎样，他从不说话，因为他是老板，没有人能强迫他就自己与伯尼·麦道夫的关系以及这对棒球界最重要的球队之一所造成的毁灭性影响回答问题。MLB多年来一直保护着威尔彭家族，给予他们贷款和委员会中的高层职位。威尔彭从那篇《纽约客》的文章中关于诚实的危险性学到了教训。

source: Imagine learning about Michelangelo by painting your own Sistine Chapel . At The Lab School of Washington in Washington , DC , ten-and eleven-year-olds not only paint ceilings , they also make frescoes and study the basic building techniques used for the great cathedrals . Students of the Renaissance illustrate their own time line with dates and events that becomes a history lesson . Later , instruction in Leonardo da Vinci 's use of perspective is applied when a science class goes outside to observe nature . And for an hour a day , the kids participate in the Renaissance Club costumed as members of the Council of Florence .
domestication: 想象一下，通过自己绘制西斯廷教堂来学习米开朗基罗。在华盛顿特区的实验室学校，十岁和十一岁的孩子们不仅会画天花板，还会制作壁画，研究建造大教堂的基本技术。学生们在绘制文艺复兴时期的时间线时，会标注重要的日期和事件，这成了一堂生动的历史课。到了科学课上，老师会讲解达芬奇如何使用透视法，然后学生们就到户外观察自然，亲身体验这种技巧。每天还有一个小时，孩子们会穿上佛罗伦萨议会成员的服装，参加文艺复兴俱乐部的活动。
foreignization: 想象一下通过自己绘制西斯廷教堂来学习米开朗基罗。在华盛顿特区的实验室学校，十岁和十一岁的孩子们不仅会画天花板，他们还会制作壁画并学习用于建造伟大教堂的基本建筑技术。文艺复兴时期的学生们用自己的时间线标注日期和事件，成为一堂历史课。后来，当科学课外出观察自然时，学生们会应用达芬奇的透视法。每天有一个小时，孩子们会参加文艺复兴俱乐部，装扮成佛罗伦萨委员会的成员。

Imagine learning about Michelangelo by painting your own Sistine Chapel . At The Lab School of Washington in Washington , DC , ten-and eleven-year-olds not only paint ceilings , they also make frescoes and study the basic building techniques used for the great cathedrals . Students of the Renaissance illustrate their own time line with dates and events that becomes a history lesson . Later , instruction in Leonardo da Vinci 's use of perspective is applied when a science class goes outside to observe nature . And for an hour a day , the kids participate in the Renaissance Club costumed as members of the Council of Florence .

source: Laura Fairrie is directing the doc biopic which is being produced by John Battsek and Lizzie Gillett of Searching For Sugar Man and One Day In September outfit Passion Pictures . The movie will chart the journey of one of the world 's best-selling novelists whose turbulent life sometimes rivaled the spicy plots she dreamed up for her books . Hollywood Wives scribe Collins ( n ? e Jacqueline but known as Jackie ) , also also an actress , screenwriter and producer , passed away in 2015 after spending the latter decades of her life in LA .
domestication: 劳拉·费里正在执导这部纪录片传记片，由《寻找糖人》和《九月的一天》的制作公司Passion Pictures的约翰·巴特塞克和莉齐·吉尔特担任制片人。这部电影将讲述一位世界级畅销小说家的生平历程，她的人生波折有时甚至比她笔下的故事还要精彩。柯林斯（原名杰奎琳，但大家都叫她杰姬）不仅是编剧，还是演员、编剧和制片人，她在人生的最后几十年住在洛杉矶，于2015年去世。
foreignization: 劳拉·费尔里正在执导这部纪录片传记片，该片由《寻找糖人》和《九月的一天》的制作公司Passion Pictures的约翰·巴特塞克和莉齐·吉尔特制作。这部电影将记录世界上最畅销的小说家之一的旅程，她动荡的生活有时甚至超过了她在书中构思的香艳情节。《好莱坞妻子们》的编剧科林斯（原名Jacqueline但被称为Jackie），同时也是一名演员、编剧和制片人，于2015年去世，她在生命的最后几十年生活在洛杉矶。

source: The mildest item on our menu is to increase the amount of information on energy conservation available to the public . That means extending the energy labeling program to additional products , appliances , and services . New building construction increasingly is incorporating " green features " such as energy-saving motion detectors and multi-geared toilets . One restraint on this approach is that some of these standards are not economically attractive to the consumers who typically would have to pay a higher initial price when they purchase the mole energy efficient item . Offsetting savings occur as they use the product . However the " payback " segment can extend over a long period of time .

source: THE NIGHT AFTER THE Dallas show , Crow and band are with Blues Traveler in Austin , Texas , at a pretty outdoor venue called the Backyard . Crow 's friend Michael Ramos , a local musician who has performed with the BoDeans and Charlie Sexton , is sitting in with her band , playing accordion on " Strong Enough . " Backstage , Sexton , still a big star in these parts , holds court . Also present is a fan who has flown in from El Paso , Texas , to swap his early ' 60s Fender custom Telecaster for Crow 's brand-new -- but signed -- guitar .
domestication: 达拉斯演出后的那个晚上，克劳和她的乐队在奥斯汀与“蓝调旅行者”乐队汇合，演出地点是个风景优美的户外场地，叫后院。克劳的朋友迈克尔·拉莫斯，当地的一位音乐人，曾与波迪恩斯乐队和查理·塞克斯顿合作过，这次也加入了克劳的乐队，在《足够坚强》这首歌里演奏手风琴。后台，塞克斯顿依然是这里的明星人物，正坐着享受粉丝们的簇拥。还有一位从得克萨斯州的埃尔帕索专程飞来的乐迷，他想用自己的60年代早期的芬达定制电吉他换克劳的一把签名新款吉他。

source: A group of writers centered on Black Mask magazine forged hard-boiled fiction into something honest and vigorous ; of their number , Hammett and Chandler emerged to produce something that will pass for Art . Years after their passing we still write this sort of book better than anyone else . The French have an insatiable appetite for the roman noir and accord the work considerable critical respect-rather more , I sometimes think , than it truly deserves . But very few of the hard-boiled crime novels published in France are homegrown .
domestication: 以《黑面具》杂志为中心的一群作家，将硬汉小说锤炼得既真诚又有力；其中的汉密特和钱德勒更是脱颖而出，创作出了堪称艺术的作品。多年过去，我们依然写这类书比谁都强。法国人对黑色小说有着无尽的热情，还给予了相当高的评价——有时我甚至觉得有点儿过誉了。但法国出版的硬汉侦探小说中，真正本土作品却寥寥无几。
foreignization: 一群以《黑面具》杂志为中心的作家将硬汉小说锻造成了某种诚实而有力的东西；其中，哈梅特和钱德勒脱颖而出，创作出了可以被称为艺术的作品。多年后，我们仍然比任何人都更擅长写这类书。法国人对黑色小说有着无尽的热爱，并给予这些作品相当高的批评尊重——有时我心想，这比它们真正应得的还要多。但在法国出版的硬汉犯罪小说中，很少有本土创作的。

But very few of the hard-boiled crime novels published in France are homegrown .

source: June 26 , 1999 , was a momentous day in the history of the internet of things , though the phrase itself had only barely been born . Twenty years ago , an artificial intelligence system named " Pat " revolutionized , and then terrorized , the lives of the Cooper family in the Disney Channel Original Movie Smart House . For millennials like me , these movies were a classic part of tweendom and still hold a fond place in our hearts .
domestication: 1999年6月26日，这天在物联网的历史上是个大日子，尽管“物联网”这个词当时才刚诞生不久。二十年前，一个叫“帕特”的人工智能系统在迪士尼频道原创电影《智能屋》中彻底改变了库珀一家的生活，但也给他们带来了不小的麻烦。像我这样的千禧一代，这些电影是我们青少年时期的经典回忆，至今仍让人怀念不已。

source: Typical is the recent rash of antitakeover laws corporations marshaled through legislatures in Indiana , Massachusetts , Ohio , New York , Wyoming and other states . Free-market conservatives denounce these laws as unwarranted government intrusions allowing corporate executives to escape the consequences of their own mismanagement . Thus , when Pennsylvania in April passed the toughest antitakeover law in the nation , Forbes magazine dubbed it " Socialism , Pennsylvania Style , " failing to mention that the law 's sponsor , Pennsylvania State Senator Noah Wenger , is a conservative Republican . Ideology counts for little when state legislators are struggling to keep jobs at home .
domestication: 最近，印第安纳、马萨诸塞、俄亥俄、纽约、怀俄明等州的企业联手通过了一系列反收购法，这已经司空见惯了。自由市场保守派痛斥这些法律，认为这是政府无端干涉，让企业高管逃脱因管理不善而应承担的后果。因此，当宾夕法尼亚州在四月通过了全国最严格的反收购法时，《福布斯》杂志将其称为“宾夕法尼亚式的社会主义”，却没提该法律的发起人、宾夕法尼亚州参议员诺亚·温格是个保守派共和党人。当州议员们努力想保住本地的工作机会时，意识形态就显得无足轻重了。
foreignization: 典型的例子是最近在印第安纳州、马萨诸塞州、俄亥俄州、纽约州、怀俄明州和其他州通过的反收购法律。自由市场保守派谴责这些法律是不正当的政府干预，使企业高管能够逃避自己管理不善的后果。因此，当宾夕法尼亚州在4月通过了全国最严格的反收购法律时，《福布斯》杂志将其称为“宾夕法尼亚式的社会主义”，没有提到该法律的发起人，宾夕法尼亚州参议员诺亚·温格，是一位保守的共和党人。当州立法者努力将工作岗位留在本地时，意识形态就显得无关紧要了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Typical is the recent rash of antitakeover laws corporations marshaled through legislatures in Indiana , Massachusetts , Ohio , New York , Wyoming and other states . Free-market conservatives denounce these laws as unwarranted government intrusions allowing corporate executives to escape the consequences of their own mismanagement . Thus , when Pennsylvania in April passed the toughest antitakeover law in the nation , Forbes magazine dubbed it " Socialism , Pennsylvania Style , " failing to mention that the law 's sponsor , Pennsylvania State Senator Noah Wenger , is a conservative Republican . Ideology counts for little when state legislators are struggling to keep jobs at home .

source: We all know there 's a whole lot of theatrics involved in putting on a fashion show . Although I marvel at the makeup artistry , I am often left wondering . Who is going to wear that ? When I posed the question to MAC 's artistic team , who created 201 makeup styles for shows in New York , London , Paris and Milan , Senior Artist Fatima Thomas knew exactly what I meant . Here 's her advice on what to keep , what to dial down and what 's better left on the runway ,

source: In 2006 , Donald Trump made plans to purchase the Menie Estate , near Aberdeen , Scotland , aiming to convert the dunes and grassland into a luxury golf resort . He and the estate 's owner , Tom Griffin , sat down to discuss the transaction at the Cock & Bull restaurant . Griffin recalls that Trump was a hard-nosed negotiator , reluctant to give in on even the tiniest details . But , as Michael D'Antonio writes in his recent biography of Trump , Never Enough , Griffin 's most vivid recollection of the evening pertains to the theatrics . It was as if the golden-haired guest sitting across the table were an actor playing a part on the London stage .
domestication: 2006年，唐纳德·特朗普打算买下苏格兰阿伯丁附近的梅尼庄园，想把那里的沙丘和草地变成一个豪华高尔夫度假村。他和庄园的主人汤姆·格里芬在一家叫“公鸡与牛”的餐厅坐下来谈这笔交易。格里芬回忆说，特朗普是个硬邦邦的谈判高手，连最小的细节都不肯让步。不过，迈克尔·丹托尼奥在他最近写的特朗普传记《永远不够》中提到，格里芬对那天晚上的最深刻印象却是特朗普的表演。坐在桌子对面的金发客人，就像在伦敦舞台上表演的演员一样。

source: Students and faculty members used to be willing to take controversial positions because the risks were relatively modest . After all , one could say something provocative , and the statement soon disappeared from view . But now , every comment you make can be circulated to the world and called up with a click by prospective employers or graduate schools or neighbors .
domestication: 以前，师生们愿意发表一些争议性的观点，因为风险相对较小。毕竟，说些出格的话，很快就没人记得了。可是现在不一样了，你每说一句话，都能被传遍全球，未来雇主、研究生院或是邻居只要点一点鼠标就能看到。
foreignization: 学生和教职员工过去愿意采取有争议的立场，因为风险相对较小。毕竟，可以说一些挑衅的话，而这些话很快就会从人们的视线中消失。但现在，你所说的每一句话都可以被传播到全世界，并且未来的雇主、研究生院或邻居只需点击一下就可以调出来。

source: Financial Industrial Income . In contrast to United , which gets most of its income from stock dividends , $550 million Industrial Income relies heavily on bonds as well to generate yield . Manager John Kaweske , 48 , the no-load 's pilot since 1985 , currently has 20% of the equity-income fund in conventional corporates and convertibles , including 6% in high-yield issues . That has helped boost the fund 's yield to 4% , compared with 3.5% for the S &P.;
domestication: 金融产业收益。与联合公司主要靠股票分红赚钱不同，工业收益的5.5亿美元资金更依赖债券来产生收益。基金经理约翰·卡韦斯基，今年48岁，自1985年起就掌舵这只无管理费基金。目前，他将这只股债混合基金的20%投资于传统公司债和可转债，其中高收益债券占了6%。这帮助基金的收益率提升到了4%，而标普500指数的收益率仅为3.5%。
foreignization: 金融产业收入。与联合公司主要从股票股息中获得大部分收入不同，5.5亿美元的产业收入基金严重依赖债券来产生收益。自1985年以来一直管理这只无负荷基金的48岁经理约翰·卡韦斯基目前将该股权收益基金的20%投资于传统公司债和可转换债券，其中6%投资于高收益债券。这有助于将基金的收益率提高到4%，而标准普尔的收益率为3.5%。

source: What did Hirohito really think of Pearl Harbor ? On the 50th anniversary of the Japanese attack that brought the US into the Second World War , Herbert Bix offers a provocative reassessment of the Showa Emperor 's responsibility for the conflict , drawing on his translations from diaries and memoirs of Hirohito and his court circle .

source: Who is the biggest winner ? The most improbable development has been the transformation of Regis Philbin into a folk hero . " Reege " is n't the butt of jokes like his morning co-star Kathie Lee Gifford ; instead , he has become our national avuncular enabler , shepherding contestants ( and viewers , by proxy ) through the emotional ups and downs of the winning process . Unlike Chris Tarrant , the British show 's host , " Philbin is very much on the side of the contestant , " says Davies . ( Tarrant , on the other hand , " will absolutely torture them . " )
domestication: 谁是最大的赢家呢？最出乎意料的是雷吉斯·菲尔宾变成了民间英雄。“里吉”不像他的晨间节目搭档凯蒂·李·吉福德那样常被人取笑；相反，他成了我们全国人民心中的好叔叔，带着参赛者（还有电视机前的观众）经历赢得比赛过程中的喜怒哀乐。和英国版节目的主持人克里斯·塔伦特不一样，菲尔宾完全是站在参赛者这边的，戴维斯说。（而塔伦特呢，可真是会折磨人。）
foreignization: 谁是最大的赢家？最出人意料的发展是雷吉斯·菲尔宾变成了民间英雄。“里奇”并没有像他的晨间节目搭档凯西·李·吉福德那样成为笑柄；相反，他成为了我们的国家叔父般的支持者，带领参赛者（以及代入感强烈的观众）经历赢得比赛过程中的情感起伏。与英国版节目的主持人克里斯·塔伦特不同，“菲尔宾非常站在参赛者这一边，”戴维斯说。（相比之下，塔伦特“绝对会折磨他们。”）

source: The shack I was to call home for the summer had a single room with 23 windows . The fire finder , a heavy platform with a map and a revolving scope , sat in the center of the room . All the furniture -- cot , cupboards , table , oil stove , and fridge -- was at crouch level so nothing would obstruct the view . Heavy cables secured the shack , none too securely , to the mountain .
domestication: 夏天我住的那间小屋只有一个房间，却有23扇窗户。屋子正中间放着一个沉重的平台，上面有地图和旋转望远镜，那是用来找火情的。家具都是矮矮的，床、柜子、桌子、煤油炉、冰箱，全是蹲下来就能用的高度，免得挡了视线。小屋用粗重的缆绳拴在山上，但看起来也不怎么牢固。
foreignization: 我整个夏天要住的小屋只有一间带23扇窗户的房间。房间中央放着一台火情探测器，一个装有地图和旋转望远镜的重型平台。所有家具——床铺、橱柜、桌子、油炉和冰箱——都位于蹲伏高度，这样就不会妨碍视线。粗重的电缆将小屋固定在山上，但并不十分牢固。

All the furniture -- cot , cupboards , table , oil stove , and fridge -- was at crouch level so nothing would obstruct the view . Heavy cables secured the shack , none too securely , to the mountain .
夏天我住的那间小屋只有一个房间，却有23扇窗户。屋子正中间放着一个沉重的平台，上面有地图和旋转望远镜，那是用来找火情的。家具都是矮矮的，床、柜子、桌子、煤油炉、冰箱，全是蹲下来就能用的高度，免得挡了视线。小屋用粗重的缆绳拴在山上，但看起来也不怎么牢固。

source: The spartan look of Bazille 's studio was probably typical of 19th-century ateliers , especially those of younger artists who were not yet established or financially secure , but it was not the ideal . For successful mainstream artists and those who wanted to join their ranks , an elaborately decorated studio was considered necessary to convey an appropriately dignified atmosphere . The exotic bric-a-brac that went into these showplaces produced an aesthetic totality composed of expressive colors , rich textures , deep shadows , and brilliant highlights . Because these were the favorite formal qualities of 19th-century Academic painting , a studio decorated in such a fashion was both an advertisement of good taste and a well-stocked warehouse of potential subject matter .
domestication: 巴齐尔的工作室简朴得近乎寒酸，这在19世纪的画室中相当常见，尤其是那些尚未成名或经济条件不宽裕的年轻艺术家。但这可不是什么理想状态。对于成功的主流艺术家以及那些渴望加入他们行列的人来说，装饰华丽的工作室才是必须的，这样才能营造出一种恰当的庄重氛围。这些展示空间里堆满了异国情调的小玩意儿，形成了一种由丰富色彩、细腻质感、深邃阴影和耀眼高光构成的整体美感。由于这些都是19世纪学院派绘画最钟爱的形式元素，所以这样布置的工作室不仅展现了良好的品味，还像是一个充满潜在创作题材的宝库。
foreignization: 巴齐尔工作室的简朴外观可能是19世纪画室的典型特征，特别是那些尚未建立声誉或经济上还没有保障的年轻艺术家的工作室，但这并不是理想的状态。对于成功的主流艺术家以及那些希望加入他们行列的人来说，一间装饰华丽的工作室被认为是必要的，以营造出适当的庄重氛围。这些展示场所中的异国情调小饰品产生了一种由表现力丰富的色彩、质感丰富的材料、深邃的阴影和耀眼的高光组成的审美整体。因为这些正是19世纪学院派绘画所钟爱的形式特征，所以以这种方式装饰的工作室既是一种良好品味的广告，也是一个充满潜在主题素材的丰富仓库。

The exotic bric-a-brac that went into these showplaces produced an aesthetic totality composed of expressive colors , rich textures , deep shadows , and brilliant highlights . Because these were the favorite formal qualities of 19th-century Academic painting , a studio decorated in such a fashion was both an advertisement of good taste and a well-stocked warehouse of potential subject matter .

source: But there are notable differences between coyotes in Yellowstone and those in other parts of the West , where they are targets of government trappers who , to keep land safe for livestock , poison them , shoot them from airplanes , and dig up their dens to kill their pups . In natural areas like Yellowstone , researchers have found an annual average of two to three newborn pups per territory , while exploited populations generally average about five to eight per territory . That means that in areas where coyotes are hunted heavily , they reproduce more quickly to repopulate vacant domains .
domestication: 但是，黄石公园的土狼和其他西部地区的土狼之间存在显著差异。在其他地方，土狼成了政府猎捕的目标，为了保护牲畜的安全，人们会下毒、从飞机上射击，甚至挖开它们的巢穴杀死幼崽。而在像黄石这样的自然区域，研究者发现每个领地每年平均只有两到三只新生幼崽，而在被大量捕杀的地区，这个数字通常达到五到八只。这说明，在猎杀频繁的地方，土狼繁殖得更快，以填补空缺的领地。
foreignization: 但是，黄石公园的土狼与其他西部地区（在那里，土狼是政府猎人捕捉的目标，为了保护牲畜安全，他们用毒药毒死土狼、从飞机上射杀它们，以及挖开它们的洞穴杀死幼崽）的土狼之间存在显著差异。在像黄石公园这样的自然区域，研究人员发现每片领地每年平均有两到三只新生幼崽，而被开发区域的土狼通常平均每片领地有五到八只幼崽。这意味着，在土狼被大量捕猎的地区，它们会更快地繁殖以重新填充空缺的领地。

source: EXACTLY A YEAR FROM NOW THE WORLD WILL BE MARKING THE FIVE HUNDREDTH ANNIVERSARY OF THE SINGLE MOST IMPORTANT EVENT OF THE PAST MILLENNIUM . THE ZEAL OF ONE MAN BROUGHT ABOUT THAT EVENT , AND HIS NAME AND TALK OF HIS ACHIEVEMENTS WILL BE OMNIPRESENT . HERE , THEN , IS A COLUMBUS CATECHISM TO HELP YOU THROUGH THE MONTHS AHEAD : WAS HE REALLY THE FIRST ? IF HE SAILED FOR SPAIN , WHY DO ITALIANS MAKE SUCH A FUSS ABOUT HIS BIRTHDAY ? HOW COME AMERICA IS N'T NAMED FOR HIM ? WHY IS HE BEING CALLED A VILLAIN NOW ? DID COLUMBUS DISCOVER THE NEW WORLD ?
domestication: 再过一年，全世界将纪念过去一千年中最重要的事件——五百周年。这件事因一个人的热忱而发生，他的名字和他的丰功伟绩将会无处不在。那么，为了帮助你应对接下来的几个月，这里有一个哥伦布小问答：他真的是第一个发现新大陆的人吗？既然他是为西班牙出航，为什么意大利人还这么重视他的生日？为什么美洲没有以他的名字命名？现在为什么有人称他为恶棍？哥伦布真的发现了新世界吗？
foreignization: 正好从现在起一年后，世界将纪念过去一千年中最重要的单一事件的五百周年。这一事件是由一个人的热情所促成的，他的名字和他的成就将会无所不在。因此，这里有一个哥伦布教义问答，以帮助你度过即将到来的几个月：他真的是第一个吗？如果他为西班牙航行，为什么意大利人要如此大肆庆祝他的生日？为什么美国没有以他的名字命名？为什么现在他被称作恶棍？哥伦布是否发现了新大陆？

再过一年，全世界将纪念过去一千年中最重要的事件——五百周年。这件事因一个人的热忱而发生，他的名字和他的丰功伟绩将会无处不在。那么，为了帮助你应对接下来的几个月，这里有一个哥伦布小问答：他真的是第一个发现新大陆的人吗？既然他是为西班牙出航，为什么意大利人还这么重视他的生日？为什么美洲没有以他的名字命名？现在为什么有人称他为恶棍？哥伦布真的发现了新世界吗？

source: Prison reform . For years , prison officials have begged lawmakers to expand prison industries , which put convicts to work making everything from license plates to circuit boards . Taxpayers , they argue , gain when prisoners pay for some of their own upkeep . So do inmates , who learn skills while earning pocket money - part of which can be docked for child support or victims ' compensation . Guards and wardens benefit , too , because boredom and idleness among convicts invite trouble .
domestication: 监狱改革。多年来，监狱官员一直央求立法者扩大监狱产业，让囚犯从事从制作车牌到电路板的各种工作。他们认为，纳税人从中受益，因为囚犯可以分担自己的部分生活费用。囚犯也能从中获益，不仅赚点零花钱，还能学到技能，其中一部分收入还可以用于支付子女抚养费或赔偿受害者。狱警和典狱长也受益匪浅，因为囚犯无所事事容易惹是生非。

source: We were told that the sole purpose of Brezhnev 's military buildup was to achieve parity with the U.S. , an objective that was justified because Russia had so often been the victim of foreign invasion . In expanding its influence in the less developed countries , the USSR , it was said , was only doing what the U.S. had done in the past ; as George Kennan observed , it was absurd to think that the Soviets could ignore the pleas of fraternal socialist regimes given their position as leader of the world Communist movement .
domestication: 我们被告知，勃列日涅夫军事扩张的唯一目的就是与美国达到均势，这个目标是正当的，因为俄罗斯历史上多次遭受外国入侵。在扩展对不发达国家的影响时，苏联只不过是重复了美国过去的做法；正如乔治·凯南所观察到的，作为世界共产主义运动的领头羊，苏联不可能忽视那些兄弟社会主义国家的求助呼声。
foreignization: 我们被告知，勃列日涅夫军事扩张的唯一目的是与美国实现均势，这一目标是合理的，因为俄罗斯曾多次遭受外国入侵。在扩大其在不发达国家的影响时，据说苏联只是做了美国过去做过的事情；正如乔治·凯南所观察到的，认为苏联可以忽视兄弟社会主义政权的呼吁是荒谬的，鉴于其作为世界共产主义运动领导者的地位。

source: White Houses can be dangerous places under leadership that does not respect the law . When friends ask me , " Should I accept a job under President Trump ? " it 's not merely a philosophical question . Answer the question wrong , and they may find themselves two or three years later facing a congressional investigation or possibly even a grand jury . Even those who never face charges -- let alone conviction -- can see their lives up-ended : As the saying goes , in Washington , the process is the punishment .
domestication: 白宫在不尊重法律的领导下，确实是个危险的地方。朋友问我：“我该不该去特朗普总统手下工作？”这可不只是个哲学问题。答错了，过个两三年，他们可能会发现自己被国会调查，甚至可能面对大陪审团。就算从未被起诉——更别提定罪了——生活也可能被搞得一团糟。俗话说得好，在华盛顿，过程就是惩罚。
foreignization: 白宫在不尊重法律的领导下可能会变得危险。当朋友们问我，“我应该接受特朗普总统手下的工作吗？”这不仅仅是一个哲学问题。回答错误，他们可能在两三年后发现自己面临国会调查，甚至可能是大陪审团的审查。即使那些从未面临指控——更不用说定罪的人——也可能会看到自己的生活被颠覆：正如俗话说的，在华盛顿，程序本身就是惩罚。

source: Bailing out . It was n't just college grads taking the money and running . A whole league of plant workers who were nearing retirement called it quits . These included a group of German immigrants who had arrived in Rochester after World War II , tool-and-die men who had worked on the machinery within the company 's centerpiece , Kodak Park . " There were people who knew the nuts and bolts of the operation and had been there 25 years , and they all left , " says Craig Erickson , a retired quality-control manager . " Waste levels and inefficiency and customer complaints ran out of control for a year and a half . "
domestication: 纷纷跳船了。不只是大学毕业生拿钱走人，一帮快退休的工厂工人也撒手不干了。这其中还包括一群二战后来到罗切斯特的德国移民，他们是模具工，负责公司核心——柯达公园里的机器维护。“那些对操作了如指掌、干了25年的人全走了，”退休的质量控制经理克雷格·埃里克森说，“结果呢，浪费、低效和客户投诉像脱缰的野马，一年多都收不住。”

" Waste levels and inefficiency and customer complaints ran out of control for a year and a half . "

source: Thus began a gloomy voyage in a modest fleet of four caravels . He sailed past islands already discovered but found no strait . He believed -- correctly -- that he was on an isthmus between the waters but had neither the men nor the supplies to push through the jungles that separated him from becoming the discoverer of the Pacific .
domestication: 于是，一场阴郁的航行开始了，他率领着一支由四艘小船组成的舰队出发了。沿途经过了一些已知的岛屿，却始终未能找到那条通往新世界的海峡。他确信自己正位于两片水域之间的地峡上，但既没有人手也没有足够的补给，无法穿越那片将他与太平洋发现者之名隔开的密林。

Thus began a gloomy voyage in a modest fleet of four caravels . He sailed past islands already discovered but found no strait . He believed -- correctly -- that he was on an isthmus between the waters but had neither the men nor the supplies to push through the jungles that separated him from becoming the discoverer of the Pacific .
于是，他开始了在四艘小帆船组成的 modest fleet 中的阴郁航行。他经过了已经发现的岛屿，但没有找到海峡。他相信——正确地相信——自己处于水域之间的地峡上，但由于人员和补给不足，无法穿越将他与成为太平洋发现者之隔开的丛林。

source: George : Portrait of a Serial Killer -- One AIDS Death Every Six Minutes . " So read a recent cover of the " gay/lesbian/bisexual newspaper " The San Francisco Bay Times , that featured the official presidential portrait of George Bush . Actually , one AIDS death every six minutes would come out to about 88,000 deaths . Despite early government projections of 45,000 to 57,000 AIDS deaths this year , the actual number will probably be about 30,000 .

source: PHOTO ( BLACK &; WHITE ) : One of the two woodcuts in the first illustrated edition of Columbus 's letter describing his voyage , published in Basel in 1493 , showed La Navidad , the first European colony in the New World . source: The Allez will go fast when pushed , but its 20.4-pound weight means it will never be the quickest bike on the shop ride . Despite that , it is a surprisingly competent climber , owing at least in part to the low gearing of the SRAM Apex group . The compact crank ( 52/36 ) is paired with a 12-28 cassette . It 's not the lowest gear available with Apex , but it was easy enough to let me spin up steep climbs that would have had me out of the saddle on standard gearing .
domestication: 推起来，Allez这车确实快，但20.4磅的重量让它在店里试骑时永远不是最快的那一个。尽管如此，它的爬坡能力却出人意料地强，这要归功于SRAM Apex套件的低齿比。紧凑型牙盘（52/36）搭配12-28飞轮，虽然不是Apex能提供的最低齿比，但让我轻松应对陡坡，要是换成普通齿比，我早就得站起来踩踏了。
foreignization: Allez在被推动时会很快，但其20.4磅的重量意味着它永远不会成为商店骑行中最快的自行车。尽管如此，它是一个令人惊讶的有能力的爬坡者，这至少部分归功于SRAM Apex组件的低齿比。紧凑型曲柄（52/36）与12-28飞轮搭配。这不是Apex可用的最低齿比，但足够容易让我在陡峭的爬坡上轻松旋转，而在标准齿比下我可能已经离鞍了。

source: Musicians , scholars and collectors from around the world visit the Smithsonian to conduct research and examine and play our instruments , joining us in live performances . source: Most coyote studies have reported roughly one inadvertent death for every 20 animals captured . But after more than 200 captures , Crabtree has not recorded a single death in Yellowstone or during his other studies of coyotes at California 's Mono Lake and Washington 's Hanford Nuclear Reservation .

source: " When we took the enzymes from bacteria and applied them to the fungi , we found that they worked in the same way on the fungi biofilm ; which was surprising , " says the study 's co-principal investigator , Dr. P. Lynne Howell , who is also a professor in the Department of Biochemistry at the University of Toronto . " What 's key is that this approach could be a universal way of being able to leverage the microbes ' own systems for degrading biofilms . This has bigger implications across many microbes , diseases , and infections . "
domestication: 研究的共同负责人、多伦多大学生物化学系教授P.琳恩·豪威尔博士说：“当我们从细菌中提取酶并应用到真菌上时，发现这些酶对真菌生物膜的作用方式相同，这让我们感到意外。”她接着说，“关键在于，这种方法可能是一种通用手段，利用微生物自身的系统来降解生物膜。这一发现的影响不仅限于此，还可能广泛应用于多种微生物、疾病和感染的治疗。”
foreignization: “当我们从细菌中提取酶并将其应用于真菌时，我们发现这些酶在真菌生物膜上以相同的方式起作用；这令人感到意外，”该研究的共同主要研究者、多伦多大学生物化学系教授P. Lynne Howell博士说。“关键在于，这种方法可能是一种能够利用微生物自身系统降解生物膜的通用方法。这在许多微生物、疾病和感染方面具有更广泛的影响。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" When we took the enzymes from bacteria and applied them to the fungi , we found that they worked in the same way on the fungi biofilm ; which was surprising , " says the study 's co-principal investigator , Dr. P. Lynne Howell , who is also a professor in the Department of Biochemistry at the University of Toronto . " What 's key is that this approach could be a universal way of being able to leverage the microbes ' own systems for degrading biofilms . This has bigger implications across many microbes , diseases , and infections . "

" What 's key is that this approach could be a universal way of being able to leverage the microbes ' own systems for degrading biofilms . This has bigger implications across many microbes , diseases , and infections . "
“当我们从细菌中提取酶并将其应用于真菌时，我们发现这些酶在真菌生物膜上以相同的方式起作用；这令人感到意外，”该研究的共同主要研究者、多伦多大学生物化学系教授P. Lynne Howell博士说。“关键在于，这种方法可能是一种能够利用微生物自身系统降解生物膜的通用方法。这在许多微生物、疾病和感染方面具有更广泛的影响。”

source: > Animal shelters often have puppies or young dogs . Quality shelters are more than just adoption centers . They are also places that offer obedience and puppy socialization classes and provide handouts on behavior and training tips . Major pet supply stores often donate space in their stores so that shelters can showcase their adoptable puppies and alert customers about area veterinary clinics . These stores are not , however , in the business of selling puppies . Healthy Puppy Checklist

source: BST fossils from the Ediacaran usually fall into two categories : multicellular algae , like seaweed , and fossils that are extremely difficult to classify , often the remains of extinct types of organisms . Consequently , Dornbos said , determining exactly what is preserved in Ediacaran fossil deposits can be hotly contested .
domestication: 埃迪卡拉纪的BST化石通常分为两类：一类是多细胞藻类，比如海藻；另一类则是极难分类的化石，往往是已经灭绝生物的遗骸。因此，多恩博斯说，要确定埃迪卡拉纪化石层中保存的具体是什么，常常会引起激烈的争论。
foreignization: 埃迪卡拉纪的BST化石通常分为两类：多细胞藻类，如海藻，以及极难分类的化石，通常是已灭绝生物类型的遗骸。因此，Dornbos说，确定埃迪卡拉纪化石沉积物中保存的确切内容可能引发激烈争议。

source: The way to encourage high-tech industry to move to Kentucky -- or any other state -- is not to disparage Voltaire and Camus . Rather the goal should be to build a topflight state educational system and ease the way financially for students from even the most humble backgrounds to attend . The jobs will follow -- whether they be in state government or in social media start-ups .
domestication: 要想吸引高科技产业落户肯塔基州——或者其他任何州——靠诋毁伏尔泰和加缪是行不通的。关键是要打造一流的州立教育体系，还要让家境贫寒的学生也能负担得起学费。这样，工作机会自然就会随之而来，无论是政府职位还是社交媒体初创企业的岗位。
foreignization: 鼓励高科技产业迁往肯塔基州——或任何其他州——的方法不是诋毁伏尔泰和加缪。而是应该建立一流的州教育系统，并在经济上为即使是最 humble 背景的学生提供便利，使他们能够入学。工作机会将会随之而来——无论是在州政府还是在社交媒体初创企业。

source: Last May , a group of Boeing workers at a South Carolina facility successfully voted in favor of unionizing with the International Association of Machinists and Aerospace Workers -- a move the company called " the death knell for manufacturing facilities like Boeing South Carolina , " and quickly moved to challenge on the basis of its legality . While Boeing takes its gripe to the National Labor Relations Board , the unit remains in limbo , much like Boeing 's own fleet of grounded 737 MAX aircraft .
domestication: 去年五月，南卡罗来纳州的一群波音工人成功投票加入了国际机械师和航空航天工人协会——这一举动被公司称为“波音南卡罗来纳工厂的丧钟”，并迅速以合法性为由提出挑战。波音公司在向全国劳资关系委员会申诉期间，这个工会处于悬而未决的状态，就像波音自家那批停飞的737 MAX飞机一样，前途未卜。
foreignization: 去年五月，南卡罗来纳州一家波音工厂的一群工人成功投票支持与国际机械师和航空航天工人协会结盟——公司称此举为“波音南卡罗来纳工厂等制造设施的丧钟”，并迅速基于其合法性提出挑战。当波音将其不满提交给国家劳资关系委员会时，该部门仍处于不确定状态，就像波音自身停飞的737 MAX机队一样。

Last May , a group of Boeing workers at a South Carolina facility successfully voted in favor of unionizing with the International Association of Machinists and Aerospace Workers -- a move the company called " the death knell for manufacturing facilities like Boeing South Carolina , " and quickly moved to challenge on the basis of its legality . While Boeing takes its gripe to the National Labor Relations Board , the unit remains in limbo , much like Boeing 's own fleet of grounded 737 MAX aircraft .

source: Ron Unz has been the most creative in arguing this case , which goes roughly as follows : Hispanic immigrants are hardworking and enterprising people , also socially conservative , and thus natural Republicans . If in recent years in California they have voted heavily Democratic , that is because in 1994 Gov . Pete Wilson and the grass-roots organizers of Proposition 187 ( which prohibited the use of non-emergency social services by illegal aliens ) fought a bitter anti-immigrant campaign . That saddled the California GOP with a reputation of hostility to Hispanic-Americans . As a result , Latino support for the GOP has fallen to the low 20s in polls .
domestication: 罗恩·昂兹在论证这个问题时最有创意，大意如下：拉丁裔移民勤劳能干，性格保守，是共和党的天然盟友。近年来，他们在加利福尼亚州却大量投票给民主党，这主要是因为1994年时任州长的皮特·威尔逊和提案187的草根组织者（该提案禁止非法移民使用非紧急社会服务）搞了一场激烈的反移民运动。这一举动让加州共和党背上了敌视拉丁裔美国人的名声。因此，民调显示，拉丁裔对共和党的支持率已跌至20%左右。
foreignization: Ron Unz 在论证这个观点时最为富有创造性，其论点大致如下：拉丁裔移民是勤劳且有进取心的人，同时在社会问题上也较为保守，因此是天生的共和党支持者。如果近年来他们在加利福尼亚州大量投票给民主党，那是因为在1994年，时任州长皮特·威尔逊和187号提案（禁止非法移民使用非紧急社会服务）的草根组织者展开了一场激烈的反移民运动。这使得加州共和党背上了对拉丁裔美国人不友好的名声。因此，在民调中，拉丁裔对共和党的支持率已降至20%左右。

source: Perhaps what Tiger Woods needs is a bit more gratitude and fewer lame statements like " pure joy " and " at this point being a good father is more important ... than being a great golfer " ( April 9 ) . Give me a break . I was glad to read Butch Harmon 's candid thoughts about his former swing-prodigy pupil : " When he controls his temper , it may be good for his image , but I do n't think it 's good for his golf . "

Perhaps what Tiger Woods needs is a bit more gratitude and fewer lame statements like " pure joy " and " at this point being a good father is more important ... than being a great golfer " ( April 9 ) . Give me a break . I was glad to read Butch Harmon 's candid thoughts about his former swing-prodigy pupil : " When he controls his temper , it may be good for his image , but I do n't think it 's good for his golf . "
也许老虎伍兹需要的是一点更多的感激之情，而不是像“纯粹的快乐”和“在这个时候做一个好父亲比做一个伟大的高尔夫球手更重要……”（4月9日）这样的无力言论。拜托了。我很高兴读到布奇·哈蒙对他昔日挥杆神童学生的坦率想法：“当他控制住脾气时，这可能对他的形象有好处，但我不认为这对他的高尔夫有益。”

source: It should n't be surprising that climate change will produce some winners . After all , roofers in south Florida cleaned up after Hurricane Andrew , as do construction crews in California after earthquakes . But climate change will almost surely bring more losers than winners . Some losers will be able to buy a reprieve -- New England ski-resort owners , faced with a shorter season , can dump man-made snow on their slopes , and governments can take steps to control tropical diseases , whose spread depends as much on public-health measures as on where pests can live . But such adaptations are expensive . And you ca n't write a check to bring back melted glaciers . The debate in Kyoto will focus on how much it will cost the world 's economies to burn less coal , oil and gas . Now scientists are coming to understand who will lose if we do n't .
domestication: 气候变暖带来赢家并不奇怪。毕竟，佛罗里达南部的屋顶工人在安德鲁飓风后赚得盆满钵满，加州的建筑队在地震后也是一样。但是，气候变化肯定会制造更多的输家。有些输家还能花钱买个缓兵之计——新英格兰的滑雪场老板面对缩短的雪季，可以在山坡上撒人造雪；政府也可以采取措施控制热带疾病，这些疾病的传播不仅取决于害虫能活在哪里，还取决于公共卫生措施。但这些适应措施都很烧钱。而且你不可能写张支票就把融化的冰川买回来。京都会议将围绕减少煤炭、石油和天然气燃烧对世界经济成本的影响展开讨论。现在科学家们开始明白，如果我们不这样做，谁会输得更惨。

source: Jessica is among scores of Wilmington students who 've been taught entrepreneurship at a tender age by an extraordinary elementary-school teacher , Ronni Cohen . For almost a quarter of a century , " Miss Cohen " -- this year 's Entrepreneurship Educator of the Year -- has been enlightening fourth graders about economic concepts such as scarcity , opportunity costs , and profit , and even about the intricacies of the Federal Reserve and the U.S. currency systems .
domestication: 杰西卡是威尔明顿众多学生中的一员，这些孩子在年幼时就受到一位非凡的小学老师罗尼·科恩的创业教育。近二十五年来，“科恩小姐”——今年的年度创业教育家——一直在给四年级的学生讲解诸如稀缺性、机会成本和利润等经济概念，甚至包括联邦储备系统和美国货币体系的复杂细节。科恩小姐让学生们从小就明白了这些大道理，真可谓是桃李满天下。

source: It 's just milk with a bit of yogurt stirred in , which , after several hours of sitting around , turns all the milk into yogurt . Not only is making yogurt easy , it 's good for you too , full of probiotic bacteria ( aka live cultures ) , thought to encourage healthy digestion . And you can customize it , making it as mild ortangyasyou like .
domestication: 这就是牛奶里加点酸奶搅一搅，放上几个小时，整桶牛奶就变成酸奶了。做酸奶既简单又对身体好，里面富含益生菌，也就是活菌，据说能促进消化。而且还可以根据自己的口味来调整，想做得淡一点或者酸一点都行。
foreignization: 这只是牛奶里加入一点酸奶搅拌，经过几小时的放置，会把所有的牛奶都变成酸奶。制作酸奶不仅简单，而且对你也有好处，富含益生菌（又称活性菌群），被认为可以促进健康消化。而且你可以根据自己的喜好定制，让它变得既温和又酸爽。

source: The phrase Mundus Novus ( New World ) was coined by a Venetian printer in 1504 . He lit on it as a title for a letter written by the Florentine explorer Amerigo Vespucci following the latter 's return from newly discovered Brazil . The phrase caught on . The revelation of an entirely unknown and inhabited world , credited to Vespucci , was far more sensational than Columbus 's report of a few islands and a new route to the Indies .
domestication: “新大陆”这个词是1504年一位威尼斯印刷商创造出来的。当时佛罗伦萨探险家亚美利哥·韦斯普奇从新发现的巴西归来后写了一封信，这位印刷商便给这封信起了个标题。这个称呼很快就流行起来了。因为据韦斯普奇透露，他发现了一个完全未知且有人居住的新世界，比哥伦布报告中提到的几个岛屿和通向印度的新航线要震撼得多。
foreignization: 短语“Mundus Novus”（新世界）是由一位威尼斯印刷工在1504年创造的。他为佛罗伦萨探险家亚美利哥·韦斯普奇从新发现的巴西归来后写的一封信选用了这个标题。这个短语流行了起来。据称由韦斯普奇揭示的一个完全未知且有人居住的世界远比哥伦布报告的几个岛屿和一条通往印度的新航线更为轰动。

The revelation of an entirely unknown and inhabited world , credited to Vespucci , was far more sensational than Columbus 's report of a few islands and a new route to the Indies .

source: But the findings , described in series of five papers in the Oct. 13 issue of the journal Science , are just the first steps at getting a better handle on the carbon cycle ( how carbon flows through land and sea ecosystems and the atmosphere ) , as OCO-2 heads into an expected extended mission and other space-based projects are scheduled to follow in its wake .  Luck and surprises
domestication: 但这一发现只是迈出的第一步，有关碳循环（碳如何在陆地、海洋生态系统和大气中流动）的研究才刚刚开始。10月13日，《科学》杂志发表了五篇相关论文，介绍了这些初步成果。随着OCO-2进入预期的延长任务，以及其他太空项目也将紧随其后，未来的路还长着呢。这事儿说不准，意外和惊喜都在后头。

source: The scale of the sea change can be observed at the Great Canadian Beaver-Eating Contest , at Burning Man , an event so popular that participants line up as if for a half-off sale . In the more discreet context of my survey , this enthusiasm was endorsed by the respondent who claimed that the only time he experienced " absolute contentment " was when his face was between his wife 's legs . He wished to make clear that he was not talking just about sex ; he meant in life generally .
domestication: 这次变革的规模可以从加拿大大型海狸吃大赛和火人节这样的活动上看出端倪。火人节人气爆棚，参加者排队的架势仿佛是去抢半价大促销。在我的调查中，这种热情得到了一位受访者的认同，他说自己唯一感受到“绝对满足”的时刻是当他脸贴在他妻子双腿之间的时候。他特别强调，这不仅仅是指性爱，而是指生活中的方方面面。
foreignization: 这种变化的规模可以在加拿大大型海狸食用大赛、火人节等活动中观察到，这些活动如此受欢迎，以至于参与者排起长队，就像在等待半价销售一样。在我的调查这一较为隐秘的背景下，一位受访者表示，他唯一一次体验到“绝对满足”是在他的脸位于妻子双腿之间的时候。他希望澄清，他所说的不仅仅是性；他指的是生活中的总体感受。

source: Greater fuel efficiency would lower petroleum use , and thus lower petroleum imports . This would make us less dependent on OPEC , would lower world oil prices , and would also lead to less domestic oil use , preserving our reserves . Better fuel economy would lead to less air pollution . For some people , more fuel-efficient cars represent an improvement in life style ; these cars would be less wasteful . Since stringent CAFE standards would increase the price of new cars , it would lead to fewer cars being sold and perhaps to less congestion .
domestication: 提高燃油效率可以减少石油消耗，进而降低石油进口量。这样我们对欧佩克的依赖就会减轻，世界油价也会随之下降，国内的石油使用也会减少，保存我们的资源。更好的燃油经济性还能减少空气污染。对一些人来说，更省油的汽车意味着生活方式的提升；这些车更节省。严格的燃油经济性标准虽然会推高新车价格，但可能会导致新车销量减少，或许还能缓解交通拥堵。
foreignization: 更高的燃料效率将降低石油使用量，从而减少石油进口。这将使我们对欧佩克的依赖减少，降低世界油价，并且也会导致国内石油使用量减少，保护我们的储备。更好的燃油经济性将导致空气污染减少。对一些人来说，更省油的汽车代表了生活方式的改善；这些汽车将更加节俭。由于严格的CAFE标准将提高新车的价格，这将导致销售的汽车减少，也许还会减少拥堵。

Greater fuel efficiency would lower petroleum use , and thus lower petroleum imports . This would make us less dependent on OPEC , would lower world oil prices , and would also lead to less domestic oil use , preserving our reserves . Better fuel economy would lead to less air pollution . For some people , more fuel-efficient cars represent an improvement in life style ; these cars would be less wasteful . Since stringent CAFE standards would increase the price of new cars , it would lead to fewer cars being sold and perhaps to less congestion .

source: There are days when you wish the mailman would mind his own business . At least that 's how you feel when he delivers the most unwelcome letter you 'll get all year . Shortly after the turmoil of meeting the April 15th federal income tax deadline , you could receive in the mail an official notification that Your name was selected ( along with about one million other Americans ) to be audited in 1992 .
domestication: 有时候真希望邮差能管好自己的事。特别是当他送来你一年中最不希望看到的信时，你肯定这么想。刚忙完4月15日的联邦所得税申报，心里还没踏实呢，就可能收到一封信，通知你被选中了，要接受审计。这倒霉的事，居然轮到自己头上，和你一样倒霉的还有大约一百万美国人。
foreignization: 有些日子你希望邮递员能管好自己的事。至少在收到一年中最不受欢迎的信时你会有这种感觉。在4月15日联邦所得税申报截止日期的混乱之后不久，你可能会收到一封正式通知，告知你的名字（连同其他大约一百万美国人）被选中在1992年接受审计。

source: Deadlines are a pain ; I know . As a writer , I 've been dealing with them for , well , let 's just say many years now . But those are easy . The deadlines that cause problems are those on the water , when we think we have to get somewhere by a certain time for a variety of reasons : our vacation is running out , we 're picking up or dropping off a crew member , we 're on a delivery , whatever .

Deadlines are a pain ; I know . As a writer , I 've been dealing with them for , well , let 's just say many years now . But those are easy . source: Sadly , that level of detail helps explain why the company ceased motorcycle production in 1955 . There is a lot of time-consuming handwork involved in a Vincent . They say the best ones were made before 1951 , because in later bikes , the dies tended to wear out in the stamping presses and the parts were n't as good . They were also expensive bikes , costing about $1200 when a Triumph twin was roughly $600 .
domestication: 可惜的是，正是这种精细的工艺解释了为什么公司在1955年停止了摩托车生产。制作一辆文森特摩托车需要大量的手工活，耗时费力。人们常说，最好的文森特是在1951年前生产的，因为后来的车型，冲压模具磨损严重，零件质量大不如前。这些车还特别贵，当时售价大约1200美元，而一台同样条件下的凯旋双缸车只卖600美元左右。
foreignization: 可悲的是，这种细节水平有助于解释为什么该公司在1955年停止了摩托车生产。Vincent摩托车上有很多耗时的手工工作。他们说最好的车型是在1951年之前制造的，因为在后来的车型中，冲压机上的模具趋于磨损，零件质量不如以前。这些车也很贵，当时售价约为1200美元，而一辆Triumph双缸摩托车的价格大约是600美元。

Sadly , that level of detail helps explain why the company ceased motorcycle production in 1955 . There is a lot of time-consuming handwork involved in a Vincent . They were also expensive bikes , costing about $1200 when a Triumph twin was roughly $600 .
